Motivation: 同行评审是学术出版的关键环节，但不断增加的投稿量给审稿人和编辑带来巨大压力。本研究旨在通过分析审稿意见中不同方面的情感与审稿时长的关系，为有针对性地修改稿件、提高审稿效率提供支持。

Method: 采用两阶段方法：首先从同行评审报告中提取细粒度方面，并使用情感分类模型确定每个方面的情感；其次分析方面级情感与审稿时长之间的相关性，并计算不同审稿轮次的情感得分以考察关系变化。

Result: 审稿情感与审稿时长呈弱但统计显著的负相关；其中"评估与结果"以及"影响与研究价值"方面的情感与审稿时长相关性更强；不同审稿轮次中方面级情感与审稿时长的关系存在显著差异。

Conclusion: 本研究将同行评审报告的文本内容与审稿过程的时间特征联系起来，识别出与审稿时长更相关的评审方面，为作者优先修订、审稿人和编辑提高审稿效率提供了证据，有助于减轻同行评审负担、加速学术交流和知识传播。

Abstract: Purpose: Peer review is essential to scientific publishing, but increasing submission volumes have placed growing pressure on reviewers and editors. This study examines the relationship between sentiment toward specific review aspects and peer review duration. It also investigates how this relationship varies across disciplines and review rounds, with the aim of supporting targeted manuscript revision and improving review efficiency.
  Design/methodology/approach: We adopt a two-stage approach. First, fine-grained aspects are extracted from peer review reports, and a sentiment classification model is used to determine the sentiment associated with each aspect. Second, correlations between aspect-level sentiment and peer review duration are analyzed. Sentiment scores are also calculated for different review rounds to determine whether these relationships change over successive rounds.
  Findings: Review sentiment has a weak but statistically significant negative correlation with peer review duration, indicating that more positive reviews tend to be associated with shorter review periods. Aspects concerning Evaluation and Results and Impact and Research Value show relatively stronger correlations with review duration. The relationships between aspect-level sentiment and review duration also differ significantly across review rounds.
  Originality/value: This study connects the textual content of peer review reports with the temporal characteristics of the review process. By identifying review aspects that are more closely associated with review duration, it provides evidence that may help authors prioritize revisions and assist reviewers and editors in improving review efficiency. The findings contribute to reducing the burden of peer review and accelerating scholarly communication and knowledge dissemination.

</details>


### [77] [Deeper is Not Always Better: Mitigating the Alignment Tax via Confident Layer Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21906)
*Xuanming Zhang,Sining Zhoubian,Yuxuan Chen,Tianyi Tang,An Yang,Sean Du,Chujie Zheng,Fei Huang,Dayiheng Liu,Gao Huang,Jingren Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文揭示了LLM解码过程中存在"猜测-精炼-扰动"的动态模式：早期层形成粗略猜测，中间层精炼推理语义，最终层可能将精炼预测扰动为通用或对齐偏好的token。作者提出Confident Decoding，一种无需训练的解码策略，通过熵引导的保守反向搜索动态选择最可靠的近最终层，理论化为最优停止问题。实验证明该方法在推理基准上取得一致提升，零内存开销且延迟增加低于2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点认为LLM解码应使用最后一层，因为越深层的表示越可靠。本文质疑这一假设，发现最终层的输出可能被"对齐扰动"污染，导致模型从精炼的推理语义滑向通用或安全偏好的token，从而削弱了推理能力。

Method: 提出Confident Decoding，一种无需训练的解码策略：(1) 通过熵引导的保守反向搜索，从最后一层向前回溯，动态选择最可靠的近最终层；(2) 将层选择形式化为最优停止问题，在有限投影噪声和主导的后期对齐扰动假设下，过滤扰动同时控制相对于精炼层的损失上界。

Result: 在稠密模型和MoE模型上进行实验，在GPQA-Diamond、Omni-MATH和HLE等具有挑战性的推理基准上取得一致提升，零内存开销，延迟仅增加不到2%。

Conclusion: 动态绕过最终层的扰动可以激发对齐LLM更强的推理行为，挑战了"越深层越可靠"的传统认知，为解码策略提供了新视角。

Abstract: Autoregressive generation in large language models (LLMs) conventionally decodes from the final layer, assuming that deeper representations yield more reliable next-token predictions. We revisit this assumption by revealing a recurring Guess-Refine-Perturb dynamic: early layers form coarse guesses, intermediate layers refine reasoning-relevant semantics, and final layers can perturb these refined predictions toward generic or alignment-preferred tokens. We introduce Confident Decoding, a training-free decoding strategy that dynamically selects the most reliable near-final layer through entropy-guided conservative backward search. We further provide a theoretical formulation of layer selection as an optimal stopping problem, showing that under bounded projection noise and dominant late-stage alignment perturbation, our search rule filters perturbation while bounding the loss relative to the oracle refinement layer. Experiments across dense and Mixture-of-Experts LLMs demonstrate consistent gains on challenging reasoning benchmarks, including GPQA-Diamond, Omni-MATH, and HLE, with zero memory overhead and less than 2% latency increase. These results suggest dynamically bypassing final-layer perturbations can unlock stronger reasoning behavior from aligned LLMs.

</details>


### [78] [Pre-Generation Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models via Soft-Target Attention Probing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21917)
*Amina Miftakhova,Alexey Zaytsev*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出在生成前检测幻觉风险的方法：通过随机采样输出的经验错误率作为软目标监督，并采用注意力探针技术聚合与幻觉相关的提示表示，在多个QA基准和模型上优于传统二元分类和线性探针方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法将幻觉检测视为对单个解码输出的二元分类，但这种方式未能充分利用模型采样分布的信息，且无法提供细粒度的风险估计。作者希望在不增加解码成本的前提下，提前估计幻觉风险以支持拒答、检索增强和路由决策。

Method: 1) 将幻觉检测重新定义为风险估计问题，采用软目标监督——基于随机采样输出的经验答案错误率作为训练标签，并证明该估计量是模型在采样分布下每个提示错误概率的唯一无偏最小方差估计量。2) 将注意力探针（attention probing）适配到生成前设置，使检测器能够选择性聚合与幻觉相关的提示表示。

Result: 在三个问答基准和五个模型上，注意力探针在短答案任务中优于线性探针。用软目标监督替代二元标签能持续且一致地提升检测质量。

Conclusion: 将幻觉检测从二元分类拓展为风险估计问题，并引入软目标监督和注意力探针，能够更有效地在生成前估计幻觉风险，提升检测性能。

Abstract: Detecting hallucination risk before generation enables abstention, retrieval augmentation, and routing decisions without incurring the cost of decoding.
  While prior work has shown that such risk can be estimated from a model's internal representations, existing approaches treat this as binary classification over a single decoded output. We instead formulate it as a risk-estimation problem. Under this formulation, we introduce soft-target supervision based on the empirical answer error rate over stochastically sampled outputs - an estimator we prove to be the unique unbiased minimum-variance estimator of the model's per-prompt error probability under its sampling distribution.
  We further adapt attention probing to the pre-generation setting, enabling the detector to selectively aggregate hallucination-relevant prompt representations. Across three question-answering benchmarks and five models, attention probing outperforms linear probing on short-answer tasks. Replacing binary labels with soft-target supervision further and consistently improves detection quality.

</details>


### [79] [MindTailor: Personalized Emotional Support via Post History-Grounded Case Formulation and Collaborative Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21930)
*Suhyun Han,Kyunghyun Cho,JinYeong Bak*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出MindTailor框架，通过挖掘用户发帖历史构建案例表述，并利用多策略咨询师代理协同批判生成个性化情感支持回复。在ReddiSupp数据集上，通过LLM评估、专家评估和用户研究证明该方法优于基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有情感支持方法仅关注用户当前状态（情绪、人格、情境），忽略了塑造用户当前问题的过往经历（形成性经历），缺乏历史感知能力。

Method: MindTailor框架：1) 从用户发帖历史中构建案例表述（case formulation）; 2) 多个基于不同咨询策略的咨询师代理通过协作批判（collaborative critique）迭代优化回复。

Result: 在ReddiSupp数据集（798条Reddit帖子及历史）上，通过LLM-as-a-Judge、专家人工评估和用户研究，MindTailor在共情、个性化、理解度及整体偏好上均优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 历史感知对于个性化情感支持至关重要，基于案例表述和多策略协作批判的框架能有效提升情感支持回复质量。

Abstract: As mental health concerns continue to rise globally, social media has emerged as a vital space where individuals seek emotional support. While prior work on personalized emotional support has leveraged seekers' emotional states, personas, and situational context, these approaches primarily capture the seeker's current state, overlooking the formative experiences that shape present concerns. In this work, we propose MindTailor, a framework that generates personalized emotional support responses by constructing a case formulation from the seeker's post history and iteratively refining responses through collaborative critique among counselor agents grounded in distinct counseling strategies. To enable research on this history-aware task, we construct ReddiSupp, a dataset of 798 Reddit posts paired with seekers' prior post histories. Through LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation, expert human evaluation, and a user study with seekers, we demonstrate that MindTailor outperforms baselines across these evaluations, improving empathy, personalization, understanding, and achieving the highest overall preference.

</details>


### [80] [Beyond Value Benchmarks: Measuring Value-Structure Alignment in Large Language Models via Symmetric Q-Sorts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21939)
*Jingting Zheng,Yuqi Ren,Linhao Yu,Yongqi Leng,Deyi Xiong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Q方法论的对称人机评估框架，通过140项道德陈述的强制分布排序，测量LLM与人类在价值观结构上的对齐程度。对12个LLM进行240次复制Q排序实验，发现模型间存在显著异质性，且传统全局评分掩盖了局部结构扭曲。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM道德评估依赖逐项行为指标，无法捕捉模型如何作为完整系统在竞争性价值观之间进行结构性优先级排序，缺乏对价值观结构对齐的系统性测量方法。

Method: 采用Q方法论构建对称人机评估框架：人类与LLM对同一140项道德陈述集进行九列强制分布排序；LLM通过严格排序确定性映射到Q分类桶；使用Procrustes相似度(φ)和RSA Spearman相关(ρ)量化结构对齐。

Result: 在35人人类参考样本上建立三因子参考结构；12个LLM（4个系列）240次复制Q排序实验显示：跨系列显著异质性、模型对生成随机性的特定敏感性、局部错位现象——有利全局分数可能掩盖潜在区域扭曲；排名与分桶分析高度一致，但提示措辞引入显著方差。

Conclusion: 价值观结构对齐评估为传统逐项道德基准提供了关键的结构性补充，揭示了全局指标无法反映的局部价值观结构扭曲问题。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in contexts requiring complex moral reasoning and value trade-offs. However, existing evaluations typically rely on item-level behavioral metrics, which fail to capture how models structurally prioritize competing values as a cohesive system. To address this, we propose a symmetric human-LLM evaluation framework, grounded in Q methodology, to measure value-structure alignment. Under our protocol, humans and models sort an identical 140-item moral statement set into a shared nine-column forced distribution; for LLMs, we elicit strict rankings and deterministically map them to Q-sort buckets. Using a human reference sample ($N=35$), we establish a stable three-factor reference geometry specific to this instrument and sample. We evaluate 12 LLMs across four model families via 240 replicated Q-sorts at two temperature settings, quantifying structural alignment via Procrustes similarity ($φ$) and RSA-based Spearman correlation ($ρ$). Our results reveal significant cross-family heterogeneity, model-specific sensitivity to generation stochasticity and localized misalignment, which demonstrate that favorable global scores can obscure underlying regional distortions. While rank- and bucket-based analyses remain highly consistent, prompt phrasing introduces notable variance. Ultimately, assessing value-structure alignment provides a crucial structural complement to traditional itemwise moral benchmarks.

</details>


### [81] [Are Multilingual Models Actually Improving? Isolating True Cross-Lingual Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21954)
*Prasoon Bajpai,Eleftheria Briakou,Colin Cherry,Preethi Jyothi,Vihari Piratla*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Hardness Adjusted Transfer (HAT) Score的新指标，用于更准确地衡量跨语言迁移强度，并通过分析20个语言模型和3个基准发现：小模型的迁移能力并未失效，模型规模增大并未带来预期的迁移进步速度，但跨语言迁移能力随时间推移确实有所提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跨语言迁移强度指标将源语言准确率提升与真实迁移能力混为一谈，无法准确衡量模型的迁移效果，因此需要一种更可靠的度量方法。

Method: 提出Hardness Adjusted Transfer (HAT) Score作为替代指标，对20个不同语言模型和3个主流多语言基准进行系统性分析。

Result: 1) 小模型的跨语言迁移能力并未失效；2) 随着模型规模增大，跨语言迁移能力的提升速度比预期更慢；3) 跨语言迁移能力随时间推移有明显进步。

Conclusion: HAT Score能更可靠地衡量跨语言迁移强度，纠正了以往对迁移能力的误解，揭示了模型规模与迁移能力之间并非简单的正比关系。

Abstract: Cross-lingual transfer is a model's ability to generalize capabilities from well-represented source languages to under-represented target languages. Existing measures of a model's transfer strength conflate improvements in transfer with general improvements to accuracy in the source language. We advocate for an alternate metric that reliably captures transfer strength called Hardness Adjusted Transfer (HAT) Score, and use it to derive multiple insights on factors influencing transfer strength. Our analysis across twenty diverse language models and three popular mainstream multilingual benchmarks argues that 1) transfer in small models is not broken, 2) we are making slower than expected progress in cross-lingual transfer with model size, and 3) we have made clear progress over time.

</details>


### [82] [OpenBioRQ: Unsolved Biomedical Research Questions for Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21959)
*Minbyul Jeong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出OpenBioRQ，一个包含12,553个未解决生物医学研究问题的检索增强型agent基准，用于评估模型在无标准答案情况下的真实性和放弃能力。研究发现约15.9%的引用链接到错误论文，且现有基准因依赖固定答案键而忽视此问题。在最难问题上，最强agent仅解决约60%，且出现agentic collapse现象——工具在最需要时反而失效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有agent模型虽然很少捏造引用（99%可解析），但约15.9%的链接指向了错误的论文。当前基准因依赖固定答案键而忽视了这一失败模式——模型可以从答案键中复现预期来源，而非独立验证来源是否支持其主张。需要构建无标准答案的、基于开放问题的基准来真实评估模型的忠实性。

Method: 构建了OpenBioRQ基准，包含12,553个未解决的生物医学研究问题，涵盖12个领域。采用agentic设定（模型需多次调用工具），问题无标准答案，开放性通过真实追踪证据而非模型参数知识验证。难度锚定于三个开源参考模型无法回答的问题，而非主观标注。

Result: 在最难子集上，与难度锚点同源系的模型仅解决约17%，而三个前沿agent（Gemini-3-Pro, Opus-4.7, GPT-5.5）覆盖29-60%的宽广范围。观察到agentic collapse现象：在最难问题上agent停止使用工具。对于最易崩溃的模型，完全禁止工具访问后得分几乎没有变化。引入冻结的每问题检查清单可将评判者间一致性从Spearman 0.35提升至0.82。

Conclusion: OpenBioRQ是一个难、非饱和、具有区分度的基准，最佳agent仍留下33-40%未解决。工具在模型最需要的时候反而失效（agentic collapse），揭示当前agent模型在面临真正困难问题时工具使用策略的根本缺陷。

Abstract: A working citation looks like proof -- but the fact that a link resolves does not mean the cited paper supports the claim. I find that current agentic models rarely fabricate citations (over $99\%$ resolve), yet roughly $15.9\%$ link to the wrong paper. Existing benchmarks miss this failure mode: when a question has a fixed answer key, a model can reproduce the expected source from that key rather than independently verifying that the source supports the claim. I introduce \textbf{\openbiorq{}}, a retrieval-grounded agentic benchmark of $12{,}553$ unsolved biomedical research questions across $12$ domains that treats open questions as a faithfulness-and-abstention probe. To my knowledge, this is the first biomedical benchmark to combine an agentic setting -- where the model must issue multiple tool calls -- with unsolved questions that have no answer key. Openness is verified against real follow-up evidence rather than a model's parametric knowledge. Difficulty is empirical: I anchor it on questions that three open-weight reference models fail to answer, rather than on subjective hardness labels. On this hardest subset, held-out models from the same lineage as the difficulty anchors solve only ~17%, while three independent frontier agents (Gemini-3-Pro, Opus-4.7, GPT-5.5) span a wide 29-60% range. The benchmark is thus hard, non-saturating (the best agent still leaves ~33-40\% unsolved), and discriminating across capability tiers. Beyond difficulty, I observe agentic collapse on the hardest questions, where agents stop using their tools. For the most collapse-prone model, blocking tool access entirely barely changes its score -- so tools stop paying off exactly where they are needed most. A frozen per-question checklist raises inter-judge agreement from Spearman 0.35 to 0.82.

</details>


### [83] [Can LLMs Control Readability? A Multi-Dimensional Evaluation Framework for CEFR-Controlled Arabic Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21981)
*Nour Rabih,Chatrine Qwaider,Ted Briscoe*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出多维度评估框架，研究LLM在阿拉伯语文本生成中控制CEFR可读性水平的能力。结构化提示词+词汇约束达到最佳效果（余弦相似度0.91，可读性一致性0.99），为自适应教育系统奠定基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM能生成流利阿拉伯语，但能否可靠控制文本可读性水平尚不明确，需要系统性评估。

Method: 构建多维评估框架，包含：控制性提示策略、Taha-19自动可读性预测模型、词汇约束验证、句法复杂度分析。

Result: CEFR引导+词汇约束的提示策略达到最优：与参考语言画像的余弦相似度0.91，可读性水平预测一致性0.99；无约束提示则控制力弱。

Conclusion: 结构化提示能显著提升CEFR对齐程度，为将可读性可控的阿拉伯语文本生成集成到自适应教育系统中提供了实证基础。

Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent Arabic text, their ability to reliably control readability levels remains unclear. We propose a multi-dimensional evaluation framework for Common European Framework of Reference for Language (CEFR)-controlled Arabic text generation, assessing whether instruction-following LLMs can serve as reliable generators for adaptive language learning. Our framework integrates controlled prompting, automatic readability prediction using a validated Taha-19 model, lexical constraint validation, and syntactic complexity profiling. Results show that structured prompting substantially improves CEFR alignment. In particular, CEFR-guided prompting with lexical constraints achieves the highest conformity to reference linguistic profiles (0.91 cosine similarity) and near-perfect agreement with predicted readability levels (0.99), while unconstrained prompting exhibits weak control. These findings establish an empirical foundation for integrating readability-aware Arabic text generation into adaptive educational systems.

</details>


### [84] [Adding Robust Code-Switching Capabilities to High Performance Multilingual ASR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21990)
*Enes Yavuz Ugan,Alexander Waibel*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出贝叶斯因子化适应方法，在不破坏单语基线能力的前提下，仅用少量合成数据即可有效提升多语言ASR系统的代码切换性能，词错误率降低5.31%，代码切换词转录错误减少32.87%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实部署中多语言ASR系统面临代码切换（CSW）的挑战，简单微调合成CSW数据会破坏已训练好的单语模型性能，因此需要一种既能保留单语能力又能处理复杂代码切换的方法。

Method: 贝叶斯因子化适应（Bayesian Factorized Adaptation），通过学习将代码切换相关知识高效集成到预训练模型中，而不会覆盖已有能力，仅需少量合成数据。

Result: 代码切换词转录错误减少32.87%，整体WER降低5.31%，单语性能保持稳定。

Conclusion: 有效的代码切换适应更多依赖于知识集成的方式而非数据复杂性。

Abstract: Code-switching (CSW) remains challenging for large multi-lingual ASR systems in real-world deployment. While fine-tuning on synthetic CSW data is possible, it generally degrades strong monolingual baselines. Our goal is to preserve these capabilities while extending models to handle complex code-switching, including morphological variations across languages. We propose Bayesian factorized adaptation, which learns to efficiently integrate switching-relevant knowledge into strong pretrained models without overwriting existing capabilities. Requiring only a small amount of synthetic data, our approach reduces transcription errors by 32.87% on code-switched words while improving overall WER by 5.31%, all while maintaining mono-lingual performance. Our results demonstrate that effective CSW adaptation depends more on knowledge integration than data complexity.

</details>


### [85] [Benchmarking Large Language Models for Grapheme-to-Phoneme Conversion: A Japanese Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22009)
*Tomoki Koriyama*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究了30多个大语言模型在日语G2P转换上的表现，发现最佳模型字符错误率(0.52%)优于传统工具(1.03%)，且解析模式（先形态分析再规则转换）优于直接预测模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: G2P转换对可控、鲁棒的文本转语音至关重要，LLM具有广泛的语言知识，但以往缺乏系统性的日语G2P基准测试。

Method: 在3000条人工标注句子上对比30多个LLM与传统形态解析器；测试两种策略：解析模式（LLM做形态分析+规则转换）和直接模式（LLM直接预测读音）。

Result: 最佳LLM字符错误率0.52%，传统工具1.03%；解析模式普遍优于直接模式；模型规模、版本和日语专门训练是关键因素。

Conclusion: LLM在日语G2P任务上超越传统工具，解析模式因规则后处理减轻了复杂发音规则的负担而更优，且LLM预测的读音可用于改善TTS发音质量。

Abstract: Grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) conversion is essential for controllable and robust text-to-speech, and large language models (LLMs), with broad linguistic knowledge, offer a promising approach. We benchmarked over 30 LLMs on Japanese G2P, comparing them with conventional morphological analyzers on 3000 manually annotated sentences. We evaluated two prompting strategies: a parse mode, where the LLM performs morphological analysis followed by rule-based kana conversion, and a direct mode, where the LLM directly predicts kana readings. The results show that model size, version, and Japanese-specialized training are key factors, with the best LLMs achieving kana character error rate below 0.52\% vs. the best conventional tool (1.03\%). Parse mode outperforms direct mode for most models, as rule-based post-processing relieves the LLM of handling complex pronunciation rules. We also show that feeding LLM-predicted kana into a kana-input TTS yields better pronunciation than end-to-end TTS.

</details>


### [86] [NL2Scratch: An Executable Benchmark and Evaluation for Block-Based Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22061)
*Heejin Do,Alexandre Ballenghien,Yang Wu,April Yi Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了NL2Scratch基准，包含311,648个经过解析器验证的自然语言-Scratch程序对，并设计了语义对齐一致性（SAC）指标用于评估，揭示了现有模型在词汇相似度与语义对齐之间的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于块的编程环境（如Scratch）在教育中广泛使用，但自然语言到代码（NL2Code）的研究主要集中在文本语言上。Scratch程序的事件驱动、视觉组合和并发脚本特性，使得传统的NL2Code假设和评估方法不适用。

Method: 1) 构建NL2Scratch基准：从真实Scratch项目中提取程序，配对语义对齐的自然语言描述，共311,648对。2) 提出SAC（语义对齐一致性）指标：可解释的槽级度量，衡量描述与程序之间的语义一致性。3) 利用SAC构建语义验证集（23,594例）和平衡诊断基准（800例）。

Result: 在指令微调和微调LLM上的实验表明：词级F1超过0.93的模型往往无法达到完美的SAC，尤其是在长样本上。错误集中在操作槽（动作、条件、数值参数），这些失败模式在传统指标下基本不可见。

Conclusion: 现有NL2Code评估方法在Scratch场景下存在显著缺陷，SAC指标能更有效地揭示语义对齐问题，尤其是传统指标无法发现的深层错误模式。

Abstract: Block-based programming environments such as Scratch are widely used in early programming education, yet natural-language-to-code (NL2Code) research has focused primarily on text-based languages. Scratch programs are event-driven, visually compositional, and distributed across concurrent scripts, making conventional NL2Code assumptions and evaluation insufficient. We introduce NL2Scratch, an executable benchmark for natural-language-to-Scratch generation comprising 311,648 parser-valid NL--program pairs, whose program side is extracted from real Scratch projects and paired with semantically aligned NL descriptions. For reliable evaluation beyond surface overlap, we propose Semantic Alignment Consistency (SAC), an interpretable slot-level metric for measuring semantic agreement between descriptions and programs. With SAC, we construct a semantically validated pool of 23,594 examples, and a slot-balanced 800 diagnostic benchmark. Experiments across instruction-tuned and fine-tuned LLMs reveal a notable gap between lexical similarity and semantic alignment: models achieving token-level F1 above 0.93 often fail to attain perfect SAC, particularly on longer examples. Errors concentrate on operational slots like actions, conditions, and numeric arguments, exposing failure modes largely invisible under conventional metrics.

</details>


### [87] [Where Does the Signal Live? A Web Data Recipe for Medical Encoder Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22079)
*Bofeng Huang,Jacques Sun,Diane Bouchacourt,Nicolas Barascud,Fajwel Fogel*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 针对密集术语领域（如医学）的编码器预训练，本文提出通过医学术语密度过滤和信号增强改写两种方法实现网络规模数据策展，在法语医学场景中构建了FineMed语料库和DoctoBERT模型，取得了SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前解码器LLM的预训练已广泛采用网络数据策展，但编码器（尤其是医学等密集术语领域）仍依赖小规模人工策展语料，限制了规模性和写作风格多样性，在非英语临床场景中这一瓶颈更为严重。网络规模数据策展是否也能惠及编码器的掩码语言模型预训练，仍是一个开放问题。

Method: 提出两种互补策略：1) 医学术语密度过滤（Medical-term density filtering）——选择富含医学术语的文档；2) 信号增强改写（Signal-amplifying rephrasing）——使用LLM将文档改写为密度更高、实体上下文更丰富的变体。在法语医学NLP场景中实例化上述方法。

Result: 医学术语密度过滤在下游医学任务上优于广泛使用的教育质量过滤方法，且两者互补。信号增强改写单独使用即可提升原始网络数据效果，与过滤后的网络数据混合使用增益最大。最终构建的FineMed语料库和DoctoBERT模型在公共基准DrBenchmark和专有临床NER任务上均达到SOTA。

Conclusion: 网络规模数据策展策略可以有效应用于密集术语领域的编码器MLM预训练，术语密度过滤和信号增强改写是互补且有效的方案，为非英语临床场景提供了可扩展的预训练数据构建范式。

Abstract: Web data curation has been widely studied for decoder Large Language Model (LLM) pretraining. Encoders for dense-terminology domains such as medicine, by contrast, are pretrained on small, manually-curated corpora that limit scalability and writing style diversity, a bottleneck even more severe in non-English clinical settings. Whether web-scale data curation also benefits encoder Masked Language Modeling (MLM) in a dense-terminology domain remains an open question. To address this, we introduce two complementary levers. Medical-term density filtering selects documents rich in medical terms. Signal-amplifying rephrasing uses an LLM to rewrite documents into denser variants with broader entity contexts. We instantiate the recipe on French medical NLP. The medical-term density filter outperforms the widely-used educational quality filter on downstream medical tasks, and the two complement each other. Signal-amplifying rephrasing alone improves on raw web data, and mixing it with filtered web data produces the largest gain. The recipe yields FineMed, a French medical pretraining corpus, and DoctoBERT, a state-of-the-art French medical encoder family evaluated on both the public benchmark DrBenchmark and a proprietary clinical Named Entity Recognition (NER) task.

</details>


### [88] [Plurification in/of language technology -- The integration of culture in next-generation AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22097)
*Gertraud Koch,Fausto Giunchiglia*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了如何在NLP中操作化“文化”，并提出文化对齐不能仅靠增加“其他文化”的样本，而需要多元认识论。通过五层技术活动模型分析发现，当前NLP研究虽取得进展，但多数方法仍停留在输出或表征层面，未能解决权力、治理等深层问题。论文主张采取反思性的社会技术方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前NLP系统往往隐含地以单一（如西方）文化视角为基础，缺乏对多元文化背景的充分考虑。作者试图探讨“文化”如何在NLP中被操作化，以及技术设计中考虑多元文化背景的可能性和局限性。

Method: 采用社会技术模型——技术活动五层模型，收集和系统化NLP中处理“文化”的各种方法，分析现有研究在哪些层面触及文化问题。

Result: 分析表明，NLP研究在文化敏感性方面取得了一定进展，但多数方法仍停留在输出或表征层面，对权力、治理、社会语境等深层问题关注不足。

Conclusion: 文化的操作化远不止技术适配问题；需要一种反思性的、多元的社会技术方法，在计算形式化的潜力与局限之间平衡，以容纳多元语言和社会文化背景。

Abstract: The paper explores how "culture" can be operationalised in Natural Language Processing (NLP) and what this reveals about the possibilities and limits of considering a plurality of cultural backgrounds in technological design. It proposes that cultural alignment cannot be achieved only by adding more examples of "other cultures", rather it requires plural epistemologies: allowing multiple, locally grounded ways of knowing. To analyze how this plurality of knowing can be addressed in NLP, the paper uses a socio-technical model of language technology (LT) design, the five layers of technological activity model, for collecting and systematizing approaches to culture in NLP. The analysis shows that while NLP research has made progress toward more culturally sensitive systems, many approaches remain partial, addressing "culture" primarily at the level of output or representation while leaving deeper questions of power, governance, and social context unresolved. The paper concludes that operationalising culture requires much more than technical adaptation; it suggests a reflexive and plural socio-technical approach that navigates potentials and limits of computational formalisation for accounting multiple linguistic and socio-cultural backgrounds.

</details>


### [89] [From Recognition to Understanding: Unlocking Cognitive Time Series Reasoning with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22126)
*Xin Qiu,Junlong Tong,Yao Zhang,Yunpu Ma,Wei Zhang,Xiaoyu Shen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出TSCognition多模态时间序列推理基准和TSAlign对齐框架，通过将时序数据编码为补丁级表示并与LLM嵌入空间对齐，在五个认知推理任务上超越现有方法，同时降低计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有将时间序列分析与LLM结合的方法存在根本性错配：大多将时序理解简化为曲线拟合，只关注低层预测而忽略了真实世界时间决策中的语义、上下文和推理密集型特征。

Method: 提出TSCognition基准（15个公开来源构建约41K QA样本，涵盖解码、定位、推断、外推、行动五种认知推理任务）和TSAlign框架（将时序编码为紧凑的补丁级表示，通过门控残差注入和多变量融合与LLM嵌入空间中的语义方向对齐）。

Result: TSAlign在TSCognition和公开TimerBed基准上优于现有LLM、VLM和时间序列QA基线方法，同时大幅降低计算成本。

Conclusion: 通过将时序数据与LLM的语义空间对齐，可以有效弥合现有方法在时间序列推理中的语义鸿沟，实现高效且推理能力更强的时间序列理解。

Abstract: Time series analysis has recently been coupled with Large Language Models (LLMs) to leverage their reasoning and world knowledge capabilities, yet gains remain limited. We attribute this to a fundamental mismatch between existing task formulations and LLM strengths: most settings reduce time series understanding to curve-fitting systems, focusing on low-level prediction while ignoring the semantic, contextual, and reasoning-intensive nature of real-world temporal decision-making.To address these limitations, we introduce TSCognition, a multimodal benchmark for multi-dimensional time series reasoning. It collects real-world time series and textual information from 15 public sources and constructs approximately 41K QA samples around five cognitive reasoning tasks: Decoding, Grounding, Inferring, Extrapolating, and Acting. Building on this, we further propose TSAlign, a unified framework that encodes time series into compact patch-level representations and aligns them with semantic directions in the LLM embedding space via gated residual injection and multivariate fusion.Experiments show that TSAlign outperforms existing LLM, VLM, and time series QA baselines on TSCognition and the publicly available TimerBed benchmark while substantially reducing computational cost.Code is available at: [https://github.com/EIT-NLP/CognitiveTSR](https://github.com/EIT-NLP/CognitiveTSR)

</details>


### [90] [BioMatrix: Towards a Comprehensive Biological Foundation Model Spanning the Modality Matrix of Sequences, Structures, and Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22138)
*Qizhi Pei,Zhimeng Zhou,Yi Duan,Yiyang Zhao,Wei Li,Han Guo,Liang He,Chengping Li,Chang-Yu Hsieh,Conghui He,Rui Yan,Lijun Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: BioMatrix是首个在单一解码器架构中自然整合分子序列、分子结构、蛋白质序列、蛋白质结构和自然语言的多模态基础模型，通过统一分词方案将所有模态映射到共享离散词元空间，在3044亿词元上持续预训练后，在80项生物任务中的77项上达到或超越最先进水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生物基础模型存在"原生多模态"与"广泛实体覆盖"难以兼得的问题：融合多种模态的模型局限于单一实体类型，而覆盖多种实体类型的模型要么缺少显式结构建模，要么依赖适配器设计导致模型无法原生生成其能读取的模态。

Method: 基于Qwen3语言模型（1.7B和4B），采用统一分词方案将分子序列（SMILES/SELFIES）、分子结构、蛋白质序列、蛋白质结构和自然语言映射到共享离散词元空间，所有模态在单一"下一个词元预测"目标下统一消费和生成，无需外部编码器、投影适配器或模态特定输出头。在3044亿词元上持续预训练，涵盖通用/领域文本、分子和蛋白质的序列与结构视图、交叉模态语料。

Result: 在涵盖6大类（单实体和多实体的模态内与跨模态理解与生成）80项下游任务上，BioMatrix在77项任务上达到最先进或具有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: 一个原生的多模态通用模型能够有效匹配甚至超越多种生物任务上的专门方法，证明了统一架构在生物领域多模态学习中的可行性。

Abstract: We present BioMatrix, the first multimodal foundation model that natively integrates sequences, structures, and natural language for both molecules and proteins within a single decoder-only architecture. Existing biological foundation models pursue native multimodality and broad entity coverage separately: those that fuse multiple modalities under a shared objective remain confined to a single entity type, while those spanning multiple entity types either omit explicit structural modeling or rely on adapter-based designs in which the model cannot natively generate the very modalities it can read. BioMatrix closes this gap by mapping molecular sequences (supporting both SMILES and SELFIES notations), molecular structures, protein sequences, protein structures, and natural language into a shared discrete token space through a unified tokenization scheme, so that all modalities are consumed and produced uniformly under a single next-token prediction objective -- without external encoders, projection adapters, or modality-specific output heads. Built upon the Qwen3 language model (1.7B and 4B), BioMatrix is continually pretrained on 304.4 billion tokens spanning general and domain-specific text, sequence and structure views of molecules and proteins, and cross-modal corpora that interleave biomolecular entities with scientific text and link distinct entities through molecule-protein and protein-protein interaction data. After tuning on a comprehensive suite of downstream applications covering 80 tasks across 6 categories -- encompassing single-entity and multi-entity understanding and generation tasks across and within modalities -- BioMatrix achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance on 77 out of 80 tasks, demonstrating that a single, natively multimodal generalist model can effectively match or surpass specialized approaches across a wide range of biological tasks.

</details>


### [91] [The Score Granularity Gap in Black-Box LLM Classification: A Comparative Study of Confidence Constructions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22179)
*Ao Sun,Tian Sun,Jiaxing Geng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出了"分数粒度差距"概念，研究LLM作为黑盒分类器时，置信度分数可被阈值化的粒度。通过比较7种置信度构建方法（从单次口头化数字到多次查询聚合），在25个模型-数据集对上的实验发现：单次口头化置信度虽然排序性能好，但仅有少量离散值，导致操作者只能设置几个粗粒度阈值。多次查询聚合能帮助弱模型但可能降低强模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究关注LLM置信度的校准性和排序性，但忽略了置信度分数在实际部署中的可阈值化分辨率问题——即操作者能否根据精细的阈值选择不同的风险水平。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 在25个模型-数据集对（9个LLM，3个基准）上，系统比较了7种置信度分数构建方法，包括：单次口头化数字、词元概率、多次查询聚合等，并评估了它们的阈值粒度与排序性能之间的权衡。

Result: 单次口头化置信度（正确转换为类别概率后）排序性能良好，但只取少量离散值，导致粒度差距大；多次查询聚合能帮助弱模型提升性能，但可能降低已强模型的性能。

Conclusion: 不同置信度构建方法在粒度、排序性能和推理成本之间存在明确权衡，论文将这些权衡转化为具体的部署指导建议。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as black-box classifiers in pipelines that automate confident decisions and route uncertain ones to human review. Such selective prediction needs a confidence score that an operator can threshold at a chosen risk level. Prior work asks whether LLM confidence is well calibrated or well ranked; we ask a complementary, deployment-oriented question that has been largely overlooked: at what resolution can the score be thresholded? We call the answer the score granularity gap. Through a controlled comparison of seven ways to build a confidence score, from a single verbalized number, to token probabilities, to querying the model many times and combining the answers, across 25 model-dataset pairs (9 LLMs, 3 benchmarks), we find that single-shot verbalized confidence, once correctly converted to a class probability, ranks cases surprisingly well, yet takes only a handful of distinct values. It therefore offers an operator only a few coarse thresholds, no matter how well it ranks. We show which constructions widen this gap, at what inference cost, and with what effect on ranking, notably that multi-query aggregation helps weak models but can degrade already-strong ones. We translate these trade-offs into concrete deployment guidance.

</details>


### [92] [When Is Emergent Consensus Real? A Measured Coupling Gain and a Validity Diagnostic for LLM Agent Societies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22203)
*Dongxu Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出耦合增益γ作为可测量控制参数，系统研究了LLM智能体社会中的共识与极化现象。发现γ具有稳定性、模型区分性且不受语言变体影响；通过经典动力学理论（Friedkin-Johnsen和符号拉普拉斯/结构平衡）可预测社会状态；前沿LLM不会自发"逆火"导致极化；通过随机初始条件诊断可区分真正的社会平均与模型先验伪影；耦合具有上下文依赖性，需要模态匹配的群体耦合而非单邻居γ来预测涌现共识。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体社会研究展示了涌现共识或极化现象，但缺乏可测量的控制参数、没有关于何时出现哪种状态的理论、也无法区分真正的社会动态与模型伪影。

Method: 提出"耦合增益γ"这一可测量指标，通过反事实扰动邻居观点计算；结合经典社会动力学理论（Friedkin-Johnsen和符号拉普拉斯/结构平衡）分析LLM社会状态；设计随机初始条件诊断方法区分平均化与先验伪影。

Result: γ在5种前沿模型中稳定且可区分（0.15-0.43）；前沿LLM不会自发产生极化；经典动力学理论能有效预测社会状态；随机初始条件诊断揭示了先前研究中先验伪影与真正平均化的混淆；群体耦合比单邻居γ更能预测涌现共识（Pearson r=-0.70, p=0.008）。

Conclusion: 本文提供了一个测量协议和有效性验证工具，而非提出新理论，为LLM社会动态研究提供了可量化的方法论基础。

Abstract: LLM "agent societies" are studied via demonstrations of emergent consensus or polarization -- with no measurable control parameter, no theory of when each regime appears, and no test of whether an outcome is a genuine social dynamic or a model artifact. We introduce the coupling gain gamma, measured per-agent by counterfactually perturbing a neighbour's stated opinion. (i) gamma is stable and model-distinguishing -- across five frontier models it spans 0.15-0.43 (n=20, 95% CIs <= 0.025), paraphrase-invariant; social-neighbour gamma roughly equals numeric-anchor gamma, so gamma is evidence-coupling, not uniquely social. (ii) Classical dynamics with measured (not assumed) coefficients organise the regime: Friedkin-Johnsen for consensus/pluralism, signed-Laplacian/structural-balance for polarization. (iii) Frontier LLMs do not spontaneously backfire (beta <= 0), so default societies do not self-polarize -- polarization is always induced; the beta>0 branch arises only in the FJ surrogate, never in the agents. (iv) A randomized-initial-condition diagnostic -- the (slope, bias) of final vs. initial opinion -- separates genuine averaging from model-prior artifacts (boundary-censoring ruled out by construction via interior-valued facts); applied to a published "emergent consensus" result (Chuang et al. 2023) it reveals a model-specific conflation: averaging on debatable claims, prior-artifact on settled facts. (v) Coupling is context-dependent: pairwise gamma does not predict multi-neighbour outcomes -- it can order them backwards -- whereas a modality-matched group coupling does (sixteen closed+open models, Pearson r=-0.70, permutation p=0.008). The regime laws take this matched coupling, not the single-neighbour gamma: emergent consensus must be read from coupling in the target interaction. We contribute a measurement protocol and a validity instrument, not new theory.

</details>


### [93] [Lexical Consensus: Grounded Word Learning and Shared Meaning in Artificial Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22207)
*Patricio M. Vera*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出 Lexical Consensus 框架，研究 AI 系统能否在结构化感知基础上习得新词汇含义。实验发现感知一致性梯度（原生类别>连贯泛化>中间类别>远距类别），感知距离显著预测习得效果，语义距离无解释力。双向评估显示命名与检索能力分离，冻结的感知几何既支持又限制词汇基础化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 AI 评估多关注任务表现和行为模仿，但未充分检验智能体能否从具身经验中获取、稳定并使用新的词汇含义。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 提出 Lexical Consensus 实验框架：利用冻结的 DINOv2 视觉嵌入、Carroll 式无意义词和可解释的词汇学习器（含线性基线），测试智能体习得视觉概念标签、双向泛化及稳定性的能力。设计预注册的 CIFAR-100 分离实验区分感知距离与语义距离。

Result: 发现稳健的感知一致性梯度（原生>连贯泛化>中间>远距）。感知距离显著预测习得准确率（partial R²=0.245, p<1e-7），语义距离无显著贡献（partial R²=0.002, p=0.660）。命名与检索分离，基于范例的机制优于原型。冻结感知几何既基础化词汇又限制习得上限。

Conclusion: AI 系统的词汇基础化受感知几何的强烈约束，感知一致性是核心因素，语义相关性不重要。无表示适应时，词汇习得存在固有瓶颈。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence systems are commonly evaluated through task performance and behavioral imitation, but such evaluations leave open whether an artificial agent can acquire, stabilize, and use new lexical meanings from grounded experience. This paper introduces Lexical Consensus, an experimental framework for studying grounded word learning over a structured perceptual substrate. Using frozen DINOv2 visual embeddings, Carroll-style nonce words, and interpretable lexical learners plus linear baselines, we test whether agents can acquire artificial labels for visual concepts, generalize them bidirectionally, and stabilize them across controlled settings.
  The main result is a robust perceptual-coherence gradient: native categories are easiest to learn, coherent overextensions remain learnable, mid-range disjunctive concepts degrade, and far-disjunctive concepts approach chance. A pre-registered CIFAR-100 dissociation experiment confirms that this gradient is governed by perceptual distance rather than semantic relatedness: perceptual distance predicts acquisition accuracy (partial R^2 = 0.245, p < 1e-7), while semantic distance adds no significant explanatory power (partial R^2 = 0.002, p = 0.660).
  Bidirectional evaluation shows that naming and retrieval are distinct: exemplar-based mechanisms outperform centroid prototypes in label-to-image retrieval, exposing a memory-fidelity dimension separate from naming accuracy. Falsification controls, homogeneous candidate-pool evaluations, and null results on representational restructuring indicate that frozen perceptual geometry both enables lexical grounding and limits what can be acquired without representational adaptation.

</details>


### [94] [Evaluating Large Language Models for Hausa and Fongbe Machine Translation: Benchmarks, Failures, and Metric Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22269)
*Mahounan Pericles Adjovi,Roald Eiselen,Prasenjit Mitra*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文评估了四个LLM（GPT-4o Mini、Claude Sonnet 4、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Qwen2.5-7B）在英语→豪萨语和英语→丰贝语两个低资源西非语言上的翻译质量，发现：豪萨语翻译质量可接受（4.0-4.5/5），丰贝语质量极差（1.0-2.2/5）；模型排名因语言而异；自动指标与人工评判的相关性波动极大（丰贝语rho=1.0，豪萨语rho=0.5）；神经指标存在嵌入坍缩问题（相似度>0.99）。建议多指标评估且最小样本量需达2,500句。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源非洲语言翻译研究严重不足，现有自动指标是否可靠未经验证，且跨语言模型表现是否存在一致性尚不清楚。

Method: 选取豪萨语（亚非语系）和丰贝语（尼日尔-刚果语系），用四个LLM分别翻译500至10,000句，以BLEU、chrF++、TER、COMET、BERTScore等自动指标评估，并以母语者人工评分作为对照。

Result: 豪萨语质量可接受而丰贝语极差，BLEU分差达3倍；模型排名因语言而异；自动指标与人工评判相关性从强（rho=1.0）到弱（rho=0.5）不等；BERTScore等神经指标出现嵌入坍缩；样本量需≥2,500句才能得到稳定排名。

Conclusion: 低资源非洲语言翻译需采用多指标评估体系，谨慎使用神经指标，且必须保证足够样本量以避免小样本伪发现。

Abstract: We investigate the translation quality of current large language models (LLMs) for English-to-Hausa and English-to-Fongbe - two typologically distinct West African languages from the Afroasiatic and Niger-Congo families respectively - and evaluate whether standard automatic metrics reliably reflect human judgment for these low-resource languages. We evaluate four models (GPT-4o Mini, Claude Sonnet 4, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Qwen2.5-7B) at progressive scales (500 to 10,000 sentences) using automatic metrics (BLEU, chrF++, TER, COMET, BERTScore) validated against native-speaker judgment. Our results reveal three key findings. First, translation quality varies substantially by language: Hausa achieves acceptable quality (human scores 4.0-4.5/5) while Fongbe achieves poor quality (1.0-2.2/5), with a consistent 3x BLEU gap across all systems. Second, model rankings differ by language - Gemini leads for Fongbe while GPT-4o leads for Hausa by human evaluation - indicating that performance on one low-resource African language does not predict performance on another. Third, metric-human correlation varies dramatically: perfect rank correlation for Fongbe (rho=1.0) but weak correlation for Hausa (rho=0.5), where human evaluators preferred GPT-4o despite all automatic metrics ranking Claude first. We further show that neural metrics like BERTScore exhibit embedding collapse (within-language similarity >0.99) for both languages, limiting their ability to differentiate translation quality. Based on these findings, we recommend multi-metric evaluation for low-resource African languages, with particular caution when interpreting neural metrics. We establish that minimum sample sizes of n=2,500 sentences are required for stable system rankings, as smaller samples produced artifact findings that reversed at scale.

</details>


### [95] [MixedPEFT: Combining Multiple PEFT Methods with Mixed Objectives for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22272)
*Mohammed Rawhani,Dervis Karaboga,Ozkan Ufuk Nalbantoglu,Alper Basturk,Bahriye Akay*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合定制PEFT架构与混合目标训练的参数高效无监督域自适应方法，在MNLI数据集上超过现有方法，仅使用7%的可训练参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练语言模型在新领域应用时，全微调计算成本高且易发生灾难性遗忘，需要一种参数高效的域自适应方法。

Method: 将可逆适配器与LoRA结合成统一参数高效框架，采用混合目标训练：同时优化源域数据的分类损失和目标域数据的MLM损失。

Result: 在MNLI数据集20个域迁移任务上，比UDapter提升1.41%、比全微调DANN提升1.26%、比DSN提升0.86%，仅用7%可训练参数。

Conclusion: 精心设计的PEFT组合与并行优化不仅能超越参数高效方法，还能超越传统全微调方法，为参数高效无监督域自适应设立了新基准。

Abstract: Pre-trained language models struggle when applied to new domains, as full fine-tuning is computationally expensive and prone to catastrophic forgetting. This study addresses this challenge by presenting a novel parameter-efficient strategy for unsupervised domain adaptation that combines custom PEFT architectures with mixed-objective training. Our approach simultaneously optimizes classification performance on labeled source domain data and masked language modeling (MLM) on unlabeled target domain data, preserving target domain knowledge while adapting to source domain tasks. Our method employs a custom union of invertible adapters and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) within a unified parameter-efficient framework. Through comprehensive evaluation on the Multi-Genre Natural Language Inference (MNLI) dataset across 20 domain shifts, our approach achieves significant improvements over existing methods: 1.41 percentage points over the current parameter-efficient state-of-the-art UDapter, 1.26 percentage points over the fully-tuned DANN baseline, and 0.86 percentage points over DSN, while utilizing only 7% of the model's trainable parameters. These results establish new benchmarks for parameter-efficient unsupervised domain adaptation and demonstrate that carefully designed PEFT combinations with concurrent optimization can outperform both existing parameter-efficient methods and traditional fully-tuned approaches.

</details>


### [96] [From Speech to Text Corpora: Evaluating ASR-Based Data Acquisition for Low-Resource Fongbe and Hausa](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22274)
*Mahounan Pericles Adjovi,Victor Olufemi,Roald Eiselen,Prasenjit Mitra*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探索利用ASR流水线为两种西非低资源语言（Fongbe和Hausa）扩展文本语料。通过微调MMS-300M，在Fongbe上实现9.48%的词错误率（相较于之前44.04%的基线降低了78%），并保留了声调变音符号。从1,553个YouTube视频中处理了424个（45.49小时），生成6,770个转录片段。人工评估显示Hausa平均质量得分57.4/100，Fongbe为36.5/100，表明Hausa转录可用于语料构建，而Fongbe需要后处理或改进模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源非洲语言缺乏训练语言模型所需的文本语料库，亟需寻找有效的方法来扩展文本资源。

Method: 对两种类型学上不同的西非语言（声调语言Fongbe和非声调语言Hausa）采用不同的ASR方案：对Fongbe微调MMS-300M模型（使用12.3小时整理数据集）；对Hausa应用已有微调Whisper-Small模型。从YouTube收集视频，筛选后进行处理生成转录片段，并进行人工评估。

Result: Fongbe上WER降至9.48%（相对降低78%）；处理424个视频（45.49小时）生成6,770个转录片段；Hausa人工质量得分57.4/100，Fongbe为36.5/100。

Conclusion: Hausa转录接近可接受的语料构建质量，而Fongbe转录需要后处理或改进模型才能用于生产环境。研究释放了数据集、微调模型、转录语料库和完整视频目录。

Abstract: Low-resource African languages lack text corpora needed for language model training. We investigate whether ASR pipelines can extend text resources for two typologically distinct West African languages: Fongbe (tonal, diacritic-rich) and Hausa (non-tonal). We fine-tune MMS-300M on a curated 12.3-hour Fongbe dataset, achieving 9.48% WER on the ALFFA benchmark - a 78% relative reduction from the prior 44.04% baseline - while preserving tonal diacritics critical to the language. For Hausa, we apply an existing fine-tuned Whisper-Small model. We catalog 1,553 YouTube videos (236 hours) and process a subset of 424 videos (45.49 hours) selected to balance domain diversity with available computational resources, producing 6,770 transcribed segments. Human evaluation on 50 randomly sampled segments per language shows mean quality scores of 57.4/100 for Hausa and 36.5/100 for Fongbe, indicating that while Hausa transcriptions approach acceptable quality for corpus construction, Fongbe transcriptions require post-processing or improved models for production use. We release the curated dataset, fine-tuned model, transcribed corpus, and full video catalog following platform terms and ethical guidelines.

</details>


### [97] [Learning at the Right Pace: Adaptive Data Scheduling Improves LLM Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22305)
*Zicheng Xu,Ruixuan Zhang,Yu-Neng Chuang,Xiuyi Lou,Hoang Anh Duy Le,Oren Gal,Alexander S. Szalay,Zhaozhuo Xu,Guanchu Wang,Vladimir Braverman*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出自适应数据调度(ADS)框架，通过聚类级自适应分布和样本级策略边界选择替代统一数据采样，在LLM强化学习后训练中提升平均准确率5.2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM的RL后训练普遍采用统一数据采样，忽略了训练数据的语义结构以及训练策略不断变化的能力，导致训练效率受限。

Method: 提出ADS双层级数据调度框架：(1) 聚类级：按语义模式组织样本并维护自适应簇间分布以巩固当前训练进度；(2) 样本级：在簇内持续采样策略边界样本，提供信息量丰富的相对优势信号。

Result: 在三种LLM和七个推理基准上，ADS相比GRPO平均提升5.2%准确率，且能一致改进不同目标设计的RL方法。

Conclusion: ADS作为一种通用的数据调度策略，能有效提升LLM强化学习后训练效果，代码已开源。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve remarkable reasoning capabilities through reinforcement learning (RL) post-training. However, existing RL post-training commonly relies on uniform data sampling, which ignores the semantic structure of the training data and the changing capability of the training policy. To address these limitations, we propose Adaptive Data Scheduling (ADS), a dual-level data scheduling framework for pacing RL post-training that replaces uniform sampling with an adaptive distribution over semantic clusters and policy-boundary sample selection. At the cluster level, ADS organizes samples according to semantic patterns and maintains an adaptive inter-cluster distribution to solidify current training progress. At the sample level, ADS performs intra-cluster scheduling to continuously sample policy-boundary samples, which provides informative relative advantages. Experimental results across three LLMs and seven reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that ADS improves average accuracy by 5.2% over Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Notably, ADS consistently improves RL methods with different objective designs, highlighting its potential as a general data scheduling strategy for LLM RL post-training. The source code is available at: https://github.com/Richard-zrx/ADS.

</details>


### [98] [BabelJudge: Measuring LLM-as-a-Judge Reliability Across Languages and Agent Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22329)
*Shreyas KC*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: BabelJudge 是一个开源基准测试和可靠性审计框架，用于测量 LLM 作为评估者时的位置偏差、冗长偏差、排序不一致性和跨语言退化问题，通过受控扰动构建已知标签的方法免除了人工标注成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM-as-a-judge 虽已成为可扩展评估的主流方法，但其存在系统性偏差（位置偏差、冗长偏差、排序不一致、跨语言退化），而传统准确率指标无法揭示这些问题，亟需一个系统的可靠性审计框架。

Method: 提出金标签退化方法：从高质量参考响应出发，施加受控扰动构建配对样本，其金标签由构造过程已知。框架测量四种失效模式，并扩展至智能体评估的九种轨迹级扰动和三个新指标。

Result: 在 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-4bit 上的评估显示，复合偏差惩罚可靠性分数从印地语的 0.714 降至斯瓦希里语的 0.550，而原始准确率仅显示 0.835 到 0.660 的差距；斯瓦希里语排序一致性仅 0.480，接近随机水平。

Conclusion: BabelJudge 能有效暴露传统准确率隐藏的多种偏差，尤其是在低资源语言中评估者可靠性严重退化，该框架已开源支持 11 种评估后端。

Abstract: LLM-as-a-judge has become the dominant approach to scalable evaluation in NLP pipelines, yet judges themselves carry systematic biases that raw accuracy hides: they favor responses placed in slot A (position bias), they prefer longer responses regardless of quality (verbosity bias), and their reliability degrades sharply in lower-resource languages. We introduce BabelJudge, an open-source benchmark and reliability audit framework that measures all four failure modes -- position bias, verbosity bias, order inconsistency, and cross-lingual degradation -- on any judge model, without requiring human preference labels. The key insight is gold-labelling by degradation: starting from a high-quality reference response and applying a controlled perturbation yields a pairwise item whose gold label is known by construction, eliminating annotation cost. We evaluate Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-4bit across English, Hindi, Arabic, and Swahili and find that our composite bias-penalised reliability score drops from 0.714 in Hindi to 0.550 in Swahili, a gap that raw accuracy (0.835 vs. 0.660) understates. Swahili order consistency collapses to 0.480, meaning judge verdicts are near-random under slot-order swaps -- a failure mode invisible to accuracy alone. We further extend the framework to agentic evaluation via nine trajectory-level perturbations (argument corruption, tool swaps, hallucinated calls, missing steps) and three new metrics: tool accuracy, hallucination detection rate, and trajectory-length bias. BabelJudge is released as a Python package supporting 11 judge backends. Code: https://github.com/Shreyaskc/BabelJudge

</details>


### [99] [How Does Research Evolve? Tracing Cross-Domain Trajectories in NLP, ML, and CV with Claim-Grounded Typed Citations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22342)
*Abdul Muntakim,Md Abdullah Al Hafiz Khan,Sadid Hasan,Yong Pei*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了SciTraj语料库——第一个基于声明（claim）驱动的类型化引文图，将引文边链接到具体动机声明，包含32,559篇NLP/ML/Vision论文、6种关系类型、57.3万条有向边和2.87亿条长度≥3的类型化轨迹，用于分析科学进展的演化模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有引文图将不同引用角色（如扩展方法、解决局限、反驳主张等）坍缩为单一同质边类型，限制了分析科学进展的能力。作者希望构建一个细粒度的类型化引文图，以更好地理解和预测科研进展轨迹。

Method: 从论文章节中提取承载声明的句子，通过NLI蕴含验证四种声明驱动的关系（扩展、解决、实现、反驳），辅以两种仅基于相似度的关系（cosine相似度和年份间隔规则）。构建覆盖2015-2024年NLP、ML、Vision领域32,559篇论文的语料库，包含573,126条有向边和6种关系类型。

Result: 发现了学科孤岛现象（类型化引文流动中的领域隔离）以及Vision和LLM相关工作中的主题涌现。语料库包含2.87亿条长度≥3的类型化轨迹，覆盖72.8%的论文。3标注者试点实验报告κ=0.74，精度79.9%。

Conclusion: SciTraj为分析科学进展提供了更细粒度的类型化引文图，支持时序划分的类型化链接预测基准测试，并通过年份洗牌可证伪性测试分离时间结构与年份相关内容。

Abstract: How does research evolve, and what substrate would let us forecast where it goes next? Scientific progress is not simply a uniform accumulation of facts: ideas extend prior methods, address known limitations, realize proposed future directions, and sometimes dispute earlier claims. Existing citation graphs usually collapse these roles into a single homogeneous edge type, limiting how we can analyze scientific progress. We address this gap by proposing the SciTraj corpus, the first claim-grounded typed citation graph in which each edge is linked to the specific claim sentence that motivates it. Claim-bearing sentences are extracted from paper sections; four claim-driven relations are verified by NLI entailment against in-paper context, while two similarity-only relations are gated by abstract cosine and year-gap rules. SciTraj contains 32,559 papers from NLP, ML, and Vision (2015--2024), connected by 573,126 directed edges across six relation types, with NLI-verified claim seeds. Using SciTraj, we identify disciplinary siloing in typed citation flow and topic emergence concentrated in Vision and LLM-related work. The corpus also contains 287M typed trajectories of length $\geq 3$, covering 72.8% of papers, and supports a temporally split typed link-prediction benchmark. A year-shuffle falsifiability test separates temporal structure from year-correlated content, and a 3-annotator pilot reports $κ= 0.74$ with 79.9% precision.

</details>


### [100] [Curiosity as Linguistic Intervention: Using LLM Tutoring Dialogues to Influence Exploratory Learning Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22349)
*Gevindu Ganganath,Pasindu Bolonghege,Qianru Lyu,Pradeep Varakantham,Thivya Kandappu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了CURIOBOT框架，通过将Berlyne的对比变量（新颖性、复杂性、冲突、不确定性）作为语言干预策略应用于对话式辅导中，实验表明好奇心导向的干预能显著增加学习者的探索行为（最高2.4倍对话轮次），并建立了以学习者为中心的评估体系。研究证明LLM对话可作为研究语言如何塑造探索性认知的可扩展实验框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索语言如何塑造探索性认知，利用LLM在推理时系统性地操作对话策略来研究好奇心对学习行为的影响。

Method: 提出CURIOBOT框架，将Berlyne的对比变量（新颖性、复杂性、冲突、不确定性）作为适应性语言干预策略；在270场对话、多个模型家族、领域和主题复杂度下进行实验；引入以学习者为中心的评估框架（探索性提问、对话主体性、生产性挣扎、可观察好奇心）。

Result: 好奇心导向的干预持续增加学习者的探索行为，在固定时间预算下产生最多2.4倍的对话轮次；学习者侧收益在辅导侧教学质量不变时仍然持续存在。

Conclusion: 好奇心是部分独立的交互层面机制；LLM对话可作为研究语言如何塑造探索性学习行为的可扩展实验框架。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) provide a new opportunity to study how language shapes exploratory cognition because conversational strategies can be systematically manipulated at inference time. We introduce CURIOBOT, a framework that operationalizes Berlyne's collative variables, novelty, complexity, conflict, and uncertainty, as adaptive linguistic interventions for conversational tutoring. Across 270 tutoring conversations spanning multiple model families, domains, and topic complexity levels, curiosity-oriented interventions consistently increased exploratory learner behaviors, producing up to 2.4x more conversational turns under fixed time budgets. To measure these effects, we further introduce a learner-centered evaluation framework capturing exploratory questioning, conversational agency, productive struggle, and observable curiosity. Learner-side gains persisted even when tutor-side instructional quality remained unchanged, suggesting that curiosity functions as a partially independent interaction-level mechanism. More broadly, our results demonstrate that LLM-mediated dialogue can serve as a scalable experimental framework for studying how language shapes exploratory learning behavior.

</details>


### [101] [ORBIT: Training-Free Multi-Attribute Behavioral Steering via Orthogonal Subspace Rotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22357)
*Narges Ghasemi,Amir Ziashahabi,Salman Avestimehr,Jonathan May*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出ORBIT方法，通过正交旋转在联合子空间中对多个属性同时进行激活引导，无需训练即可平衡且有效地控制语言模型的多属性行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有激活引导方法大多只能控制单一属性，多属性场景下朴素求和会导致范数失衡和方向抵消，而基于分类器的方法在属性集变化时需要重新训练，缺乏轻量、训练自由的多属性控制方案。

Method: 通过SVD构建多属性联合子空间，施加单一范数保持的旋转朝向联合目标方向；引入自适应逐token门控识别需校正的属性，可选加法增强加强初始投影弱的属性；同时构建了TraitFactory多属性基准数据集。

Result: 在TraitFactory和ToneBank上，基于Llama-3.2-3B、Qwen-2.5-7B、Llama-3.1-8B三个模型的实验表明，ORBIT在多属性引导强度和平衡性上优于现有训练自由基线，且更好保持输出连贯性。

Conclusion: ORBIT实现了无需训练的多属性激活引导，有效解决了多属性控制的范数失衡和方向抵消问题，在多属性行为调控任务中表现出更优的性能和输出质量。

Abstract: Language models are widely used in assistant settings, where controlling behavioral attributes is often essential. Activation steering modifies hidden-state representations at inference time, providing a lightweight, training-free mechanism that can be toggled at runtime. Existing methods, however, have focused primarily on steering a single attribute at a time. When multiple attributes must be controlled simultaneously, naive summation of per-attribute steering vectors suffers from norm imbalance and directional cancellation, while classifier-based approaches require retraining whenever the attribute set changes. We introduce ORBIT (Orthogonal Rotation-Based Intervention Technique), a training-free extension of rotation-based steering to the multi-attribute setting. Our method constructs a joint subspace from per-attribute steering planes via singular value decomposition and applies a single norm-preserving rotation within that subspace toward a combined target direction. Adaptive per-token gating identifies which attributes need correction at each position, and an optional additive boost strengthens attributes with weak initial projection. We also introduce TraitFactory, a new multi-attribute benchmark that focuses on behavioral tendencies rather than surface-level style. We evaluate ORBIT on TraitFactory and ToneBank across three models (Llama-3.2-3B, Qwen-2.5-7B, Llama-3.1-8B) while steering multiple attributes simultaneously, showing that it achieves stronger and more balanced multi-attribute steering than existing training-free baselines while better preserving output coherence.

</details>


### [102] [First-Token Broadcasters: Mechanistic Origins of Language Identity and Distributed Robustness in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22361)
*Arjun Pillai,Christian Hoang,Anjelo Jann Laroza*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出语言身份头消融（LIHA）方法，发现多语言模型生成错误语言的原因是少数"首token广播头"（如GPT-2的L6H1）持续关注第一个token并传播语言信号。指令微调会将语言控制电路重组到早期层（如Qwen2.5-Instruct的L0H5）。补偿性重分配遵循层级化前馈级联模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言语言模型经常生成错误语言，且这一问题难以修复。作者希望探究这一现象的神经基础，即模型中哪些注意力头负责控制输出语言，以及训练方式（如指令微调）如何改变这些语言控制电路。

Method: 提出语言身份头消融（LIHA）方法：逐个置零每个注意力头，测量在2700个提示-语言对（覆盖7种语言）上的语言切换率。应用于GPT-2、Qwen2.5-1.5B-Base和Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct，并扩展中文和俄语实验。

Result: GPT-2中L6H1是主要语言控制器（切换率0.32，高于均值3.23σ）。补偿性重分配仅发生在被消融头的上方层，呈前馈级联模式。Qwen2.5-Base近平坦（最大SR=0.016），Instruct模型因果影响力集中在第0层（L0H5，SR=0.224，8.93σ）。非拉丁文字语言在GPT-2中由第0层处理。

Conclusion: 语言身份由少数关键注意力头控制，指令微调显著改变语言电路结构，将其推向早期层局部化。这为理解和修复多语言模型的错误语言生成提供了因果解释和可操作的干预目标。

Abstract: Why do multilingual language models sometimes generate in the wrong language, and why is this so hard to fix? We introduce Language Identity Head Ablation (LIHA), a causal intervention that zeros each attention head individually and measures the resulting language switch rate across a parallel dataset of 2,700 prompt-language pairs spanning seven languages. Applied to GPT-2, LIHA identifies a small set of first-token broadcaster heads - led by L6H1 (switch rate 0.32, 3.23 $σ$ above the population mean) - that attend persistently to the first prompt token, propagating its language signal throughout generation. Compensatory redistribution when heads are ablated is statistically significant (p < $10^{-5}$) and follows a directional, hierarchical pattern: compensation always recruits heads in layers above the ablated head, suggesting a feedforward cascade rather than global diffusion. To probe how training regime shapes these circuits, we apply LIHA to a controlled pair - Qwen2.5-1.5B-Base and Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct - identical in architecture and size, differing only in training. The base model is nearly flat (max SR=0.016, 200/336 heads at SR=0.0); the instruct model concentrates causal influence sharply at layer 0, led by L0H5 (SR=0.224, 8.93 $σ$ above mean), with all other layers near zero. This controlled comparison provides direct causal evidence that instruction tuning reorganizes language identity circuits toward early-layer localization. Extended experiments with Chinese and Russian confirm that first-token broadcasting is script-specific in GPT-2, with non-Latin languages handled at layer 0 - the same locus as the instruction-tuned model. Code and data will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [103] [Knowledge-Graph Grounding Helps LLMs Only for Out-of-Training Knowledge: A Controlled Study on Clinical Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22419)
*Madhulatha Mandarapu,Sandeep Kunkunuru*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究复现了Nature Medicine的结论，发现通用前沿LLM在医学基准上优于专用检索增强工具，且检索可能损害强模型。进一步发现：结构化知识图谱（KG）仅在事实超出模型训练范围时才有帮助（如私有或新数据），公共KG事实冗余且不提升性能。模型在HealthBench上的得分为~46-47（经医生校准），而GPT-5.2 Consensus得分为90.9。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然延伸Nature Medicine的研究：在前沿LLM优于检索增强临床工具且检索可能损害强模型的发现之后，追问结构化知识图谱（KG）是否改变这一局面，以及何时KG真正有帮助。

Method: 1) 复现HealthBench评分，发现前沿模型和理想补全在医生校准评分器下仅得~46-47分（一致性82.5%），复现GPT-5.2 Consensus=90.9并标记评分器缺陷；2) 使用图+向量引擎（samyama-graph）基于公共生物医学KG PrimeKG，测试朴素三元组检索和智能体NL-to-Cypher查询对MedQA的影响；3) 在合成反事实KG和混合基准（已知+新事实）上测试相同流程。

Result: 公共KG检索对弱到强模型均无提升（|Delta|<=3.4），智能体查询仅82%成功率。但在合成反事实KG和混合基准上，相同流程将训练外准确率从随机提升至~100%（+68至+79），对已知事实无提升。

Conclusion: KG辅助仅在决定性事实位于模型训练范围之外时才有帮助——公共KG事实冗余，私有和新数据才是价值所在，这与原研究的机构数据限制结论一致。

Abstract: A recent Nature Medicine study reports that general-purpose frontier LLMs outperform specialized retrieval-augmented clinical tools on medical benchmarks, and that retrieval can hurt strong models. We ask the natural follow-up: does structured knowledge-graph (KG) grounding change this, and when does grounding help at all? We contribute two results. First, a reproduction: the study's headline HealthBench score (~88) is the Consensus variant, not full HealthBench, where frontier models and ideal completions both score ~46-47 under a physician-calibrated grader (agreement 82.5%); we reproduce GPT-5.2 Consensus =90.9 and flag a score-deflating grader bug. Second, a knowledge-boundary result. Using a graph+vector engine (samyama-graph) over the public biomedical KG PrimeKG, neither naive triple retrieval nor an agentic natural-language-to-Cypher loop (82% successful queries) improves MedQA across a weak-to-strong model ladder (all |Delta| <= 3.4). On a synthetic counterfactual KG, and on a hybrid benchmark mixing known and novel facts, the identical pipeline lifts out-of-training accuracy from chance to ~100% (+68 to +79) while adding nothing on known facts (a no-LLM arm answers both). Across three regimes (no-knowledge, graph-aided, hybrid), grounding helps only insofar as the decisive fact lies outside the model's training -- public-KG facts are redundant, private and novel data are where it pays -- matching the study's institutional-data caveat.

</details>


### [104] [Words as Difference Makers: How Large Language Models Determine Causal Structure in Text](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22430)
*Wolfgang Pietsch*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了大型语言模型(LLM)如何在没有明确因果推理框架的情况下学习因果结构。作者认为LLM采用了一种基于差异制造逻辑的归纳方法（变分归纳），通过大量文本数据识别词语序列中的差异制造者和非差异制造者，其机制与实验方法中的因果推理存在根本性相似。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决LLM成功预测文本背后是否具备"世界模型"（因果与定义结构）的争议——传统因果推断工具（Pearl干预主义、Neyman-Rubin潜在结果框架）难以解释LLM如何学习因果结构。

Method: 提出LLM通过"变分归纳"学习因果结构：1) 训练中需要海量多样化文本数据以识别差异/非差异制造者；2) 分析token嵌入和自注意力等架构特征在变分归纳中的作用；3) 将LLM的差异制造逻辑与实验方法中的因果推导进行类比。

Result: LLM的差异制造逻辑与实验方法在根本上具有相似性——通过系统性地变化个别环境因素来确定其对现象的影响。

Conclusion: LLM并非依赖传统因果推理框架，而是通过变分归纳（一种基于差异制造的经验归纳逻辑）来捕捉因果结构，这为理解LLM的"世界模型"提供了新视角。

Abstract: Because large language models (LLMs) are impressively successful in predicting text, it appears that they must have access to a 'world model' representing causal and definitional structure. However, the dominant formalisms of modern causal inference -- Judea Pearl's interventionist approach and the Neyman-Rubin potential outcomes framework -- struggle to illuminate how LLMs learn causal structure. I resolve this puzzle by arguing that LLMs employ a specific inductive approach based on a difference-making logic -- sometimes called variational induction. I demonstrate how central aspects of this logic are realized during training, where LLMs require enormous amounts of text data from a wide range of contexts to identify difference- and indifference-makers within word sequences. Furthermore, I analyze specific architectural features of LLMs -- such as token embeddings and self-attention -- to determine their roles in variational induction. The difference-making logic of LLMs fundamentally parallels the experimental method, where causal relations are derived by systematically varying individual circumstances to determine their influence on a phenomenon.

</details>


### [105] [CASPER in the Machine: Insights into Character Variety in LLM-Generated Stories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22454)
*Anneliese Brei,Abhisheik Sharma,Nicholas Sanaie,Lu Wang,Snigdha Chaturvedi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文从叙事学角度，通过八个维度（如风格化、整体性）自动推断并对比LLM生成故事与人类创作故事中的角色特征，发现两者存在有趣的相似性与差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM生成的文本（尤其是虚构故事）越来越多，探究LLM生成的故事在角色塑造方面与人类创作的故事有何不同，以理解AI在创意写作中的能力与局限。

Method: 借用叙事学定义，从八个细微维度（如风格化、整体性等）分析角色；对LLM和人类创作的故事进行角色类别自动推断，然后进行对比分析。

Result: 发现了LLM生成故事与人类创作故事在角色方面存在一系列有趣的相似点和差异点。

Conclusion: LLM生成的故事与人类故事在角色塑造上既有相似之处也有显著差异，并总结了若干关键发现。

Abstract: As LLM-generated text is increasingly used, especially in fictional domains, we explore how much LLM-generated stories differ from human-written stories. In this work, we focus on characters. We borrow definitions from narratology to analyze eight intricate dimensions of character, such as stylization and wholeness. These dimensions consider more than just basic characteristics. They assess how characters are portrayed within their stories. After automatically inferring categories of characters within both LLM and human-written stories, we compare and contrast these two sets of stories. We consider the following overarching questions: (1) Do LLMs and human-written stories have similar characters? and (2) Do LLMs generate stories with a variety of characters? Our analysis includes research questions that focus on stories generated by popular LLMs and recently published human-written stories. We describe a number of interesting similarities, differences and key takeaways.

</details>


### [106] [Interleaved Speech Language Models Latently Work In Text](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22473)
*Talia Sternberg,Gallil Maimon,Yossi Adi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过logit lens分析发现，交织式语音-文本语言模型在中间层存在隐式转录阶段（将语音转为文本），随后在文本空间预测下一个词，最后转换回语音域。这种机制在77%的数据中有效，并受交织数据和文本LM初始化的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语音语言模型广泛采用语音-文本交织训练范式，但两种模态在模型隐空间中的交互机制尚不明确。理解这一过程有助于优化SLM的设计和训练策略。

Method: 使用logit lens分析不同模型族和大小的交织式语音-文本LM，观察中间层的解码输出，研究语音到文本的转换过程以及文本预测阶段的出现时机。

Result: 模型存在隐式转录阶段，语音单词的文本token在中间层可解码（77%数据中出现在top候选词中）；随后模型在文本空间预测下一个词，再转回语音域。交织数据和文本LM初始化对此行为有显著影响。

Conclusion: 揭示了语音-文本模态交互的内部机制，为优化语音语言模型（如训练策略、数据设计）提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Speech language models (SLMs) have been extensively studied, with the common paradigm incorporating text data and pre-trained text LMs. A leading approach is speech-text interleaving in which models are trained over sequences containing both speech and text tokens, aiming to boost even speech-only capabilities. Yet the way these two modalities interact in the model latent space remains unclear. In this work, we analyze interleaved speech-text LMs from different model families and sizes through the scope of the logit lens to provide such insight. We reveal that these models go through an implicit transcription phase in which the text token of the spoken word becomes decodable in intermediate layers, despite not being trained for speech recognition. The transcription of the word appears as one of the top candidate words for as much as 77\% of the data. Following this stage, the models proceed to predict the next word in the text space before transforming back to the speech domain. We finally analyze the role of interleaving data, and initializing from text LMs in eliciting this behavior, as well as seeing how this correlates with spoken knowledge abilities. Our analysis sheds light on the internal mechanisms underlying the relationship between speech and text modalities and could shape SLM optimization.

</details>


### [107] [Not All Claims Are Equally Risky: FACTOR for Adaptive Verification in Factual Long-Form Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22474)
*Areeba Hassan,Arooj Kausar,Syeda Kisaa Fatima,Gibrail Islam,Mehwish Fatima*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出FACTOR方法，通过不确定性估计自适应调整验证策略，在提升长文本生成事实性的同时降低验证成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有验证技术对所有声明采用相同验证策略，忽略了不同声明在幻觉风险上的差异，导致验证效率低下。

Method: 结合不确定性估计、自适应语言推理验证和候选重排序，根据声明级别的不确定性动态调整验证标准，将验证资源集中在高风险声明上。

Result: 在FactScore基准上，自适应验证在提升事实性的同时降低了验证成本；消融实验识别了性能提升的主要驱动因素。

Conclusion: FACTOR是一种有效且模型无关的方法，能够在不依赖特定模型的情况下改善长文本生成的事实性。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) generate fluent long-form text, however, often add unsupported factual claims. Existing verification techniques improve factuality by grounding generation in external evidence. However, the same verification policy usually applies to all claims despite being differences in hallucination risks. We propose \textit{FACTOR} (\textit{FACTuality-Oriented Risk-aware Verification}), an inference-time model that adapts verification criteria according to claim-level uncertainty. FACTOR combines uncertainty estimation, adaptive language inference verification, and candidate re-ranking to allocate verification effort where it is most needed. We evaluate \textit{FACTOR} on FactScore benchmark showing that adaptive verification improves factuality while reducing verification cost simultaneously. We further perform different ablation studies to identify the primary driver of these gains. Our results show the effective and model-agnostic performance of \textit{FACTOR} for improving factuality in long-form generation.

</details>


### [108] [ROMEVA: Geometry-Preserving Vocabulary Expansion for Roman Urdu Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22478)
*Mahnoor Khan,Afsheen Asif,Milhan Afzal Khan,Seemab Latif,Mehwish Fatima*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 针对罗马乌尔都语（Roman Urdu）拼写变体导致的子词碎片化问题，提出ROMEVA方法（子词平均初始化+PCA引导的锚点损失）扩展mBERT词汇表。实验表明，尽管ROMEVA能最好地保留预训练嵌入空间，但朴素微调在下游情感分类任务上表现更好，揭示了嵌入稳定性与下游性能之间的脱节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言模型（如mBERT）在形态不一致语言（如罗马乌尔都语）上的适应性问题尚未得到充分探索，尤其是拼写变体导致的严重子词碎片化（平均每个token产生1.50个子词）影响了模型性能。

Method: 提出ROMEVA方法，包含两个关键策略：(1) 子词平均初始化（sub-word-average initialization）：对新词汇的嵌入进行初始化；(2) PCA引导的锚点损失（PCA-guided anchor loss）：在词汇扩展过程中稳定嵌入空间。实验在36,130条评论的罗马乌尔都语语料上进行，向mBERT添加500个高频碎片化token，并与朴素微调和子词感知微调进行对比。

Result: ROMEVA在保留预训练嵌入空间方面最为有效，但朴素微调在下游情感分类任务上取得了最佳性能。嵌入稳定性与下游性能之间存在脱节。

Conclusion: 在形态不一致的语言中，更强的适应性（而非严格的嵌入保留）可能更有利于下游任务表现。嵌入空间的稳定性并不直接等同于更好的下游性能。

Abstract: Multilingual Language Models like mBERT are widely used for low-resource NLP, yet their adaptation to morphologically inconsistent languages such as Roman Urdu remains underexplored. Roman Urdu spelling variation causes severe sub-word fragmentation, averaging 1.50 sub-words per token. We propose \textit{ROMEVA} (Roman Urdu Embedding-preserving Vocabulary Adaptation), which combines sub-word-average initialization and a PCA-guided anchor loss to stabilize embeddings during vocabulary expansion. Using a 36,130-comment Roman Urdu corpus, we add 500 highly fragmented tokens to mBERT and compare naive fine-tuning, sub-word-aware fine-tuning, and \textit{ROMEVA}. While \textit{ROMEVA} most effectively preserves the pretrained embedding space, naive fine-tuning achieves the strongest downstream sentiment classification performance. These findings reveal a disconnect between embedding stability and downstream performance, suggesting that stronger adaptation may be preferable to strict embedding preservation in morphologically inconsistent languages.

</details>


### [109] [Look Light, Think Heavy: What Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Can and Cannot Do](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22565)
*Zhuoran Jin,Kejian Zhu,Hongbang Yuan,Yupu Hao,Pengfei Cao,Yubo Chen,Kang Liu,Jun Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了多模态Chain-of-Thought推理的能力与局限，发现：(1) CoT并非通用方案，在感知任务中可能产生负面影响，但在数学、科学和多图像推理等推理任务中有效；(2) 现行开源多模态推理模型整体提升有限，过度侧重数学推理；(3) 视觉推理是当前主要瓶颈，模型呈现"看得轻、想得重"模式，视觉反思在推理过程中持续减弱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究多模态Chain-of-Thought推理的能力与不足之处，回答"What can multimodal CoT do, and where and why does it fall short?"这一核心问题。

Method: 在12个多模态任务（涵盖感知和推理两类）上，使用14个非推理模型和8个推理模型进行系统评估与分析。

Result: (1) CoT在感知任务上效果不佳（如视觉定位、目标计数），但在推理任务上有效；(2) 开源多模态推理模型整体提升有限，过度侧重数学推理；(3) 模型呈现"Look Light, Think Heavy"模式，视觉推理是主要瓶颈。

Conclusion: 多模态CoT处理语言反思相对较好，但缺乏在推理过程中维持深层视觉内省的能力，视觉反思在推理中持续减弱。

Abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) has become a standard method for improving reasoning capabilities in large language models (LLMs) by eliciting step-by-step thinking, but its effectiveness in multimodal tasks remains unclear. In this paper, we aim to systematically investigate the key question: What can multimodal Chain-of-Thought reasoning do, and where and why does it fall short? To this end, we evaluate 12 multimodal tasks across perception and reasoning categories using both 14 non-reasoning models and 8 reasoning models. Our analysis reveals several important findings: (1) CoT is not a free lunch and should be used selectively depending on the specific requirements of each task. For perception tasks, CoT can lead to undesirable side effects, such as reduced performance in visual grounding and object counting. In contrast, it proves effective for reasoning tasks involving mathematical, scientific, and multi-image reasoning; (2) Compared to original models, existing open-source multimodal reasoning models often yield only marginal overall improvements, possibly due to an overemphasis on mathematical reasoning at the expense of broader capabilities; (3) Visual reasoning remains a key bottleneck for current multimodal CoT, as models exhibit a Look Light, Think Heavy pattern where verbal reflection rises and falls during reasoning, whereas visual reflection consistently diminishes. These findings suggest that while multimodal CoT handles verbal reflection relatively well, it lacks the ability to maintain deep visual introspection throughout the reasoning process.

</details>


### [110] [What are Key Factors for Updates in RL for LLM Reasoning?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22570)
*Peidong Wang,Demi Wang,Xufang Luo,Jiahang Xu,Xiaocui Yang,Shi Feng,Yuqing Yang,Dongsheng Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文理论分析了RLVR更新中off-policy程度（每轮rollout的梯度步数）对重要性采样比率分布及裁剪行为的影响，发现其决定哪些token主导更新。基于此提出自适应裁剪策略优化（ACPO），根据重要性采样比率的经验方差调整不同token组的裁剪边界，在3B/7B模型上的数学推理、表格QA等基准上超越DAPO等强基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR工作多依赖启发式直觉，导致算法选择分歧甚至矛盾但均声称有效，缺乏理论理解。本文旨在通过理论分析揭示RLVR更新的核心机制，解释不同算法选择为何都能取得收益。

Method: 1) 理论分析RLVR更新，揭示off-policy程度（每轮rollout的梯度步数）影响重要性采样比率分布和裁剪行为，进而决定哪些token主导更新。2) 将梯度期望作为核心量，分析token概率、优势函数和重要性采样比率的作用。3) 提出ACPO，根据重要性采样比率经验方差自适应调整不同token组的裁剪边界。

Result: 在3B和7B模型上，涵盖数学问题求解、表格QA、逻辑谜题等多样化推理基准中，ACPO优于DAPO、CISPO等强基线方法。

Conclusion: 基于理论分析驱动的原则性方法能产生更鲁棒有效的RLVR算法，验证了理论指导实践的价值。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising framework for enhancing the reasoning ability of large language models. However, much of the existing work is guided by heuristic intuition, leading to divergent algorithmic choices, even contradictory ones that nevertheless report empirical gains. To better understand this phenomenon, we conduct a theoretical analysis of RLVR updates. Our study reveals that differences in off-policy degree, determined by the number of gradient steps per rollout, substantially affect the distribution of importance sampling ratios and their clipping behavior, thereby altering which tokens dominate the update. Building on this insight, we characterize gradient expectation as the central quantity governing update dynamics and analyze the roles of token probability, advantage, and importance sampling ratio. Motivated by these findings, we propose Adaptive Clip Policy Optimization (ACPO), which adjusts clipping boundaries across token groups according to the empirical variance of their importance sampling ratios. Experiments on 3B and 7B models across diverse reasoning benchmarks, spanning mathematical problem solving, tabular QA, and logic puzzles, demonstrate that ACPO outperforms strong baselines such as DAPO and CISPO. These results demonstrate that principled, analysis-driven approaches yield more robust and effective RLVR methods. Code is available in: https://github.com/Control-derek/ACPO

</details>


### [111] [Context-Aware Distillation and Ablation for Text2DSL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22578)
*Alexander V. Kozachok,Alexander M. Nazimov,Shamil G. Magomedov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文在Text2DSL方向提出两项改进：(1) 用上下文感知蒸馏替代纯提示生成，构建了包含BNF语法、API规范、标识符词汇的结构化上下文，并通过AST验证+运行时测试两阶段流水线，将PolkitBench语料库从4,204扩展到10,073对，AST有效性100%，运行时通过率99.7%。(2) 对结构化上下文进行逐组件析因消融实验（8种条件C0-C7），发现：新语料库使基线性能大幅下降，而上下文增强模式仅轻微退化；完整上下文C7在所有指标上最优；词汇组件对语义质量贡献最大，API和BNF对结构有效性贡献最大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在Text2DSL（从自然语言自动生成领域特定语言代码）任务中，现有方法依赖纯提示合成，生成质量有限。作者希望探索结构化上下文（包括BNF语法、API规范、标识符词汇）能否显著提升生成质量，并量化各组件对最终性能的贡献。

Method: (1) 提出上下文感知蒸馏：使用教师大模型DeepSeek-V4-Flash，在显式定义的结构化上下文（BNF语法+API规范+封闭标识符词汇）下生成文本-DSL对，并通过esprima进行AST验证和polkitd守护进程+pkcheck客户端进行运行时测试的两阶段流水线过滤。(2) 设计8种消融条件C0-C7（从无上下文到完整上下文），在GigaChat-10B-A1.8B模型上评估各组件（BNF、API、词汇）的独立与组合贡献，并用Shapley值分解量化各组件影响。

Result: (1) PolkitBench语料库从4,204对扩展到10,073对，AST有效性100%，运行时通过率99.7%。(2) 新语料库使基线模式（无上下文）的Syntax Valid从97.6%降至58.5%，Combined Score从0.482降至0.252；而上下文增强模式仅从98.6%/0.801降至97.4%/0.750。(3) 完整上下文C7在所有指标上最优。(4) 词汇组件对语义质量贡献最大（Combined +0.198），API对结构有效性贡献最大（+24.7 pp），BNF次之（+22.3 pp）。

Conclusion: 结构化上下文不是装饰性改进，而是承担重要作用的机制。词汇组件是语义质量的关键，API和BNF是结构有效性的核心。完整上下文（C7）是最优配置，这为Text2DSL任务中的上下文设计提供了明确指导。

Abstract: We extend our prior work on Text2DSL automatic generation of domain-specific language (DSL) code from natural language descriptions along two complementary axes. First, we replace prompt-only synthetic generation with context-aware distillation, in which a teacher large language model (DeepSeek-V4-Flash) operates under an explicitly defined structured context comprising a BNF grammar, an API specification, and a closed identifier vocabulary; the resulting corpus is verified by a two-tier pipeline combining AST validation through esprima and runtime acceptance through the production polkitd daemon and the pkcheck client. This scales the verified PolkitBench corpus from 4,204 to 10,073 natural-language-to-Polkit-rule pairs at 100.0% AST validity and 99.7% runtime pass rate. Second, we conduct the per-component factorial ablation of structured context that was identified as future work in the precursor study: eight conditions C0-C7 are evaluated on GigaChat-10B-A1.8B with the new corpus. Three findings emerge. (i) The new harder corpus collapses the baseline mode (Syntax Valid 97.6% -> 58.5%, Combined Score 0.482 -> 0.252), whereas the context-enhanced mode degrades only marginally (Syntax 98.6% -> 97.4%, Combined 0.801 -> 0.750), confirming that structured context is not a cosmetic improvement but a load-bearing mechanism. (ii) The best absolute condition is the full context C7 across all metrics, while the strongest partial conditions (C5 = BNF + Vocabulary, C6 = API + Vocabulary) both contain the vocabulary. (iii) A Shapley-style decomposition assigns the largest semantic-quality effect to the vocabulary (Combined +0.198), the largest structural-validity effects to API (+24.7 pp) and BNF (+22.3 pp).

</details>


### [112] [Sub-Billion, Super-Frontier: Small Language Models Rival Zero-Shot Frontier LLMs on General and Literary Relation Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22606)
*Despina Christou,Grigorios Tsoumakas*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文系统比较了小语言模型（SLMs，360M-3B参数）与大语言模型（LLMs）在关系抽取任务上的表现，发现经过任务适配训练的SLM（如Qwen2.5-0.5B）在通用领域和文学领域均能超越零样本的GPT-5.4和Claude Sonnet 4.6等前沿大模型，证明了在数据可用的情况下，紧凑的任务适配模型能实现准确、隐私且硬件高效的关系抽取。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在关系抽取任务上表现强劲，但计算需求大且依赖专有API，限制了在资源受限或隐私敏感场景中的部署。本研究旨在探究小语言模型能否缩小这一差距，实现高效、私密的关系抽取。

Method: 选取5个参数在360M至3B之间的SLM，在3种领域组成机制和2种提示微调风格下（共30种配置）进行评估，与零样本的前沿LLM及判别式RoBERTa基线对比。在9个基准上测试，包含通用领域和文学文本的关系抽取。

Result: 最佳sub-billion模型Qwen2.5-0.5B在通用领域微调后正类micro-F1达0.83，远超GPT-5.4的0.69和Claude Sonnet 4.6的0.66。在文学领域，微调SLM在Biographical基准达0.92（GPT-5.4为0.83），文学平均达0.833（GPT-5.4为0.578）。RoBERTa基线同样超越前沿LLM，表明增益来自任务适配而非生成式解码。

Conclusion: 当任务特定数据可用时，紧凑的任务适配模型能够提供准确、隐私保护且硬件高效的关系抽取。SLM并非本质更强，而是针对性任务适配使4位量化模型可在单张消费级GPU上部署，超越了通用型前沿系统。
