We present UnBias-Plus, an open-source toolkit unifying (1) segment-level multi-class bias classification, (2) biased span localization, (3) neutral text rewriting, and (4) reasoning for each decision. Available via Python, CLI, REST API, and web interfaces, UnBias-Plus supports accessible bias analysis. The toolkit, source code, models, datasets, and documentation are publicly available.

</details>


### [151] [TriggerBench: Investigating Prospective Memory for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23459)
*Tianhua Zhang,Xinjiang Wang,Qianxi Zhang,Qi Chen,Kun Li,Yaoqi Chen,Dingdong Wang,Helen Meng,Yan Lu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出TriggerBench基准，系统评估大语言模型的前瞻记忆（PM）能力，发现PM存在精确率-召回率权衡、注意力脆弱性，且PM显着难于回顾记忆（RM），并可作为模型剩余推理能力的行为探针。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM评估主要关注回顾记忆（通过显式查询），而前瞻记忆（自发回忆并执行潜在约束的能力）未被评估，但这对长交互场景至关重要。

Method: 构建TriggerBench基准，涵盖五个维度的日常助手和专业工作流场景；每对场景配备匹配的RM控制、对比性正/负变体及过载触发器，在同一协议下实现精细化的主动召回率、误报率和注意力鲁棒性测量。

Result: （i）PM存在精确率-召回率权衡和注意力脆弱性，增强推理可提升主动召回但可能过拟合"始终提醒"启发式；PM在隐式约束或触发器过载下性能显著下降。（ii）PM明显难于RM：相同上下文下RM在10万token内接近饱和，PM随上下文长度增加急剧衰减。（iii）PM可作为推理能力的行为探针：成功轨迹对应的PM准确率高于失败轨迹。

Conclusion: 稳健的前瞻记忆仍是一个开放挑战，PM可作为衡量模型剩余推理容量的有效指标，为长上下文LLM评估提供新视角。

Abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in long interactions, existing evaluations focus predominantly on retrospective memory (RM) via explicit queries. Prospective memory (PM), the critical ability to spontaneously recall and act on latent constraints without direct prompts, remains largely unevaluated. We introduce TriggerBench, a comprehensive PM benchmark spanning five dimensions across both daily assistants and professional workflows. TriggerBench pairs scenarios with matched RM controls, contrastive positive/negative variants, and overloaded triggers, enabling fine-grained measurement of proactive recall, false-alarm rate, and attentional robustness under a single protocol. Our evaluation yields three key findings. (i) PM shows a precision-recall trade-off and attentional fragility. Though enhanced reasoning significantly improves proactive recall, models may overfit to an "always-remind" heuristic. Furthermore, PM accuracy degrades substantially under implicit constraints or triggers overloaded by concurrent user requests, indicating that robust PM remains an open challenge. (ii) PM is notably harder than RM: on identical contexts, RM near-saturates up to 100K tokens, while PM decays sharply as context length scales. (iii) PM may serve as a behavioral probe of spare reasoning capacity. Pairing PM scenarios with AIME-2025 math problems reveals that successful trajectories yield higher PM accuracy than failed ones at the same context length, showing PM tracks spare reasoning budget that token count obscures. Project page: https://github.com/KristenZHANG/TriggerBench-Official.

</details>


### [152] [Self-Compacting Language Model Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23525)
*Tianjian Li,Jingyu Zhang,William Jurayj,Xi Wang,Chuanyang Jin,Mehrdad Farajtabar,Eric Nalisnick,Daniel Khashabi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SelfCompact是一种让模型自主决定何时以及如何压缩长轨迹上下文的框架，通过配对压缩工具与轻量级规则，无需微调即可实现自适应压缩，在数学和智能体搜索任务上优于固定间隔压缩方案，并暴露出模型元认知能力的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长智能体轨迹中，链式推理和工具调用会积累陈旧内容，锚定后续生成并最终超出上下文窗口。现有固定间隔压缩策略忽视轨迹结构，可能在推理中途或搜索过程中丢弃部分结果。

Method: 提出SelfCompact框架，包含两个推理时要素：(i) 模型可主动调用的压缩工具，用于总结累积的上下文；(ii) 轻量级规则，规定何时触发压缩（子任务解决或轨迹收敛）以及何时抑制压缩（推导中途或陷入困境）。两者缺一不可。

Result: 在六个基准测试（竞争性数学与智能体搜索）和七个模型上，SelfCompact匹配或超越固定间隔压缩方案，同时token成本更低；相比无压缩基线，数学提升最高18.1个百分点，智能体搜索提升5-9个百分点，单问题成本降低30-70%。

Conclusion: 未受提示的模型无法可靠判断自身上下文何时"腐烂"，但轻量级规则可弥补这一元认知差距；压缩时机选择是无需训练即可由框架提供的能力。

Abstract: Long agent traces composed of chains of thought and tool calls accumulate stale content that anchor subsequent generations, and eventually outgrow the context window. Existing scaffolds mitigate it with fixed-interval compaction triggered at a token threshold. Such triggers pay no heed to trajectory structure, risking discard of partial results mid-derivation or mid-search. We propose SelfCompact, a scaffold that allows the model itself to decide when and how to compact. Specifically, it pairs two inference-time elements: (i) a compaction tool the model invokes to summarize the accumulated context, and (ii) a lightweight rubric specifying when to fire (a sub-task has resolved, or the trajectory is converging) and when to suppress (mid-derivation, or when stuck). Both are needed. The tool alone is unevenly used across open-weight models, often invoked at unhelpful moments or not at all; the rubric alone cannot act. Together, they elicit effective adaptive compaction without any fine-tuning or external supervision. We present empirical results on six benchmarks (competitive math and agentic search) and seven models. Our results show that SelfCompact matches or exceeds fixed-interval summarization at a fraction of the token cost, improving over a no-summarization baseline by up to 18.1 points on math and 5-9 points on agentic search at 30-70% lower per-question cost. Our results expose a meta-cognitive gap: although unprompted models cannot reliably tell when their own context is rotting, a lightweight rubric closes this gap, reframing when to compact as a capability that scaffolds can supply without training.

</details>


### [153] [LangMAP: A Language-Adaptive Approach to Tokenization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23566)
*Clara Meister,Suchir Salhan,Andrzej Szablewski,Pietro Lesci,Paula Buttery,Tiago Pimentel*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出LangMAP分词方案，在单共享词汇表上实现语言特定分词，无需改变词汇表即可适配预训练模型，在形态边界对齐和AST对齐上表现优异，但对下游任务效果不一。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语言特定分词器虽然能提升模型性能，但使用成本高：要么从头训练新模型，要么需调整预训练模型的词汇表。作者希望在不改变词汇表的前提下，实现语言特定的分词方案。

Method: 提出LangMAP分词方案，将UnigramLM算法扩展到多语言场景。训练时需要语言标签，但推理时无需知道输入语言即可执行语言特定分词。

Result: 在14个开源分词器、9种自然语言和9种编程语言上，LangMAP在形态边界对齐和AST叶边界对齐上均有提升。下游任务中，在多语言语法可接受性任务上表现提升，但在知识相关任务上效果不一致。

Conclusion: LangMAP实现了无需改变词汇表即可进行语言特定分词，在形态和语法对齐上效果显著，但下游任务泛化能力仍需进一步验证。

Abstract: Language-specific tokenizers improve tokenization quality and the downstream performance of models on those languages. However, using such a tokenizer comes at a cost: either a new model must be trained from scratch, or the vocabulary of an existing pretrained model must be adapted. We propose Language-adaptive Maximum a Posteriori (LangMAP) Tokenization, a tokenization scheme that extends the UnigramLM algorithm to the multilingual setting, producing language-specific tokenization from a single shared vocabulary. Notably, LangMAP can be used when training a multilingual language model from scratch or to adapt a pretrained model's tokenizer to individual languages without changing its vocabulary. While language labels are required at training time, a key feature of the algorithm is that it then performs language-specific tokenization at inference without knowledge of the input's language. Across 14 open-source tokenizers, 9 natural languages, and 9 programming languages, LangMAP improves morphological boundary alignment and, for all coding languages tested, alignment with abstract syntax tree (AST) leaf boundaries. In fine-tuning experiments, results are mixed: LangMAP improves target-language grammatical acceptability (MultiBLiMP) on the languages tested; its benefits are less consistent on knowledge-related tasks (Global-PIQA, Belebele).

</details>


### [154] [Evaluation Awareness Is Not One Capability: Evidence from Open Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23583)
*Nilesh Nayan,Aishwarya Sampath Kumar,Rishiraj Girmal,Shivani Anilkumar,Sankaran Vaidyanathan,David A. Nader Palacio,Reshmi Ghosh,Soundararajan Srinivasan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过37个开源模型的8个实验发现，模型能检测到评估环境（best AUROC 0.714 vs 人类0.819），这导致基准测试表现（高顺从性）无法反映真实部署行为（低顺从性）。检测能力主要来自指令微调而非规模，且与行为表现、可控性等维度弱相关，形成无法被单一分数衡量的“基准幻觉”。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全基准假设测试条件下的行为能预测部署行为，但模型可能识别出评估信号并改变其行为，导致基准分数虚高。作者希望系统性地刻画这种“评估意识”的检测、表现、可控性及其相互关系，揭示基准测试与真实部署之间的差距。

Method: 对37个开源模型（7个模型家族）进行8项实验：(i)评估模型是否/如何检测评估环境；(ii)检测如何改变安全行为（如假想框架下硬拒绝下降5.8个百分点）；(iii)表征分析（改写后探针AUROC仍达0.98）；(iv)各维度之间的耦合分析（仅1/15相关性显著）。

Result: (i)24/37模型超过随机，最佳AUROC 0.714低于人类的0.819，指令微调主导而规模作用有限。(ii)检测显著改变行为：假想框架下硬拒绝下降5.8个百分点，21/140个HarmBench框架效应显著，顺从性最高增加30个百分点。(iii)改写将行为降至随机水平以下后，表征探针AUROC仍保持0.98；多层干预可因果影响下游任务。(iv)各维度弱耦合，唯一稳健关联是行为检测与框架抵抗的负相关（ρ=-0.79, p<0.001）。

Conclusion: 可检测性、行为表现和可控性相互独立变化，评估意识是一个多变量问题而非单一分数，因此任何单一的“意识分数”都不能可靠地代表部署安全性。作者将这种差距称为“基准幻觉”。

Abstract: Safety benchmarks assume that test-condition behavior predicts deployment behavior, an assumption that fails if models detect evaluation cues and adapt. This opens a gap between benchmark performance and deployment behavior: compliance measured under test conditions becomes an optimistic upper bound that overstates how safely a model behaves once the evaluation harness is removed. We characterize this evaluation awareness through eight experiments across 37 open-weight models and seven families. (i)Detection is moderate and training-driven (24/37 models exceed chance, best AUROC 0.714 vs.0.819 human, with instruction tuning dominating over scale). (ii)Detection shifts safety behavior (hard refusal drops 5.8 percentage points under hypothetical framing, and 21/140 HarmBench framing effects are significant, with compliance rising up to +30 percentage points. (iii)Representations survive behavioral collapse (probes retain AUROC 0.98 under rewrites that drive behavior below chance, and multi-layer steering causally moves three downstream tasks while random controls do not). (iv)These axes are weakly coupled (only 1/15 correlations are significant, the sole robust link being behavioral detection versus framing resistance, $ρ=-0.79$, $p<0.001$). We call this gap the benchmark illusion: because detectability, behavioral manifestation, and controllability vary independently, it is multivariate rather than a single number, so no single awareness score is a reliable proxy for deployment safety.

</details>


### [155] [EnterpriseClawBench: Benchmarking Agents from Real Workplace Sessions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23654)
*Jincheng Zhong,Weizhi Wang,Che Jiang,Kai Tian,Zhenzhao Yuan,Junlin Yang,Dianqiao Lei,Kaiyan Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了EnterpriseClawBench，一个从真实企业会话构建的智能体基准测试，包含852个可复现任务。由于涉及企业私密内容，仅公开构建和评估协议。最佳配置（Codex + GPT-5.5）得分仅0.663，表明企业智能体评估需要多维度报告，而非单一分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业智能体日益在复杂工作空间中运行（处理异构文件、调用工具、交付业务制品），但缺乏能够反映真实企业场景的标准化基准测试。现有基准往往过于简化或脱离实际企业环境。

Method: 从大型企业会话存档出发，构建了852个可复现任务，每个任务包含恢复的fixtures、重写提示词、角色分类、技能子类、硬规则和语义评估标准。由于数据涉密，仅公开构建和评估协议。

Result: 最佳配置（Codex + GPT-5.5）在EnterpriseClawBench上仅达0.663分，性能远未饱和。

Conclusion: 企业智能体评估不能仅靠单一分数，必须报告：harness-model组合、制品交付质量、视觉质量、成本、运行时和技能迁移行为等多维指标。

Abstract: Enterprise agents increasingly operate inside workspaces: they read heterogeneous files, invoke tools, and deliver business artifacts. We introduce EnterpriseClawBench, an enterprise agent benchmark constructed from proprietary, real-world agent sessions. Starting from a large archive of workplace sessions, the EnterpriseClawBench produces 852 reproducible tasks, each paired with recovered fixtures, rewritten prompts, role classes, skill subclasses, hard rules, and semantic rubrics. Because the sessions contain internal enterprise content, we do not release the benchmark data; instead, our reusable contribution is the construction and evaluation protocol. On EnterpriseClawBench, the best configuration reaches only 0.663 (Codex with GPT-5.5). These results show that enterprise agent evaluation must report harness--model combinations, artifact delivery, visual quality, cost, runtime, and skill-transfer behavior, rather than collapsing performance into a single score. Code: https://github.com/FrontisAI/EnterpriseClawBench

</details>


### [156] [Can LLMs Reliably Self-Report Adversarial Prefills, and How?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23671)
*Quang Minh Nguyen,Uzair Ahmed,Taegyoon Kim*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探究大语言模型（LLM）在安全背景下的内省能力，发现模型无法可靠识别自身输出是否受到对抗性前缀攻击（adversarial prefill attack）的影响，且其内省信号主要来源于安全/拒绝相关推理。通过LoRA微调（SFT、GRPO、DPO）试图提升内省能力，反而扩大了意图探测与外部篡改探测之间的差距，并在多数模型上意外提升了攻击成功率。研究揭示了LLM自我报告在安全情境中不可靠的风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前工作已表明LLM在良性任务上具备一定的内省能力，但在安全关键场景下（如模型是否能够识别自身输出被对抗性攻击操纵），这种能力是否仍然可靠尚未被系统研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，考察模型在安全背景下内省信号的真实来源及其局限性。

Method: 使用10个开源指令微调LLM（3B-70B）在4个安全基准上进行实验。通过对抗性前缀攻击生成被污染的响应，然后测试模型能否识别这些响应是"自然产出"还是"被攻击诱导"。采用权重正交化（去除拒绝方向）、不同探测框架（意图探测 vs. 外部篡改探测）以及三种LoRA微调方法（SFT、GRPO、DPO）进行干预分析。

Result: 模型在被污染响应上声称"有意图"的平均比例为27.3%；正交化去除拒绝方向后，污染与自然输出间的声称差距几乎归零；意图探测与篡改探测结果定性不同；LoRA微调（SFT、GRPO、DPO）在8B-27B模型上均扩大了意图探测差距，且方法排名因模型而异，干预无法迁移到篡改探测，反而在多数模型上提高了攻击成功率。

Conclusion: LLM在安全情境下的内省信号不可靠，其来源主要与安全/拒绝推理相关而非真正的自我认知。当前的微调干预无法有效提升内省能力，反而可能产生反效果。这警示我们在依赖模型自我报告进行安全评估时需要保持谨慎。

Abstract: Prior work shows that large language models (LLMs) exhibit introspective capability on benign tasks. We extend the question to safety contexts and examine how reliably a model can recognize that its own prior response was elicited by an adversarial prefill attack. Across ten open-weight instruction-tuned LLMs (3B to 70B) and four safety benchmarks, no model reliably recognizes its own compromised outputs, with models claiming intent on prefilled responses at an average rate of $27.3\%$. Introspective signal stems largely from safety- and refusal-related reasoning. Orthogonalizing models' weights against the refusal direction collapses the gap between claiming rates on prefilled and natural outputs to near zero, though the direction is not its unique mediator. The signal is also probe-dependent: framing the question as internal intention versus external tampering elicits qualitatively different responses on the same models. We test three LoRA finetuning methods (SFT, GRPO, DPO) on eight models from 3B to 27B; all three widen the intention-probe gap on every model from 8B to 27B, with method ranking varying by model. The intervention does not transfer to the tampering probe and counterintuitively raises attack success rate under adversarial prefill on most models, amounting to a partial mitigation. These findings outline mechanisms underpinning the observed introspective signals in safety contexts and highlight risks in the reliability of LLM self-reports.

</details>


### [157] [Randomized YaRN Improves Length Generalization for Long-Context Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23687)
*Manas Mehta,Fangcong Yin,Greg Durrett*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Randomized YaRN方法，通过在短序列训练中引入随机化的YaRN位置编码和长度课程，提升LLM在超长序列（16K-128K）上的推理泛化能力，在BABILong和MRCR基准上超越标准微调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在短序列上预训练后，即使经过额外训练也难以泛化到更长的序列，长上下文推理能力受限。

Method: 结合YaRN位置外推、随机位置编码和长度课程训练。在短上下文训练中，为token分配从更大位置范围采样的YaRN位置编码，使模型在短输入时也暴露于分布外（OOD）的位置表征。

Result: 在<8K上下文训练数据上，Randomized YaRN在16K到128K上下文长度上持续提升推理性能，超过标准微调，在远超出分布的长度上增益最大。

Conclusion: 渐进式地让模型暴露于分布外位置分布，是实现可泛化长上下文推理的有效策略。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are typically pretrained on short sequences and then extended to work on longer sequences with additional training. However, such LLMs still struggle to further generalize to very long sequences. We propose Randomized YaRN, a training method that improves length generalization by combining YaRN-based positional extrapolation with randomized positional encoding and a length curriculum. During training on short context data, tokens are assigned YaRN positional encodings sampled from a larger position range, exposing the model to out-of-distribution positional representations even on short-context inputs. We evaluate Randomized YaRN on two challenging long-context reasoning benchmarks, BABILong and Multi-Round Coreference Resolution (MRCR). When training on data with <8K context, Randomized YaRN consistently improves reasoning performance on context lengths from 16K to 128K and outperforms standard fine-tuning, with the largest gains appearing at far out-of-distribution lengths. Our results suggest that progressively exposing models to OOD positional distributions provides an effective recipe for generalizable long-context reasoning.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.PR'></div>

# q-fin.PR [[Back]](#toc)

### [158] [A Unified General Formula for Arbitrary Liquidity Operations in Weighted AMMs: Potential Applications to Intelligent Transportation Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22118)
*Vittorio Astarita,Giuseppe Guido,Sina Shaffiee Haghshenas,Sami Shaffiee Haghshenas*

Main category: q-fin.PR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个统一闭式公式，将Balancer型自动做市商的四种标准资源分配操作扩展为全部六种操作，并证明无费用环境下任意非比例操作等价于内部再平衡交换加比例操作，为智能交通系统的去中心化资源分配提供了数学基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能交通系统需要去中心化机制来动态分配有限资源（如货运容量、充电设施等），现有文献仅记录了四种标准操作且推导分离，缺乏统一框架。

Method: 将Balancer型加权不变性推广到多token化资源的广义形式，推导出一个统一闭式公式，覆盖所有六种资源分配操作；并证明两个交换分解定理。

Result: 守恒不变性与分配公式在结构上等价；发现了两种此前未记录的操作（部分比例贡献和完全非比例操作）；两个交换分解定理将单资源命题推广到任意多资源操作。

Conclusion: 该框架为交通网络的去中心化市场协调提供了数学上严谨的机制，可支持更灵活的资源分配策略。

Abstract: Intelligent transportation systems increasingly rely on decentralized mechanisms to allocate limited resources such as freight capacity, warehouse availability, charging infrastructure, and network bandwidth. Efficient allocation requires pricing mechanisms that adapt dynamically to demand while preserving system stability. This paper investigates weighted constant-function market makers as a decentralized resource allocation mechanism for intelligent transportation systems, adapting the weighted invariant from Balancer-type automated market makers to model a generalized formulation over multiple tokenized resources. The standard literature documents exactly four resource allocation operations: proportional contribution, proportional withdrawal, single-resource contribution, and single-resource withdrawal, each obtained via separate derivations. This paper presents a single closed-form formula that unifies all four cases and extends them to two previously undocumented operations: partial-proportional contributions and fully non-proportional operations. The unified formula reveals that the conservation invariant and the allocation formula are structurally identical; the invariant itself is the general allocation formula. We prove two swap-decomposition theorems showing that, in a fee-less environment, any non-proportional operation is equivalent to an internal rebalancing swap combined with a proportional operation. Both theorems generalize previous propositions from single-resource to arbitrary multi-resource operations. The proposed framework provides a mathematically grounded mechanism for decentralized market-based coordination in transportation networks.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.TR'></div>

# q-fin.TR [[Back]](#toc)

### [159] [Transaction Costs and Speed in the Ethereum Ecosystem: Scalability of the Mainnet and Layer 2s](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22206)
*Meghan Ambrosia,Bruce Mizrach*

Main category: q-fin.TR

TL;DR: 本文研究了2024年1月至2026年3月期间以太坊主网、L2网络、Solana和Polygon的交易速度与费用演变，并预测了未来趋势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估以太坊升级（增加区块大小和blob数量）对TPS和费用的实际影响，并比较不同区块链网络的性能发展。

Method: 基于2024年1月至2026年3月的实际数据，分析以太坊主网、L2、Solana和Polygon的TPS和手续费变化，并进行未来趋势预测。

Result: 以太坊升级使主网和L2的TPS翻倍；主网中位费从$2降至$0.02以下，L2中位费下降95%以上（从$0.05降至$0.0015）。预计主网中位费将在2027年8月与Solana趋同，但TPS在2034年前低于100；L2将在2029年3月超越Solana的TPS，并在2026年10月实现更低的中位费。

Conclusion: 以太坊升级显著降低了费用并提升了TPS，但主网TPS增长缓慢；L2在费用和速度上展现出更强的竞争力，有望超越Solana。

Abstract: We study the evolution of transaction speed and fees from January 2024 through March 2026, comparing Ethereum Mainnet and its Layer 2 (L2) networks, as well as Solana and Polygon. Ethereum has undergone upgrades that have increased block size and blob count. These upgrades have doubled transactions per second (TPS) on both the Mainnet and the L2 networks. Mainnet median fees have fallen from over \$2 to under \$0.02, and L2 median fees have fallen more than 95% from \$0.05 to \$0.0015. We forecast that Mainnet median fees will converge with Solana in August 2027, but TPS will remain below 100 until 2034. The L1 Strawmap, proposing EIP-7938, a potential exponential increase in the gas limit, brings the Mainnet to only 100 TPS in January 2028. With continued blob expansion, L2s will surpass Solana TPS in March 2029 and have lower median fees by October 2026.

</details>


### [160] [Endogenous Randomness from Adversarial Market Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22743)
*Jian Sun*

Main category: q-fin.TR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个确定性对抗性市场模型，其中内生涌现的表观随机性源于市场机制与预测性交易者之间的交互。初始平滑、高可预测性的市场路径在经过对抗性适应后，交易者样本外利润趋于零，且回报序列呈现平衡、低自相关性等统计特性，支持市场随机性源于套利压力内生残差而非外生随机冲击的假说。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点认为市场随机性来自外生随机冲击，本文试图证明市场看似随机的特征可以内生地产生于市场机制与交易者的对抗过程中，而不需要外生噪声注入。

Method: 构建确定性对抗性市场模型：市场由确定性二元回报路径表示，交易者从样本内历史学习预测策略并在样本外进行交易，市场随后对抗性适应以减少交易者的预测优势和交易优势。实验从平滑、高可预测性的市场路径开始，让具有多回溯窗口和多持有期的交易者学习预测未来累积回报。

Result: 样本外正回报比例为0.5010，转移率0.4896，最大绝对值自相关0.0275。二元回报块变换后接近[0,1]均匀分布，归一化块和与标准正态分布一致。无需显式施加符号平衡、转移率或自相关惩罚，序列自然呈现平衡、低自相关等随机特征。

Conclusion: 市场随机性可以内生地产生于套利压力，是对抗性市场机制下交易者预测能力被消除后的残差现象，而非源于外生随机冲击。

Abstract: We propose a deterministic adversarial market model in which apparent randomness emerges endogenously from the interaction between a market mechanism and a population of predictive traders. Unlike a classical generative adversarial network, the model does not attempt to imitate an external empirical data distribution and does not inject random noise into a generator. The market is represented by a deterministic binary return path, while traders learn predictive strategies from observed in-sample history and trade on an out-of-sample continuation. The market then adapts against the traders by reducing their predictive and trading edge.
  The central experiment begins with a smooth, highly predictable market path. Traders with multiple lookback windows and multiple holding periods learn to predict future cumulative returns. Initially, these traders earn large out-of-sample profits. After adversarial market adaptation, their out-of-sample profitability collapses toward zero. Importantly, in the final clean specification, no explicit sign-balance, transition-rate, or autocorrelation penalties are imposed. Nevertheless, the out-of-sample return sequence becomes balanced, has transition rate close to one half, has low autocorrelation, and passes block-based distributional diagnostics. In a medium-size experiment with $T_{\mathrm{IS}}=2000$ and $T_{\mathrm{OOS}}=10000$, the out-of-sample positive-return fraction is $0.5010$, the transition rate is $0.4896$, and the maximum absolute autocorrelation is $0.0275$. Binary return blocks transformed into dyadic variables are close to uniform on $[0,1]$, and normalized block sums are broadly consistent with a standard normal law. These results support the hypothesis that market randomness can arise as the endogenous residue of arbitrage pressure rather than from exogenous stochastic shocks.

</details>


### [161] [Mitigating Adverse Selection in Concentrated Liquidity AMMs with Dynamic Fees: An Agent-Based Model Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23070)
*Daniele Maria Di Nosse,Fabrizio Lillo*

Main category: q-fin.TR

TL;DR: 本文通过构建基于代理的模型（ABM），模拟Uniswap v3集中流动性池在Heston随机波动率市场中的运行，研究动态费用机制如何补偿流动性提供者（LP）因逆向选择（LVR）造成的损失。结果表明，动态费用主要通过提高价格过时风险状态下的费用收入来改善LP的盈利，而非直接降低LVR。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有理论已量化LVR成本，但缺乏对现实区块链微观结构（如区块传播延迟、mempool延迟）与内生定价机制之间相互作用的深入探索。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 构建基于代理的模型（ABM），包含：Heston随机波动率参考市场、离散区块传播与mempool延迟机制、异构代理群体（延迟敏感套利者、智能路由器、MEV搜索者、主动LP）。提出基于波动率和订单流毒性的动态费用方案，并与无摩擦再平衡策略对比。

Result: 动态费用调整主要通过增加价格过时风险状态下的费用收入来提高LP的风险调整后盈利（费用减去LVR）。费用规则对LVR本身的影响有限且依赖配置，当前结果更支持对LVR进行补偿而非直接降低LVR。

Conclusion: 动态费用机制可以改善LP的盈利状况，但其作用路径主要是通过增加费用收入来补偿LVR损失，而非直接减少LVR。在现实DeFi环境中，费用设计应侧重于风险补偿而非风险消除。

Abstract: Automated Market Makers based on concentrated liquidity, such as Uniswap v3, significantly improve capital efficiency but expose Liquidity Providers (LPs) to adverse selection costs, formalized as Loss-Versus-Rebalancing (LVR). While theoretical literature quantifies these costs, the interplay between realistic blockchain microstructure and endogenous pricing mechanisms remains under-explored. This paper develops a granular Agent-Based Model of a Uniswap v3 pool interacting with a stochastic reference market governed by Heston volatility dynamics. The framework incorporates discrete block propagation, mempool latency, and a heterogeneous population of agents, including latency-sensitive arbitrageurs, smart routers, Maximal Extractable Value searchers, and active LPs benchmarked against a frictionless rebalancing strategy. We propose and evaluate dynamic fee schedules driven by volatility and order-flow toxicity proxies intended to compensate LPs for adverse-selection losses. Our simulations investigate the conditions under which LPs can achieve positive hedged Profit and Loss (fees minus LVR). The analysis suggests that dynamic fee adjustments can improve hedged LP profitability mainly by increasing fee income in states associated with stale-price risk. Depending on the configuration, these rules may also affect realized LVR, but the current aggregate results support compensation for LVR more directly than a reduction of LVR itself.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.PM'></div>

# q-fin.PM [[Back]](#toc)

### [162] [Reinforcement Learning for Risk-Sensitive Investment Management: a Free Energy--Entropy Duality Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20903)
*Sebastien Lleo,Wolfgang Runggaldier*

Main category: q-fin.PM

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的连续时间风险敏感基准资产配置方法，利用自由能-熵对偶性将问题转化为线性二次高斯随机微分博弈，并设计了连续时间q学习演员-评论家算法，在美国股票数据上验证了高精度的最优策略学习效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准马尔可夫随机控制模板无法直接处理基准资产配置问题（状态不可控，终端奖励含受控伊藤积分），需要新的方法框架。

Method: 利用自由能-熵对偶性将问题重新表述为等价概率测度下的线性二次高斯随机微分博弈，得到显式鞍点解；基于此设计连续时间q学习演员-评论家方法：二次值函数作为评论家，仿射鞍点控制作为确定性演员（投资组合演员与对抗演员）。

Result: 在美国股票数据上验证，演员能够以高精度学习最优策略；发现不对称性：投资组合演员比辅助对抗演员获得更清晰的学习信号。

Conclusion: 学习的资产配置可通过分数凯利分解获得经济解释；该方法在实践中有效且具有良好的学习特性。

Abstract: This paper develops a reinforcement-learning approach to continuous-time risk-sensitive benchmarked asset allocation in a partly model-based setting. The benchmarked problem does not directly fit the standard Markovian stochastic-control template: the state is uncontrolled, whereas the terminal reward contains a controlled Itô integral. We use free energy-entropy duality to reformulate the problem as a linear-quadratic-Gaussian stochastic differential game under an equivalent probability measure, yielding explicit finite- and infinite-horizon saddle-point solutions. This structure guides a continuous-time $q$-learning actor-critic method: the quadratic value function motivates the critic, while the affine saddle-point controls motivate deterministic actors for the portfolio allocation and adversarial control. The learned allocation admits an economic interpretation through fractional Kelly decompositions. A proof-of-concept implementation calibrated to U.S. equity data shows that the actors learn the optimal policy with high accuracy and reveals a favorable asymmetry: the portfolio actor receives a cleaner learning signal than the auxiliary adversarial actor.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.CP'></div>

# q-fin.CP [[Back]](#toc)

### [163] [Semi-Analytical Pricing for General Default Intensity Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21800)
*Ryan Parker,Mark Stedman,Luca Capriotti*

Main category: q-fin.CP

TL;DR: 本文利用路径积分形式，为一般类别的违约强度模型开发了一种精确且易于计算的半解析近似方法，在Black-Karasinski模型中表现优异，可替代全数值方法用于计量经济学和衍生品定价（如XVA、CDS）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有违约强度模型的数值计算通常复杂且耗时，需要开发一种既准确又计算高效的近似方法，以满足计量经济学和衍生品定价的实际需求。

Method: 基于路径积分形式，提出半解析近似方法，适用于一般类别的违约强度模型。

Result: 在Black-Karasinski模型中，该方法即使在高峰值波动率和多年期时间范围下也提供非常精确的结果；计算效率显著优于全数值方案。

Conclusion: 该半解析近似方法在准确性和计算效率上均表现优异，可作为全数值方法的可行替代方案，适用于XVA计算、信用衍生品定价等实际应用，如Quanto CDS定价。

Abstract: Using the path-integral formalism, we develop an accurate and easy-to-compute semi-analytical approximation for a general class of {default intensity} models. We illustrate the accuracy of the method by presenting results for the Black-Karasinski model for which the proposed approximation provides remarkably accurate results, even in regimes of high volatility and multi-year time horizons. The accuracy and the computational efficiency of the proposed approximation makes it a viable alternative to fully numerical schemes for a variety of applications in econometrics and derivatives pricing, including the computation of XVA for credit products. As a practical example, we consider the pricing of a quanto Credit Default Swap (CDS) under stochastic intensity of default and an FX devaluation model.

</details>


### [164] [Asymmetry PRISM: A CPU/GPU Portfolio Optimization Engine for Deadline-Bounded Institutional Rebalancing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23367)
*Debdoot Ghosh*

Main category: q-fin.CP

TL;DR: 本文评估了Asymmetry PRISM（CPU/GPU投资组合优化引擎）在机构再平衡场景中的性能。实验表明，在N=100到2,000的多求解器测试中，PRISM-CPU比最快的参考求解器快4.5x-24.1x；在生产队列中，PRISM-GPU在109.5秒内完成500/500账户（基线仅完成4/500）；在受约束的实际数据集上，PRISM比最优基线快3.4x-126.7x，GPU路线比CPU路线快8.8x（N=384,800）。所有求解均提供审计记录，零错过截止时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机构再平衡是一个有硬截止时间的批处理优化工作负载，需要在预算、换手率、风险敞口、排除项和税务感知等约束下，在交易前完成数百个账户的权重调整。现有求解器难以在严格的运营时间窗口内完成如此大规模的约束优化任务。

Method: 采用公开评估边界方法，固定硬件和软件版本，声明计时通道，分离冷调用与重复工作负载，要求有可比较的参考求解器完成才能声称目标函数差距。在CPU和GPU两个路线上系统评估Asymmetry PRISM引擎，并与OSQP等基线对比。

Result: (1) N=100到2,000时，PRISM-CPU比最快参考行快4.5x-24.1x；(2) 生产队列测试中，PRISM-GPU 109.5秒完成500/500账户（基线4/500），零错过截止时间；(3) 真实数据集上，PRISM比最优基线快3.4x-126.7x，GPU/CPU增益比为8.8x (N=384,800)；(4) 无参考求解器的行以可行性、计时、内存和失败状态证据报告。

Conclusion: Asymmetry PRISM在机构再平衡的硬截止时间批处理优化任务中，展现出显著优于现有基线的性能，能够可靠地在运营时间窗口内完成大规模约束优化，同时提供完整的审计跟踪，具有实际部署价值。

Abstract: Institutional rebalancing is a batched optimization workload with a hard operating deadline: hundreds of accounts need new weights under budget, turnover, exposure, exclusion, and tax-aware controls before trading can proceed. This paper evaluates Asymmetry PRISM, a CPU/GPU portfolio optimization engine, through a public evaluation boundary; problem data in, and returned weights, status codes, timings, memory class, external feasibility diagnostics, eligible objective comparisons, and audit records out. Within that boundary, the evaluation protocol fixes hardware and software versions, declares timing lanes, separates cold single calls from repeated workloads, and admits objective-gap claims only where an eligible reference solver completed. On completed multi-solver rows from N=100 to N=2,000, Asymmetry PRISM-CPU is 4.5x to 24.1x faster than the fastest completed reference row in the same lane. In the production queue study, Asymmetry PRISM-GPU completes 500/500 accounts over a 10,000-instrument universe in 109.5 s within a declared 25-minute operating window, with zero missed deadlines and an audit record for every solve; the recorded OSQP queue baseline completes 4/500. On an operationally constrained real-data suite (tax-motivated transition penalties, restriction caps, turnover controls, batches), Asymmetry PRISM clears constrained solves 3.4x to 126.7x faster than the best completing incumbent at certified-equal objectives, and the GPU route widens to 8.8x over the CPU route at N=384,800. Rows without a completed reference are reported as feasibility, timing, memory, and failure-status evidence.

</details>


### [165] [Analytic Pricing of Bermudan Swaptions with Few Exercise Dates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23510)
*Emiliano Papa*

Main category: q-fin.CP

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种定价具有少量行权日的百慕大式互换期权的新方法，通过分解为欧式互换期权之和减去修正项，并利用边界线性性简化计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 百慕大式互换期权定价复杂，尤其在只有少量行权日时，现有方法计算成本高。本文旨在提供一种解析可处理、计算高效的定价框架。

Method: 以两个行权日为基础，将百慕大价格分解为短期欧式互换期权之和（上界）减去修正项，修正项用远期波动率协议的积分表示。扩展到三个行权日时，采用滚动远期测度下的反向归纳法，关键创新在于发现行权边界的线性结构——分为行权价依赖项和方差项，其中线性项为负，抑制后续指数项。该线性性可推广到多个行权日。

Result: 百慕大期权价格可重构为：在每个行权日，加入初始短期互换期权（行权价递增），减去所有从该日起始的远期接收方互换期权的积分支付。高阶积分衰减迅速，在行权日较少时可忽略而不显著影响估值。

Conclusion: 提出的分解框架有效简化了少行权日百慕大式互换期权的定价，边界线性性使得解析计算成为可能，且高阶项可安全忽略。

Abstract: In this paper, we consider pricing a Bermudan swaption with a small number of exercise dates. We begin with the case of two exercise dates.
  In this limit, we show that the Bermudan price decomposes into the sum of short-dated European swaptions, setting an upper bound, minus a correction term. This correction is expressed as an integral involving a forward volatility agreement type payoff with start at the first exercise date, and it can be evaluated in closed form. The magnitude of the correction is smaller when variance is front loaded and larger when it is back-loaded.
  We extend to three-exercise Bermudans via backward induction under rolling forward measures. A key feature is boundary linearity enabling further analytic steps.
  The exercise boundary of options splits into a strike-dependent term and a variance term; together they determine optimal exercise. The linear term is negative, supressing the exponentials in subsequent steps and aiding analytic calculations.
  This boundary linearity extends to multiple exercise dates and yields pricing formulas with the same decomposition, showing how optionality accumulates across exercise dates.
  We conclude that the Bermudan can be reconstructed by adding, at each exercise date, the initial short swaption with an increasingly higher strike and subtracting the integrated payoffs of all forward-starting receiver swaptions starting at that date. The corresponding double and higher-order integrals decrease rapidly and, in the presence of only a few exercise dates, can be safely neglected without materially impacting the valuation. The general case is discussed at the end.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.GN'></div>

# q-fin.GN [[Back]](#toc)

### [166] [Anatomy of the Market: A Body-Tail Test of Factor Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23596)
*Useong Shin*

Main category: q-fin.GN

TL;DR: 本文探讨了因子模型在定价整个市场时，是否也能正确定价其内部组成部分。研究发现，虽然所有模型都通过了市场整体的检验，但q5模型在按规模划分的市场“主体”和“尾部”部分产生了系统性、方向相反的定价误差（主体为负、尾部为正）。随机分割则消除了这种拒绝。证据表明，市场整体看似被正确定价，可能是因为内部定价误差相互抵消了。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统因子模型检验通常只关注能否定价整个市场，但忽略了市场内部成分（如不同规模股票）的定价准确性。作者想知道：即使模型能通过整体市场检验，是否内部存在未被发现的定价偏差？

Method: 构造了CRSP可投资市场组合，并按规模将其拆分为“主体”（body）和“尾部”（tail）两部分，这两部分恰好能重新组合成整个市场。然后检验因子模型（特别是q5模型）对整体市场、主体和尾部的定价表现。

Result: 所有模型都通过了整体市场的定价检验。但q5模型在主体部分产生显著负向alpha，在尾部部分产生显著正向alpha，呈现出系统性的抵消模式。而随机拆分市场时，这种拒绝现象消失。

Conclusion: 市场整体被正确定价可能是一种假象，实际是因为内部不同部分（如大小盘股）的定价误差相互抵消。因子模型对市场整体的检验不够敏感，需要关注内部成分的定价一致性。

Abstract: I ask whether a factor model that prices the aggregate market also prices the market's internal components. I construct a CRSP investible market portfolio and split it into size-ranked body and tail legs that exactly recombine to the market. All models pass the aggregate market test. Yet q5 leaves systematic, offsetting alphas: negative in the body and positive in the tail. Random splits remove the rejection. The evidence suggests that the market can appear priced because internal pricing errors cancel.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [167] [Beyond Importance: Interchange-Sobol Sensitivity Reveals Task-Specific Content Channels in Transformer Components](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20678)
*Yifeng Guo,Jin-Hong Du,Xiang Chen*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出IGSD方法，通过配对干预（匹配激活替换与零消融）分离Transformer组件的两类角色：内容传输与计算退化。在事实回忆任务中，发现早期层存在标准方法低估的内容通道，并细粒度定位到具体注意力头。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可解释性方法用单一重要性分数混淆了组件的两种不同角色：传输任务相关内容 vs. 移除后导致计算退化，需要一种能够区分这两种角色贡献的方法。

Method: 提出IGSD（Interchange-Group Sobol Decomposition），通过配对干预：对同一组件同时进行匹配激活替换（保留内容）和零消融（删除内容），估计两个Sobol方差指数，用它们的符号差异区分两种角色，并引入对称离流形诊断指标$\widehat{\mathrm{ST}}>1$监控干预有效性。

Result: 在事实回忆任务中，IGSD在GPT-2 small和Qwen2.5-1.5B中识别出早期层内容通道（标准重要性方法低估）。受控实验显示：早期层传输关系框架内容，后期层传输主体检索内容，细粒度定位到Attn_L9H8头。后期层钳制实验表明早期信号通过下游转换而非残差直通表达。

Conclusion: 替换与删除不是可互换的控制方法，它们的差异为检测Transformer组件中的内容传输提供了实用的统计诊断工具。

Abstract: Mechanistic interpretability methods summarize a transformer component by a single importance score, conflating two distinct roles: a component may matter because it transports task-relevant content, or because the forward computation degrades when its contribution is removed. We introduce \emph{Interchange-Group Sobol Decomposition} (IGSD), a paired-intervention framework that compares matched activation replacement with zero ablation on the same component, estimates two Sobol-style variance indices, and uses their signed difference to separate the two roles, with intervention validity monitored by a symmetric off-manifold diagnostic $\widehat{\mathrm{ST}}>1$. In factual recall, IGSD identifies an early-layer content channel in both GPT-2 small and Qwen2.5-1.5B that standard importance methods underestimate. A controlled subject and relation donor design shows that the early channel transports relation-frame content while late attention transports subject-retrieval content, refining at head granularity to the known $\mathrm{Attn}_{L9H8}$ head. Late-layer clamping confirms that the early signal is expressed through downstream transformations rather than residual pass-through. These results show that replacement and deletion are not interchangeable controls and their divergence provides a practical statistical diagnostic for content transport in transformer components.

</details>


### [168] [Betting on Moments: Legendre Jumper Martingales for Online Exchangeability Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20859)
*Johan Hallberg Szabadváry*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一族基于平移勒让德多项式的共形测试鞅，扩展了Simple Jumper鞅。包括Simple Legendre Jumper（多项式投注函数）、Product Legendre Jumper（多阶乘积，但状态空间指数增长）、Variational Legendre Jumper（平均场近似降低复杂度）和Composite Legendre Jumper（多跳跃率自适应），实验表明组合方法在分布漂移检测上优于单一度数的鞅。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展Simple Jumper鞅，使其能够检测方差、偏度及更高阶的均匀性偏离，并解决多阶乘积鞅状态空间指数增长（跳跃税）的问题。

Method: (1) Simple Legendre Jumper：用任意次数的勒让德多项式替代线性投注函数。(2) Product Legendre Jumper：将多个度数乘积整合为统一投注函数。(3) Variational Legendre Jumper：通过平均场近似分解联合适应，将指数复杂度降为线性。(4) Composite Legendre Jumper：融合多个跳跃率，保障可交换性下的财富下限并自动适应漂移时间尺度。

Result: 在真实世界分类任务上，组合方法一致优于任何单一度数的鞅；当漂移时间尺度未知时，推荐使用Composite Legendre Jumper作为默认方法。

Conclusion: 提出的勒让德鞅家族有效提升了分布漂移检测能力，Composite变体兼具鲁棒性和自适应性，适合实际应用。

Abstract: We present a family of conformal test martingales based on shifted Legendre polynomials, which extends the Simple Jumper martingale. The Simple Legendre Jumper substitutes the linear betting function with a polynomial of arbitrary degree, thereby facilitating the detection of variance, skewness, and higher-order deviations from uniformity; the standard Simple Jumper is a specific instance of degree one. The Product Legendre Jumper integrates multiple polynomial degrees into a unified betting function, although its state space expands exponentially-a cost we refer to as the jumping tax. To address this issue, we introduce the Variational Legendre Jumper, which factorises the joint adaptation through a mean-field approximation, thereby reducing exponential scaling to linear time with minimal loss in power. Lastly, the Composite Legendre Jumper incorporates several jumping rates, ensuring a wealth floor under exchangeability and automatic adaptation to the shift's timescale. Empirical results from a real-world classification task demonstrate that the combined methods consistently surpass any single-degree martingale under distributional shift, and the composite variant is recommended as the default when the shift timescale is unknown.

</details>


### [169] [Adversarial observations in probabilistic State-Space Models for robust Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20880)
*M. Santos-Pascual,D. Ríos Insua*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文分析了在线性概率状态空间模型中，攻击者在似然约束下修改观测值对潜状态推断和策略决策的影响，为构建更鲁棒的强化学习系统提供了理论依据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在部分观测或对抗性观测条件下，准确推断环境的潜状态及其不确定性至关重要。本文旨在理解对抗性观测攻击如何影响潜状态推断及策略决策，从而为构建更鲁棒的强化学习系统铺平道路。

Method: 论文分析了线性概率状态空间模型上的对抗性攻击，攻击者在似然约束下修改观测值，确保扰动与观测数据一致。通过理论分析观测偏移对潜状态和策略决策的影响来进行研究。

Result: 揭示了对抗性观测偏移如何影响潜状态推断，并进而影响基于强化学习的策略决策过程。

Conclusion: 该视角为构建更鲁棒的强化学习系统提供了原则性路径，对机器人等安全关键领域的可靠运行具有直接意义。

Abstract: Decision-making under partial or adversarial observability requires accurate inference of the environment's latent state and its associated uncertainty. This work analyses adversarial attacks on linear probabilistic state-space models, commonly integrated within reinforcement learning architectures, where the attacker alters observations under likelihood constraints that ensure the perturbations remains consistent. We analyze how such adversarial yet realistic observation shifts influence the latent state and influence policy decisions. This perspective provides a principled pathway toward building more robust reinforcement learning systems, with direct relevance to safety-critical domains such as robotics, where reliable operation under sensor noise, partial failures, and adversarial conditions is essential.

</details>


### [170] [Diffusion-Driven State Space Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21036)
*Jack Ruder,Michael Wojnowicz*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出扩散驱动状态空间模型（DDSSM），用扩散模型替代传统高斯转移分布，解决了序列数据上联合训练自编码器和扩散模型的开放问题，在模拟多模态时间序列上优于现有深度SSM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在准确预测与忠实捕捉潜在系统动态之间难以兼顾：深度状态空间模型假设高斯潜在转移，限制了拟合与预测能力；扩散模型表达力强但缺乏对潜在动态的原则性推断。作者希望结合两者的优势。

Method: 提出DDSSM，将传统状态空间模型中的高斯转移分布替换为扩散模型，并解决了序列数据上联合训练自编码器与扩散模型的开放问题，扩展了时间序列潜在扩散模型的文献。

Result: 在模拟多模态转移的时间序列上，DDSSM在拟合和预测任务上均经验性地优于最先进的深度状态空间模型。

Conclusion: DDSSM成功融合了扩散模型的表达力与状态空间模型的推断能力，为时间序列建模提供了新范式。

Abstract: In many domains, practitioners seek models that produce accurate forecasts while faithfully capturing latent system dynamics. Existing approaches typically sacrifice one of these goals: deep state space models often assume Gaussian latent transitions, limiting fit and forecasting, while diffusion models are highly expressive but lack principled inference for the underlying dynamics. To combine the strengths of both, we introduce the Diffusion-Driven State Space Model (DDSSM), which replaces the conventional Gaussian transition distribution with a diffusion model. Our DDSSM resolves the open problem of how to jointly train an autoencoder and a diffusion model on sequential data, thereby extending the literature on latent diffusion models for time series. Moreover, we find that the DDSSM empirically outperforms a state-of-the-art deep SSM at fitting and forecasting a simulated time series with multimodal transitions.

</details>


### [171] [Bayesian Model Averaging under Predictor Redundancy via Density-Ratio Posterior Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21080)
*Hanqing Li,Xuewen Lu,Yuting Chen*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对贝叶斯模型平均中因预测变量冗余导致后验质量分散的问题，提出了一种基于支撑空间区域报告的方法。通过硬区域或软区域压缩后验信息，并利用密度比量化压缩损失（TV/KL散度）。方法涵盖固定区域、度量球区域、后验聚类区域等，并给出误差公式与验证边界。实验表明区域报告能在保留主要后验信息的同时提供更简洁的摘要，且密度比诊断可警示信息过度丢失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在贝叶斯模型平均中，当预测变量存在冗余时，后验质量会分散在许多几乎可互换的支撑集上，导致精确支撑的摘要不稳定或难以解释，即使预测本身是稳定的。因此需要一种不改变贝叶斯目标的前提下，更简洁、稳定地报告已拟合的贝叶斯模型平均后验的方法。

Method: 提出用支撑空间的硬区域或软区域来压缩后验报告。通过显式密度比将压缩报告法则与参考后验进行比较，进而计算可操作的TV距离和KL散度失真、有界预测摘要的界、保留质量诊断和回退权重诊断。框架涵盖固定硬区域、度量球区域、后验聚类区域和池化剪枝区域词典，并推导了精确误差公式和验证边界。

Result: 证明了区域报告的精确误差公式和验证边界，给出了用少量区域替代大量单个支撑列表的条件。模拟实验中，区域报告通常能提供更短更清晰的摘要，同时保留主要后验信息，且密度比诊断能有效指示何时信息丢失过多。

Conclusion: 区域报告方法能在不改变贝叶斯目标的前提下，有效压缩冗余支撑空间的贝叶斯模型平均后验，提供简洁稳定的摘要，同时通过密度比诊断保证信息损失可控。这为高维冗余预测变量场景下的后验报告提供了实用框架。

Abstract: Bayesian model averaging in support-indexed regression induces a posterior distribution over active predictor supports. Under predictor redundancy, posterior mass can spread across many nearly interchangeable supports, making exact-support summaries unstable or hard to interpret even when prediction is stable. We study how to report an already fitted Bayesian model averaging posterior without changing the Bayesian target. A report uses hard or soft regions of support space, and its compressed reporting law is compared with the reference posterior through an explicit density ratio. This ratio gives computable total-variation and Kullback--Leibler distortion, bounds for bounded predictive summaries, retained-mass diagnostics, and fallback-weight diagnostics. The framework covers fixed hard regions, metric-ball regions, posterior-cluster regions, and pooled-pruned region dictionaries. We prove exact error formulas and validation bounds for these region reports, and give conditions under which a few regions can replace a long list of individual supports. In simulations, our region reports often give shorter and clearer summaries while preserving the main posterior information, and the density-ratio diagnostics show when too much information has been lost.

</details>


### [172] [Two Layers of Instability in Causal Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21185)
*Alexis Bellot*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文揭示了因果推断中的双重不稳定性：除了已知的因果效应在数据分布上的不连续性（Robins & Ritov, 1997），还发现不同估计器本身也会在数据分布上发生跳跃式不连续变化，这取决于估计器隐含的损失函数是否与因果效应对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从观测数据中进行因果推断即使满足可识别性条件也是困难的，因为因果效应在数据分布上可能是不连续的。作者希望揭示由估计器选择带来的第二层不稳定性。

Method: 作者将标准点估计解读为结构因果模型空间上多峰分布的点摘要，依此对估计器进行分类，并从决策理论角度分析其稳定性——取决于估计器优化的隐式损失函数是否与因果效应对齐。

Result: 逆概率加权估计和回归估计属于不连续的摘要（不稳定），而显式后验均值和后验中位数被证明是连续的（稳定）。

Conclusion: 估计器的稳定性高度依赖于其隐含的损失函数是否与目标因果效应一致，这为选择稳定估计器提供了决策理论指导。

Abstract: There is a precise sense in which drawing causal inferences from observational data is hard, even when identifiability is assumed. In particular, Robins and Ritov (1997) and Robins et al. (2003) showed that causal effects can be discontinuous as a function of the data distribution: two arbitrarily close data distributions might correspond to different causal effects. This is a fact independent of the choice of estimator; however, not all estimators are equally unstable. Our contribution is to surface a second layer of instability that depends on the choice of estimator. We show that many standard point estimates can be read as point summaries of multimodal distributions over the space of structural causal models. As such, estimators can jump discontinuously in the data distribution. This defines a taxonomy of estimators that admits a decision-theoretic reading: stability depends on whether the implicit loss function an estimator optimizes is aligned with the causal effect itself. Specifically, inverse propensity weighted estimators and regression estimators are examples of discontinuous summaries, while explicit posterior means and medians are shown to be continuous.

</details>


### [173] [Orthogonal Discrepancy Kernels for Learning with Partial Physics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21199)
*Swapnil Manna,Timothy J. Rogers,Lawrence Bull*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出一种半参数框架用于非线性系统辨识，通过正交高斯过程回归将物理模型与偏差函数解耦，在不完整物理先验下生成可解释模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非线性系统辨识方法难以在物理先验不完整时平衡模型可解释性与偏差学习能力，亟需一种能显式解耦物理成分与偏差的框架。

Method: 构建半参数框架，利用正交高斯过程回归（OGPR）实现白盒（稀疏参数选择）与黑盒（偏差学习）的并行优化，强制物理模型与残差偏差正交。

Result: 在物理先验不完整条件下，模型仍能保持可解释性，且偏差学习不会干扰物理参数的稀疏选择。

Conclusion: 该框架为物理-数据混合建模提供了一种有效的解耦策略，提升了模型在部分物理知识缺失场景下的鲁棒性与可解释性。

Abstract: We introduce a semi-parametric framework for nonlinear system identification, which decouples discrepancy functions from physics-based components. Orthogonal Gaussian process regression balances sparse parameter selection (the white box) with discrepancy learning (the black box) to produce interpretable models from incomplete physics.

</details>


### [174] [Subsampling for supervised learning in reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21260)
*Eyal Vayness,Maxime Sangnier*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究非参数统计学习中基于重加权经验风险最小化的子采样方法，揭示了最优子采样方案（关于协方差算子迹），并通过数值实验验证了其可行性与优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大数据时代，子采样被广泛用于降低统计学习的计算成本和时间，进而减少能耗和碳足迹。本文旨在非参数框架下（假设空间为再生核希尔伯特空间）研究子采样的最优策略。

Method: 采用Horvitz-Thompson重加权的经验风险最小化估计器，在再生核希尔伯特空间中分析其渐近性质，推导出关于协方差算子迹的最优子采样方案，并通过plug-in方式实现。

Result: 揭示了最优子采样方案（基于协方差算子迹），在合成数据和真实数据集上的数值实验展示了该方法的实用性和优势。

Conclusion: 提出的子采样方案能有效降低计算成本，同时保持良好的统计性能，在实际应用中具有可行性。

Abstract: In the era of big data, subsampling became a common practice in statistical learning. By selecting a subgroup of individuals based on which the learner is trained, subsampling aims at reducing the computational cost and time of the estimation step, and ideally leads to a decrease of its energy consumption and carbon footprint. This work focuses on a nonparametric setting, in which the hypotheses set lies in a reproducing kernel Hilbert space, and the estimator is a minimizer of an empirical risk reweighted à la Horvitz-Thompson. By studying the asymptotic properties of this estimator, we reveal an optimal subsampling scheme (regarding the trace of the covariance operator) and show that it can be used via plug-in. A numerical study on synthetic and real-world datasets shows the practicability and the benefit of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [175] [Finite-Sample Performance of Gradient Descent in Logistic Regression with Gaussian Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21683)
*Junren Chen,Arya Mazumdar*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究逻辑回归（高斯设计）中梯度下降（GD）的有限样本估计性能，证明了在O(1)步长下GD线性收敛到O(√‖θ*‖₂⁵d/n)的ℓ₂误差，在大步长下实现更快局部线性收敛，并基于Matsumoto和Mazumdar (2025)的工作提出更优的高维估计器，逼近最优率Θ(√‖θ*‖₂d/n)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有理论缺乏逻辑回归中GD的非渐近估计误差率，且参数收敛速度较慢，本文旨在填补这一空白，刻画GD的有限样本估计性能。

Method: 通过覆盖（covering）和剥离（peeling）论证统一控制梯度与其总体版本的偏差，证明梯度满足近似可逆性条件（AIC）；再基于总体Hessian矩阵的特征值分析证明总体GD是收缩映射；最后结合近期工作提出更优的高维估计器。

Result: 小步长下GD线性收敛到O(√‖θ*‖₂⁵d/n)的ℓ₂误差；大步长下实现更快局部线性收敛到同一统计误差；高维下可进一步改进至Θ(√‖θ*‖₂d/n)的最优率。

Conclusion: 本文首次提供了逻辑回归中GD的非渐近估计误差率，揭示了现有结果的次优性，并给出了接近信息论下界的估计器。

Abstract: We consider the parameter estimation problem in logistic regression with Gaussian design: the estimation of a fixed unknown parameter $θ^*\in \mathbb{R}^d$ ($\|θ^*\|_2\ge 1$) from $n$ i.i.d. samples $\{(x_i,y_i)\}_{i=1}^n$, where $x_i\sim N(0,I_d)$ and $y_i|x_i \sim {\rm Bernoulli}(1/(1+\exp(-x_i^\top θ^*)))$. Our main aim is to characterize the finite-sample estimation performance and convergence behavior of gradient descent (GD) on the maximum likelihood objective (i.e., the logistic loss). Under small $O(1)$ stepsize and $0$ initialization, we show that GD linearly converges to a small neighborhood of $θ^*$ achieving an $\ell_2$ error of order $O(\sqrt{\|θ^*\|_2^5d/n})$. This substantially goes beyond existing theoretical results that lack non-asymptotic estimation error rate and exhibit much slower parameter convergence. We also establish a faster local linear convergence to the same statistical error under a large $Θ(\|θ^*\|_2)$ stepsize. The main technical component is to show that the gradient of the logistic loss satisfies a certain approximate invertibility condition (AIC). To that end, we uniformly control the deviation of the gradient from its population counterpart by covering and peeling arguments, and then show that the population GD is a contraction by a delicate analysis based on the eigenvalues of population Hessian matrices. Finally, we build upon the recent work Matsumoto and Mazumdar (2025) and devise a novel efficient estimator that attains a sharper rate in high dimensions. This indicates that the existing non-asymptotic guarantees exhibit sub-optimal dependence on $\|θ^*\|_2$, and that in many regimes $Θ(\sqrt{\|θ^*\|_2d/n})$ is the tight estimation error rate. Numerical examples are provided to corroborate our theoretical results.

</details>


### [176] [Signed Evidence Flow: Conflict-Aware and Stability-Calibrated Data Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21875)
*Jeffery Opoku,David Banahene*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出Signed Evidence Flow (SEF)，一个通过结合预测规则与符号特征归因来量化证据支持、反对、冲突和稳定性的审计工具。实验表明，冲突能在置信度看似相同的预测中进一步区分风险，但方向不统一，因此引入ScopeGate诊断来验证方向后再使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代数据分析通常只给出预测置信度，但无法揭示背后的证据是清晰、冲突还是稳定的。两个案例可能有相同的置信度，但一个基于一致证据，另一个则同时存在强烈支持和强烈反对。现有方法无法区分这种情况，需要一种能揭示证据结构（支持、反对、冲突）的工具。

Method: 提出Signed Evidence Flow (SEF)，将拟合的预测规则与符号特征归因相结合，测量证据的支持、反对、冲突和扰动稳定性。推导了置信度决定冲突的充要条件，分析条件方差，并建立冲突与几何决策脆弱性的联系。引入ScopeGate，一种留出置换诊断方法，用于检查SEF的方向是否有效，确保其作为审计工具而非通用风险评分使用。

Result: 在医疗、Covertype、黑盒模型、金融及十个外部数据集上，冲突能够区分置信度相同的预测中的风险差异。交叉拟合测试表明，在多个数据集（包括两个大型金融任务）上，冲突在置信度和归因熵之外提供了额外的错误排名信息。但方向不是普适的：某些任务中低冲突案例风险更高。

Conclusion: SEF是一个描述证据结构的审计工具，而非通用风险评分。它需要通过独立校准样本（ScopeGate）来验证冲突方向在目标人群中是否有用，才能用于审查分流。证据结构（冲突）有时能比单纯置信度更好预测损失，但这种关系因任务而异。

Abstract: Modern data analysis usually gives a prediction without showing whether the evidence behind it is clear, conflicting, or stable. Two cases can have the same fitted confidence even when one has mostly agreeing evidence and the other has strong support and strong opposition. We propose Signed Evidence Flow (SEF), which combines a fitted prediction rule with signed feature attributions to measure support, opposition, conflict, and perturbation stability. We prove that confidence determines conflict exactly when it also determines total evidence mass, derive the remaining conditional variance, and state when conflict can improve loss prediction beyond confidence and other audit variables. We also connect conflict to geometric decision fragility. Across healthcare, Covertype, black-box, finance, and ten external data sets, conflict sometimes separates risk among predictions that already appear confident. Cross-fitted tests show added error-ranking information beyond confidence and attribution entropy on several data sets, including two large finance tasks. The direction is not universal: in some tasks, lowconflict cases are riskier. We therefore introduce ScopeGate, a held-out permutation diagnostic
  that checks the direction before SEF is used for review triage. SEF is consequently an audit tool
  rather than a universal risk score: it describes evidence structure, while an independent calibration sample determines whether that structure is useful in the target population.

</details>


### [177] [Variance-Tilted Diffusion Models for Diverse Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22239)
*Iskander Azangulov,Leo Zhang,Kianoosh Ashouritaklimi*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文针对扩散模型独立采样无法生成多样化候选集的问题，提出一种方差加权批分布方法，通过Doob h-变换推导出交互粒子采样器，包含排斥项和曲率项，实现显式概率目标下的多样化采样。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统扩散模型独立采样时，即使下游任务需要多样化的候选集，也无法直接控制样本多样性。作者旨在设计一个能显式鼓励多样性的采样分布。

Method: 引入方差加权批分布，以线性特征映射后的经验方差为目标；通过Doob h-变换修正独立扩散动力学，得到交互粒子采样器：包含排斥后验去噪均值的交互项，以及将粒子推向高特征方差区域的曲率项。

Result: 推导出紧凑形式的修正项，形成具有透明概率目标的交互粒子采样器，而非启发式排斥漂移。

Conclusion: 所提方法将多样性目标显式融入扩散采样过程，提供了概率意义明确的多样化采样框架，优于简单的启发式方法。

Abstract: Diffusion models are typically sampled independently, even when the downstream objective is to obtain a diverse set of candidates. We introduce a variance-weighted batch distribution that favours collections of samples with large empirical spread after a prescribed linear feature map. The target is specified explicitly, and the sampler is derived as the corresponding Doob $h$-transform of independent diffusion dynamics. The resulting correction has a compact form: an interaction term that repels posterior denoised means, together with a curvature term that moves particles to the region of higher feature variance. This yields an interacting-particle sampler with a transparent probabilistic target rather than a heuristic repulsive drift.

</details>


### [178] [Convergence Analysis of Nyström Subsampling in Covariate Shift Adaptation for Misspecified case](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22259)
*Hanna Myleiko,Sergei Solodky,Vasyl Semenov*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了在协变量偏移下，正则化Nyström子采样用于无监督域适应问题的收敛性，重点分析了低光滑度（误设定）情况下目标函数不在再生核希尔伯特空间内的情形，并给出了过风险的上界及其在高概率下的表现形式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无监督域适应方法在处理协变量偏移时，往往假设目标函数具有较高光滑度或位于再生核希尔伯特空间内，但实际应用中这一假设常不成立。本文旨在填补低光滑度（误设定）情形下理论分析的空白。

Method: 将Tikhonov正则化与Nyström投影（子采样子空间投影）相结合，在协变量偏移下分析算法的收敛性；进一步考虑Radon-Nikodym导数未知需近似的情况，推导维持相同收敛速率所需的最小额外样本量。

Result: 得到了过风险的高概率上界，该上界由源条件、有效维度和样本量共同刻画；在Radon-Nikodym导数需近似时，给出了维持原收敛速率所需的最小额外样本量条件。

Conclusion: 正则化Nyström子采样方法在低光滑度域适应问题中仍能保证良好的收敛性，且即使密度比未知，通过适当的额外采样也可恢复与Oracle情形相同的收敛速率。

Abstract: This paper investigates convergence properties of regularized Nyström subsampling applied to the unsupervised domain adaptation problem under covariate shift. We focus on the low-smoothness (misspecified) case where the target function lies outside the reproducing kernel Hilbert space. By combining Tikhonov regularization with Nyström projection onto a subsampled subspace, we obtain upper bounds on the excess risk that hold with high probability and are expressed in terms of the source condition, the effective dimension, and the sample sizes. We further extend the analysis to the setting where the Radon-Nikodym derivative between the target and source marginal distributions is unknown and must be approximated, and we identify the minimal additional sample sizes required to maintain the same convergence rate as in the oracle case.

</details>


### [179] [Null-Calibrated Conformal Selection via Target-Membership Scores](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22336)
*Seungjin Choi*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出基于目标成员概率的评分方法用于符合性选择，在控制错误发现率的同时提升选择效能，尤其在方差驱动、多模态等复杂目标场景下优于传统预测导向评分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有符合性选择方法多继承预测导向的非符合性评分（如残差或裁剪残差），这些评分与选择任务的目标不一致，在区间值、方差驱动、多模态或多条件目标下尤其表现不佳。

Method: 提出以目标成员概率作为自然评分，并设计了一种名为Null-Calibrated Conformal Selection (NCCS)的校准路径，通过对确认的非目标校准样例进行排名，生成有限样本有效的零假设p值，可结合BY或BH程序进行多重假设检验控制。

Result: 实验证明成员概率评分在均值单调目标上与常规评分持平，在方差驱动目标上显著优于均值评分选择，在稀有目标场景下NCCS以牺牲部分效能换取有限样本零假设有效性。

Conclusion: 目标成员概率是符合性选择的自然评分标准，NCCS提供了一种在控制错误发现率的同时提升选择效能的可行框架，特别是在复杂目标场景下。

Abstract: Conformal selection aims to identify test candidates whose unknown responses fall in a target region while controlling the false discovery rate. Existing methods often inherit prediction-oriented nonconformity scores, such as residual or clipped residual scores, from conformal prediction. We argue that the natural score for selection is instead the target-membership probability. This score directly addresses the binary event being selected, and any monotone transform of it gives the Neyman--Pearson oracle ranking at a fixed null selection level. This distinction is irrelevant for mean-monotone targets, where conventional scores induce essentially the same ranking, but becomes important for interval-valued, variance-driven, multimodal, or multi-condition targets, where prediction-oriented scores can be misaligned with selection power. We study membership-score-based conformal selection and isolate one conformal calibration route, Null-Calibrated Conformal Selection (NCCS), which ranks test scores against confirmed non-target calibration examples. Under null exchangeability, NCCS yields finite-sample valid null p-values, which can be combined with BY under arbitrary dependence or with BH under standard positive-dependence conditions. Experiments support the score principle: membership scores match conventional scores on mean-monotone targets, substantially improve over mean-score selection on variance-driven targets, and, when calibrated by NCCS, trade power for finite-sample null validity in rare-target regimes where direct empirical-FDP thresholding can be anti-conservative.

</details>


### [180] [Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling for Function-Space Regression and Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22346)
*Yaozhong Shi,Zachary E. Ross,Yisong Yue*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling (FAPS)，统一了随机过程回归与PDE逆问题的后验采样框架，基于预训练的函数空间流匹配先验，通过低秩协方差预 conditioner 的 Langevin 校正实现高效后验推理，在多项任务上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机过程回归与PDE逆问题长期缺乏统一的后验采样框架，现有方法在处理稀疏噪声观测、变分辨率查询和先验密度评估等方面存在局限。

Method: 基于预训练的函数空间流匹配先验，结合似然引导的后验推理，使用低秩协方差预 conditioner 的 Langevin 校正来利用跨离散化的主导函数空间相关性。

Result: 在高斯和非高斯随机过程回归基准及多种PDE逆问题上，FAPS生成相干的后验样本，不确定性量化准确，显著超越现有功能回归基线，在PDE噪声逆问题上达到或优于基于扩散的后验采样器，同时降低测试时采样成本。

Conclusion: FAPS首次实现了随机过程回归与PDE逆问题的统一后验采样，在性能和效率上均有显著优势。

Abstract: Principled regression for stochastic processes is a long-standing challenge with deep connections to scientific inverse problems. We introduce Flow Annealing Posterior Sampling (FAPS), to our knowledge the first function-space posterior sampling framework that unifies stochastic-process regression and PDE inverse problems. Built on pretrained function-space flow-matching priors, FAPS enables likelihood-guided posterior inference from sparse and noisy observations, supports variable query discretizations, and avoids explicit prior-density evaluation. Its Langevin correction uses a low-rank covariance preconditioner to exploit dominant function-space correlations across discretizations. Across Gaussian and non-Gaussian stochastic-process regression benchmarks and diverse PDE inverse problems, FAPS produces coherent posterior samples with accurate uncertainty quantification, significantly outperforming existing functional regression baselines and achieving competitive or better PDE noisy inverse performance than diffusion-based posterior samplers while reducing test-time sampling cost.

</details>


### [181] [Robust Diffusion Models via Divergence-Induced Weighted Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22521)
*Lei Li,Yuexiao Dong*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出将扩散模型中的标准MSE去噪损失替换为由f-散度诱导的非线性变换，从而在数据污染下获得更鲁棒的训练效果，且计算开销小。理论上通过局部散度构造将每步条件f-散度简化为去噪误差的一维函数，训练目标统一为散度加权的去噪过程。实验表明，在CIFAR-10上30%污染下，负指数散度将FID从93.0降至77.5，优于Huber和截断MSE等鲁棒损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准扩散模型使用MSE去噪损失，在数据被污染时（如标签噪声、异常样本）性能显著下降，需要一种鲁棒性更强的训练目标。

Method: 利用f-散度诱导的非线性变换替换MSE损失：基于DDPM高斯反向核结构，每步似然比服从对数正态分布，条件f-散度简化为去噪误差的一维函数；训练目标为散度加权去噪，其中散度的导数作为残差空间的权重，有界影响散度（Hellinger、负指数）可抑制大误差样本。

Result: CIFAR-10上30%污染下，负指数散度FID从93.0（KL/标准MSE）降至77.5，优于Huber损失和截断MSE。

Conclusion: f-散度框架为扩散模型提供了一种统一、简单且有效的鲁棒训练方案，有界影响散度能自动抑制污染样本的影响，且几乎不增加计算开销。

Abstract: We show that replacing the standard MSE denoising loss in diffusion models with a nonlinear transformation induced by an f-divergence yields a simple robust training surrogate that empirically improves performance under data contamination, with small additional computational overhead. The theoretical foundation rests on a local divergence construction: under the Gaussian reverse-kernel structure of DDPM, each per-step likelihood ratio follows a lognormal distribution parameterized by a scalar mismatch, so the conditional f-divergence at each step reduces to a one-dimensional function of the denoising error. Summing these local divergences yields a training objective that unifies diffusion training as divergence induced weighted denoising, where the derivative of the induced divergence acts as a residual-space influence weight that controls the contribution of each sample. Bounded-influence divergences (Hellinger, negative exponential) suppress large error samples, with Hellinger yielding an explicit exponential weight, connecting the framework to robust M-estimation. Empirically, on CIFAR-10 under 30% contamination, NED reduces FID from 93.0 (KL) to 77.5, while also outperforming standard robust losses such as Huber and clipped MSE.

</details>


### [182] [Scalable Bayesian Additive Models for Stellar Flare Detection via Amortized Gaussian Process Inference and Hidden Markov Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22601)
*Rodrigo Herrera,Vianey Leos-Barajas,Gwendolyn Eadie,Elizaveta Semenova,James Davenport*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）的生成式替代框架，通过学习Celerite高斯过程的压缩表示，将计算复杂度从三次/线性降至神经网络前向传播速度，解决了长序列天文时间序列建模中的计算瓶颈问题，并在恒星耀斑检测任务中验证了其效率与精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高斯过程（GP）是贝叶斯时间序列建模的强大工具，但三次方计算成本限制了其在长、高频天文数据集上的应用。虽然Celerite等求解器将复杂度降至线性，但在迭代贝叶斯采样中反复计算精确似然仍是构建复杂模型（如层次或加法模型）的瓶颈。

Method: 提出生成式替代框架：利用VAE学习Celerite先验的压缩表示，将高相关随机依赖映射到低维各向同性流形，完全绕过精确协方差运算，将计算负担转移到快速神经网络前向传播。随后将该VAE近似嵌入加法模型（VAE+HMM）用于恒星耀斑检测。

Result: 仿真实验表明生成式替代模型能准确重现Celerite等物理核的结构保真度；在天体物理时间序列上，VAE+HMM架构相比精确Celerite+HMM框架显著降低了计算时间，实现了大规模数据档案中恒星耀斑的严格表征。

Conclusion: VAE生成式替代框架有效解决了GP在长序列天文数据上的计算瓶颈，为构建更复杂的层次化、加法化贝叶斯模型提供了可行路径，有望推动大规模天文数据的高效分析。

Abstract: Gaussian Processes (GPs) are a powerful tool for Bayesian time-series modeling, yet their cubic computational cost remains a severe barrier for application to long, high-cadence datasets in astronomy. While specialized scalable solvers like Celerite elegantly reduce this scaling to linear time, repeatedly evaluating the exact likelihood during iterative Bayesian sampling is a bottleneck for developing more complex models, like hierarchical or additive models in which Celerite is only one component. To make this inference computationally tractable, we introduce a generative surrogate framework. By utilizing a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) to learn a compressed representation of the Celerite prior, we map highly correlated stochastic dependencies into a low-dimensional, isotropic manifold. This transition completely bypasses exact covariance operations, shifting the computational burden to a rapid neural network forward pass. Through an extensive simulation study, we show that the generative surrogate accurately reproduces the structural fidelity of exact physical kernels like Celerite. Finally, we demonstrate embedding our VAE approximation into an additive model that combines Celerite and a hidden Markov model (HMM) for stellar flare detection in time series data of stars. We evaluate the joint VAE+HMM architecture against the exact Celerite+HMM framework on empirical astrophysical time series and demonstrate that the proposed methodology achieves significant reductions in computational time, enabling the rigorous, large-scale characterization of stellar flares across massive data archives.

</details>


### [183] [Statistical Inference for Misspecified Contextual Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22639)
*Yongyi Guo,Ziping Xu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究在模型设定错误（misspecified）的上下文赌博机（contextual bandit）环境下，标准算法（如LinUCB）可能无法稳定，导致非高斯估计行为和无效推断。作者提出一个逆概率加权（IPW）的Z估计框架，定义了“缩放逆倾向收敛”（scaled inverse-propensity convergence）的稳定性条件，在该条件下IPW-Z估计量具有一致性和渐近正态性。实验验证了方法的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文赌博机算法（如LinUCB）在模型设定错误时可能不稳定，导致估计量非高斯分布、统计推断失效。这一问题在实际应用中非常重要，因为在线智能体常使用近似模型（如复杂动力系统的简化近似）来平衡奖励、计算可及性和鲁棒性。本文旨在解决这一被忽视的推断难题。

Method: 提出逆概率加权Z估计（IPW-Z）框架，适用于广泛的边缘矩目标（包括投影参数、含噪声上下文的结构参数、离策略值）。定义“缩放逆倾向收敛”稳定性条件，在该条件下证明IPW-Z估计量的一致性和渐近正态性，并给出一致性夹心方差估计器。为多种策略类（多臂赌博机算法、平滑上下文分配策略）建立了该稳定性条件的充分条件。

Result: 通过模拟实验和基于HeartSteps V1真实数据校准的应用验证，所提方法在多个目标上展示了可靠的覆盖率和有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: 研究强调了稳定性感知的自适应设计（stability-aware adaptive design）对于有效的实验后推断至关重要。

Abstract: Contextual bandit algorithms have transformed modern experimentation by enabling real-time adaptation for personalized treatment. Yet these advantages create challenges for statistical inference due to adaptivity. We study inference with contextual-bandit data without assuming a well-specified outcome model. In this setting, we show a previously overlooked issue: standard algorithms such as LinUCB may fail to stabilize under misspecified working models, leading to non-Gaussian estimator behavior and invalid inference. This issue is practically important, as misspecified working models -- such as approximations of complex dynamical systems -- are often employed by online agents in real-world adaptive experiments to balance reward, computational tractability, and robustness.
  We develop an inverse-probability-weighted Z-estimation framework for a broad class of marginal moment targets, including projection parameters, structural parameters with noisy contexts, and off-policy values. We identify a stability condition tailored to this framework, scaled inverse-propensity convergence, under which the IPW-Z estimator is consistent and asymptotically normal with a consistent sandwich variance estimator. We further establish sufficient conditions for scaled inverse-propensity convergence for several policy classes, including multi-armed bandit algorithms and smooth contextual allocation policies. Simulations and a HeartSteps V1 real-data-calibrated application show reliable coverage and competitive performance across multiple targets. Overall, our results highlight the importance of stability-aware adaptive design for valid post-experiment inference.

</details>


### [184] [Data Evolution by Wittgenstein's Rule Following](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22674)
*Aydin Ghojogh,Benyamin Ghojogh*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出 Wittgenstein's Rule Following (WRF) 数据演化框架，受维特根斯坦的规则遵循和家族相似性概念启发，用于从历史数据集序列中演化或生成新数据集，而非从固定分布中采样。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准合成数据生成通常从固定分布采样或增强，无法处理数据集序列随时间演化的场景。作者希望捕捉历史数据集序列中隐含的"规则"，生成既遵循规则又保持家族相似性的新数据集。

Method: 1) 用结构描述符（几何、分布、聚类、标签属性）表示每个数据集；2) 通过外推描述符轨迹预测规则遵循目标，通过平均历史描述符预测家族相似性目标；3) 通过平衡或受限混合重组生成候选数据集，按目标评分，可选通过可微优化进行精炼。

Result: 在合成数据集和图像数据集上的模拟表明，WRF 能够在无监督和监督设置下生成演化数据集的有意义的延续。

Conclusion: WRF 允许样本量和特征维度随时间变化，不假设下一数据集是上一数据集的直接变换，为处理时序演化数据生成提供了新范式。

Abstract: This paper introduces Wittgenstein's Rule Following (WRF) data evolution, a framework in philomatics for evolving or generating a new dataset from a sequence of previously observed datasets. The method is inspired by Ludwig Wittgenstein's rule-following considerations and his notion of family resemblance in Philosophical Investigations. Unlike standard synthetic data generation, where the goal is usually to sample from or augment a fixed distribution, WRF aims to continue the implicit rule expressed by a historical sequence of datasets while preserving resemblance to the previous datasets.
  WRF represents each dataset by structural descriptors rather than pointwise correspondences. These descriptors summarize geometric, distributional, clustering, and, in the supervised case, label-based properties of the data. The method predicts a rule-following target by extrapolating descriptor trajectories and a family-resemblance target by averaging historical descriptors. Candidate datasets are then generated from the observed history through balanced or bounded mixture recombination, scored according to these targets, and optionally refined through differentiable optimization in descriptor space.
  The proposed framework allows both sample size and feature dimension to vary over time and does not assume that the next dataset is a direct transformation of the last one. Simulations on synthetic and image datasets show that WRF can generate meaningful continuations of evolving datasets in both unsupervised and supervised settings.

</details>


### [185] [Domain Adaptation Under Wireless Network Constraints: When Does It Become Green?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23047)
*Illyyne Saffar,Aurélie Boisbunon,Shruti Bothe*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了无监督域适应（UDA）在6G无线网络部署中的能耗问题，并与从头训练（retraining）进行对比，提出了判断UDA何时在能耗和标注成本上更优的决策条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 6G无线网络中数据分布频繁漂移导致模型性能下降，UDA虽能无标签适应新域，但其额外模块和优化流程可能带来更高能耗，需要量化这种能耗与标注成本之间的权衡。

Method: 通过实验测量UDA与单任务训练的能耗，提出一个基于目标域数量阈值的决策方法，将标注成本纳入考虑，判断UDA何时比重新训练更节能。

Result: 给出了UDA比重新训练更节能所需的最小目标域数量，明确了UDA在能耗和标注成本综合视角下的适用条件。

Conclusion: 从能耗和标注成本角度为6G网络中选择UDA还是重新训练提供了实用指导，有助于在性能、能耗和标注开销之间做出更明智的权衡。

Abstract: The deployment of data-driven models in 6G wireless networks is increasingly challenged by frequent distribution shifts that degrade performance over time. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) offers an alternative approach by adapting the trained model to a shifted domain without requiring labels. However, UDA pipelines are often more complex than single-task training due to additional modules and optimization procedures, raising a practical question: do the benefits of adaptation come at a higher energy cost, and how does this trade-off compare to retraining when labeling effort is also considered? In this work, we investigate the energy consumption of UDA and compare it to single task. We further propose a way to determine the minimum number of target domains for which UDA becomes more energy-efficient than retraining, taking into account the labeling cost. Our results aim to clarify when UDA should be preferred over classical train-from-scratch approaches from an energy and labeling-aware perspective.

</details>


### [186] [Time Series Classification through Diffeomorphic Time Warping (DiffTW)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23472)
*Vicky Geneva Haney,Kamel Lahouel,Victor Rielly,Bruno M. Jedynak*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为 Diffeomorphic Time Warping (DiffTW) 的理论框架，通过学习实数函数之间的微分同胚变换来度量时间序列相似性，在86个数据集的60个上超越了经典DTW。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DTW仅限于离散点匹配，无法实现函数级别的连续对齐。本文旨在突破这一限制，提出一种基于微分同胚变换的理论框架，实现时间序列之间连续、光滑的映射。

Method: 将时间序列对齐建模为线性输运方程特征曲线对应的流，得到微分同胚变换；利用特征线法将PDE转化为ODE；基于微积分基本定理设计目标函数；使用再生核希尔伯特空间和最优控制方法灵活表示速度场。

Result: 在86个UCR时间序列数据集上，使用1-最近邻分类器，DiffTW在60个数据集上优于DTW。

Conclusion: DiffTW提供了一种理论上严谨的、基于微分同胚的时序相似性度量，在多数基准数据集上表现优于经典DTW，证明了函数级连续对齐方法在时间序列分类中的有效性。

Abstract: Time series classification involves learning a mapping from a continuous, temporally ordered sequence of real-valued observations to a discrete response variable, like class labels. This task is fundamental in domains, including health monitoring, where the temporal structure of data is critical for accurate prediction. Dynamic Time Warping (DTW) is a standard technique for measuring similarity between sequences varying in time or speed. However, DTW is restricted to discrete point matching. To move beyond pairwise alignment, we propose a theoretical framework that learns mappings between real-valued functions. These mappings approximate the flow associated with the characteristic curves of a linear transport equation with a space-dependent velocity field, providing a diffeomorphic transformation between two time series. Using the method of characteristics, we transform this partial differential equation into ordinary differential equations (ODEs) modeling system dynamics. The objective function used to learn these ODEs derives from the fundamental theorem of calculus. To enable flexible, expressive representations of the velocity field, we utilize reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces and optimal control methods. Our method, Diffeomorphic Time Warping (DiffTW), provides a theoretically grounded dissimilarity measure. Using a 1-nearest neighbor classifier, DiffTW outperforms DTW on 60 of 86 datasets.

</details>


### [187] [Sublinearly Structured Deep Neural Networks Achieve Feature Learning Consistency for Compositional Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23477)
*Sehwan Kim,Yan Sun,Faming Liang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文证明，当学习层次组合目标函数时，具有次线性结构（输入/输出维度及隐层神经元数随样本量次线性增长）的DNN能够实现特征学习和预测一致性，即使在过参数化下也成立。常用的CNN（如AlexNet、ResNet等）在图像任务上实际具有次线性结构，这从统计学角度解释了大规模深度学习模型在大量图像数据上成功的原因。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从统计学角度探究深度神经网络能否像经典模型一样实现特征学习和预测的一致性，为大规模深度学习模型在图像任务上的成功提供理论解释。

Method: 定义"次线性结构DNN"（输入/输出维度和隐层神经元数随样本量次线性增长），理论上证明其对层次组合目标函数的学习一致性（包括过参数化情形）和通用逼近性；并通过对AlexNet、VGGNet、ResNet、GoogLeNet等实际CNN的结构审计，验证它们具有次线性结构。

Result: 1) 次线性结构DNN在特征学习和预测上具有一致性保障；2) 在过参数化下该一致性依然成立；3) 经验上次线性结构DNN表现不逊于甚至优于宽DNN；4) 主流CNN在各自图像分类基准上均为次线性结构；5) 次线性结构DNN在样本量足够时能通用逼近层次组合函数。

Conclusion: 从统计学习视角解释了为什么许多大规模深度学习模型在充足训练数据和海量图像数据集上能够成功：因为实际使用的CNN具有次线性结构，且图像本身具有层次组合结构，两者相匹配。

Abstract: Over the past decade, deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved remarkable success on complex machine-learning tasks, yet the theoretical foundations of their performance remain incomplete. From a statistical viewpoint, a natural question is: can DNNs attain feature-learning and prediction consistency comparable to that of classical models? While a full characterization is open, we provide positive results for a broad subclass. We establish feature-learning consistency guarantees for sublinearly structured DNNs-architectures whose input/output dimensions and number of hidden neurons grow sublinearly with the sample size-when learning hierarchically compositional target functions. Importantly, this consistency still holds even in the conventional "over-parameterized" regime where the total number of parameters exceeds the number of training samples. Empirically, sublinearly structured DNNs match or surpass wide DNNs in prediction. A structural audit further indicates that widely used convolutional neural networks (CNNs), including AlexNet, VGGNet, ResNet, GoogLeNet, are sublinearly structured on their image classification benchmarks. We further prove that the sublinearly structured DNNs achieve universal approximation for hierarchically compositional functions in the large-sample limit. Moreover, images exhibit an inherent hierarchical, compositional structure. Taken together, these results explain, through a statistical lens, why many large-scale deep learning models succeed after adequate training on massive image datasets.

</details>


### [188] [FairBED: A Bayesian Experimental Design Approach to Gathering Fairer Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23515)
*Marcel Hedman,Emily Alger,Brieuc Lehmann,Chris Holmes,Tom Rainforth*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出FairBED框架，通过贝叶斯实验设计在数据采集阶段主动减少敏感属性信息，从而收集更公平的数据用于训练模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公平性方法多聚焦于从已有数据中学习公平模型，但数据本身已存在偏见，因此需要在数据采集环节就引入公平性考量。

Method: 提出FairBED，量化数据集公平性（公平数据集应对敏感属性信息量低），构建公平感知贝叶斯实验设计目标，最大化目标变量的期望信息增益，同时最小化敏感属性的期望信息增益。

Result: 推导了FairBED与人口统计平等的理论联系；实验表明，基于FairBED收集的数据训练的模型，相较于随机采集和传统BED，在公平性-准确率权衡上表现更优。

Conclusion: 在数据采集阶段主动抑制敏感属性信息是一种有效的公平性干预手段，FairBED能够在不显著牺牲准确率的前提下提升模型的公平性。

Abstract: Frameworks for ensuring fairness in machine learning typically focus on learning fair models from existing data. But this endeavor is often undermined by biases already present in that data. We therefore look to modify the data acquisition process itself to help gather fairer data that is inherently more suitable for training fair predictors. To this end, we introduce FairBED, which provides novel formulations for quantifying the fairness of datasets themselves based on the idea that fair datasets should be uninformative about sensitive attributes. We then use this to construct practical fairness-aware Bayesian experimental design (BED) objectives that maximize expected information gain about the target quantity of interest while minimizing expected information gain about sensitive attributes. We further derive a theoretical link between FairBED and demographic parity, and show empirically that models trained on data gathered using FairBED provide improved fairness-accuracy trade-offs compared to randomly acquired data and conventional BED.

</details>


### [189] [Neural Networks as Linear Regression: An Introduction for Statisticians](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23601)
*Abigail Loe,Susan Murray,Zhenke Wu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文旨在降低统计学家进入神经网络领域的门槛，通过描述近似线性回归的网络及其常见定制化方法，为后续研究奠定基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络领域对传统频率派统计学家而言入门门槛较高，作者希望破除这一障碍，帮助更多统计学家理解和使用神经网络。

Method: 通过描述近似线性回归的神经网络作为切入点，并介绍常见的网络定制化方法。

Result: 提供了一种从统计学家熟悉的线性回归角度理解神经网络的途径。

Conclusion: 该信件通过将神经网络与线性回归联系起来，降低了传统统计学家的学习门槛，为神经网络的进一步研究提供了基础性指导。

Abstract: Neural networks are a commonly used prediction tool in computer science and statistics. However, the barrier to entry of this interesting field remains high, particularly for classical statisticians trained in a frequentist perspective. In this letter, we demystify neural networks by describing networks that approximate a linear regression and describe common customizations that provide a foundation for further study.

</details>


### [190] [Diffusion Models Adapt to Low-Dimensional Structure Under Flexible Coefficient Choices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23627)
*Changxiao Cai,Yuchen Jiao,Gen Li*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文证明了扩散模型对低维结构的适应性是稳健的，在广泛更新系数下，仅需̃O(k/ε)次迭代即可生成ε-精确样本，与数据所在的环境维度无关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有关于扩散模型在低维数据结构下的收敛理论大多局限于特定系数选择，这引发了一个根本性问题：扩散模型对低维结构的适应性是否对系数选择敏感？本文旨在证明这种适应性是稳健的。

Method: 作者构建了一个统一的理论框架，分析了一类广泛的更新系数（而非特定系数），从理论上证明了̃O(k/ε)的迭代复杂度（k为低维结构维度，ε为TV距离精度），且该复杂度与高维环境维度无关。

Result: 证明了在广泛更新系数下，扩散模型仅需̃O(k/ε)次迭代即可达到ε-TV距离精度，该复杂度不依赖于环境维度。该结果涵盖了多种实践中常用的采样方法。
