Conclusion: 扩散模型对低维结构的适应是一种稳健的普适性质，而非特定系数选择下的特例。这为扩散采样器在处理结构化高维数据时的实证有效性提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Diffusion models are known to exploit unknown low-dimensional structure to accelerate sampling. However, existing convergence theory under low-dimensional data structure has largely focused on update rules with narrowly prescribed coefficient choices. This raises a fundamental question: is adaptation to low-dimensional structure sensitive to the precise choice of update coefficients? In this paper, we show that such adaptation is a robust property of diffusion models. For a broad class of update coefficients, we prove that $\widetilde{O}(k/\varepsilon)$ iterations suffice to generate an $\varepsilon$-accurate sample in total variation (TV) distance, independently of the ambient dimension. Our framework substantially broadens the class of diffusion samplers known to enjoy low dimensional adaptation and applies to several commonly used methods in practice. These results provide a theoretical justification for the empirical effectiveness of diffusion samplers across different coefficient choices when applied to structured, high-dimensional data.

</details>


### [191] [Action-BED: Task-Driven Bayesian Experimental Design with Singly Intractable Objectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23662)
*Tom Rossa,Angus Phillips,Tom Rainforth*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于期望未来损失（EFL）的贝叶斯实验设计（BED）新框架——ACTION-BED，将传统BED从双重难解优化转化为单重难解优化，通过联合优化设计策略和下游动作策略，无需显式后验或边际似然估计，只需从联合模型中采样即可高效求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统BED方法基于最大化期望不确定性降低，导致目标函数双重难解且难以优化，同时难以针对特定下游任务进行定制。现有方法效率低、复杂性高，亟需一种更简单、任务驱动的设计框架。

Method: 从第一性原理决策理论出发，将BED重新形式化为下游动作的期望未来损失（EFL）最小化问题。证明所有EFL目标均可重整为单重难解形式，并利用随机梯度联合优化设计策略和动作策略，无需显式计算后验或边际似然，仅需从联合模型中采样并评估下游损失。

Result: ACTION-BED框架相比现有方法能更有效、高效、简单地学习设计策略，且易于针对不同下游任务和损失函数进行定制化调整。

Conclusion: 基于EFL的BED框架通过将双重难解简化为单重难解，提供了更优的计算效率与灵活性，为任务驱动的实验设计开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Bayesian experimental design (BED) has traditionally been based on maximising expected uncertainty reductions from prior to posterior. A major shortfall of this approach is that it leads to doubly intractable objectives that are difficult to optimise, while customising them to particular downstream tasks of interest can also be difficult. Following first principles decision theory, we demonstrate that BED can alternatively be formulated in terms of an expected future loss (EFL) on downstream actions, providing a simple and naturally task-driven framework. Critically, we then show that all such EFLs can be rearranged into singly intractable objectives that can be jointly optimised with respect to both the design policy and a downstream action policy using stochastic gradients, an approach we refer to as ACTION-BED. This formulation further sidesteps the need for any explicit posterior or marginal likelihood estimation and is naturally implicit, requiring only the ability to sample from the joint model over model parameters and data, and evaluate the downstream loss function. It thus allows design policies to be learned more effectively, efficiently, and simply than existing methods, while providing easy customisation to different downstream tasks and losses.

</details>


### [192] [Ratio Utility and Cost Analysis for Privacy Preserving Subspace Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/1702.07976)
*Mert Al,Shibiao Wan,Sun-Yuan Kung*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文提出RUCA方法，通过压缩隐私技术有效平衡数据效用与隐私保护，在分类任务中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有隐私保护方法在控制效用-隐私权衡方面缺乏灵活性，且在高隐私需求场景下效果不佳。

Method: 提出基于压缩隐私的RUCA方法，通过比率效用与成本分析，最大化非敏感分类任务性能的同时，最小化推断隐私信息的能力。

Result: 在Census和Human Activity Recognition数据集上，RUCA在多种隐私定价下显著优于现有隐私保护数据投影方法。

Conclusion: RUCA能有效解决隐私-效用权衡问题，为数据所有者提供更灵活的隐私保护方案。

Abstract: With a rapidly increasing number of devices connected to the internet, big data has been applied to various domains of human life. Nevertheless, it has also opened new venues for breaching users' privacy. Hence it is highly required to develop techniques that enable data owners to privatize their data while keeping it useful for intended applications. Existing methods, however, do not offer enough flexibility for controlling the utility-privacy trade-off and may incur unfavorable results when privacy requirements are high. To tackle these drawbacks, we propose a compressive-privacy based method, namely RUCA (Ratio Utility and Cost Analysis), which can not only maximize performance for a privacy-insensitive classification task but also minimize the ability of any classifier to infer private information from the data. Experimental results on Census and Human Activity Recognition data sets demonstrate that RUCA significantly outperforms existing privacy preserving data projection techniques for a wide range of privacy pricings.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [193] [Towards CSI-Native Foundation Models: A Channel-Adaptive Roadmap for 6G](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20670)
*Chenyu Zhang,Xinchen Lyu,Chenshan Ren,Shuhan Liu,Qimei Cui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种面向CSI原生的信道自适应基础模型框架，通过对齐预训练、位置建模和注意力控制与三类信道需求（尺度感知异构暴露、物理时频空坐标、相关约束的token交互），在零样本泛化、尺度外推和推理效率上显著优于现有方法，并在系统级评估中以极低导频开销实现高谱效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无线基础模型将CSI视为通用任务张量而非受传播条件约束的信道响应，未能捕捉无线环境固有的时-频-空几何结构，导致对信道物理特性的表征能力不足。

Method: 提出CSI原生基础模型框架：(1) 尺度感知异构暴露用于预训练对齐；(2) 物理时频-天线坐标用于位置建模；(3) 相关约束的token交互用于注意力控制，使模型训练与信道物理特性一致。

Result: 零样本泛化NMSE降低超4dB；8倍未见过天线缩放下NMSE增益达5.4dB；移动感知处理加速18.8%；仅用7.01%密集导频开销，平均NMSE达-18.64dB，净谱效相对LMMSE提升36.6%、相对WiFo提升15.5%。

Conclusion: CSI原生表征学习能够支持导频高效的无线接入，为6G可复用信道智能提供了有效路径。

Abstract: Wireless foundation models offer a path toward reusable channel state information (CSI) intelligence for sixth-generation (6G) systems. However, existing generic-backbone adaptation and CSI pretraining methods often treat CSI as task tensors rather than propagation-conditioned channel responses, thereby failing to capture the intrinsic time-frequency-spatial geometry of wireless environments. This paper presents a channel-adaptive roadmap toward CSI-native foundation models, proposing a unified framework that aligns pretraining, positional modeling, and attention control with three channel requirements: scale-aware heterogeneous exposure, physical time-frequency-antenna coordinates, and correlation-bounded token interaction. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework across three dimensions: zero-shot generalization, reducing NMSE by more than 4 dB across spatial-temporal-frequency tasks; scale extrapolation, yielding up to a 5.4 dB gain under 8 times unseen antenna scaling; and inference efficiency, accelerating mobility-aware processing by up to 18.8%. A system-level evaluation with Sionna SYS further shows that the proposed framework uses only 7.01% of dense-pilot overhead, reaches -18.64 dB average NMSE, and improves average net spectral efficiency by 36.6% over dense LMMSE and 15.5% over WiFo, indicating that CSI-native representation learning can support pilot-efficient radio access.

</details>


### [194] [NeuroShield: A Device-Agnostic Foundation Model for EEG Authentication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20673)
*Matin Fallahi,Patricia Arias-Cabarcos,Thorsten Strufe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NeuroShield是一个可复用的EEG认证基础模型，采用双阶段Transformer架构，能够在可变通道和可变长度的EEG记录中学习身份判别嵌入，在15,762名被试和28,116个session上预训练，在未见过的下游数据集上微调后EER降低0.44-8.06个百分点，支持跨不同硬件、通道布局和信号时长的异构场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG认证模型难以处理不同采集设备、通道布局和信号时长带来的异质性，导致每个新数据集或新设备都需要从头开发模型，缺乏可复用性和知识迁移能力。

Method: 提出NeuroShield，采用双阶段Transformer架构，在可变通道和可变长度的EEG记录上学习身份判别嵌入。在三个公开EEG数据集（15,762名被试，28,116个session）上预训练，然后在未见过的下游数据集上进行微调和评估。

Result: 微调后，NeuroShield在EER（等错误率）上相比现有最优方法降低0.44-8.06个百分点；能够泛化到训练时未见过的更长信号片段，以及预训练中未接触的通道布局。

Conclusion: NeuroShield是一个可复用、可适应的EEG身份编码器，能够在异构记录设置下工作，开源发布支持可重复性和社区应用。

Abstract: A central challenge in EEG authentication is that models are typically tied to the acquisition settings in which they are trained. In particular, variations in headset hardware, channel layout, and signal duration create heterogeneous recordings that existing models are not designed to handle, causing each new headset or dataset to be treated as a separate model-development problem. This fragmentation limits multi-dataset learning, hinders knowledge transfer, and reduces model reusability. To address this limitation, we present NeuroShield, a reusable foundation model for EEG authentication that learns identity-discriminative embeddings from variable-channel and variable-length EEG recordings through a dual-stage transformer architecture. We pretrain NeuroShield on three public EEG datasets comprising 15{,}762 subjects and 28{,}116 sessions, and evaluate transfer on two unseen downstream datasets. Our evaluations show that, after fine-tuning, NeuroShield reduces equal error rate by 0.44--8.06 percentage points relative to the state of the art. NeuroShield further generalizes to segments longer than those seen during training and operates across channel layouts not encountered during pretraining. These results establish NeuroShield as a reusable and adaptable EEG identity encoder across heterogeneous recording settings. We release NeuroShield as open source to support reproducibility and community adoption.

</details>


### [195] [Massive Activations Are Architecturally Robust: A Controlled Scratch/Commitment Residual Stream Test](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20743)
*Maruthi Vemula*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究提出Ledger Residuals架构，将残差流分为可变暂存区（Deliberation）和受保护累加器（Commitment），以检验大型激活（massive activations）是否为残差流过载产生的伪影。实验发现，即使在专用解码通道中，模型仍会重建起始token上的固定维度离群值，且更强的稀疏惩罚反而使其更集中、更持久，说明大型激活是功能性的而非偶然性伪影。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前学术界对Transformer中大型激活（massive activations）的性质存在争议：它们是残差流必须同时承担读写角色而产生的可移除伪影，还是模型功能所必需的结构？本文旨在直接检验这一伪影假设。

Method: 提出Ledger Residuals架构，将残差流分为两个通道：Deliberation（可变暂存区，中间计算可自由覆写）和Commitment（受保护累加器，仅用于解码读出）。在160M和290M参数规模的匹配损失语言模型上进行实验，观察大型激活是否在专用解码通道中消失。

Result: 即使在受保护的解码通道中，模型仍然重建了标准的固定维度、起始token离群值（outlier）。该重建特征在幅度上小于标准Transformer，但更尖锐地集中于起始token；施加更强的稀疏惩罚不仅没有移除它，反而使其更持久、更集中。

Conclusion: 大型激活在架构上具有鲁棒性：无论模型从哪个表征中解码，它们都会重新出现。这表明大型激活是功能性的而非偶然性伪影。

Abstract: Trained transformers reliably develop massive activations, a small number of hidden dimensions whose magnitude is far above the median and which concentrate on the sequence-start token. Whether these outliers are a removable artifact of the residual stream's overloaded read and write role, or instead a functional necessity, is actively debated. We test the artifact hypothesis directly, with an architectural intervention. Our architecture, Ledger Residuals, splits the residual stream into a mutable scratch stream (Deliberation) that intermediate computation may freely overwrite and a protected, decode-only accumulator (Commitment) that holds the representation the model reads out. If massive activations exist only because one stream is forced to be both scratchpad and answer, then a dedicated answer channel should remove the need for them. We find that it does not. In matched-loss language models at the 160M and 290M scales, the model rebuilds the canonical fixed-dimension, start-token outlier inside the protected channel. The rebuilt feature is smaller in magnitude than in a standard transformer but more sharply concentrated on the start token, and a stronger sparsity penalty makes it more persistent and more concentrated still, rather than removing it. Massive activations therefore look architecturally robust: they re-emerge in whichever representation the model decodes from, which is what we would expect if they are functional rather than incidental. We release our architecture and measurement code.

</details>


### [196] [CIExplainer++: Generating Causal and Interpretable Explanations for Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20747)
*Francisco Caldas,Sahil Satish Kumar,Ruben Belo,Cláudia Soares*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出两个方法：CIExplainer（基于因果推断的GNN解释器）和G2TeXplainer（将因果子图转化为自然语言解释），旨在提升图神经网络的可解释性和可信度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可解释人工智能旨在使黑箱模型更可信，需要识别对输出有因果影响的成分并将其转化为可解释表示。

Method: 1) CIExplainer：基于潜在结果框架的扰动方法，识别对GNN预测因果效应最大的子图；2) G2TeXplainer：将因果子图转化为包含特征级和关系级信息的自然语言解释。

Result: 在多种GNN架构（GCN、GraphSAGE、GAT、GIN）和数据集上评估了CIExplainer。

Conclusion: 通过因果推断和自然语言生成相结合的方式，提高了GNN解释的可靠性和人类可理解性。

Abstract: Explainable Artificial Intelligence aims to make black-box models more trustworthy by presenting, in a human-understandable manner, the elements that lead to the model's output. This involves both (i) identifying components and connections with genuine causal influence on outputs and (ii) translating such structures into an interpretable representation. For the former, we introduce CIExplainer, a novel perturbation-based method grounded in causal inference for explaining Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). CIExplainer identifies the subgraph with the highest causal effects on GNN predictions using the Potential Outcome Framework. We evaluate and compare CIExplainer on various GNN architectures (GCN, GraphSAGE, GAT, GIN) and datasets.
  To bridge subgraph explanations with human interpretability, we further propose G2TeXplainer, a method that transforms causal subgraphs into natural language explanations that capture both feature-level and relational information.

</details>


### [197] [Evidential Fusion Network for Multimodal Survival Prediction under Missing Modalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20757)
*Yucheng Xing,Hailan Mo,Zi Wang,Ling Huang,Mengling Feng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出EMMS模型，利用Dempster-Shafer理论和高斯随机模糊数进行多模态融合，在缺失模态场景下实现生存预测，无需生成缺失数据即可达到SOTA性能并提供校准的不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生存预测模型假设数据完整，对临床中常见的模态缺失问题鲁棒性不足。

Method: 基于Dempster-Shafer理论和高斯随机模糊数进行多模态决策融合，将缺失模态视为空证据，同时考虑偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。

Result: 在四个癌症数据集上达到SOTA性能，提供校准且可解释的不确定性估计，且无额外计算开销。

Conclusion: EMMS提供了一种简单高效的处理模态缺失的生存预测方案，兼顾预测性能与不确定性量化。

Abstract: Recent multimodal survival prediction models have demonstrated strong predictive performance by leveraging complementary information across modalities. However, such models generally assume data completeness and exhibit limited robustness toward missing modalities, which are frequently encountered in real-world clinical settings. We propose the Evidential Missing Modality Survival Fusion (EMMS) model for multimodal survival prediction under missing modalities. EMMS offers a straightforward, computationally effective approach to survival analysis without requiring a generative phase for missing data. By employing Dempster-Shafer theory and Gaussian Random Fuzzy Numbers for multimodal decision fusion, it considers both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty alongside modality reliability for fusion. Moreover, the model treats missing modalities as vacuous evidence, preventing interference with available inputs and naturally reflecting increased uncertainty and calibrated predictions. Extensive experiments on four cancer datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance while providing calibrated and interpretable uncertainty estimates under incomplete multimodal observations, without introducing additional computational overhead.

</details>


### [198] [ELADO: Elliptic PDE Assessment Datasets for Operator Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20771)
*Frank Ehebrecht,Toni Scharle,Martin Atzmueller*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了ELADO，一个用于评估神经算子架构在求解椭圆型偏微分方程时的失败模式的系统基准套件，涵盖泊松方程和亥姆霍兹方程。通过可控数据生成过程构建了多个数据集，分别测试了五个困难来源：重尾解分布、谱分布偏移、频域重尾、输入敏感性和输入信号复杂度。实验表明，重尾目标、谱偏移和输入敏感性会显著降低预测精度，而标准指标（如平均相对L²误差）可能掩盖这些问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子基准数据集主要关注平均性能，忽视了椭圆PDE中自然出现的挑战性情况（如重尾分布、谱偏移等），导致失败模式被标准指标掩盖。

Method: 构建可控数据生成过程，针对泊松方程和亥姆霍兹方程的非恒定系数情形，设计了五个专门数据集，分别隔离不同的困难来源：重尾解分布、输入谱偏移、频域重尾分布、输入敏感性（局部Lipschitz分析）、输入信号复杂度（幅度归一化）。

Result: 多种神经算子架构的实验显示，重尾目标、谱偏移和输入敏感性显著降低预测精度，而这些退化在标准平均相对L²误差指标下不易察觉。

Conclusion: ELADO揭示了现有神经算子评估的盲区，强调了在椭圆柱PDE基准测试中纳入这些失败模式的重要性，推动更鲁棒的算子学习方法的发展。

Abstract: We introduce ELADO (Elliptic PDE Assessment Datasets for Operator Learning), a systematic benchmark suite constructed to show and quantify failure modes of neural operator architectures when learning solution operators of elliptic PDEs. While the benchmarks of existing datasets focus on average case performance, the ELADO datasets are constructed to highlight challenges that arise naturally in elliptic PDE problems. In particular, we construct several datasets built around Poisson's equation and the Helmholtz equation, each with non-constant coefficients. We define a controllable data-generating process to create datasets, that are designed to isolate a distinct source of difficulty. Specifically, these are (1) heavy-tailed solution distributions arising from light-tailed coefficient field distributions, (2) spectral distribution shift of the input data, (3) heavy-tailed distributions in the frequency domain of solutions, arising from light-tailed coefficient field distributions, (4) input sensitivity of learned operators, quantified by an empirical local Lipschitz analysis, and (5) the effect of input signal complexity on prediction accuracy under controlled amplitude normalization. We evaluate several neural operator architectures across all datasets and show that heavy-tailed targets, spectral shift, and input sensitivity each cause substantial degradation of the prediction accuracy that standard datasets and metrics (e.g., the mean relative $L^2$ error) may obscure.

</details>


### [199] [B[FM]$^2$: Brain Foundation Model via Flow Matching with SplitUNet](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20812)
*Jaedong Hwang,Kathleen Zhang,Wei Dai,Konstantinos Kontras,Maarten Vanmarcke,Maarten De Vos,Ila Fiete,Paul Pu Liang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: B[FM]² 是一种基于流匹配的脑电图基础模型，直接在原始信号上连续时间训练，无需分块、标记化或掩码。通过 SplitUNet 处理时间-电极不对称性，在仅用约307小时数据（比现有模型少30倍）的情况下，在9个下游任务中的7个上取得最先进结果，并能生成临床医生无法区分的合成脑电图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG基础模型将连续多通道脑电波形离散化为块或码本标记，破坏了连续脑节律并掩盖了细粒度时间动态。作者希望设计一种更符合脑电数据特性的预训练方法，保留原始信号的连续性和时间精细结构。

Method: 提出 B[FM]² 框架，核心创新包括：(1) 直接对原始EEG信号进行连续时间流匹配预训练，无需分块、标记化或掩码；(2) 设计 SplitUNet 速度网络，将每个模块分解为独立的1D时间卷积和1D电极卷积，仅沿时间维度下采样，保留电极拓扑结构，解决时间-电极维度的不对称性。

Result: 在9个标准EEG下游分类任务中，7个达到最先进水平。预训练仅需36,895个片段（约307小时），比现有EEG基础模型少1-2个数量级（约30倍数据量）。生成的合成EEG使两名认证神经科医生无法区分真假（Cohen's κ=-0.096）。

Conclusion: B[FM]² 证明了流匹配范式在脑电信号建模中的有效性，以极低的数据预算实现了卓越的迁移性能，同时具备逼真的生成能力，为EEG基础模型提供了新的范式方向。

Abstract: EEG foundation models can learn generalizable representations from large-scale EEG corpora to enable single-backbone transfer across diverse clinical and brain-computer interface tasks. Existing models typically discretize the continuous multi-channel EEG waveform into patches or codebook tokens and train a transformer with masked self-supervision. Recognizing that this discretization fragments continuous brain rhythms and obscures fine-grained temporal dynamics, we present B[FM]$^2$(Brain Foundation Model via Flow Matching), whose inductive bias aligns with the data by pretraining directly on the raw signal using continuous-time flow matching without patches, tokenization, or masking. However, multi-channel EEG signals pose an architectural challenge for flow matching: time is densely sampled and highly autocorrelated (thousands of timepoints), while the electrode axis is short (tens of channels) at distinct scalp positions. To address this time-electrode asymmetry, we introduce SplitUNet, a velocity network that factorizes each block into separate 1D temporal and 1D electrode convolutions and downsamples only along time, preserving electrode topology throughout the hierarchy. B[FM]$^2$ sets a new state of the art on 7 of 9 standard downstream EEG classification tasks, using a pretraining budget of only 36,895 segments ($\approx$ 307h), 1-2 orders of magnitude ($\approx$ 30x) less than required by existing EEG foundation models. Further, it generates synthetic EEGs that two board-certified neurologists cannot distinguish from brain data (Cohen's $κ=$ -0.096). https://jd730.github.io/projects/BFM2

</details>


### [200] [CELEUS: Certifiable and Efficient LLM Evaluation via E-Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20820)
*Zhijian Zhou,Zesheng Ye,Zhaorun Chen,Bo Li,Feng Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Celeus框架，利用E-process构建任意有效置信区间，通过不确定性引导采样和代理辅助近似，在LLM评估中实现统计严谨且高效的可信评估，相比基线方法减少54-62%的评估样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM评估方法在反复更新置信区间并决定何时停止时，无法保证声称的覆盖概率（如95%）始终有效，存在理论严谨性与实践之间的差距。

Method: 提出Celeus框架，核心包括：(i) 不确定性引导采样，选择信息量大的样本；(ii) 代理辅助近似，对未评估样本进行估计。两者结合构造无偏信号，基于E-process构建任意有效置信区间。

Result: Celeus达到目标精度所需评估样本比基线方法少54-62%，同时保持任意有效的覆盖概率。理论上证明置信区间能以近参数速率（达对数因子）收缩，并分析了方差最优采样规则。

Conclusion: 该工作弥合了LLM评估中理论严谨性与实践之间的鸿沟，提供了统计上严谨且高效的可靠评估方案。

Abstract: Can we trust evaluation scores to capture an LLM's true real-world performance? Certifiable evaluation answers this question by providing guarantee for LLM evaluation. In particular, existing methods sequentially curate evaluation samples and keep updating confidence intervals (CIs) that cover the true performance with high probability (e.g., 95%) until some conditions are satisfied, e.g., the CI width reaches a target precision. However, existing methods are not generally anytime-valid: the claimed coverage (e.g., 95%) may fail when CIs are repeatedly updated and used to decide when to stop, leaving a gap between theoretical rigor and practice. This paper bridges this gap by proposing Celeus, a Certifiable framework for Efficient LLM evaluation, which leverages E-processes to build anytime-valid CIs. Concretely, we propose signals that combine two ingredients: (i) Uncertainty-guided sampling to select informative samples for evaluation, and (ii) Surrogate-assisted approximations for unevaluated samples. We prove that such signals remain unbiased for the evaluation score conditional on the past, enabling statistically-grounded and anytime-valid $e$-process CIs. More importantly, the two ingredients reduce estimation variance and help reach the target precision with fewer evaluated samples. We also prove that CIs obtained by Celeus can shrink at a near-parametric rate up to logarithmic factors and analyze the oracle variance-optimal sampling rule that motivates the empirical uncertainty-guided one. Experiments show that Celeus reaches the target precision using 54-62% fewer evaluated samples than baselines, while preserving anytime-valid coverage.

</details>


### [201] [Evolutionary Discovery of Developmental Reward Schedules in Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20858)
*Alan Nadelsticher Ruvalcaba*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种进化框架来发现强化学习中的发展性奖励调度，通过随时间动态调整三个生物启发成分（能动性、新颖性和反应性）的权重。在MiniGrid任务上测试了四种进化算法，发现进化方法优于基线，其中L-SHADE和CMA-ES分别在不同任务上表现最佳，且新颖性始终是训练早期的主导信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统强化学习中奖励结构的时间组成是人工设计且固定不变的，忽视了训练过程中动机优先级的变化。本文旨在探索如何通过进化优化自动发现更优的发展性奖励调度。

Method: 提出进化框架，将三种生物启发成分（能动性、新颖性、反应性）通过时变权重组合。使用四种进化算法（CMA-ES、xNES、DE、L-SHADE）优化权重调度，在稀疏奖励的DoorKey-6x6和KeyCorridorS3R1任务上评估。

Result: DoorKey-6x6上所有进化方法优于基线，L-SHADE最好，相对均值提升11.4%；KeyCorridorS3R1上CMA-ES最佳，其他进化方法泛化能力较弱。跨任务发现新颖性是训练早期的主导信号，进化发现的最优调度与生物学预期不同。

Conclusion: 进化优化是深度强化学习中发展性奖励调度发现的有效方法，但计算环境中的最优调度可能与生物学中的最优调度存在差异。

Abstract: The temporal structure of reward composition in reinforcement learning (RL) is typically hand-designed and held fixed throughout training, leaving the progression of motivational priorities largely unexplored. In this work, we propose an evolutionary framework for discovering developmental reward schedules, in which three distinct biologically inspired motivational components -- agency, novelty, and reactivity -- are combined through time-varying weights that dynamically shift over the course of training. Evaluated on two sparse-reward MiniGrid tasks: DoorKey-6x6 and KeyCorridorS3R1, our framework compares the generalizability of four evolutionary algorithms: CMA-ES, xNES, DE, and L-SHADE against an extrinsically motivated baseline (our main comparison point), and three additional hand-designed methods. On DoorKey-6x6, all evolved methods outperform the non-evolved baselines, with L-SHADE achieving the best performance -- an approximate relative mean improvement of 11.4% over the extrinsic only baseline. On KeyCorridorS3R1, CMA-ES achieves the best overall performance, with the remaining evolved methods showing weaker and less reliable generalization capability compared to the extrinsic only baseline. Interestingly, the discovered schedules diverge from our defined developmental ordering, with novelty consistently emerging as the dominant early signal during training, across both tasks. Collectively, our results position evolutionary optimization as a promising approach for developmental reward schedule discovery in deep reinforcement learning, and suggest that what evolution finds to be optimal in computational settings may differ from what it finds to be optimal in biology. The code for this project can be found at: https://github.com/alannadels/Evolutionary_RL.git.

</details>


### [202] [Machine Learning Classification of Cryopathy Syndromes: A Comprehensive Comparative Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20874)
*Nataliya Shakhovska,Valentyna Chopyak,Ivan Izonin,Vira Haievska*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用机器学习方法对2,686名患者的冷球蛋白相关综合征实验室数据进行自动分类，发现随机森林与梯度提升树的软投票集成模型表现最佳，基于冷球蛋白的交互特征是最具信息量的预测因子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冷球蛋白综合征的分类困难，因实验室模式常在不同诊断类别间重叠，且部分诊断罕见，导致常规检测结果解读困难，高度依赖专家经验。因此需要开发自动分类方法来辅助临床决策。

Method: 分析了2,686名患者、14个诊断类别的实验室数据，包括人口统计学变量、冷球蛋白测量、沉淀试验等。数据预处理后进行特征工程，构建了12种建模策略（随机森林、梯度提升树、多层感知器、软投票集成、SMOTE、分层分类等），采用分层训练-测试和5折交叉验证评估，主要指标为宏平均F1分数、准确率、Top-3准确率和期望校准误差。

Result: 最佳多分类性能由随机森林与梯度提升树的软投票集成实现；交叉验证确认平衡随机森林模型性能稳定；树模型优于神经网络；基于冷球蛋白的交互特征是最重要的预测因子。

Conclusion: 由于类别不平衡和临床诊断重叠，整体分类任务具有挑战性，但树模型集成方法展现了实际应用潜力，特征工程（尤其是冷球蛋白交互特征）对提升判别能力至关重要。

Abstract: Cryopathy syndromes are difficult to classify because laboratory patterns often overlap across diagnostic categories, while some diagnoses are rare. This makes routine interpretation of cryoglobulin-related tests challenging and increases dependence on expert judgment. The aim of this study was to develop and compare machine learning approaches for automated classification of cryopathy syndromes from laboratory data and to identify a practical strategy for clinical decision support. Methods: We analysed laboratory records from 2,686 patients assigned to 14 diagnostic categories. The dataset included demographic variables, cryoglobulin measurements, precipitation tests, and hemagglutinin and hemolysin titers. Data preprocessing included cleaning, encoding, imputation, normalization, and construction of clinically informed interaction features. We evaluated 12 modelling strategies, including Random Forest, Gradient Boosted Trees, Multi-Layer Perceptron, soft-voting ensembles, class balancing with Synthetic Minority Over-sampling Technique, hierarchical classification, period-aware models, targeted binary classifiers, and probability calibration. Performance was assessed using stratified train-test evaluation and stratified 5-fold cross-validation. The main metrics were macro-averaged F1 score, accuracy, Top-3 accuracy, and expected calibration error. The overall task proved difficult because of marked class imbalance and clinical overlap between diagnoses. The best multiclass performance was achieved by a soft-voting ensemble of Random Forest and Gradient Boosted Trees. Cross-validation confirmed stable performance for the balanced Random Forest model. Tree-based methods consistently outperformed the neural network model. Feature engineering improved discrimination, and the most informative predictors were derived cryoglobulin-based interaction features.

</details>


### [203] [Understanding Latent Flow Models for Tabular Data Synthesis: Targets, Paths, and Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20878)
*Bahrul Ilmi Nasution*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了潜空间流模型在合成表格数据生成中的性能，发现学习目标（速度/后验匹配 vs. 分数/噪声匹配）在很大程度上决定了效用-风险权衡，OT路径比VP路径更容忍早停以节省计算资源，并给出了实用的配置建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在受监管领域共享合成表格数据时，需要平衡数据效用、披露风险和计算成本。虽然潜空间流模型很灵活，但不同学习目标、概率路径和采样动态之间的理论等价性在有限步积分和有限计算预算下会表现出不同行为，缺乏系统的实证指导。

Method: 在7个数据集上对表格潜流模型进行实证研究，评估了速度匹配、分数匹配、噪声匹配和后验匹配四种目标，在最优传输（OT）和方差保持（VP）两种路径下，结合ODE和SDE采样，以及不同的积分预算设置。

Result: (1) 学习目标决定效用-风险权衡：速度/后验匹配倾向于更高效用，分数/噪声匹配倾向于更低披露风险；(2) 配置和采样选择影响性能：中点法常改善分布保真度，OT路径比VP路径更容忍早停，可在固定预算或风险阈值下节省计算；(3) 提炼出可操作的默认配置和实用指导。

Conclusion: 该研究为在披露风险和资源约束下进行发布前模型选择提供了实证依据和实用配置指南，代码已开源。

Abstract: Synthetic tabular data enables microdata sharing in regulated domains, yet deploying continuous-time generative models requires balancing analytical utility, disclosure risk, and computational cost. Latent-space flow models are flexible, but theoretical equivalences across learning targets, probability paths, and sampling dynamics can translate into different behaviour under finite-step integration and explicit compute budgets. We present an empirical study of tabular latent flow models across seven datasets, evaluating velocity, score, noise, and posterior matching objectives under optimal transport (OT) and variance-preserving (VP) paths, ODE and SDE sampling, and varying integration budgets. Our contributions are threefold: (1) we show that the learning target largely determines the utility-risk operating regime, with velocity and posterior matching tending to yield higher utility, while score and noise matching tend to achieve lower disclosure risk; (2) we demonstrate that configuration and sampling choices shift performance, with midpoint often improving distributional fidelity and OT paths often tolerating earlier stopping than VP, enabling compute savings under fixed budgets or risk thresholds; and (3) we distil these findings into actionable defaults and practical configuration guidance to support pre-release model selection under disclosure risk and resource constraints. The code implementation and supplementary materials can be accessed in https://github.com/rulnasution/tabular-latent-flow/.

</details>


### [204] [Temporal Causal Prior-Data Fitted Networks for Panel Data with Learned Reliability Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20889)
*Shravan Talupula,Saurabh Sharma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TCPFN，一个用于时序因果发现的基础模型，支持零样本推理，并能输出可靠性信号（如零效应概率、混杂强度等），在19个基准数据集上取得优异表现，工业规模上比PCMCI快约50倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果基础模型（CausalPFN、CausalFM）仅适用于静态数据，时序因果方法（CRN、G-Net）需要逐数据集训练，且没有方法能同时输出逐对的可靠性信号。工业时序因果推断需要处理时间动态、时变治疗和未观测混杂，现有方法无法满足大规模零样本需求。

Method: (1) Causal Judgment Head：联合预测零效应概率、混杂强度、可识别性、中介分数和因果机制；(2) 混合训练先验：覆盖六种因果机制（独立、直接、混杂、中介、时变混杂、反馈）及前门/工具变量先验；(3) 离散token面板数据架构 + 交叉注意力掩码防止跨时间步泄漏；(4) 零样本推理：FAISS上下文选择 + 一步后验修正。

Result: 在19个基准数据集上，AUROC达到0.96（TE）、0.93（SWaT）、0.98（Causal Rivers）、0.97（CAUSRCA）。空检测器NullF1=0.94，AUROC=0.99。工业数据集上，TCPFN（V=1275）6小时完成，PCMCI（V=666子集）81.5小时，外推至V=1275需约12.5天。

Conclusion: TCPFN是首个支持零样本时序因果发现的基础模型，具备可靠性信号输出能力，在工业规模上实现了数量级的效率提升，并能发现跨子系统的因果关系（而PCMCI主要发现仪器内控制器-测量耦合）。

Abstract: Estimating causal effects in industrial time series requires handling temporal dynamics, time-varying treatments, and unobserved confounders. Existing causal foundation models (CausalPFN, CausalFM) operate only on static cross-sectional data; neural temporal methods (CRN, G-Net) require per-dataset training; and concurrent temporal-PFN proposals have not been demonstrated at industrial scale. None output explicit per-pair reliability signals alongside their CATE estimates.
  We introduce Temporal Causal Prior-Data Fitted Networks (TCPFN), a foundation model for zero-shot temporal causal discovery with learned reliability signals. TCPFN makes four contributions: (1) a Causal Judgment Head that jointly predicts null-effect probability, confounding strength, identifiability, mediation fraction, and causal regime; (2) a mixed training prior covering six causal regimes (independent, direct, confounded, mediated, time-varying confounded, feedback) plus CausalFM-style front-door and instrumental-variable priors; (3) a discrete-token panel-data architecture with cross-attention masking that prevents inter-horizon leakage; (4) zero-shot inference at industrial scale via FAISS-based context selection and one-step posterior correction.
  On 19 benchmark datasets across five domains, TCPFN achieves competitive zero-shot causal discovery: AUROC 0.96 on Tennessee Eastman, 0.93 on SWaT, 0.98 on Causal Rivers, 0.97 on CAUSRCA. The null detector reaches NullF1 0.94, AUROC 0.99. TCPFN scales to V=1,275 on a proprietary Kraft pulp-and-paper dataset in 6 hours on a single GPU; PCMCI, a CPU-only library, on a V=666 sub-panel of the same data took 81.5 hours, extrapolating by O(V^2) to ~12.5 days at V=1,275. TCPFN's top edges identify cross-subsystem causal relationships while PCMCI's surface within-instrument controller-measurement coupling -- a scalability case study.

</details>


### [205] [MMGNN: Multi-level, multi-color graph neural networks for molecular property prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20906)
*Trung Nguyen,Duc Duy Nguyen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MMGNN，一种将分子图分解为原子类型对子图的层次化图神经网络，在分子性质预测任务上取得了优异表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统分子消息传递神经网络通过单一图传播化学相互作用，会混合不同交互信号，且需要深层传播才能捕捉远程效应，因此需要一种能解耦交互特定信号的层次化框架。

Method: 提出MMGNN框架，将分子图分解为重叠的原子类型对子图，保留原子级分辨率。MMGNN-2D基于共价键构建化学着色子图，MMGNN-3D基于空间邻近构建几何着色子图并增加距离、角度和二面角描述符，最后通过共享的消息传递骨干网络和原子级聚合进行预测。

Result: 在MoleculeNet的5个分类和3个回归基准上，MMGNN-2D宏平均AUC-ROC达0.838，ESOL上RMSE为0.803；MMGNN-3D在BBBP上AUC-ROC达0.956，FreeSolv上RMSE为1.793。

Conclusion: 重叠的交互特定子图分解是分子性质预测的一种有竞争力的策略，拓扑和几何表示具有互补优势。

Abstract: Molecular message-passing neural networks commonly propagate chemically diverse interactions through a single graph, which may mix interaction-specific signals and require deep propagation to capture long-range effects. We introduce the Multi-level, Multi-color Graph Neural Network (MMGNN), a hierarchical framework that decomposes a molecular graph into overlapping atom-type-pair-specific subgraphs while preserving atom-level resolution. MMGNN-2D constructs chemical-colored subgraphs from covalent connectivity, whereas MMGNN-3D constructs geometric-colored subgraphs from spatial proximity and augments their edges with distance, angular, and torsional descriptors. Both variants apply a shared communicative message-passing backbone to each subgraph and combine the resulting representations through atom-wise aggregation and molecular readout. We evaluated MMGNN on five classification and three regression benchmarks from MoleculeNet using common scaffold splits and five independent runs. MMGNN-2D achieved the highest macro-average AUC-ROC of 0.838 across the classification datasets and the lowest RMSE on ESOL (0.803). MMGNN-3D obtained the highest mean AUC-ROC on BBBP (0.956) and the lowest RMSE on FreeSolv (1.793), indicating complementary strengths of topological and geometric representations. Structural and leave-one-out analyses further illustrate how the subgraph decomposition affects learned representations and atom-type-pair sensitivities. These results support overlapping interaction-specific graph decomposition as a competitive strategy for molecular property prediction.

</details>


### [206] [Physics-Guided Dual-Stream Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network for Predicting Full-Field Structural Response of Stiffened Panels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20916)
*Yuecheng Cai,Jasmin Jelovica*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DS-HGNN（双流异构图神经网络），用于薄壁结构（如加筋板箱梁）的全场应力和位移预测。该方法通过物理引导的边状态初始化、双流消息传递、FiLM条件谱卷积和低秩读出模块，在异构图上实现高效且准确的物理场预测，在多个数据集上优于六种基准模型，并可在减少19%-38%训练样本时保持相当精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 有限元分析计算成本高，现有神经代理模型难以处理变拓扑和复杂边界条件，亟需一种高效、准确且具有泛化能力的替代方法。

Method: 1) 构建面板级异构图表示；2) 物理引导的边状态初始化（融合边类型、空间信息和边界运动学）；3) 双流消息传递（分离纵向与横向结构信息，并允许跨流交换）；4) FiLM条件的一维谱卷积融合几何与载荷效应；5) 谱旁路低秩读出机制重构物理场。

Result: 在多个加筋板数据集上，DS-HGNN在应力和位移RMSE上均优于六种异构GNN基准模型；仅用19%-38%的训练样本即可达到与最强基准相当的精度；能捕捉屈服及后屈服应力特征。

Conclusion: DS-HGNN有效解决了变拓扑和复杂边界条件下薄壁结构全场预测难题，兼具高精度与数据效率，为大型结构迭代设计提供了可行的代理模型方案。

Abstract: Iterative design and optimization of large, complex structures require fast and accurate prediction of stress, displacement, and other fields. Finite element analysis (FEA) is computationally expensive for this task. Existing neural network surrogates often struggle with varying topologies and complex boundary conditions. This study proposes the novel Dual-Stream Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network (DS-HGNN) for full-field stress and displacement prediction in thin-walled structures, demonstrated on box beams made of stiffened panels. DS-HGNN operates on panel-level heterogeneous graph representations and introduces physics-guided edge states initialized from edge types, spatial information, and boundary kinematics. These states are updated through dual-stream message passing that separates longitudinal and transverse structural information while allowing cross-stream exchange. Geometry and loading effects are incorporated through Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM)-conditioned 1-D spectral convolutions, and physical fields are reconstructed using a spectral-bypass low-rank readout. The model is evaluated on stiffened panel datasets with different geometries, boundary kinematics, loading conditions, and material nonlinear responses. DS-HGNN achieves the lowest stress and displacement RMSE compared with six benchmark heterogeneous graph neural network models. It also reaches comparable accuracy to the strongest benchmark models using 19%-38% fewer training samples. A targeted evaluation further shows that DS-HGNN captures yield and post-yield stress features.

</details>


### [207] [Short-Term Electricity Demand Forecasting for New England Using a Hybrid Transformer-XGBoost Framework with Weather, Calendar, and COVID-19 Indicators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20918)
*Reza Ghanavati,Behrooz Mosallaei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Transformer编码器+XGBoost混合框架用于新英格兰地区短期电力需求预测，融合气象、日历、自回归滞后及COVID-19变量。混合模型测试集RMSE为8,876 MWh，MAPE 2.05%，R² 0.906。但Diebold-Mariano检验表明与纯XGBoost基线无显著差异。消融实验揭示COVID-19特征在疫情后阶段成为噪声，存在时间有效性衰减问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 短期电力需求预测对电力系统可靠运行与市场规划至关重要，传统方法难以充分捕捉时间序列特征与非线性的多源影响因素。

Method: 构建混合框架：Transformer编码器提取时间特征，XGBoost进行最终预测；整合六城市气象数据、日历效应、自回归滞后项及COVID-19流行病学变量；使用Optuna的多变量TPE优化超参数，采用无泄漏的70/15/15时序划分。

Result: 混合模型RMSE 8,876 MWh，MAPE 2.05%，R² 0.906；XGBoost基线RMSE 9,304 MWh，MAPE 2.21%，R² 0.896。DM检验显示差异不显著（DM=-1.126, p=0.262）。消融实验：移除COVID-19特征使混合模型RMSE上升3.2%，但使XGBoost略微改善1.2%。

Conclusion: COVID-19特征存在时间有效性衰减：疫情期行为扰动产生强信号，但2022年中后适应完成，流行病学变量沦为噪声放大过拟合。模型在疫情后测试集上过度应用已过时的疫情模式。

Abstract: Accurate short-term electricity demand forecasting is critical for reliable power system operation, energy market planning, and infrastructure optimization. This paper presents a hybrid framework combining a Transformer encoder for temporal feature extraction with gradient-boosted decision trees (XGBoost) for daily electricity demand forecasting across New England. The framework integrates meteorological observations from six cities spanning all six New England states, calendar and holiday effects, autoregressive demand lags, and COVID-19 epidemiological variables. Hyperparameter optimization uses Optuna with a multivariate Tree-structured Parzen Estimator over 500 trials, with a leakage-free 70/15/15 chronological train-validation-test split. The hybrid model achieves a test RMSE of 8,876 MWh, MAPE of 2.05%, and R-squared of 0.906. A tabular-only XGBoost baseline achieves RMSE of 9,304 MWh, MAPE of 2.21%, and R-squared of 0.896. A Diebold-Mariano test (Harvey-Leybourne-Newbold correction) confirms the 427.7 MWh difference is statistically indistinguishable from noise (DM = -1.126, p = 0.262). An ablation study reveals COVID-19 features improved training accuracy but had asymmetric test effects: removal degraded hybrid RMSE by 3.2% while marginally improving XGBoost-only by 1.2%. A SHAP temporal analysis shows 5 of 8 COVID features rank higher on the post-acute test set than during pandemic-active training, indicating the model over-applies learned pandemic patterns. These findings establish temporal validity decay as a central mechanism: behavioral disruptions drove a strong COVID-demand signal during 2020-2021, but adaptation was complete by mid-2022, leaving epidemiological features as noise amplifying overfitting to stale pandemic patterns.

</details>


### [208] [$Ω$: Operator-based Mixture Ensemble for Generative Assimilation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20920)
*Pouria Behnoudfar,Nan Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Ω框架，结合条件高斯代理建模、无监督分数学习与生成采样，高效解决高维非线性系统中非高斯后验分布的推断问题，无需真实后验样本，在湍流模型中验证了优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据同化方法（如集合卡尔曼滤波、粒子滤波、基于分数的生成方法）在处理强非高斯后验分布时各有局限：高斯近似不准确、粒子滤波可扩展性差、分数方法需监督训练。本文旨在开发一种无需真值后验样本的可扩展框架。

Method: Ω框架包含四步：(1) 条件高斯代理模型提供非线性非高斯基线近似，对未解析变量有闭式后验；(2) 利用闭式分布解析恢复高维未观测分量，降低计算成本；(3) 通过去噪分数匹配仅学习残差（基线之外的部分），无需真实后验样本；(4) 用高斯混合表示重构全非高斯后验分布，并通过退火朗之万采样从基线向目标后验迭代优化。

Result: 在多个具有间歇性和极端事件的湍流模型上验证，Ω一致提升了后验精度。

Conclusion: Ω为高维非线性系统的非高斯后验推断提供了一种可扩展、无监督的有效解决方案，兼具计算效率和统计精度。

Abstract: Characterizing non-Gaussian posterior distributions in partially observed high-dimensional nonlinear systems remains a fundamental challenge in data assimilation. Ensemble Kalman filters rely on Gaussian approximations that can be inaccurate for strongly non-Gaussian posteriors, whereas particle filters suffer from severe scalability limitations. Recent score-based generative approaches improve posterior characterization but typically require supervised training with ground-truth posterior samples, which are unavailable in most practical applications. We introduce $Ω$ (Operator-based Mixture Ensemble for Generative Assimilation), a scalable framework that integrates conditional Gaussian surrogate modeling, unsupervised score learning, and generative sampling. The conditional Gaussian surrogate provides a nonlinear non-Gaussian baseline approximation while admitting closed-form conditional posterior distributions for the unresolved variables. First, $Ω$ exploits these closed-form conditional distributions to analytically recover the high-dimensional unobserved component, reducing computational cost and mitigating the curse of dimensionality. Second, $Ω$ learns only the residual discrepancy beyond an analytical baseline through denoising score matching using ensemble trajectories alone, eliminating the need for ground-truth posterior samples and substantially reducing the learning burden. Third, $Ω$ reconstructs the full non-Gaussian posterior distribution of both observed and unobserved variables via a Gaussian mixture representation, capturing multimodal, skewed, and heavy-tailed statistics. Finally, $Ω$ employs annealed Langevin sampling to iteratively refine ensemble members from the baseline toward the target posterior. $Ω$ is validated on several turbulent models with intermittency and extreme events, consistently improving posterior accuracy.

</details>


### [209] [Hierarchical Pooling for Sheaf Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20932)
*Dionisia Naddeo,Carlo Abate,Pietro Liò,Nicola Toschi,Filippo Maria Bianchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HiSP（Hierarchical Sheaf Pool），一种基于局部谱粗化的层状池化框架，用于在Sheaf神经网络中构建层次化表示。通过对簇内Sheaf Laplacian的低频特征模态进行投影，实现粗尺度上的有效降维，并分析了截断误差和实现损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Sheaf神经网络仅在固定图分辨率下操作，缺乏原则性的池化机制来构建层次化表示。

Method: 基于局部谱粗化，将细粒度茎值特征投影到簇内Sheaf Laplacian的低频特征模态上，通过Galerkin算子构建粗空间，并形式化分析了截断损失和实现损失。

Result: 提出了HiSP池化层，兼容Sheaf神经网络，支持批处理、提升Sheaf Laplacian和层次化架构。

Conclusion: HiSP为Sheaf神经网络提供了一种原则性的层次化池化机制，能够在降维过程中保持Sheaf结构的关键能量特性。

Abstract: Sheaf Neural Networks (SNNs) generalize Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) by replacing scalar node signals with stalk-valued signals and by using restriction maps to measure compatibility across edges. Unlike standard graph diffusion, which encourages neighboring node features to become similar, sheaf diffusion promotes consistency through the restriction maps and can therefore model more general relationships between neighboring nodes. However, existing sheaf neural architectures mainly operate at a fixed graph resolution and do not provide a principled pooling mechanism for building hierarchical representations. In this paper, we introduce Hierarchical Sheaf Pool (HiSP), a sheaf-aware pooling framework based on local spectral coarsening. Given a partition of the graph, HiSP constructs each coarse stalk by projecting fine stalk-valued features onto the low-frequency eigenmodes of the cluster-internal sheaf Laplacian. These local modes define a cochain-level prolongation map, which allows the fine sheaf energy to be represented on the coarse space through a Galerkin operator. We further analyze the approximation induced by coarsening by separating truncation loss, due to discarded local modes, from realization loss, due to representing the projected operator as a coarse sheaf. Finally, we implement HiSP as a GNN pooling layer compatible with SNNs and provide a PyG implementation supporting batching, lifted sheaf Laplacians, and hierarchical architectures.

</details>


### [210] [Towards Robust Training in NNGPT AutoML Pipeline: A Loss-Optimizer Pairing Selection Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20933)
*Anton Abramochkin,Radu Timofte,Dmitry Ignatov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了6种优化器与3种损失函数的18种组合，在33种异构架构上的表现（共594个变体）。发现没有通用的最佳配对，交叉熵+Adam/AdamW最鲁棒，NGL损失需搭配自适应优化器才能与交叉熵竞争，而Adagrad和Adadelta在固定超参数下普遍表现不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动化架构搜索(AutoML)中，损失函数与优化器的配对选择对模型训练影响重大，但现有研究缺乏对异构架构池中该配对选择的系统性探究，不清楚是否存在通用最优配方。

Method: 在LEMUR异构架构池的33种基础架构上，将3种损失函数（交叉熵、负对数似然、基因进化NGL）与6种优化器（SGD+Momentum、Adam、AdamW、RMSprop、Adagrad、Adadelta）组合为18种配置，通过源级注入流水线自动生成594个变体，在6个图像分类数据集上以固定超参数进行对比实验。

Result: 交叉熵+Adam/AdamW是跨架构和数据集最鲁棒的选择；NGL损失在搭配自适应优化器时与交叉熵竞争力相当，但搭配SGD或累积方法时性能显著下降；Adagrad和Adadelta无论搭配何种损失函数在固定超参数下均表现不佳。

Conclusion: 不存在普遍最优的损失-优化器配对，研究结果为NNGPT框架中的损失-优化器选择提供了可操作的指导建议。

Abstract: The choice of loss function and optimizer is an important decision, that shapes further model training. Yet automated architecture search pipelines (AutoML) benefits significantly more from the optimal pairing selection and vice versa. This paper investigates whether a single recipe is sufficient for heterogeneous architecture pools, or whether the optimal pairing varies across structurally diverse models. We conduct a systematic empirical study of all $3 \times 6 = 18$ combinations of six optimizers (SGD+Momentum, Adam, AdamW, RMSprop, Adagrad, Adadelta), paired with three loss functions: Cross-Entropy (CEL), Negative Log-Likelihood (NLL), and the recently introduced genetically evolved NGL loss across the base models presented in LEMUR heterogeneous architecture pool on six image classification datasets (CelebA-Gender, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNette, MNIST, SVHN). The 18 loss-optimizer configurations are applied to each of the 33 compatible base architectures taken from the LEMUR pool, resulting in 594 variants that were generated fully automatically by a source-level injection pipeline and evaluated under fixed hyperparameters, ensuring that observed accuracy differences are attributable solely to the loss-optimizer pairing. Our results confirm that no single pairing is universally optimal. Cross-Entropy with Adam or AdamW is the most robust choice across architecture families and datasets. NGL is a competitive alternative to CEL on standard convolutional classifiers, but only when paired with adaptive optimizers; it degrades substantially with SGD or accumulation-based methods. Adagrad and Adadelta consistently underperform under fixed hyperparameters regardless of loss function, highlighting their sensitivity to learning rate tuning. These findings provide actionable guidance for loss-optimizer selection within NNGPT Framework.

</details>


### [211] [Learning through Internalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20937)
*Nikolaos Tsilivis,Nirmit Joshi,Marko Medvedev,Julia Kempe,Nati Srebro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究神经网络系统（特别是Transformer）如何将显式计算过程内化为自身权重（即内部化过程），并分析其如何促进学习。具体探讨了Transformer如何通过内部化思维链（CoT）标记来模拟半自动机，哪些半自动机更难内化，以及内部化导致的分布外性能退化问题。作者首次提供了成功内部化的可证明分析：在奇偶性学习任务中，简化的一层Transformer先通过显式CoT监督学习目标，然后随着CoT标记逐步移除而内化自回归生成过程，最终学会直接计算奇偶性。该任务在没有CoT监督下难以从数据中学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解神经网络系统如何将显式计算过程内化为自身权重（内部化）的机制，以及这一过程如何促进学习。特别关注Transformer如何内化思维链（CoT）推理，并分析内部化的难易程度及其副作用（分布外性能退化）。

Method: 理论分析与可证明分析相结合。通过研究Transformer内化半自动机模拟的过程，分析不同类别半自动机的内化难度；并在奇偶性学习任务中，对简化的一层Transformer进行严格的理论证明，展示从CoT监督到内化直接计算的完整过程。

Result: 1) 揭示了Transformer内化CoT推理的机制；2) 发现不同类别的半自动机内化难度不同；3) 发现内部化会导致分布外性能逐渐退化；4) 首次提供了成功内部化的可证明分析，证明一层Transformer可以先通过CoT学习奇偶性，然后内化为直接计算。

Conclusion: 内部化是神经网络学习的重要机制，能使模型将显式推理步骤吸收为隐式权重知识。但内部化存在副作用（分布外性能下降），且某些计算任务的内化更困难。通过内部化学习与正分布偏移现象存在关联，为理解神经网络的推理与学习机制提供了新视角。

Abstract: We study internalization processes, by which neural-network-based systems absorb an explicit computational procedure into their own weights, and how they facilitate learning. We investigate how transformers internalize the simulation of semiautomata by internalizing chain-of-thought (CoT) tokens, which classes of semiautomata are harder to internalize, and expose the flip side of internalization, that is, a progressive degradation of out-of-distribution performance. We then provide the first provable analysis of successful internalization: for the task of learning parities, we show that a simplified one-layer transformer provably first learns the target with explicit CoT supervision and then internalizes the autoregressive generation as CoT tokens are progressively removed, learning to directly compute the parity. This task is computationally hard to learn from data without CoT supervision. Finally, we discuss how learning through internalization relates to the \textit{Positive Distribution Shift} phenomenon recently introduced by~\citet{Med+26}.

</details>


### [212] [Grouped Query Experts: Mixture-of-Experts on GQA Self-Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20945)
*Vishesh Tripathi,Abhay Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GQE在分组查询注意力基础上引入混合专家层，通过路由选择每个token激活一半的查询头，在250M参数规模、30B token预算下，达到与全激活GQA基线相当的下游准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准密集注意力对所有token使用相同数量的注意力头，计算量随序列长度二次增长，导致长序列场景下计算浪费。作者希望通过减少每个token激活的查询头数量来节省计算，同时保持模型性能。

Method: 提出Grouped Query Experts (GQE)，在GQA的每个组内引入路由机制，为每个token选择k个查询专家头（查询头），而所有键值头保持密集且不变。

Result: 在250M参数规模、30B token预算的固定设置下，GQE激活一半的查询头即可达到与全激活GQA基线相当的下游准确率。

Conclusion: GQE在保持GQA的KV缓存优势的同时，有效减少了查询头的计算量，验证了注意力头可以根据token难度进行稀疏激活的可行性。

Abstract: Self-attention is central to Transformer performance and is often the most expensive part of the Transformer at long context lengths because its pairwise token interactions scale quadratically with sequence length. Standard dense attention also applies the same set of attention heads to every token regardless of token difficulty or information content. This uniform activation can waste compute, especially as sequences grow longer and attention cost increases rapidly. We propose Grouped Query Experts (GQE), a mixture-of-experts layer on top of grouped-query attention (GQA). Within each GQA group, a router selects k query-head experts per token while all key-value (KV) heads remain dense and unchanged. Thus, GQE keeps the KV cache benefits of GQA and reduces only the active query-head computation. On a fixed 30B token budget at the 250M parameter scale, GQE matches the all-active GQA baseline in downstream accuracy while activating half the query heads per token.

</details>


### [213] [A Gated Graph Neural Network Approach to Fast-Convergent Dynamic Average Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20955)
*Antonio Marino,Claudio Pacchierotti,Paolo Robuffo Giordano*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于门控图神经网络(GGNN)的分布式动态平均估计算法，通过将估计过程建模为分布式自回归模型，并引入正则化项和编解码机制，实现了比传统方法更快的收敛速度和更高的估计精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统中的动态平均估计问题面临传统模型驱动方法收敛速度慢、对网络拓扑变化敏感等挑战，亟需一种快速收敛且鲁棒的分布式解决方案。

Method: 利用GGNN结构将估计过程建模为分布式自回归器；训练中引入正则化项保证收敛性；设计编解码机制降低通信开销。

Result: 大量数值实验表明，该方法在收敛速度和估计精度上均显著优于传统模型驱动估计器。

Conclusion: 该方法为多智能体系统中的动态平均估计提供了一种有前景的替代方案，兼具快速收敛、高精度和低通信开销的优势。

Abstract: Dynamic average estimation is a critical problem in multi-agent systems, enabling agents to collaboratively estimate time-varying signals using only local information exchange. Traditional model-based approaches often face challenges related to convergence speed and sensitivity to network topology changes. This paper introduces a novel learning-based solution leveraging Gated Graph Neural Networks (GGNNs) for fast-convergent dynamic average estimation in a fully distributed manner. Taking advantage of the inherent structure of GGNNs, the proposed method models the estimation process as a distributed autoregressor, ensuring rapid convergence while maintaining stability. We incorporate a regularization term during training to enforce convergence guarantees and introduce an encoding-decoding mechanism to reduce communication overhead without sacrificing accuracy compared to standard GGNNs. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms conventional model-based estimators in terms of both convergence speed and precision, making it a promising alternative for multi-agent applications that require dynamic average estimation.

</details>


### [214] [Right Knowledge, Wrong Answer: Test-Time Steering for Temporal Fact Conflicts in Open-Weight Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20959)
*Elias Hossain,Sourav Saha,Umesh Chandra Biswas,Sanjeda Sara Jennifer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出时序吸引子引导(TAS)方法，在推理时通过三层干预检测并覆盖大模型中过时的参数化知识，无需重训练或外部检索，在四个开源模型上实现29-57%的冲突解决率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型参数中同时存储了过时事实和更新事实，但标准提示仍可能引导模型输出过时答案，需要一种无需重训练或检索的推理时干预方法来解决此问题。

Method: 提出时序吸引子引导(TAS)三阶段方法：1)检测潜在参数时序冲突(PTC)；2)识别冲突关键层；3)将隐藏状态向新事实表示引导。在8,746条验证基准上评估，涉及五个Wikidata关系。

Result: 单层激活补丁实现0.72-0.85的答案翻转率；端到端TAS解决29-57%的PTC案例，同时在非冲突查询上保持85-99%准确率，在四个模型中的三个上优于ITI基线。

Conclusion: 过时的参数化知识可以在推理时被选择性覆盖，为模型知识时效性更新提供了无需重训练的有效途径。

Abstract: Large language models can store both outdated facts and newer superseding facts in their parameters, but standard prompting may still elicit the outdated answer. We formalize this problem as Parametric Temporal Conflict (PTC) and introduce Temporal Attractor Steering (TAS), a three-stage test-time intervention that detects likely conflicts, identifies a conflict-critical layer, and steers hidden states toward newer-fact representations without retraining or external retrieval. We construct an 8,746-record verified benchmark across five Wikidata relations and evaluate four open-weight language models from three families: Qwen-2.5-1.5B/7B, Mistral-7B-v0.3, and Llama-3.1-8B. Single-layer activation patching achieves answer-flip rates of 0.72-0.85 across all models. End-to-end TAS resolves 29-57% of PTC cases while preserving 85-99% accuracy on non-conflict queries, outperforming a matched ITI baseline on three of four models. These results show that outdated parametric knowledge can be selectively overridden at inference time.

</details>


### [215] [Is Our Benchmark Enough? An Analysis of Continual Learning for MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20961)
*Van-Tuan Tran,Shruthi Gowda,Merim Dzaferagic,Marco Ruffini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文挑战了MR-LoRA方法中“多模态大模型（MLLM）必须作为路由器”的假设，提出了无需训练、无需回放的简单原型路由方法RePRo，并指出共享专家对MLLM的持续学习并无帮助。作者认为当前MLLM-CL基准存在任务高度可分离和固定任务顺序两大结构缺陷，导致评测偏向孤立学习而非真正的持续迁移，并提出了新基准设计建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对MR-LoRA方法中“必须使用MLLM作为路由器处理复杂多模态输入”这一核心假设提出质疑，希望验证简单方法是否能达到同等效果，并揭示当前MLLM持续学习基准（MLLM-CL）的结构性问题。

Method: 提出RePRo方法：使用冻结的预训练特征和任务原型进行无训练、无回放的简单原型路由。同时，通过实验分析共享专家在MLLM持续学习中的实际效果，并剖析MLLM-CL基准的两个结构限制（任务高度可分离、固定任务顺序导致结论对单一课程敏感）。

Result: RePRo以远低于MR-LoRA的计算成本，匹配了后者基于MLLM的路由器性能；共享专家并未提升MLLM的持续学习效果；MLLM-CL基准的任务在表示空间中高度可分，且固定任务顺序导致结论缺乏鲁棒性，导致基准主要奖励孤立学习而非持续迁移。

Conclusion: 未来MLLM持续学习基准应设计重叠的任务流形、多种任务顺序、细粒度领域漂移，以及奖励前向迁移和记忆保持的评估协议。

Abstract: Continual adaptation is essential for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) deployed across evolving domains, but the state-of-the-art MR-LoRA method highly relies on the assumption that a MLLM-based router is necessary to process complex multimodal inputs. This paper revisits this claim on the MLLM-CL benchmark and argues for two claims. \textbf{First}, routing does not require an MLLM: a simple training-free, replay-free ptotypical routing method (\textsc{RePRo}), uses frozen pretrained features and task prototypes to match the MLLM-based router of MR-LoRA at far lower computational cost. \textbf{Second}, shared experts do not improve continual learning for MLLMs, despite their theoretical appeal. We show that these findings arise from two structural limitations of MLLM-CL: (1) its tasks are \textbf{highly separable} in representation space, and (2) its fixed task order makes conclusions \textbf{sensitive to a single curriculum} rather than robust across diverse continual-learning trajectories. As a result, the benchmark primarily rewards learning in isolation rather than genuine continual transfer. This motivates a new design for future benchmarks of continual MLLM learning, with overlapping task manifolds, multiple task orders, fine-grained domain shifts, and evaluation protocols that reward forward transfer as well as retention.

</details>


### [216] [Formalizing Task-Space Complexity for Zero-Shot Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20967)
*Jung-Hoon Cho,Heling Zhang,Siqi Du,Roy Dong,Cathy Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于性能的有向任务不相似度——符号散度，用于衡量策略在不同上下文间的零样本泛化能力。该度量可导出ε-容忍集和任务空间复杂度，并在有限oracle设置下将源选择简化为集合覆盖问题。实验表明，贪心选择策略能用更少的策略实现与均匀或随机基线相同的ε-覆盖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单一策略在不同条件下往往过于保守，而完全自适应方案又过于复杂。需要一种既能衡量策略泛化能力、又能指导源策略选择的理论工具。

Method: 1) 提出符号散度（signed divergence）作为有向任务相似度度量，用于界定泛化差距的上界。2) 定义ε-容忍集和任务空间复杂度（最小源上下文数量）。3) 在有限oracle设置下，将源选择问题转化为集合覆盖问题，采用贪心策略求解。

Result: 在Mass-Spring-Damper系统（LQR控制器）和CartPole系统（深度强化学习控制器）上的实验表明，贪心选择策略能以比均匀或随机基线更少的策略达到相同的ε-覆盖效果。

Conclusion: 本文提供了一种基于性能的任务相似度度量，以及构建具有泛化能力的简单策略集合的实用认证工具。

Abstract: Policies must operate across diverse conditions, yet a single policy is often conservative while fully adaptive schemes can be complex. We study zero-shot generalization in contextual dynamical systems and introduce a performance-centric, directional task dissimilarity--the signed divergence--that upper bounds the generalization gap from a source context to a target context. The signed divergence induces $\varepsilon$-tolerance sets that certify when a source policy class generalizes, and it yields a concrete notion of task-space complexity: the minimum number of source contexts needed so that every target context incurs at most $\varepsilon$ generalization gap. Under a mild local smoothness assumption on performance, the induced tolerance sets admit certified inner/outer balls and instance-dependent volume bounds on task-space complexity. In the finite-oracle setting, source selection reduces to set cover; a greedy strategy inherits the standard $H(n)$ approximation guarantee. Using a Mass-Spring-Damper system with linear-quadratic regulator (LQR) controllers and a nonlinear CartPole system with deep reinforcement learning controllers, we show that greedy selection achieves the same $\varepsilon$-coverage with fewer policies than uniform or random baselines. Our approach delivers a performance-based task similarity measure and practical certificates for building generalizable control with simple policies.

</details>


### [217] [Detecting Satellites in Radio-Frequency Data via Semi-Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20976)
*Cade W. Trotter,Maksim E. Eren,Justin C. Holmes,J. Brent Parham,David Ewing,Boian S. Alexandrov,Gian Luca Delzanno*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种半监督的射频检测与分类工作流程，结合非负矩阵分解（NMFk）、专家解释和分类器预测，用于卫星监控中的RF数据分析，减少对大规模标注数据的依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RF监测数据量大、稀疏、标签少，依赖专家知识且监督学习方法需要大量标注样本，因此需要一种能利用未标注数据、减少人工标注成本的半监督方法。

Method: 将RF观测数据构建为非负特征矩阵，使用NMFk自动估计最优聚类数；专家对聚类结果赋予物理含义（如卫星信号、电离层环境等）；最后训练分类器对测试集进行预测与分类。

Result: 该流程能够在有限标注条件下有效检测和分类RF信号，揭示了卫星探测、电离层背景及其他RF事件等潜在模式。

Conclusion: 半监督的NMFk+专家解释+分类器方法提供了一种可解释、可迁移的RF数据分析方案，降低了对大规模标注数据的依赖。

Abstract: Radio-frequency (RF) monitoring is essential for space domain awareness, but it often generates large, variable, and sparsely populated datasets with few labels. These observations can capture satellites, space debris, and the ionospheric background, yet interpreting them typically requires specialized subject-matter expertise. Supervised deep learning methods can perform well on labeled RF data, but they require many annotated examples and may need careful retraining as RF conditions change. Semi-supervised approaches offer a practical alternative for limited-data settings by using unlabeled observations to reveal latent patterns that experts can interpret. In this paper, we present a semi-supervised RF detection and classification workflow for satellite monitoring that combines Non-negative Matrix Factorization with automatic model determination (NMFk), expert-guided cluster interpretation, and classifier-based prediction. We first represent RF observations as a non-negative feature matrix and apply NMFk to estimate the number of clusters that best captures patterns in the unlabeled data. Subject-matter experts then assign physical meaning to the resulting clusters, including satellite detections, ionospheric environmental conditions, and other RF event categories. Finally, we train a classifier on these interpreted clusters to evaluate performance on a test set and categorize future observations. This pipeline reduces reliance on large pre-labeled datasets by pairing unsupervised factorization with expert interpretation, enabling an interpretable and transferable methodology for detecting, observing, and classifying behavior in RF data.

</details>


### [218] [Physics-Guided Fully Convolutional Spatiotemporal Learning Toward Digital-Twin-Enabled Microstructure Evolution Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20983)
*Michael Trimboli,Wenxi Liu,Xianqi Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种物理引导的全卷积时空学习框架，用于微观结构演化预测，通过将物理方程融入训练目标，在保持计算效率的同时提升了预测准确性、长期稳定性和物理一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纯数据驱动的时空学习模型在微观结构演化预测中物理一致性不足、长期预测精度下降，需要一种结合物理约束的方法来弥补这一缺陷。

Method: 提出物理引导的全卷积时空学习框架，显式地将控制物理方程（热力学和动力学定律）纳入训练目标，通过物理引导残差正则化约束模型学习。

Result: 在旋节线分解实验中，相比纯数据驱动基线，本方法在微观结构形态、统计特性和演化趋势的重现上更加忠实，预测精度、长期稳定性和鲁棒性均得到提升。

Conclusion: 该框架弥合了高保真物理仿真与数据驱动代理建模之间的差距，为数字孪生驱动的微观结构演化预测提供了一个可靠且高效的代理建模方案。

Abstract: Understanding and predicting microstructure evolution is central to materials design, yet purely data-driven spatiotemporal learning models often suffer from limited physical consistency and degraded long-term prediction accuracy. In this work, we introduce a physics-guided fully convolutional spatiotemporal learning framework for microstructure evolution prediction. Unlike prior self-supervised approaches, the proposed method explicitly incorporates governing physical equations into the training objective, thereby encouraging the learned dynamics to remain consistent with known thermodynamic and kinetic laws. This physics-guided formulation improves predictive accuracy, long-horizon stability, and robustness across spatial resolutions and temporal prediction settings. Extensive experiments for spinodal decomposition demonstrate that incorporating physics-guided residual regularization leads to more faithful reproduction of microstructural morphology, statistics, and evolution trends compared with purely data-driven baselines. The proposed framework preserves the scalability and computational efficiency of fully convolutional architectures while bridging the gap between high-fidelity physics-based simulations and data-driven surrogate modeling, offering a reliable and efficient surrogate-modeling step toward digital-twin-enabled microstructure evolution prediction.

</details>


### [219] [Continuous-Time Probabilistic Correctors for Uncertainty-Aware Physics-Based Spacecraft Trajectory Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21021)
*Muhammad Bilal Shahid,Zhanhong Jiang,Soumik Sarkar,Cody Fleming*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个预测-校正框架，使用基于潜变量神经受控微分方程（Latent NCDEs）的连续时间概率校正器，增强基于物理的确定性轨道传播器，实现长期航天器轨迹预测中同时提升预测精度和提供校准的不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长期航天器轨迹预测中，由于缺乏修正观测，误差会不断累积，而现有的高保真物理传播器虽能提供准确确定性预测，但缺乏经过校准的不确定性估计，这对于空间态势感知和交会评估等安全关键决策至关重要。

Method: 提出预测-校正框架：确定性物理传播器（如NASA的GMAT）作为预测器，Latent NCDEs构建的概率校正器对预测误差进行连续时间建模；设计促进校准性和锐利度的损失函数；支持不规则采样和缺失特征。

Result: 在NASA CDDIS真实数据上，覆盖2-4天无观测预报窗口和六个滚动测试窗口，所提方法在预测精度和不确定性校准性上持续优于确定性基线和基于Latent ODE的校正器。

Conclusion: 连续时间概率校正器能有效提升长期轨迹预测的准确性和不确定性校准能力，可灵活部署于现有确定性传播器之上。

Abstract: Long-horizon spacecraft trajectory forecasting suffers from error accumulation due to the absence of corrective observations in the forecast regime, making reliable uncertainty estimation crucial for safety-critical decision-making such as space domain awareness and conjunction assessment. While high-fidelity physics-based orbit propagators provide accurate deterministic forecasts, they typically lack calibrated uncertainty estimates over long horizons. We introduce a Predictor--Corrector framework in which a physics-based continuous-time $\textit{deterministic}$ forecaster is augmented with a learned continuous-time $\textit{probabilistic}$ Corrector that models forecast errors. The proposed Corrector can be wrapped around an existing deterministic propagator to improve forecast accuracy while producing sharp and calibrated full-covariance uncertainty estimates. The Corrector is based on Latent Neural Controlled Differential Equations (Latent NCDEs) and models the probabilistic temporal evolution of forecast errors in continuous time, naturally supporting irregular sampling and missing features. We further introduce a loss function that promotes calibration and sharpness in long-horizon uncertainty propagation. We evaluate the proposed framework on long-horizon spacecraft trajectory forecasting using real-world data from NASA's Crustal Dynamics Data Information System (CDDIS), wrapping the Corrector around NASA's General Mission Analysis Tool (GMAT). Across forecast horizons of 2--4 days without observations and six rolling test windows, the proposed approach consistently improves accuracy and uncertainty calibration compared to deterministic baselines and Latent ODE-based correctors, demonstrating the effectiveness of the continuous-time probabilistic Corrector for trajectory forecasting.

</details>


### [220] [Structure-Aware Graph Multi-Task Learning for Dynamic Sparse OD Demand Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21022)
*Ming Xu,Jiawei Cao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对动态稀疏、长尾的OD需求预测问题，提出SAGMTL框架，将OD预测分解为结构状态建模和流量强度估计，通过节点-边协同表示和多约束目标联合学习，在北京、成都、南京数据集上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实OD流具有动态稀疏、长尾分布和异构零流量模式的特点，现有方法将其视为单一回归任务，难以区分OD连接是否活跃以及激活后的流量大小，尤其无法建模低频、间歇性的OD交互。

Method: 提出SAGMTL框架，包含：(1) 节点-边协同表示模块，通过交互更新捕获区域语义、时间动态和空间先验；(2) 将OD预测分解为结构状态建模（连接活性）和流量强度估计（需求大小）；(3) 多约束目标函数增强稀疏感知和结构一致性。

Result: 在北京、成都、南京三个城市真实交通数据集上的实验表明，SAGMTL在所有指标上超越现有SOTA基线，进一步分析验证了显式建模区域活性、连接状态和流量强度对鲁棒性提升的有效性。

Conclusion: 将OD预测解耦为二元状态识别和连续流量回归的多任务学习范式，相较传统纯回归方法更适应动态稀疏、长尾的真实OD场景，为智能交通系统中OD预测提供了新思路。

Abstract: Origin-Destination (OD) demand prediction is fundamental to intelligent transportation systems, yet real-world OD flows are often dynamically sparse, long-tailed, and characterized by heterogeneous zero-flow patterns. These properties make it difficult to distinguish whether an OD connection is active from how much demand it generates once activated. Many existing methods primarily treat OD prediction as a single flow regression task, which limits their ability to model low-frequency, intermittent, and long-tailed OD interactions. To address these challenges, we propose SAGMTL, a Structure-Aware Graph Multi-Task Learning framework for dynamic sparse OD demand prediction. SAGMTL decomposes OD prediction into structural state modeling and flow intensity estimation, jointly learning regional activity states, OD connection activity, and edge-level flow intensity within a unified framework. Specifically, a node-edge collaborative representation module captures regional semantics, temporal dynamics, and spatial priors through interactive node-edge updates, producing structure-aware representations for dynamic OD interactions. Based on these representations, SAGMTL estimates OD flows by jointly modeling stable demand patterns and short-term fluctuations. A multi-constraint objective further improves sparsity awareness and structural consistency. Experiments on three real-world urban mobility datasets from Beijing, Chengdu, and Nanjing show that SAGMTL achieves superior overall performance compared with state-of-the-art baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that explicitly modeling regional activity, connection states, and flow intensity improves the robustness of dynamic sparse OD demand prediction.

</details>


### [221] [Demystifying Numerical Instability in LLM Inference: Achieving Reproducible Inference for Mission-Critical Tasks with HEAL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21023)
*Zhenting Zhu,Lucas Thai,Shan Yu,Yicheng Liu,Yifan Qiao,Chenxi Wang,Harry Xu,Junyi Shu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HEAL方法，通过INT16量化和代数误差补偿，在不使用全局FP32的情况下实现LLM跨GPU的输出可复现性，相比FP32基线性能开销降低7.1倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在金融、医疗、法律等关键领域部署时，输出可复现性成为严格需求。虽然实践中使用贪婪解码消除算法随机性，但在16位精度下异构GPU间仍存在灾难性输出差异，而全局FP32管线会带来巨大的系统开销。

Method: 提出HEAL（Hybrid Error ALleviation），包含两个机制：1）对Q、K、V张量采用INT16量化，在保持数值稳定性的同时不增加KV缓存开销；2）通过代数误差补偿策略，在高吞吐16位Tensor Core上合成高精度矩阵乘法。

Result: HEAL在下游任务上达到与FP32基线相同的可复现性水平，同时将性能开销降低最多7.1倍。

Conclusion: HEAL在不牺牲计算效率的前提下，有效解决了跨GPU的LLM输出可复现性问题，为关键领域部署提供了实用方案。

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) deploy into mission-critical domains (e.g., finance, medicine, and law), output reproducibility has become a strict system requirement. While practitioners use greedy decoding to eliminate algorithmic stochasticity, empirical deployments with 16-bit precisions still exhibit catastrophic output divergence across heterogeneous GPUs. Through SASS-level profiling, we reveal that this inconsistency is fundamentally driven by truncation errors introduced during downcasting at kernel boundaries. However, achieving reproducibility via a global FP32 pipeline incurs prohibitive system penalties: bypassing 16-bit hardware accelerators hurts compute efficiency, while upcasting the KV cache doubles memory overhead. To bridge this gap, we propose Hybrid Error ALleviation (HEAL), a targeted intervention that approximates FP32 precision while resolving hardware constraints through two targeted mechanisms. First, recognizing that floating-point formats underutilize their bit-width for Q, K, V tensors, HEAL applies INT16 quantization that preserves numerical stability without expanding the KV cache footprint. Second, HEAL synthesizes high-precision matrix multiplications via an algebraic error compensation strategy, executing entirely on high-throughput 16-bit Tensor Cores. To evaluate our approach practically, we introduce MCR-Bench, a benchmark targeting reproducibility in mission-critical tasks. HEAL achieves the same level of reproducibility on downstream tasks as the FP32 baseline while reducing the performance overhead by up to 7.1x.

</details>


### [222] [An Efficient and Effective Architecture for Large-Scale Traffic Prediction via Geometry-Adaptive Square Partitioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21072)
*Yongfeng Su,Hongwen Li,Zijian Zhang,Ziquan Fang,Lu Chen,Christian S. Jensen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SqLinear，一种用于大规模交通预测的高效架构。其创新包括：1) Square Partition，一种理论上可证明的几何自适应分区算法，将海量传感器划分为平衡、不重叠、近正方形的空间区域；2) 层级线性交互(HLI)模块，摒弃注意力机制，通过轻量线性交互高效捕捉局部和全局时空依赖，实现线性计算复杂度。在四个大规模数据集上，相比10个基线方法，SqLinear在标准设置下平均降低MAE 2.30%，在极端可扩展性设置下降低5.81%，同时训练时间减少13.27%-30.84%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于神经网络的交通预测方法在处理大规模传感器部署时面临严重的计算可扩展性问题。虽然社区尝试引入网格、四叉树、KD树等空间数据库分区技术来改善可扩展性，但这些方法依赖手工设计的几何启发式，往往产生不规则或不均衡的数据分区，导致边界碎片化、填充开销过大和模型精度下降。

Method: SqLinear包含两个核心组件：1) Square Partition算法——一种几何自适应的分区方法，具有理论保证，确保分区在宽高比、平衡性和利用率上的最优性；2) 层级线性交互(HLI)模块——抛弃Transformer中昂贵的注意力机制，通过轻量线性交互方案高效建模局部区域内动态和全局区域间依赖关系，实现线性计算复杂度。

Result: 在四个大规模交通数据集和10个基线方法上的实验表明：标准设置下平均MAE降低2.30%；极端可扩展性设置下MAE降低5.81%；在空间扩展和时域扩展场景中，训练运行时间减少13.27%-30.84%。

Conclusion: SqLinear通过理论驱动的分区算法和高效的线性交互机制，有效解决了大规模交通预测中的计算可扩展性与预测精度之间的权衡问题，为实际部署提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Traffic prediction is a core task in intelligent transportation systems and urban-scale decision making. Despite the effectiveness of mainstream neural-network based methods, their deployment in real-world settings with thousands of traffic sensors is jeopardized severely by their poor computational scalability. To address this, the community has attempted to incorporate spatial database partitioning techniques (e.g., Grid, Quadtree, and K-D Tree) to improve model scalability. However, these approaches rely on handcrafted geometric heuristics and often produce irregular or imbalanced data partitions, leading to boundary fragmentation, excessive padding overheads, and degraded model accuracy. In this paper, we propose SqLinear, an efficient and effective architecture for large-scale traffic prediction. First, we design Square Partition, a geometry-adaptive algorithm that partitions massive traffic sensors into balanced, non-overlapping, and near-square spatial regions. Unlike existing heuristic-based designs, Square Partition is theoretically grounded and provides provable guarantees on aspect ratio, balance, and partition utilization, establishing a high-quality foundation for downstream spatiotemporal modeling. Next, we propose a Hierarchical Linear Interaction (HLI) module that abandons the costly attention mechanisms commonly used in Transformer-based spatio-temporal models. HLI efficiently captures both local intra-region dynamics and global inter-region dependencies through a lightweight linear interaction scheme, enabling effective spatiotemporal modeling with linear computational complexity. Extensive experiments on four large-scale traffic datasets and 10 baselines show that SqLinear reduces MAE by 2.30% on average under standard setting and by 5.81% under extreme scalability settings, while reducing training runtime by 13.27%--30.84% in spatial- and horizon-scaling scenarios.

</details>


### [223] [Sim2O: Efficient Offline-to-Online MARL via Joint Action Composition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21085)
*Bingchang Song,Yiqin Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Sim2O提出了一种简洁的离线到在线多智能体强化学习框架，通过组合式联合动作合成和集中式价值评估，无需额外训练目标即可高效实现适应性协调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线到在线适应在单智能体设置中已被广泛研究，但其在多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的扩展仍未被充分探索，而这对复杂协调决策至关重要。

Method: 将适应过程视为组合式过程，动态混合各智能体的离线与在线动作提案来合成候选联合动作，并利用集中式价值函数评估这些混合组合，从而识别高价值协调策略。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，Sim2O显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 极简设计在多智能体离线到在线适应中不仅可行，而且非常有效。

Abstract: Offline-to-online adaptation serves as a pivotal paradigm for mitigating the prohibitive cost of online exploration by bootstrapping reinforcement learning from offline datasets. While this paradigm has been extensively studied in single-agent settings, its extension to Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) remains largely unexplored, despite its critical relevance to complex coordinated decision-making. To bridge this gap, we introduce Sim2O, an elegant and minimalist framework for offline-to-online MARL. Rather than treating adaptation as a monolithic joint decision, Sim2O conceptualizes it as a compositional process. Specifically, candidate joint actions are synthesized by dynamically blending offline and online action proposals across agents. By leveraging a centralized value function to evaluate these hybrid combinations, Sim2O identifies high-value coordination strategies without requiring auxiliary training objectives or structural overhead. Empirical evaluations across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that Sim2O significantly outperforms existing baselines, underscoring that a minimalist design is not only viable but highly effective for multi-agent offline-to-online adaptation.

</details>


### [224] [What Accuracy and Gradient Cosine Miss: Evaluating Feedback Alignment via Scale Stability, Reference Validity, and Depth Utility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21126)
*Yuren Hao,Xiang Wan,ChengXiang Zhai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现反馈对齐（FA）方法的现有评估标准（任务精度+余弦相似度）存在两个隐蔽失效模式：测量退化（残差架构中BP参考梯度数值坍缩）和聚合坍缩（聚合余弦掩盖层级异质性）。提出三检查诊断协议（尺度稳定性、参考有效性、深度效用）及逐层报告，能可靠识别所有失效情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练深度网络时，生物合理且硬件高效的方法仍是开放挑战。反馈对齐（FA）方法用固定随机矩阵替代BP的对称权重，但其评估标准（任务精度和余弦相似度）是否足够可靠？作者发现现有报告对存在两个未被识别的失效模式，导致研究者可能基于无效的信用分配方法进行后续研究。

Method: （1）识别两种失效模式：测量退化（LayerNorm残差架构中BP梯度数值塌缩至机器精度，使余弦失去意义）和聚合坍缩（聚合余弦掩盖层级间梯度信用不均衡）；（2）提出三检查诊断协议：尺度稳定性检查、参考有效性检查、深度效用检查，以及逐层余弦报告替代聚合报告。

Result: 标准报告对在审计的所有案例中均未给出任何失效信号，而本文提出的协议能以宽校准裕度识别所有失效。两种失效模式因果独立：逐块尺度惩罚可缓解模式1（残差尺度爆炸导致参考坍缩），但不影响模式2（余弦排序与所有功能性指标矛盾）。

Conclusion: 现有FA评估标准存在严重盲区，可能导致研究者基于无效的信用分配方法进行后续工作。本文的诊断协议能可靠识别失败，为开发真正能训练深层网络的FA方法提供可操作指导。

Abstract: Despite the success of deep learning, training deep networks in biologically plausible and hardware-efficient ways remains an open challenge. Feedback alignment (FA) methods address this by replacing backpropagation's symmetric backward weights with fixed random matrices, but their effectiveness depends critically on whether they can be accurately evaluated. The standard evaluation relies on two quantities: task accuracy and cosine similarity between the method's credit signal and the backpropagation gradient. We show that this reporting pair is insufficient by identifying two independent failure modes, both silent under current reporting: (1) measurement degeneracy, where the BP reference gradient collapses to the numerical floor in terminal-LayerNorm residual architectures, rendering cosine uninterpretable; and (2) aggregation collapse, where the aggregate cosine masks layerwise heterogeneity that concentrates credit at one end of the network. To address these limitations, we propose a diagnostic evaluation protocol based on three checks -- scale stability, reference validity, and depth utility -- together with per-layer rather than aggregate cosine reporting. Across multiple architectures and methods, the standard reporting pair gives no signal of failure in any audited case, while our protocol identifies all failures with wide calibration margins. The two failure modes are causally independent: a per-block scale penalty alleviates Mode 1 (residual scale explosion driving reference collapse) without affecting Mode 2 (cosine ranking that contradicts every functional metric we measured). Identifying these silent failures prevents researchers from building on non-functional credit assignment and provides actionable guidance for developing FA methods that genuinely train deep layers.

</details>


### [225] [BASIL: Bayesian Application for Scientific Iteration and Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21092)
*Kelvin P. Idanwekhai,Valeriia Kaneva,Stefano Menegatti,Alexander Tropsha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BASIL是一个桌面应用程序，采用贝叶斯方法和采集函数，支持单目标和多目标优化，通过图形界面帮助用户优化实验或工艺流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工艺优化方法缺乏用户友好的图形界面，且难以同时处理单目标和多目标优化问题。

Method: 采用贝叶斯方法，结合特殊采集函数，提供图形界面输入实验参数、优化目标和历史数据，构建代理模型，并使用预定义模型模板来指导优化过程。

Result: 开发了BASIL桌面应用，能够优化任意具有已知输入变量、优化目标和定义输出的实验或过程。

Conclusion: BASIL提供了一个用户友好的图形化工具，可用于广泛的工艺流程优化任务。

Abstract: We introduce BASIL, a user-friendly desktop application for process optimization. BASIL employs a Bayesian approach, incorporating special acquisition functions that can be used to solve both single and multi-objective optimization problems. It provides a graphical interface that enables users to input their experimental parameters, optimization objectives, and legacy data.
