This is then used to build surrogate models, which are coupled with acquisition functions to guide and optimize a process towards a desired objective. To facilitate model building, BASIL provides a variety of predefined surrogate model templates. BASIL can be used to optimize any arbitrary experiment or process with known, user-defined input variables, optimization objectives, and defined output.

</details>


### [226] [Dead-Direction Signatures: A Cheap Spectral Reading of Singular Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21158)
*Tejas Pradeep Shirodkar,P. J. Narayanan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Dead-Direction Signatures (DDS)，一种基于谱线性代数的闭式方法，用于替代计算昂贵的SGLD来估计深度网络奇点几何中的局部学习系数(LLC)，能够通过激活矩阵和Fisher-Gram的谱直接读出网络的死方向(dead directions)和秩亏缺(rank deficit)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的LLC估计需要SGLD采样，每次校准需要10^4-10^6次前向-反向传播，计算成本极高且需要针对每个任务校准。作者希望设计一种廉价、闭式的替代方案来读取网络的奇异结构。

Method: 提出死方向框架(dead-direction framework)，通过激活矩阵和逐样本梯度Fisher-Gram的谱分析来构建DDS。核心包括：(1) 激活侧和Fisher侧谱之间的结构相关性预测；(2) 秩乘体积恒等式(rank-multiplicative volume identity)，其中active-volume log det⁺(G)的斜率直接计数死方向个数。

Result: 在简化秩回归上，DDS可观测量的秩追踪与理论预测一致（斜率比2.0, 3.1, 4.0对应r=2,3,4，接近理论值2,3,4）；在非线性模加法Transformer上，DDS能在18个数量级范围内区分d_model，而相同预算下的LLC无法区分。

Conclusion: DDS作为LLC的互补方法，提供了方向性、层级局部的死方向读取能力，通过闭式谱分析大幅降低了计算成本，并在某些场景下比LLC具有更好的区分度。

Abstract: Singular learning theory characterises the complexity of a deep network through the geometry of its loss singularities. The local learning coefficient (LLC), the standard estimator of Watanabe's real log canonical threshold (RLCT, $λ$), reads this geometry as an integrated Bayesian scalar through SGLD, which needs per-task calibration and $10^4$-$10^6$ forward-backward passes per checkpoint. We introduce Dead-Direction Signatures (DDS), a family of cheap closed-form spectral readings of singular structure: each reads a network's activation matrix or per-sample-gradient Fisher-Gram at a chosen layer, replacing the SGLD posterior chain with spectral linear algebra. The readings rest on a dead-direction framework that predicts a structural correlation between activation- and Fisher-side spectra at any singular minimum, and a rank-multiplicative volume identity that single-eigenvalue monitors cannot produce: the active-volume $\log\det^{+}(G)$ slope counts the dead directions, tracking the rank-deficit $r$ across $r \in \{1,2,3,4\}$ (slope ratios $2.0, 3.1, 4.0$ at $r{=}2,3,4$ against the predicted $2,3,4$), where the smallest eigenvalue is rank-blind. On reduced-rank regression with closed-form $λ$, calibrated LLC recovers $λ$ at $99\%$ mean and the DDS observables rank-track it at the framework-predicted sign; on a non-linear modular-addition transformer DDS separates $d_{\mathrm{model}}$ across eighteen orders of magnitude where calibrated LLC at the protocol budget is rank-flat. Complementary to LLC's integrated posterior reading, DDS gives a directional, layer-local handle on a network's dead directions, read in closed form from its activation and gradient spectra.

</details>


### [227] [SLeDGe: Semi-Supervised Learning on Data Streams with Graph Structure Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21096)
*Heechan Moon,Kijung Shin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SLeDGe是一种针对数据流的半监督学习方法，能够自适应学习图结构并联合训练预测模型，在极低标签率下显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据流半监督学习方法依赖固定相似度度量或静态图结构，无法捕捉样本间关系的动态演化，限制了利用样本间内在关联的能力。

Method: SLeDGe联合学习预测模型和自适应图结构，采用不同的更新策略维护紧凑的标注/未标注记忆，平衡快速适应新特征与保持历史一致性，并通过稀疏化图结构过滤虚假连接以有效传播标签监督。

Result: 在12个数据集上，SLeDGe在0.1%标签率下平均相对准确率提升31.7%，在1%标签率下提升14.8%，均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 联合学习自适应图结构与预测模型，结合稀疏化关系和差异化记忆更新策略，可有效应对数据流半监督学习中的概念漂移与标签稀缺问题。

Abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) on data streams is challenging due to the continuous evolution of high-volume data and the scarcity of labels. Existing methods are limited in leveraging the intrinsic relationships among samples because they typically rely on fixed similarity measures or static graph structures, which cannot capture how relationships evolve over time. We propose SLeDGe, an SSL method for data streams that jointly learns a predictive model and an adaptive graph structure under strict memory and label constraints. SLeDGe maintains compact labeled and unlabeled memories using distinct update strategies, balancing rapid adaptation to novel features with the retention of historical consistency. In addition, by encouraging sparsity in the relational graph, SLeDGe filters out spurious connections and enables effective propagation of label supervision. Across 12 datasets, SLeDGe outperforms state-of-the-art competitors, achieving average relative accuracy gains of 31.7% with 0.1% labels and 14.8% with 1% labels.

</details>


### [228] [A new classification method based on Minimum Spanning Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21639)
*Julio González-Díaz,Beatriz Pateiro-López,Iria Rodríguez-Acevedo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于最小生成树的监督学习分类算法，并引入了一种鲁棒性强且计算效率更高的改进版本。通过仿真和飞机轨迹真实案例验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最小生成树在无监督学习（尤其是聚类）中已有应用，但尚未被充分探索用于监督学习。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究MST在分类任务中的潜力。

Method: 提出基于最小生成树的分类算法，并引入鲁棒性更强、计算效率更高的改进版本。

Result: 通过广泛的仿真研究和飞机轨迹的真实案例验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 最小生成树在监督学习中具有可行性和有效性，所提算法在分类任务中表现出色。

Abstract: Minimum Spanning Trees have been used in unsupervised learning, particularly in clustering tasks, due to their ability to recognize clusters by removing edges that are considered inconsistent in defining those clusters. This paper aims to study the use of Minimum Spanning Trees in supervised learning. Specifically, we propose a classification algorithm based on Minimum Spanning Trees. To improve its performance, we introduce a robust version of the method that is also computationally more efficient. We evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed method through an extensive simulation study. We also apply the proposed methodology to a real-world case study involving aircraft trajectories.

</details>


### [229] [Enhancing Differentially Private Mechanisms via Empirical Bayes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21107)
*Minwoo Kim,Junyong Park,Sungkyu Jung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于经验贝叶斯估计的去噪方法，仅通过处理简单高斯机制的输出来提升差分隐私算法的效用，在直方图发布、主成分分析和线性回归等任务中表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有差分隐私算法虽能保护隐私，但往往过于复杂或计算效率低下，亟需一种简单高效的方法来提升算法效用。

Method: 对简单加性高斯机制的输出应用经验贝叶斯估计进行去噪，无需修改原隐私机制本身。

Result: 该方法仅以高斯机制的输出为输入就能降低均方误差，在直方图发布、主成分分析和线性回归中优于现有私有算法。

Conclusion: 经验贝叶斯去噪是一种简单而强大的后处理技术，可广泛适用于多种差分隐私统计问题。

Abstract: Differential privacy (DP) has become the gold standard for ensuring the privacy protection of machine learning and statistical algorithms in recent decades. A plethora of algorithms and methods have been developed to enhance the utility of DP algorithms while maintaining the same level of DP. However, these are often overly complex or computationally ineffective. We propose a novel approach focusing on denoising the output of the simple additive Gaussian mechanism by adopting the idea of \textit{empirical Bayes estimation}. We highlight that the empirical Bayes approach can reduce the mean-squared error solely by taking the output of the Gaussian mechanism as input. Our numerical studies show that this simple yet powerful approach can be applied to improve upon various statistical problems, including histogram release, principal component analysis, and linear regression, often outperforming existing private algorithms.

</details>


### [230] [AdaPrivate-TS: Private Thompson Sampling for Contextual Bandits with Privacy Amplification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21757)
*Mohammadreza Riyazat,Eranga Ukwatta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AdaPrivate-TS 是一种结合 Thompson Sampling 与批量化 zCDP 组合的差分隐私上下文强盗算法，通过将隐私噪声视为结构化不确定性来实现高绩效（在 ε∈[0.5,5] 时达到非隐私性能的 93-99%），并在事件级隐私下提供严格的隐私保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有差分隐私上下文强盗算法（如 UCB）将隐私噪声视为纯粹的干扰，导致性能显著下降。作者希望利用 Thompson Sampling 的贝叶斯特性，将噪声重新解释为不确定性的自然来源，从而在保护隐私的同时保持算法性能。

Method: 提出 AdaPrivate-TS 算法，核心创新包括：(1) 使用批量化 zCDP 组合进行差分隐私 Thompson Sampling；(2) 理论证明添加高斯噪声 N(0,σ²I) 到 b 后，后验协方差变为 v²A⁻¹ + σ²A⁻²，TS 将此视为增加的不确定性而非噪声；(3) 利用并行组合实现摊销噪声，隐私成本仅为 O(√d log T/√ρ)；(4) 探索 Poisson 子采样实现隐私放大。

Result: (1) 在 ε∈[0.5,5] 时达到非隐私性能的 93-99%，比 UCB 高 0.5-3.7%，极端 ε 下最高提升 18%；(2) 隐私放大在低 ε 时额外提升 2-5%；(3) 在 MovieLens 和 Jester 数据集上，事件级基线中整体最优，ε≥2 时占主导地位；(4) 在 DP-SVD 私有特征下，TS 相比 UCB 优势扩大至 +11%。

Conclusion: AdaPrivate-TS 有效证明了"噪声即不确定性"的设计理念，通过将隐私噪声融入 Thompson Sampling 的贝叶斯框架，在强隐私保护下实现了接近非隐私的性能。该方法在理论和实验上均优于现有基线，尤其在高维或严格隐私预算场景下优势显著。

Abstract: We present AdaPrivate-TS, a differentially private contextual bandit algorithm that combines Thompson Sampling with batched zCDP composition. Our key insight is that differential privacy noise inflates the posterior covariance in a structured way: adding Gaussian noise $N(0,σ^2 I)$ to $b$ yields sampling covariance $v^2 A^{-1} + σ^2 A^{-2}$, which Thompson Sampling interprets as increased uncertainty rather than pure corruption. Under event-level privacy (protecting individual interactions) with stochastic contexts, we prove that the privacy cost is only $O(\sqrt{d}\,\log T/\sqrtρ)$, logarithmic in $T$, because parallel composition amortizes noise across batches. Additionally, we explore privacy amplification via Poisson subsampling, which can reduce effective noise at stringent privacy budgets. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate: (1) AdaPrivate-TS achieves 93-99% of non-private performance at $\varepsilon \in [0.5, 5]$, outperforming UCB by 0.5-3.7% and up to 18% with tuned adaptive exploration at extreme $\varepsilon$; (2) privacy amplification provides additional 2-5% gains at low $\varepsilon$; (3) on MovieLens and Jester, AdaPrivate-TS achieves the best overall performance among event-level baselines, dominating at $\varepsilon \geq 2$; (4) under DP-SVD private features, TS's advantage over UCB grows to +11%, confirming noise-as-uncertainty is not limited to reward privacy. We provide rigorous proofs for privacy guarantees under interactive zCDP composition and comprehensive evaluation including convergence curves, 12-seed CIs, and DP-SVD feature ablation.

</details>


### [231] [Chem2Gen-Bench: Benchmarking Chemical-to-Genetic Translation in Perturbation Response Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21109)
*Yuxiang Lin,Ying Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了Chem2Gen-Bench基准，用于系统评估化学扰动与遗传扰动在共享靶点上的对齐程度，发现翻译保真度可测量但异质性高，且现有基础模型嵌入在K562验证中未持续优于基因-delta基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常单独评估化学响应预测或遗传扰动预测，缺乏对靶点匹配的化学-遗传翻译（chemical-to-genetic translation）的系统性测试。

Method: 构建包含260,084个化学扰动和1,099,045个遗传扰动谱的Chem2Gen-Bench基准，按细胞-靶点上下文组织，从成对比对对齐、检索、协变量关联、特征空间和基础模型嵌入五个维度进行评估。

Result: 翻译保真度可测量但异质性高；背景校正提高了成对相似性与检索成功率的关联，但配对检验显示校正后平均检索成功率有所下降；在靶点匹配的K562审计中，基础模型嵌入未持续优于基因-delta基线。

Conclusion: Chem2Gen-Bench提供了一个可审计的框架，用于测试化学扰动与遗传扰动何时围绕共享靶点对齐，以及表征增益是否得到匹配扰动证据的支持。

Abstract: Virtual-cell and perturbation models are increasingly used to predict cellular responses for biomedical discovery, but chemical and genetic perturbations are not automatically interchangeable. Existing evaluations often study chemical response prediction or genetic perturbation prediction separately, leaving target-matched chemical-to-genetic translation under-tested. We introduce Chem2Gen-Bench, a benchmark comprising 260,084 chemical and 1,099,045 genetic perturbation profiles organized into cell-target contexts, and evaluate pairwise alignment, retrieval, protocol covariate associations, feature spaces, and foundation-model embeddings. Across matched contexts, translation fidelity is measurable but heterogeneous; background adjustment increases the association between pairwise similarity and retrieval success, while paired tests show lower mean retrieval success after adjustment under the evaluated settings. In a target-matched K562 audit, the evaluated foundation-model embeddings did not consistently improve over gene-delta baselines. Chem2Gen-Bench provides an auditable framework for testing when chemical and genetic perturbations align around shared targets and when representation gains are supported by matched perturbation evidence.

</details>


### [232] [Ranking-and-Selection with Multiple Correct Answers and Non-Answerable Estimates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21889)
*Qiaoqiao Wang,Wei You*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对结构化排名与选择问题中答案可能非唯一且噪声估计可能暂时导致无有效答案的情形，提出了基于答案接受集、受限广义似然比停止准则以及答案-陷阱分解的统一框架，并设计了ENDS算法（估计、提名、陷阱检测与成本感知信息导向选择）。通过推导显式公式并在多种纯探索问题上进行数值实验，验证了该框架的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有固定精度排名与选择方法通常假设答案唯一且始终存在有效答案，但现实中（如多保真度排名与选择、成对比较识别Condorcet胜者）常出现答案非唯一或噪声估计导致暂时无解的情况，缺乏统一的理论与方法来处理这些结构化问题。

Method: 提出统一框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 答案接受集（answer-wise acceptance sets）用于建模非唯一答案；(2) 受限广义似然比停止准则（restricted generalized likelihood ratio stopping）；(3) 答案-陷阱分解（answer-pitfall decomposition）导出max-max-min特征值与通用采样原则。在此基础上设计了ENDS算法，整合估计、提名、陷阱检测与成本感知信息导向选择四个模块，并针对不同问题推导了显式公式。

Result: 在多种纯探索问题上进行了广泛数值实验，结果表明该统一配方（ENDS算法）在所有测试问题上均表现良好，能够有效处理答案非唯一和暂时无有效答案的结构化情形。

Conclusion: 该工作为结构化排名与选择中答案非唯一和暂时无解的问题提供了统一的框架和实用的算法配方，具有较强的通用性和良好的实证性能，可作为该领域的实践框架与概念验证。

Abstract: We study fixed-precision ranking-and-selection in structured settings where the answer may be non-unique and where noisy estimates may temporarily admit no valid answer at all. This phenomenon arises naturally in problems such as multi-fidelity ranking-and-selection and identifying a Condorcet winner from pairwise comparisons. To address this, we propose a unified framework based on answer-wise acceptance sets, restricted generalized likelihood ratio stopping, and an answer-pitfall decomposition that yields a max-max-min characteristic value and a common sampling principle. We introduce ENDS, a general procedure that combines estimation, nomination, pitfall detection, and cost-aware information-directed selection. We instantiate ENDS for various problems by deriving explicit formulas. Extensive numerical experiments show that this unified recipe performs well across a broad range of pure-exploration problems and offers a practical framework and proof-of-concept algorithmic recipe.

</details>


### [233] [Sequential Minimal Optimization Algorithm for One-Class Support Vector Machines With Privileged Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22210)
*Andrey Lange,Dmitry Smolyakov,Evgeny Burnaev*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对带有特权信息的一类支持向量机（OC-SVM+）的序列最小优化（SMO）算法，相比非序列算法表现更优，并建立了有限时间收敛性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 填补LUPI范式中一类SVM与特权信息结合（OC-SVM+）的空白，此前仅有监督SVM、无监督一类SVM和SVM+的SMO方法。

Method: 提出OC-SVM+的SMO优化算法，并证明其有限时间收敛性。

Result: 所提SMO算法显著优于非序列训练算法及内点法，在基准测试中表现优越。

Conclusion: 特权信息能有效影响原始特征空间的描述域，SMO算法是OC-SVM+更高效的训练方式。

Abstract: One of the powerful techniques in data modeling is accounting for features that are available at the training stage, but are not available when the trained model is used to classify or predict test data -- the Learning Using Privileged Information paradigm (LUPI). Sequential Minimal Optimization (SMO) methods have been developed for supervised Support Vector Machines (SVM), unsupervised one-class SVM, and SVM with privileged information (SVM+). The missing brick in this research has long been a one-class SVM with privileged information (OC-SVM+). In this paper, we propose an SMO algorithm for OC-SVM+ that significantly outperforms non-sequential algorithms for training the OC-SVM+ model. Its finite-time convergence is established. The experiments show how privileged information affects a descriptive domain in the space of original features. Comparative benchmark tests demonstrate that our algorithm is superior over interior point algorithms.

</details>


### [234] [Horizon Adaptive Offline Policy Learning via Value Stitching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21136)
*Kexin Zheng,Xianyuan Zhan,Xintao Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VAST提出了一种自适应地平线组合的价值更新方法，通过递归的价值拼接和未来状态-地平线长度条件辅助价值函数，实现对长时域任务更准确的价值估计，在OGBench的50个任务上超越固定步长和扩展地平线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统TD学习方法存在随地平线累积的价值估计偏差，而n-step TD和Q-chunking等扩展地平线方法采用固定的地平线建模，无法灵活捕捉长时域、多阶段任务中复杂的价值结构。

Method: VAST用递归的、自适应地平线的价值组合替代固定地平线备份。核心包括：(1) 未来状态和地平线长度条件辅助价值函数，通过直接数据监督学习；(2) 拼接策略，最优选择奖励最大化的地平线长度和未来子目标，实现自适应地平线的价值拼接。

Result: 在OGBench的50个任务上，VAST超越了固定步长方法、扩展地平线方法和生成式价值离线RL基线，在高度复杂的长期决策任务中表现尤为突出。

Conclusion: 动态地平线组合的价值更新能够提供准确且可贪婪利用的价值监督信号，为离线策略优化带来显著提升，尤其适用于长时域、多阶段复杂任务。

Abstract: Learning accurate value functions plays a decisive role for reinforcement learning (RL) agents to solve long-horizon, complex tasks. Conventional temporal-difference (TD) learning objectives suffer from value-estimation bias that accumulates over the horizon, while extended-horizon modeling methods, such as n-step TD backups and Q-chunking, adopt a rigid, fixed-horizon value-modeling recipe that is often not flexible enough to capture complex value structures in long-horizon, multi-stage tasks. In this paper, we show that enabling value updates with dynamic horizon composition can yield a strong offline policy learning scheme. Our method, Horizon Adaptive Offline Policy Learning via VAlue STitching (VAST), replaces fixed-horizon backups with recursive, horizon-adaptive value composition. Its key ingredient is to couple value optimization with a future state- and horizon-length-conditioned auxiliary value function that is learned through direct data supervision, and a stitching policy that optimally selects the reward-maximizing horizon length and future sub-goal to achieve horizon-adaptive value stitching. This design enables direct estimation and compositional "stitching" of variable-length returns grounded in actionable sub-goal states, providing an accurate and greedily exploitable value-supervision signal for offline policy optimization. Across 50 tasks on OGBench, VAST outperforms fixed-step, extended-horizon methods, and generative-value offline RL baselines, achieving strong performance particularly in high-complexity, long-horizon decision-making tasks.

</details>


### [235] [Inverting the Bellman Equation: From $Q$-Values to World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21173)
*Alistair Letcher,Mattie Fellows,Alexander D. Goldie,Jonathan Richens,Jakob N. Foerster,Oliver Richardson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明基于价值的强化学习智能体在足够丰富的奖励函数（如目标条件RL）训练下，会隐式编码一个准确的动态模型。作者提出P-learning方法从Q值、策略和奖励中提取该模型，并在理论上给出了编码真实转移核的充分条件。实验表明，即使假设被违反，智能体仍能编码准确动力学，且从隐式模型训练的策略在分布外目标上表现准最优，揭示了隐藏的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战基于模型和无模型强化学习传统二分法，证明无模型价值-based智能体在丰富奖励函数训练下隐式编码了世界模型，为连接无模型、基于模型和目标条件RL提供新视角。

Method: 提出P-learning方法，作为Q-learning的逆类比，从智能体的Q值、策略和奖励中采样以解码其内部环境模型。给出在随机和确定性MDP（有限或连续状态空间）上编码真实转移核P的充分条件。

Result: 在Reacher、MountainCar和随机FourRooms上，即使假设被违反，智能体仍编码准确动力学。从Reacher智能体隐式模型训练的策略在基于速度的分布外目标上表现准最优，尽管仅在位置目标上训练。

Conclusion: 价值-based智能体在丰富奖励函数训练下隐式包含世界模型，揭示了智能体隐藏的泛化能力，为模型基与无模型RL的连接提供了新视角。

Abstract: Model-based and model-free reinforcement learning are traditionally viewed as separate paradigms: instead of learning a model of the transition kernel $P$, model-free agents typically estimate value functions tied to a specific policy and reward. In this paper, we challenge this dichotomy by proving that value-based agents trained on a sufficiently rich set of reward functions, e.g. using goal-conditioned RL, implicitly encode a unique and accurate world model. To extract this model in practice, we introduce \textit{$P$-learning}, an inverse analogue to $Q$-learning that samples from an agent's $Q$-values, policies and rewards to decode its internal model of the environment. We then provide sufficient conditions on the type and number of goals for which agents encode the true kernel $P$, covering both stochastic and deterministic MDPs over finite or continuous state spaces. Even when our assumptions are violated, we empirically demonstrate that agents trained on a handful of reward functions encode accurate dynamics in $\texttt{Reacher}$, $\texttt{MountainCar}$ and stochastic variants of $\texttt{FourRooms}$. Surprisingly, we find that policies trained exclusively on a \texttt{Reacher} agent's implicit world model are quasi-optimal on out-of-distribution, velocity-based goals despite position-only training -- suggesting that agents contain hidden generalisation capabilities and providing a new lens into the connection between model-based, model-free, and goal-conditioned RL.

</details>


### [236] [Asymptotic Signal Subspace Recovery in Softmax Attention Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22406)
*Lan V. Truong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从理论上证明了在高维噪声环境下，通过随机梯度上升学习的softmax注意力机制能够几乎必然地收敛到潜在信号子空间，从而将注意力机制视为一种信号提取过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管注意力机制在经验上取得了显著成功，但其背后的理论基础仍然薄弱，缺乏对注意力如何从大量标记中识别相关信息的理论解释。

Method: 研究了一个简化的softmax注意力模型，其中查询向量通过随机梯度上升从信息标记和噪声标记中学习。利用模型对称性推导群体目标函数，刻画学习动力学的常微分方程极限，并运用随机逼近和动力系统理论建立随机学习算法与确定性极限之间的严格联系。

Result: 在适当的高维缩放假设和标准步长条件下，学习的查询向量几乎必然收敛到由潜在信息方向张成的一维信号子空间，即查询渐近地恢复潜在信号（仅存在符号模糊性）。

Conclusion: 为理解注意力机制作为高维噪声环境中的信号提取过程提供了严格的理论基础，并从动力系统视角揭示了注意力如何在大量噪声中发现相关信息。

Abstract: Attention mechanisms have demonstrated remarkable empirical success in identifying relevant information from large collections of tokens, yet the theoretical principles underlying this behavior remain poorly understood. We study a stylized softmax-attention model in which a query vector is learned by stochastic gradient ascent from a collection of informative and nuisance tokens. Exploiting the symmetry of the model, we derive a population objective and characterize the limiting ordinary differential equation governing the learning dynamics. Using tools from stochastic approximation and dynamical systems theory, we establish a rigorous connection between the stochastic learning algorithm and its deterministic limit. Our main result shows that, under suitable high-dimensional scaling assumptions and standard step-size conditions, the learned query converges almost surely to the one-dimensional signal subspace spanned by the latent informative direction. Equivalently, the query asymptotically recovers the latent signal up to the intrinsic sign ambiguity. These results provide a rigorous theoretical foundation for understanding attention mechanisms as signal extraction procedures in high-dimensional noisy environments and offer a dynamical-systems perspective on how attention discovers relevant information in the presence of substantial noise.

</details>


### [237] [Rejections Based on Predictive Uncertainty Enable Reliable Routine Soil Spectroscopy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21179)
*Jonas Schmidinger,Robin Gebbers,Marc-Olivier Gasser,Viacheslav Barkov,G. Mick Wu,Viacheslav I. Adamchuk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究提出"拒绝-重新测量"框架，将光谱学与机器学习结合，在不满足精度要求时转用传统实验室方法，在保证预测准确性的同时降低测量成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统土壤属性测量方法准确但昂贵耗时，而光谱学结合机器学习虽快速低成本但预测可靠性不足，两者之间存在成本与可靠性之间的权衡。

Method: 提出"拒绝-重新测量"框架：先用光谱学分析土壤样本，若预测不确定性超过预设质量约束则拒绝该预测，被拒绝的样本再使用传统实验室方法重新测量。框架结合概率建模与不确定性引导的拒绝机制，并使用TabPFNv2.5和TabICLv2等现代基础模型。

Result: 在魁北克区域可见-近红外光谱土壤库上验证，该框架能在满足用户定义的精度要求的同时降低测量成本。

Conclusion: "拒绝-重新测量"框架可有效将光学光谱学整合到常规实验室工作流程中，在成本与可靠性之间取得平衡。

Abstract: Soil properties relevant to agricultural and environmental applications are conventionally measured using elaborate laboratory methods involving physical and chemical processing. While highly accurate, these conventional methods are costly and time-consuming. In contrast, optical spectroscopy paired with machine learning enables rapid and cost-effective predictions of multiple soil properties. However, spectroscopic modelling is often considered unreliable, as the predictive accuracy varies between soil properties and individual samples. To balance this trade-off between cost and reliability, we introduce reject-to-remeasure: an AI-based measurement framework that combines probabilistic modelling with uncertainty-guided rejection. In this framework, soil samples are first analysed using spectroscopy, after which predictions are rejected if their predictive uncertainty exceeds predefined quality constraints. Rejected samples are subsequently remeasured using conventional laboratory procedures. On a regional visible-near-infrared spectral soil library from Québec, we demonstrate that reject-to-remeasure with modern foundation models (TabPFNv2.5 and TabICLv2) can facilitate the integration of optical spectroscopy into routine laboratory workflows while meeting user-defined accuracy requirements and reducing measurement costs.

</details>


### [238] [TF-SNO: Time-Frequency Gated Spectral Neural Operators for Learning Non-Stationary Partial Differential Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21189)
*Yitian Zhou,Chaoning Zhang,Zhenzhen Huang,Haoxuan Yu,Jiaquan Zhang,Yiran Li,Fan Mo,Kuien Liu,Jie Zou,Caiyan Qin,Yang Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TF-SNO框架，通过时频门控机制让谱神经算子根据当前状态自适应调整频谱响应，有效处理非平稳PDE问题，在六个基准上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统谱神经算子使用固定的共享频谱响应，无法适配非平稳PDE中随时间变化的频谱和能量分布，导致长程 rollout 时预测失真。

Method: 在谱块内部引入可学习时频门控机制，从当前状态提取频率域和物理域的统计特征生成调制系数，使频谱响应随动力学演化自适应调整，无需显式时间嵌入。

Result: 在6个一维和二维非平稳PDE基准上，TF-SNO相比强基线显著降低预测误差并提升鲁棒性，尤其在长程 rollout 中优势明显。

Conclusion: 状态依赖的频谱自适应机制能有效建模非平稳物理系统，证明了将时频自适应引入谱神经算子的有效性和必要性。

Abstract: Non-stationary partial differential equations (PDEs) arise throughout scientific computing, where the dominant frequency content and energy distribution can drift over time. While efficient in PDE solving, many spectral neural operators apply a shared spectral response across rollout stages, leading to mismatch with time-varying spectra in non-stationary systems. To address this issue, we propose Time-Frequency Gated Spectral Neural Operator (TF-SNO), a state-adaptive framework with learnable time-frequency gating inside spectral blocks. TF-SNO extracts compact frequency-domain and physical-space statistics from the current state to generate modulation coefficients, enabling the spectral response to evolve with the dynamics. TF-SNO learns temporal variation implicitly from the evolving state without introducing an explicit time dimension or time embedding, keeping the modeling complexity low. We further embed the adaptive operator blocks to accurately capture the multi-scale features, thereby improving long-horizon stability. Experiments on six non-stationary PDE benchmarks in 1D and 2D demonstrate that TF-SNO significantly reduces prediction errors and improves robustness compared to strong baselines, with particularly clear gains in long rollout, suggesting the effectiveness of state-dependent spectral adaptation in modeling non-stationary physical systems.

</details>


### [239] [A Markov Chain Approach to Preference Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22652)
*Takuya Koriyama,Tengyuan Liang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MCHF，一种利用成对偏好直接定义马尔可夫核来对齐生成模型的方法。该方法几何收敛到平稳分布，收敛率由成对效用的非传递结构决定。通过与NLHF的对比分析和扰动分析，揭示了基于奖励、博弈论和马尔可夫方法的统一视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的RLHF将成对偏好简化为标量奖励，丢失了偏好中的非传递结构信息；NLHF虽保留了成对效用但优化复杂。作者希望提出一种更直接、更简洁的方法来利用成对偏好进行对齐，同时保留偏好中的非传递结构信息。

Method: 给定成对效用函数U(x,y)（衡量y相对于x的人类偏好）和参考分布μ_ref，定义马尔可夫核P(x, dy) ∝ exp(U(x,y)) μ_ref(dy)，以μ_ref为初始分布构建马尔可夫链进行迭代对齐。

Result: 1) MCHF几何收敛到平稳分布，收敛率由半范数||U||_⊕控制；2) NLHF的镜像下降算法具有类似的结构自适应收敛保证；3) 当||U||_⊕很小时，MCHF与NLHF在RLHF解附近一阶近似一致；4) MCHF和NLHF的第一步恢复基于列和奖励的RLHF解，第二步起纳入残差的线性泛函。

Conclusion: MCHF提供了一种无需标量奖励即可利用成对偏好的对齐方法，其收敛率自适应偏好中的非传递结构。MCHF、NLHF和RLHF在特定条件下可统一理解，为基于奖励、博弈论和马尔可夫方法的对齐提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We propose Markov Chain from Human Feedback (MCHF), an elementary approach for aligning generative models from pairwise human preferences. Unlike Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), which reduces comparisons to a scalar reward, and Nash Learning from Human Feedback (NLHF), which preserves pairwise utilities through a KL-regularized minimax optimization, MCHF uses pairwise preferences directly to define a transition mechanism over model outputs. Given a pairwise utility $U(x,y)$, which quantifies human preference for $y$ over $x$, and a reference probability distribution $μ_{\mathsf{ref}}$, we define a Markov kernel $\mathsf{P}(x, dy)\propto \exp(U(x,y))μ_{\mathsf{ref}}(dy)$, and take the Markov chain starting from $μ_{\mathsf{ref}}$ as an iterative alignment procedure. We show that MCHF converges geometrically fast to the stationary distribution, with a convergence rate governed by the seminorm $\|U\|_\oplus=\inf_{g,f\in L^\infty(μ_{\mathsf{ref}})}\|U-g\oplus f\|_\infty$, which quantifies the non-transitive structure of the pairwise utility. We further show that a mirror-descent algorithm for NLHF satisfies an analogous structure-adaptive convergence guarantee. Finally, through a perturbation analysis, we prove that when $\|U\|_\oplus$ is small, MCHF and NLHF agree up to first order around an RLHF solution, which yields a unified view of reward-based, game-theoretic, and Markovian approaches to alignment. In particular, for two natural algorithms that converge to the MCHF/NLHF equilibria, we show that the first step of MCHF and NLHF recovers the RLHF solution based on the column-sum reward $\hat{f}(y)=\int μ_{\mathsf{ref}}(dx) U(x, y)$, and starting from the second iteration, both algorithms incorporate the same linear functional of the residual $U-(-\hat f)\oplus \hat f$, which captures the non-transitive structure of the pairwise utility $U$.

</details>


### [240] [DCD-PFN: A Decoupling-Aware Foundation Model for Causal Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21212)
*Zhengkang Guan,Yikang Chen,Yi He,Yunze Tong,Zijing Hu,Haoyuan Qian,Fei Wu,Kun Kuang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DCD-PFN，一种基于解耦感知的因果发现基础模型，通过对合成SCM预训练学习样本级解耦权重，实现马尔可夫边界识别和全局因果图重构，在零样本泛化上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统因果发现算法难以处理高度非线性和噪声系统，且计算瓶颈严重；现有表格基础模型虽有零样本推理能力，但在显式结构因果发现方面尚未充分探索。

Method: 基于解耦感知范式，将全局图重构任务转化为局部因果发现；通过对多样合成SCM预训练，学习样本级解耦权重用于马尔可夫边界识别；利用并行化局部发现高效重构全局因果图。

Result: 实验表明该基础模型实现了鲁棒的零样本泛化能力。

Conclusion: DCD-PFN通过解耦感知的局部发现策略，成功将PFN基础模型应用于结构因果发现，兼顾了理论可靠性和计算效率。

Abstract: Causal discovery is critical for understanding complex data-generating mechanisms, yet traditional algorithms often struggle with highly non-linear and noisy systems, or suffer from severe computational bottlenecks. Recent tabular foundation models based on Prior-Data Fitted Networks (PFNs) have demonstrated remarkable zero-shot inference capabilities, but their potential for explicit structural causal discovery remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose DCD-PFN, a decoupling-aware foundation model for causal discovery. Instead of directly amortizing global graph reconstruction, DCD-PFN focuses on local causal discovery through a decoupling-based paradigm. Through pre-training on diverse synthetic Structural Causal Models (SCMs), the model learns sample-wise decoupling weights that enable Markov boundary (MB) identification. Furthermore, by leveraging parallelized local discovery, DCD-PFN efficiently reconstructs global causal graphs while remaining grounded in the theoretical foundations of decoupling-based causal discovery. Experiments demonstrate that our foundation model achieves robust zero-shot generalization.

</details>


### [241] [GRAIN: Group Aggregation via Min-Norm Objective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22917)
*Nghia Bui,Jiarui Yao,Lijing Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GRAIN算法，通过最小范数凸组合替代均值聚合来优化梯度更新，解决过参数化深度学习中的训练不稳定问题，在大规模预训练模型上实现了更低的方差和更好的平均性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代深度学习中的过参数化模型（尤其是大型预训练模型）存在严重的训练不稳定问题：随机因素（初始化、数据顺序、dropout等）会导致优化路径收敛到差异很大的解，而重复训练的成本又太高，因此需要一种轻量级的方差降低方法。

Method: GRAIN算法将小批量优化中的均值聚合（包括批间和批内）替换为基于最小范数的凸组合。该方法确保聚合后的更新与每个组梯度之间的内积非负，解决梯度冲突，同时保持与SGD相当的O(1/T)收敛率。

Result: 在生成、分类和回归等多个大规模预训练模型任务中，GRAIN在平均性能和运行间方差方面都实现了持续改进，且无需额外训练时间或存储开销。

Conclusion: GRAIN通过简单的梯度聚合方式改变，有效缓解了深度学习中的训练不稳定问题，在理论上具有更紧的一致性稳定性界，在实践中有广泛适用性。

Abstract: Learning instability is a long-standing problem across machine learning, but it is especially acute in the overparameterized regime that defines modern deep learning: large models fine-tuned or trained on limited data traverse flat loss landscapes with many nearly-equivalent minima, and stochastic factors (initialization, data order, dropout, hardware non-determinism) can route optimization to very different solutions. The rise of large pretrained models (LPMs) makes the problem more urgent: training cost is high, downstream data is often small, and repeated runs for variance reduction are prohibitive. We introduce \textbf{GRAIN} (\textbf{G}roup \textbf{A}ggregation via m\textbf{IN}-norm objective), a lightweight training algorithm that replaces the mean aggregation used in mini-batch optimization (both across mini-batches and within a mini-batch) with a min-norm convex combination of group-wise gradients. \mName guarantees a non-negative inner product between the aggregated update and every group gradient, resolving intra- and inner-batch gradient conflict, and retains an $\mathcal{O}(1/T)$ convergence rate comparable to SGD. Under mild smoothness and absolute-continuity assumptions, the min-norm solution differs almost surely from the arithmetic mean, which yields a uniform-stability bound for \mName strictly tighter than the standard bound for SGD. Empirically across generation, classification, and regression at LPM scale, \mName delivers consistent improvements in mean performance and reductions in run-to-run variance over a broad suite of tasks, with no extra training-time or storage cost beyond a single backward pass.

</details>


### [242] [Sakana Fugu Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21228)
*Yujin Tang,Edoardo Cetin,Jinglue Xu,Qi Sun,Stefan Nielsen,Vincent Richard,Haruto Goda,Iaroslav Tymchenko,Nhan Nguyen,Hyunin Lee,Mari Ashiga,Shashank Kotyan,So Kuroki,Tarin Clanuwat*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文介绍了Sakana Fugu，一组能够理解用户查询并动态构建智能体框架的编排器模型，通过整合多个LLM的专业能力，在多项基准测试中取得了领先性能。并发布了Fugu（平衡性能与延迟）和Fugu-Ultra（追求回答质量）两个模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同LLM供应商在特定领域日益专业化，如何将这些模型的个体专长组合成一个具有集体智能的系统成为一个自然目标。

Method: 训练一组编排器模型（Fugu），使其能够理解用户查询并动态设计智能体框架来解决问题；训练范式包括大规模微调、进化算法和强化学习方法。

Result: 在SWE-Bench Pro、Terminal Bench、LiveCodeBench、GPQA-Diamond、Humanity's Last Exam、CharXiv Reasoning等多项挑战性任务中达到公开可访问模型中的最先进水平。

Conclusion: 多智能体系统和动态、查询自适应的智能体框架是迈向AI能力下一个前沿（集体智能）的有效路径。

Abstract: The capabilities of frontier Large Language Models (LLMs) continue to advance, with different providers increasingly specializing in distinct domains. This raises a natural next objective: how to combine the individual specializations of various LLMs into a collectively intelligent system. To this end, we report the development of Sakana Fugu, a family of orchestrator models that harness and amplify the capabilities of an LLM agent team. Fugu models are themselves language models trained to understand user queries and dynamically devise agentic scaffolds to solve them. Through these adaptive scaffolds, Fugu accesses performance beyond any individual LLM agent, achieving state-of-the-art results compared to other publicly accessible models across a range of challenging tasks, including SWE-Bench Pro, Terminal Bench, LiveCodeBench, GPQA-Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, and CharXiv Reasoning. We release two models: Fugu, which balances performance with latency for everyday use, and Fugu-Ultra, which prioritizes answer quality on the hardest problems. We describe our training paradigm, which encompasses large-scale fine-tuning, evolutionary algorithms, and reinforcement learning approaches, along with the infrastructure and core design principles that turn these methods into a production system. We hope this report encourages further research into multi-agent systems and dynamic, query-adaptive agentic scaffolds as a path toward the next frontier of AI capabilities, accessed through collective intelligence.

</details>


### [243] [Fusing Backdoors, Machine Learning, and Optimization for Large-Scale Parametric Mixed-Integer Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21440)
*El Mehdi Er Raqabi,Pascal Van Hentenryck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BIPC框架，通过识别问题中的"backdoor"变量子集，利用机器学习预测其取值，从而将大规模混合整数优化问题简化为更易求解的子问题，显著加速求解过程，同时保持解的高质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模优化问题在电力系统、交通、供应链等场景中需重复求解，传统方法计算开销巨大。虽然问题结构固定，但参数频繁变化（如突发事件、需求波动），亟需一种能快速提供高质量可行解的加速方法。

Method: BIPC框架分为三阶段：Phase I通过识别程序发现实例分布中的backdoor变量子集；Phase II利用监督学习为有限域backdoor预测具体值、为宽域backdoor预测区间；Phase III求解简化后的优化问题，必要时执行校正步骤以保证可行性或最优性。

Result: 在真实大规模问题上，BIPC显著降低了求解时间，仅牺牲有限的解质量。框架能够应对参数频繁变化的场景，快速提供高质量可行解。

Conclusion: BIPC将机器学习与优化管道有效集成，为重复求解大规模混合整数问题提供了一种实用的加速方案，特别适用于参数扰动频繁但结构固定的实际应用场景。

Abstract: Large-scale optimization problems are often solved repeatedly under similar structural conditions, leading to substantial computational overhead. This occurs in applications such as power systems, transportation, and supply chain networks, where the underlying structure is fixed while parameters frequently vary under perturbations.
  This paper proposes a Learning to Optimize (LTO) framework that accelerates the solution of large-scale general mixed-integer problems by leveraging the concept of a backdoor, i.e., a subset of variables that drive most of the computational complexity. The proposed BIPC framework consists of three phases. Phase I is an identification procedure that discovers a backdoor for a set of instances in the distribution. Phase II uses supervised learning to develop machine learning models that, given an instance, predict values for bounded-domain backdoor variables and intervals for wide-domain backdoor variables. These predictions define a reduced optimization problem where the predictions constrain the backdoor variables, while the other variables remain free. Phase III optimizes this reduced problem and, if necessary, applies a correction step to restore feasibility or the optimality guarantees.
  Experiments on real-world, large-scale problems show substantial reductions in solution time with only a limited loss in solution quality. The framework enables organizations to solve large-scale optimization problems efficiently in the presence of frequent perturbations, such as unexpected events, demand fluctuations, or operational changes. Because these changes affect parameters rather than the problem structure, BIPC can quickly provide high-quality, feasible solutions, offering a practical approach to integrating machine learning into existing optimization pipelines.

</details>


### [244] [Generative Robust Optimisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22536)
*Yuhui Yin,Vassilis M. Charitopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出生成式鲁棒优化（GRO）框架，用深度生成模型（解码器）定义不确定性集，替代传统固定几何形状的集合，并通过五点评估体系（重构保真度、分布匹配、潜在规律性、鲁棒相关性、计算可解性）系统评估。基于Wasserstein对抗自编码器实现，结合混合整数规划进行最坏情况验证，实验表明该方法在表达能力、校准性和优化可解性上均有优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统鲁棒优化的不确定性集采用固定几何形状（如球形、盒形），无法刻画真实数据中复杂的非线性依赖、非对称性和多峰分布，导致优化结果过于保守或不够准确。

Method: 提出GRO框架：深度生成模型（解码器网络）将校准后的潜在空间集合映射为不确定性集；五点评估体系提供模型无关的系统评价标准；具体实例为Wasserstein对抗自编码器（WAAE），采用高斯混合模型引导训练保证潜在规律性，约束一致性正则化提升鲁棒相关性，ReLU激活函数解码器支持混合整数规划精确验证最坏情况。

Result: 在包含六种不确定性分布和六种生成架构的生产规划问题，以及多阶段设施选址问题上的大量实验验证了框架有效性，表明系统关注全部五点评价准则能够同时实现不确定性集的高表达能力、良好校准性和优化可解性。

Conclusion: 生成式鲁棒优化能够有效替代传统几何形状不确定性集，五点评估体系为设计实用、可解的基于神经网络的不确定性集提供了系统性指导。

Abstract: Classical uncertainty sets for robust optimisation impose fixed geometric shapes that cannot represent the complex dependencies present in real-world data. We propose Generative Robust Optimisation (GRO), a framework in which a deep generative model defines the uncertainty set as the image of a neural network decoder over a calibrated latent set, naturally accommodating nonlinear correlations, asymmetry, and multimodality. A five-point evaluation framework (reconstruction fidelity, distribution matching, latent regularity, robust relevance, and computational tractability) provides systematic, model-agnostic criteria for assessing any neural network-based uncertainty set. We instantiate this framework with a Wasserstein Adversarial Autoencoder employing Gaussian mixture model-guided training for latent regularity and constraint-consistency regularisation for robust relevance. Restricting the decoder to ReLU activations enables exact worst-case verification through mixed-integer programming embedding. Extensive experiments on a production planning problem across six uncertainty distributions and six generative architectures, together with a multi-period facility location study, validate the framework and demonstrate that systematic attention to all five criteria yields uncertainty sets that are simultaneously expressive, well-calibrated, and optimisation-tractable.

</details>


### [245] [Comparative Evaluation of Machine Learning and Deep Learning Models for Wound-Rotor Synchronous Motor Performance Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21230)
*Kıvanç Doğan,Ahmet Orhan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究系统比较了8种机器学习与深度学习模型（含FT Transformer等最新架构）在预测绕线转子同步电机（WRSM）转矩和效率上的表现。FT-Transformer以R²=0.9928取得最佳精度，预测仅需0.33毫秒，比传统有限元分析快数个数量级，并通过多种子复现协议和帕累托分析全面评估了计算成本-精度权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: WRSM设计需要同时优化大量几何与电磁参数，传统有限元分析计算成本极高，限制了参数空间的快速探索。现有基于机器学习的代理建模研究比较模型数量有限、未包含深度学习架构、且缺乏针对WRSM的综合性基准测试。

Method: 使用拉丁超立方采样在Motor-CAD仿真环境中生成3351个样本数据集；选取来自4个算法家族的8种ML/DL模型（含FT Transformer）；每个模型使用10个不同随机种子训练，并通过Optuna进行超参数优化；采用多维指标（R²、MAE、RMSE、MAPE）评估；进行计算成本-精度的帕累托分析。

Result: 基于神经网络的模型整体优于基于树的模型。FT-Transformer取得最佳单模型精度：R²=0.9928，预测时间仅0.33毫秒，较FEA加速数个数量级。

Conclusion: 深度学习代理模型可高效替代FEA用于WRSM设计优化，FT Transformer在该任务上兼具高精度与极低推理延迟，多模型比较与帕累托分析为工程实践中的模型选择提供了系统性参考。

Abstract: Wound rotor synchronous motors have emerged as a strong alternative that eliminates dependence on REEs. However, WRSM design requires the simultaneous optimization of numerous geometric and electromagnetic parameters, and the high computational cost of conventional finite element analysis severely limits the rapid exploration of the large parameter space. Although there are machine-learning-based surrogate modeling studies in the literature, they generally compare only a limited number of models, exclude deep learning architectures, and do not provide a comprehensive benchmark specific to WRSM. In this study, the performance of a total of eight machine learning and deep learning models from four different algorithmic families was systematically compared for the prediction of WRSM torque and motor efficiency. On a dataset of 3351 samples generated using Latin Hypercube Sampling in the Motor-CAD simulation environment, each model was trained with 10 different random seed values and tuned via Optuna hyperparameter optimization. Different from the existing literature, this study jointly offers a broad model spectrum including recent deep learning architectures such as FT Transformer, a multi-seed reproducibility protocol, and a Pareto analysis of the computational cost-accuracy trade-off. The results revealed that neural-network-based models systematically outperform tree-based models. The FT-Transformer model achieved the highest single-model accuracy with R^2 = 0.9928, producing predictions in 0.33 milliseconds and thus obtaining several orders of magnitude speedup compared to FEA. Model performances were evaluated in a multidimensional manner using R^2, MAE, RMSE, and MAPE metrics.

</details>


### [246] [Federated learning with heavy-tailed gradient noise and communication noise: a variance-reduction based algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22466)
*Shengchao Zhao,Yongchao Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于方差缩减的联邦学习算法VRA-FedSGD，能同时应对重尾梯度噪声和通信噪声，在非凸和强凸目标函数下均取得理论收敛保证，并通过实验验证有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习在无线网络和物联网部署中普遍存在重尾梯度噪声和通信噪声，现有方法未能同时有效处理这两种噪声，亟需一种鲁棒的方差缩减算法。

Method: 采用动量方差缩减技术结合非线性映射来减轻重尾梯度噪声，并设计方差缩减聚合机制来抑制重尾通信噪声。

Result: 非凸目标函数下均方收敛率为 O(K^{-(p-1)/(2p-1)})；强凸目标函数下几乎必然收敛率为 Õ(K^{-(1-1/(p-ε))})；逻辑回归实验验证有效性。

Conclusion: VRA-FedSGD能有效处理联邦学习中的重尾噪声问题，提供了理论收敛保证和实验支撑。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is an emerging distributed machine learning paradigm that enables local devices to jointly train a global model while keeping data decentralized and private. We propose a variance-reduction based algorithm, VRA-FedSGD, for FL in the presence of heavy-tailed gradient noise and communication noise, where these noises are prevalent in large-scale machine learning over wireless networks and Internet of Things deployments. VRA-FedSGD employs a momentum variance reduction technique together with a nonlinear mapping to mitigate heavy-tailed gradient noise, and uses a variance-reduced aggregation mechanism to suppress heavy-tailed communication noise. In the mean sense, VRA-FedSGD achieves a convergence rate of {\small$\mathcal{O}\left(K^{-(p-1)/(2p-1)}\right)$} for nonconvex objective functions, where $p$ is the tail index of heavy-tailed noise. In the almost sure sense, VRA-FedSGD achieves a convergence rate of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(K^{-(1-1/(p-ε))}\right)$ for strongly convex objective functions, where $ε$ is an arbitrarily small constant. Simulated experiments on a logistic regression problem with real-world data verify the effectiveness of VRA-FedSGD.

</details>


### [247] [LSTM Variants for Chaotic Dynamical Systems: An Empirical Study on the Lorenz Attractor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22662)
*Ruslan Gokhman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了七种循环和卷积架构用于预测Lorenz吸引子等混沌动力系统，发现使用Huber损失的BiLSTM表现最佳（得分58.81），而加性注意力机制和CNN前端反而损害了性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混沌动力系统（如Lorenz吸引子）的长期预测极其困难，因为小数值误差会在自回归展开中被指数级放大。作者希望通过系统性地比较多种架构，找出在混沌系统中有效的设计选择。

Method: 比较了七种架构：普通LSTM、带加性注意力的LSTM、BiLSTM、使用Huber损失的BiLSTM、时序卷积网络（TCN）、CNN前端+LSTM、CNN前端+BiLSTM。所有模型共享相同的预处理、序列长度和展开过程，以隔离架构差异的影响。

Result: Leaderboard得分范围45.72-58.81。BiLSTM+Huber损失表现最佳。加性注意力使性能下降超过10分。CNN前端对LSTM或BiLSTM均无帮助。BiLSTM系列在困难样本对（6-7）上泛化更好，而LSTM+Attention在样本对6上RMSE高达8.94。

Conclusion: 双向上下文和鲁棒损失函数有助于混沌系统预测，而注意力机制和CNN前端在此场景下失效。

Abstract: Forecasting chaotic dynamical systems such as the Lorenz attractor is notoriously difficult: small numerical errors are amplified exponentially over long autoregressive rollouts. We study seven recurrent and convolutional architectures for the AI-DEEDS 2026 Chaotic Systems Challenge: a vanilla LSTM, an LSTM with additive attention, a Bidirectional LSTM (BiLSTM), a BiLSTM trained with the Huber loss, a Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN), a CNN front-end followed by an LSTM, and a CNN front-end followed by a BiLSTM. All models share the same pre-processing, sequence length, and rollout procedure, isolating the contribution of each design choice. The challenge scores predictions on a 0-100 scale where higher is better. We obtain leaderboard scores between 45.72 and 58.81, with the BiLSTM trained with Huber loss being the strongest configuration. Two findings stand out: (i) adding additive attention to the unidirectional baseline degraded performance by over ten points, and (ii) prepending a CNN front-end to either an LSTM or a BiLSTM did not help and slightly hurt the score. Per-pair RMSE measurements confirm that the BiLSTM family generalizes better in the harder pairs (6-7), while the LSTM + Attention model collapses there (RMSE up to 8.94 on pair 6). We discuss why bidirectional context and a robust loss help in chaotic regimes while attention and CNN front-ends fail in this setting.

</details>


### [248] [Does RoPE Prevent or Degrade Retrieval Heads? A Mechanistic Analysis Across Model Families](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21249)
*Cengizhan Bayram*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究RoPE对检索头的影响，发现检索头是长上下文回忆的必要条件，高频RoPE不会减少检索头数量，但零化最低频率RoPE维度会剂量依赖性地损害检索功能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究旋转位置编码（RoPE）的频率参数是否抑制或削弱了检索头的形成与功能，从而影响长上下文信息的回忆能力。

Method: 使用配对种子针尖测试、层聚类排列和因果头掩码方法，在四种7-8B开源模型（覆盖多头和分组查询注意力）上，对100倍范围的theta值进行实验，并通过受控补丁实验零化低频率RoPE维度。

Result: (1) 掩码87个检索头使回忆从1.00降至0.00，随机掩码无影响；(2) 高theta不减少检索头数量；(3) 范数-效用关系具有家族特异性；(4) 零化最低频率RoPE维度导致回忆剂量依赖性下降（1.00→0.18），随机维度几乎无影响。

Conclusion: 检索头是长上下文回忆的因果必要条件，RoPE频率而非范数-效用是影响检索功能的关键因果变量，该发现在多个模型家族和规模上一致成立。

Abstract: Retrieval heads, attention heads that copy information from earlier context to the current position, have been proposed as the mechanistic substrate for long-context recall. Rotary position embeddings (RoPE) rotate queries and keys by frequencies decaying with a base hyperparameter theta, and a natural hypothesis is that this rotation either prevents retrieval heads from forming or degrades their function. We test both across four open-weight 7-8B models spanning multi-head and grouped-query attention and a 100x range of theta, using paired-seed needle-in-a-haystack tests, layer-clustered permutation, and causal head-masking. (i) Retrieval heads are causally necessary: masking the 87 detected heads in OLMo-2 collapses recall from 1.00 to 0.00, while masking matched random heads has no effect; this replicates in Qwen. (ii) Higher theta does not reduce retrieval-head count (LLaMA-3.1 at theta=500K has 47 heads vs LLaMA-2 at theta=10K with 42), refuting the prevention hypothesis. (iii) The norm-utility relation is family-specific and significant in opposite directions (Qwen d=-0.49, OLMo d=+0.50, both significant; LLaMA null); since OLMo and LLaMA-3.1 share theta=500K yet differ, the effect is not theta-driven. (iv) Building on Chiang and Yogatama (2025), a controlled patch shows that zeroing the lowest-frequency RoPE dimensions of retrieval heads degrades recall dose-dependently (1.00 to 0.18 when 32 of 128 dimensions are zeroed, vs 0.98 for random dimensions); the effect is head-specific and task-specific. The causal variable is RoPE frequency, not norm-utility. The direction holds in all five models patched (OLMo-2, Qwen2.5-7B/14B, Gemma-2, Mistral) across four lineages and two scales. We do not claim cross-model magnitude. Code and a paired-seed harness are released.

</details>


### [249] [Non-asymptotic estimates of the minimal risk in statistical learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23295)
*Liming Wu,Sen Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文在统计学习的经验风险原则（ERP）中，证明了两种错误概率的集中不等式，给出了最小风险的非渐近高置信度下界和上界。将经验风险函数的通常有界性条件放宽为高斯或指数可积条件，并证明了最小风险下界的置信度与训练参数数量和输入向量维度无关，而上界的置信度在样本量远大于参数集的箱维数时成立。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ERP分析通常假设经验风险函数有界，这在实际中过于严格。作者希望放宽这一条件，建立更普适的非渐近浓度不等式，并探究最小风险下界和上界的置信度与模型复杂度（参数数量、维度、箱维数）之间的关系。

Method: 基于Talagrand浓度不等式（Bousquet和Klein-Rio的锐化版本）、传输-熵不等式（transport-entropy inequalities）以及经验过程与统计学习理论的最新进展进行分析。

Result: 1) 最小风险下界的置信度与训练参数数量和输入向量维度无关，可有效检测学习机器的缺陷；2) 最小风险上界的置信度在样本量n远大于参数集Θ在Orlicz度量d_{ψ₁}下的箱维数时保持较高水平。

Conclusion: 将经验风险函数的条件从有界性放松到高斯或指数可积条件，建立了更一般化的ERP浓度不等式，揭示了置信度与参数集复杂度（箱维数）之间的关键联系。

Abstract: In this paper we prove some concentration inequalities for two types of error probabilities in the Empirical Risk Principle (ERP) in statistical learning, which provide a lower bound and an upper bound for the minimal risk (in terms of the minimal empirical risk) with non-asymptotic high confidence. The usual boundedness condition of the empirical risk function is relaxed to the Gaussian or exponential integrability condition. The confidence of the lower bound of the minimal risk is shown to be independent of the number of training parameters and the dimension of the input vectors, allowing one to detect the deficiency of a learning machine efficiently; and the confidence of the upper bound of the minimal risk is proved to be high provided that the sample size $n$ is much greater than the box dimension of the parameter set $Θ$ in the Orlicz metric $d_{ψ_1}$ associated with the risk functions. Our work is based on Talagrand's concentration inequalities (the sharp versions by Bousquet and Klein-Rio), transport-entropy inequalities and the recent progress in the theory of empirical processes and statistical learning.

</details>


### [250] [Gradient-Free Warm-Start Library Recovery: an Amortized-Regret Separation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21253)
*Jianwei Lou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无梯度、局部、在线且仅追加的持续学习方法，在循环数据流上具有可证明的效率优势，通过解耦识别（与维度无关）和估计（与维度相关）过程，实现了对无记忆重新估计器的显著加速，并证明了各环节的极小极大紧性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘计算和流式部署需要无梯度、局部、在线、仅追加的持续学习方法，但其优势通常仅凭非正式论证。本文旨在为这种学习范式提供严格的理论保证，证明其在循环数据流上的可证明效率优势。

Method: 提出解耦机制：识别当前活跃的K个已知模式之一（成本O(log K/Δ²)，与维度D无关），与估计模式参数（成本Θ(D/ε²)）。采用温启动库学习器，基于分段假设，实现摊销恢复成本。同时提出计数校准变体，无需超参数和逐步骤超越函数。

Result: 温启动学习器的摊销成本为O(KD/ε² + (R-K)log K/Δ²)，远优于无记忆重新估计器的Θ(RD/ε²)。证明了识别下界Θ(log K/Δ²)和无记忆类下界Ω(RD/ε²)，各术语极小极大紧。合成流和真实k-mer基因组分布验证了维度依赖性分离。

Conclusion: 该方法在循环数据流上实现了解耦加速，无遗忘且无需端到端反向传播。但存在局限：可识别模式受单纯形 packing 限制（壁 e^{Θ(D)}），自主分割在 packing 壁处不可能，重叠情况下优势消失。

Abstract: Continual learning that is gradient-free, local, online, and append-only is attractive for edge and streaming deployment, but its value is usually argued informally. We give a provable account on recurring-regime streams. Given segmentation, a warm-start library learner attains amortized recovery cost $O\!\big(KD/\varepsilon^2+(R-K)\logK/Δ^2\big)$ versus a memoryless re-estimator's $Θ(RD/\varepsilon^2)$, an advantage $(R-K)\,Θ(D/\varepsilon^2)$ growing with dimension $D$ and recurrence density. The mechanism is a decoupling: recognizing which of $K$ seen regimes is active costs $O(\log K/Δ^2)$, independent of $D$, whereas estimating a regime costs $Θ(D/\varepsilon^2)$. We prove this is tight: matching lower bounds give recognition $Θ(\log K/Δ^2)$ and a memoryless-class bound $Ω(RD/\varepsilon^2)$, so each term is individually minimax-tight (the joint statement is conditional). The separation is born-immune (a memoryless learner's advantage is identically zero) and paradigm-level: it matches, and does not beat, a fair spawn-capable Bayesian baseline; the contribution is attaining this cost structure without end-to-end backprop and with zero forgetting by construction. A count-calibrated variant ties the baseline's leading constant up to a bounded, never-negative per-recurrence overshoot, hyperparameter-free and with no per-step transcendentals. We bound the scope: recognizable regimes are capped by simplex packing (walls $e^{Θ(D)}$); autonomous segmentation is impossible at the packing wall (no detector escapes the false-alarm/delay frontier as regimes overlap); the advantage vanishes under overlap. The dimension-dependent separation is corroborated on synthetic streams and real $k$-mer genome distributions (memoryless cost $\propto D^{1.04}$, recognition $D$-independent); the one real sequential stream sits in the $D{=}1$ near-null corner.

</details>


### [251] [Clipping the Price of Adaptivity at the Tail](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22669)
*Itai Kreisler,Yair Carmon,Oliver Hinder*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通过裁剪模型输出（当偏离参考模型过大时）的自适应随机凸优化方法，克服了传统方法在初始距离和Lipschitz常数存在大不确定性时无法高效适应的"适应性代价"障碍，在仅需少量额外结构假设下实现了近似最优的收敛保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的自适应SCO方法存在"适应性代价"的根本性障碍：在标准假设下，无法同时高效适应初始距离和Lipschitz常数的大不确定性。本文旨在绕过这一限制。

Method: 利用目标函数可分解为模型和损失函数这一额外结构，在模型输出传递到损失函数之前进行干预——当学习模型输出偏离固定参考模型输出过多时，对输出进行裁剪（clipping）。

Result: 该方法在距离和Lipschitz参数的不确定性下，匹配已知参数SCO的最优界（仅差对数因子），从而高效适应两者的巨大不确定性。

Conclusion: 通过引入合理的额外结构假设（模型-损失分解），可以突破自适应SCO的适应性代价障碍，实现更鲁棒的优化方法。

Abstract: Adaptive stochastic convex optimization (SCO) methods face a fundamental ``price of adaptivity'' barrier: under the standard set of assumptions, they cannot efficiently adapt to large uncertainty in both the initial distance to optimality and the Lipschitz constant. We circumvent this barrier by requiring a small amount of additional structure common to many learning problems. Specifically, we assume that the objective decomposes into a model and a loss function, enabling us to intervene by modifying the model's output before it passes to the loss function. Under this assumption, we design a method that clips the learned model output in tail events where it deviates too much from the output of a fixed reference model. Our method matches the optimal bounds for known-parameter SCO up to logarithmic factors in the uncertainty in the distance and Lipschitz parameters, thus efficiently adapting to large uncertainty in both.

</details>


### [252] [Collapsed Effective Operators for Higher-order Structures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23517)
*Maximilian Krahn,Lennart Bastian,Vikas Garg,Björn Schuller,Tolga Birdal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"塌缩有效算子"(Collapsed Effective Operators)，通过Schur补将高阶拉普拉斯算子的多层级自由度压缩为单一顶点级算子，实现高阶拓扑结构的顶点级建模，并保持半正定性及能量下界特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高阶谱算子将拓扑分解为不同秩(rank)分别处理，实践者需要通过特设(ad hoc)方式将信息融合回顶点，缺乏统一且原理性的融合方法。

Method: 对分级拉普拉斯(graded Laplacian)进行Schur补运算，将高阶自由度压缩为顶点级算子，得到一个通常稠密但编码长程拓扑相互作用的算子。

Result: 证明了该算子保持半正定性，且谱上界相对于秩0 Hodge Laplacian，能有效降低高阶连通性下的系统能量。在谱聚类、信号平滑和图神经网络位置编码等任务上取得改进。

Conclusion: 该算子为高阶拓扑信息提供了一种统一的顶点级表征方式，兼具理论保证与实用价值，可广泛应用于图学习与拓扑数据分析。

Abstract: Higher-order structures are powerful relational modeling tools, yet existing spectral operators decompose the topology into separate ranks, leaving practitioners to fuse the information back to vertices through ad hoc choices. We introduce Collapsed Effective Operators, which condense higher-order degrees of freedom into a single vertex-level operator via Schur complementation of a graded Laplacian. This yields a (generally dense) operator that encodes long-range interactions mediated by topology and is applicable to arbitrary higher-order constructs. We show it preserves positive semi-definiteness with a spectral upper bound relative to the rank-0 Hodge Laplacian, effectively lowering system energy under higher-order connectivity. Empirically, our operator improves spectral clustering, signal smoothing, and enables the inclusion of topological features in neural network architectures via positional encoding. The project page can be found http://circle-group.github.io/research/CollapsedEffectiveOperators

</details>


### [253] [Intrinsic Flow Matching on Quantum Pure-State Manifolds with Phase-Aligned Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21256)
*Jian Xu,Delu Zeng,John Paisley,Qibin Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Intrinsic Flow Matching (IFM)，一种在复射影空间$\mathbb{CP}^{d-1}$上的确定性传输框架，通过学习切向速度场并使用Pancharatnam相位对齐的条件路径，替代了欧几里得生成建模在量子纯态系综上的几何不匹配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子纯态系综存在于复射影空间上，使用平坦欧几里得生成建模存在几何不匹配问题，需要一种在流形本身上进行生成建模的方法。

Method: 在$\mathbb{CP}^{d-1}$流形上定义确定性传输框架，学习切向速度场；使用Pancharatnam相位对齐的条件路径；采用水平参数化去除冗余环境方向；利用流形概率流替代局部评分教师和反向随机采样。

Result: IFM在多数高量子比特、多模态、自旋相干、物理启发和幅值编码MNIST基准上优于环境欧几里得流匹配，在高维和相干性敏感任务上提升最显著，但并非所有指标均一致领先。

Conclusion: IFM目标函数能够恢复诱导边际传输场，表示确定性投影系综流，并具有端点和稳定性保证。

Abstract: Quantum pure-state ensembles live on complex projective space, making flat Euclidean generative modeling geometrically mismatched. We introduce Intrinsic Flow Matching (IFM), a deterministic transport framework on $\mathbb{CP}^{d-1}$ that learns tangent velocity fields using Pancharatnam phase-aligned conditional paths. IFM replaces local score teachers and reverse-time stochastic sampling with manifold probability flow, while horizontal parameterization removes redundant ambient directions. We show that the IFM objective recovers the induced marginal transport field, represents deterministic projective ensemble flows, and yields endpoint and stability guarantees. Empirically, IFM often improves over ambient Euclidean flow matching across higher-qubit, multimodal, spin-coherent, physics-inspired, and amplitude-encoded MNIST image-vector benchmarks, with strongest gains on high-dimensional and coherence-sensitive tasks but not uniformly across every metric.

</details>


### [254] [Dynamic multi-agent deep reinforcement learning-based pricing and incentivization approach in multimodal transportation networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23257)
*Khadidja Kadem,Mostafa Ameli,Carlos Lima Azevedo,Mahdi Zargayouna,Latifa Oukhellou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个多智能体深度强化学习框架，通过动态定价和激励策略协调共享出行服务与公共交通，在早高峰模拟中实现了通勤成本降低约20%、排放减少约10%、公共交通利润近乎翻倍，并提升了空间公平性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 共享出行服务需求集中在高密度区域，导致系统效率低下、排放增加和空间不公平；而当局、服务商和出行者三方目标冲突，缺乏协调机制。

Method: 构建多智能体深度强化学习框架，包含两个RL智能体：公共当局（分配时空公共交通激励以改善公平、排放和效率）和SMS提供商（动态调整票价以优化收入），两者在仿真环境中互动并自适应演化。

Result: 动态激励有效降低拥堵峰值、通勤成本约20%、排放约10%，公共交通利润近乎翻倍，且收益分布更公平；结合动态定价后，两个RL智能体能够平衡私人提供商与公共当局的冲突目标。

Conclusion: 该框架可作为可持续且公平的多模式交通规划的决策支持工具。

Abstract: In multimodal transportation systems, shared mobility services (SMSs) are promoted for their potential to enhance flexibility and reduce congestion. However, SMS demand is often concentrated in high-density areas, which can limit the effectiveness and accessibility for various commuter groups. This uneven integration challenges transportation system efficiency, especially in terms of emissions and spatial equity. Addressing these issues requires coordination among multiple stakeholders whose objectives frequently conflict. Whereas authorities aim to ensure sustainable and equitable mobility, SMS providers focus on revenue maximization, and travelers seek to minimize personal travel costs. This paper proposes a multi-agent deep reinforcement learning framework that captures these interactions through dynamic pricing and incentivization strategies for SMSs and public transport. The framework integrates two reinforcement learning (RL) agents: (i) a public authority that allocates spatio-temporal public transport incentives to improve equity, emissions, and efficiency, and (ii) an SMS provider that dynamically adjusts fares to optimize revenue. The agents interact with the transportation system and adapt strategies in response to evolving demand, congestion, and network conditions. Numerical experiments conducted over a three-hour morning peak period show that dynamic incentivization effectively reduces congestion peaks, lowers commuters' costs by around 20% and emissions by approximately 10%, while nearly doubling public transport profit and supporting a more equitable distribution of benefits. When combined with dynamic SMS pricing, the two RL agents demonstrate the ability to balance conflicting objectives between private providers and public authorities. The proposed approach provides a decision-support tool for sustainable and equitable multimodal mobility planning.

</details>


### [255] [Evolving Spatial Weights for Cartographic Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22252)
*Gesiel R. Lopes,Roberto F. da Silva,Mellina Yamamura,Sergio H. V. L. de Mattos,Antonio M. Saraiva,Alexandre C. B. Delbem,Eric K. Tokuda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GIS-moGA，一个基于空间自相关结构的多目标进化框架，用于解决制图综合问题。通过同时最大化全局莫兰指数和最小化局部空间关联指标方差，结合女王邻接矩阵的稀疏性优化，在巴西阿拉拉夸拉市的流行病学数据集上验证了该方法相比专家加权方案在空间一致性和超体积指标上的显著优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统制图综合依赖专家驱动加权方案，缺乏系统性和可扩展性。本文旨在提出一种数据驱动的多目标优化方法，利用空间自相关结构自动估计图层权重，克服专家主观性并提升空间一致性。

Method: 提出GIS-moGA双目标进化框架：1) 最大化全局莫兰指数（Global Moran's I）以增强全局空间结构；2) 最小化LISA方差以减少局部空间异质性。利用女王邻接矩阵97.7%稀疏性，将计算复杂度从O(N²)降至O(Nk)，实现可扩展的市级分析。通过64场景实验设计，在N=523的流行病学数据集上验证。

Result: 高突变率对维持种群多样性和防止早熟收敛至关重要；与专家AHP基线相比，Pareto前沿在超体积指标上获得显著提升，空间一致性显著改善（p < 0.001, Cliff's delta = 0.87）。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一个系统化、可扩展的数据驱动框架，适用于地理多准则决策分析，能够有效替代传统专家加权方案。

Abstract: The integration of multiple thematic data layers into a single composite map, known as the cartographic synthesis problem, is typically addressed through expert-driven weighting schemes. This study presents a multi-objective formulation of cartographic synthesis grounded in spatial autocorrelation structure. We develop a bi-objective evolutionary framework, GIS-moGA, that estimates layer weights by simultaneously maximizing global spatial structure, measured by Global Moran's I, and minimizing local spatial heterogeneity, measured by the variance of Local Indicators of Spatial Association (LISA). Because naive evaluation of spatial relationships requires O(N^2) operations, direct computation becomes impractical for larger datasets. We address this challenge by exploiting the 97.7% sparsity of queen contiguity matrices, reducing effective complexity to O(N k) and enabling scalable municipal-level analysis. The framework is evaluated on a high-dimensional spatial epidemiology dataset with N = 523 units from Araraquara, Brazil. A 64-scenario experimental design is used to examine evolutionary behavior across parameter settings. Results show that higher mutation rates are important for maintaining population diversity and preventing premature convergence in spatially autocorrelated fitness landscapes, where crossover operators can disrupt geographically coherent structures. Compared with expert-derived Analytic Hierarchy Process baselines, the resulting Pareto fronts show substantial hypervolume gains and significant improvements in spatial coherence (p < 0.001, Cliff's delta = 0.87). These findings provide a systematic and scalable framework for data-driven geographic multi-criteria decision analysis.

</details>


### [256] [Solve for the Hyperparameter, Skip the Search: Kolmogorov-Optimal Scaling Laws for Spline Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23575)
*Yong Yi Bay,Kathleen A. Yearick*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出KORE方法，利用闭式解替代网格搜索进行样条回归的超参数调优，通过理论推导平衡偏差与方差，实现约8倍效率提升，在低交互阶数场景下优于传统调优方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超参数调优通常依赖网格搜索，计算成本高昂。作者希望利用样条回归的理论特性，避免穷举搜索，实现解析求解最优分辨率。

Method: 基于经典逼近理论将平方偏差表达为分辨率G的已知幂函数，基维度为G的显式多项式；利用PRESS恒等式单次拟合即可获得留一法误差。通过平衡两条已知曲线解析求解最小化器。扩展到高维时用交互阶数替代输入维度，得到缩放律。KORE算法只需拟合两个导引分辨率，求解2x2系统校准偏差与噪声尺度，代入闭式解。

Result: 在高达80维的加性和稀疏成对目标上，KORE匹配穷举3折交叉验证及GCV/Mallow's Cp/AIC/BIC，同时减少约8倍模型拟合次数；在36个真实表格数据集上，单位计算量的准确率排名第一，超过调优的boosting和核方法。

Conclusion: 当复杂度存在于低交互阶数时，解析求解分辨率优于搜索策略。

Abstract: Hyperparameter tuning almost always means search: fit the model at every value on a grid, score each by cross-validation, and keep the winner. For spline regression that search is unnecessary. The optimal resolution can be solved for in closed form, to the accuracy an exhaustive search reaches, at a fraction of the compute. Three ingredients make this possible: classical approximation theory pins the squared bias to a known power of the resolution G, exactly the Kolmogorov n-width of the smoothness class; the basis dimension is an explicit polynomial in G; and leave-one-out error follows from a single fit via the PRESS identity. Balancing the two known curves gives the minimizer analytically. We extend this calculus to many coordinates by replacing ambient input dimension with interaction order, the number of active low-order components in an ANOVA decomposition, yielding a scaling law in which the optimal resolution and error are power functions of the effective density (sample size per active component), with input dimension absent from the exponent. The law becomes an algorithm. KORE (Kolmogorov-optimal Order-aware Resolution Estimation) fits two pilot resolutions, solves a leverage-calibrated 2x2 system for the bias and noise scales, and evaluates the closed-form plug-in resolution with a tiny leave-one-out certificate: about a dozen fits instead of a full grid sweep, with a consistency guarantee as the sample grows. Across additive and sparse pairwise targets up to 80 input dimensions, KORE matches exhaustive 3-fold cross-validation and the full classical ladder (GCV, Mallows' Cp, AIC, BIC) while fitting roughly 8x fewer models; on 36 real tabular datasets it ranks first among 21 methods in accuracy per unit of compute, ahead of tuned boosters and kernel machines. When complexity lives in low interaction order, solving for the resolution beats searching for it.

</details>


### [257] [An Empirical Study of OpenPangu Quantization on Ascend NPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21257)
*Tong Shi,Jiacheng Wang,Hui Xie,Ying Li,Aishan Liu,Jinyang Guo,Xianglong Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了OpenPangu 1B和7B模型在华为昇腾910B1 NPU上采用多种后训练量化方法（RTN、GPTQ、AWQ、SmoothQuant等）的性能表现，发现8-bit权重量化几乎无损，4-bit对7B模型可行但对1B模型有害，超低精度（2-bit、binary、W4A4）仍面临严重挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OpenPangu模型是私有和本地大语言模型部署的热门目标，但其在昇腾NPU上的激进后训练量化鲁棒性尚未被系统刻画，现有研究缺乏针对NPU平台的量化精度地图。

Method: 在华为Ascend 910B1 NPU上对OpenPangu 1B和7B模型进行受控实证研究，采用统一的校准与评估协议，测试了7种代表性后训练量化方法（纯权重量化与权重-激活量化），涵盖18个评估任务。

Result: 8-bit权重量化对两个模型均无损；4-bit对7B模型实用但对1B模型在推理、数学和代码任务上损伤明显；2-bit和二值量化几乎退化为随机行为；W4A4 SmoothQuant产生非有限困惑度。

Conclusion: 提供了面向NPU的OpenPangu量化设置精度地图，强调了极端低位压缩仍存在持续性困难。

Abstract: OpenPangu models are attractive targets for private and domestic large-language-model deployment, yet their robustness under aggressive post-training quantization on Ascend NPUs has not been systematically characterized. This paper conducts a controlled empirical study of OpenPangu 1B and 7B models on Huawei Ascend 910B1 NPUs. We evaluate representative weight-only and weight-activation post-training quantization methods, including RTN, GPTQ, AWQ, SmoothQuant, GPTAQ, BiLLM, and SliM-LLM, under a unified calibration and evaluation protocol. Across 18 evaluation tasks, we find that 8-bit weight-only quantization is effectively lossless for both models, while 4-bit quantization remains practical for the 7B model but is visibly more harmful for the 1B model on reasoning, math, and code tasks. Ultra-low precision remains challenging: most 2-bit and binary settings collapse to near-random behavior, and W4A4 SmoothQuant produces non-finite perplexity in our evaluation. These results provide an NPU-oriented accuracy map for selecting OpenPangu quantization settings and highlight the persistent difficulty of extreme low-bit compression.

</details>


### [258] [Convergence of Gradient Descent for General Neural Network Architectures Beyond the NTK Regime](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23364)
*Yuqing Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个统一的收敛性分析框架，用于研究梯度下降在广义神经网络架构（包括预归一化多层Transformer）上的训练动态，证明在温和假设下GD几乎必然收敛到驻点邻域，并揭示了学习率与深度及有效瓶颈维度而非最大宽度相关的缩放规律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练动态是理解神经网络的核心，但其理论分析即使在简单架构上也十分困难，对于现代通用架构则更具挑战性。现有NTK理论框架的适用范围有限，亟需一个更广泛的理论框架来刻画GD在不同网络架构下的收敛行为。

Method: 在"网络块"层面构建框架，覆盖预归一化多层Transformer等架构。通过解析性和测度零论证建立依赖于迭代的PL型不等式，利用多项式广义光滑性和局部松弛耗散条件证明GD轨迹上的Lipschitz光滑性，从而证明几乎所有初始化下GD以常规学习率收敛到驻点邻域。

Result: 1) 证明了在几乎所有初始化下GD收敛到驻点邻域；2) 揭示了学习率缩放规律取决于深度和有效瓶颈维度，而非最大宽度；3) 推导了残差连接和函数组合的结构非退化含义；4) 提供了框架内全局极小化器的通用特征刻画。

Conclusion: 该框架突破了NTK理论的限制，适用于更广泛的神经网络架构（包括现代Transformer），为理解深度学习训练动态提供了新的理论工具，并对实际中学习率的选择和架构设计具有指导意义。

Abstract: Training dynamics is central to understanding neural networks, yet its theoretical analysis remains difficult even for simple architectures and becomes substantially more challenging for general modern architectures. In this paper, we propose a convergence framework for analyzing gradient descent (GD) dynamics under a broad family of neural network architectures and datasets beyond the neural tangent kernel (NTK) regime. The framework is formulated at the level of network blocks and covers architectures including pre-normalized multi-layer transformers. More precisely, under mild assumptions, we prove that for almost all initializations, GD with regular learning rates converges to the neighbourhood of a stationary point. This is mainly proved by establishing an iterate-dependent PL-type inequality through analyticity and measure-zero arguments, and by proving Lipschitz smoothness along the GD trajectory through polynomial generalized smoothness and a local relaxed dissipative condition. We further interpret the theorem under Xavier initialization and practical architectural scaling, showing that the learning rate scale depends on the depth and effective bottleneck dimensions rather than the largest width. Finally, we derive structural nondegeneracy implications for residual connections and function composition, and provide a generic characterization of global minimizers within our framework.

</details>


### [259] [Learning Process Rewards via Success Visitation Matching for Efficient RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23640)
*Raymond Tsao,Andrew Wagenmaker,Sergey Levine*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出通过训练判别器区分成功/失败轨迹，将稀疏结果奖励转化为密集过程奖励，以加速强化学习在机器人操控任务中的微调，实验证明该方法在仿真和真实环境中均显著优于直接最大化稀疏奖励。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多现代强化学习应用中，任务的自然奖励是稀疏的（仅任务完成时+1，其余为0），导致信用分配困难，训练缓慢或无效。需要一种方法将稀疏奖励转化为密集奖励以加速学习。

Method: 训练一个判别器来区分成功和失败的轨迹，利用该判别器鼓励策略匹配成功轨迹的状态-动作访问分布，同时避免失败轨迹的访问分布。这种奖励基于所有状态的访问情况，而不仅仅是任务完成状态，从而提供密集的反馈信号。

Result: 在仿真和真实世界的机器人操控任务微调中，该方法显著快于直接最大化稀疏结果奖励的方法。

Conclusion: 所提出的方法能有效将稀疏结果奖励转化为密集过程奖励，在不改变最优策略的前提下加速强化学习，并在机器人控制任务中验证了有效性。

Abstract: In many modern applications of reinforcement learning (RL), the natural reward for a task of interest is inherently sparse: a reward of 0 is given everywhere except when the task is completed, when a reward of +1 is given. Training a policy to maximize such a sparse reward requires solving a challenging credit assignment problem, leading to slow or ineffective RL improvement. We propose a simple approach to transform a sparse outcome reward into a dense process reward. Our approach relies on training a discriminator to distinguish between previous successful and unsuccessful episodes, and using this discriminator to incentivize the RL-learned policy to match the state-action visitations of successful episodes, while avoiding those of unsuccessful episodes. By incentivizing the policy to match the visitations over all states, not just those that correspond to task success, this reward provides dense feedback on whether progress is being made towards task completion, and, we show, provably achieves this without changing the optimal policy. Focusing on finetuning of robotic control policies, we demonstrate that our approach leads to significantly faster RL finetuning performance on both simulated and real-world manipulation tasks, as compared to simply maximizing the sparse outcome reward.

</details>


### [260] [Reward-free Pretraining for Reinforcement Learning via Occupancy Coverage Maximization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21271)
*Marco Pratticò,Pietro Novelli,Massimiliano Pontil,Carlo Ciliberto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ROVER方法，通过最大化状态占用量熵来预训练可迁移的探索策略，使智能体能在下游任务中快速适应稀疏奖励，无需在预训练阶段评估奖励信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有内在奖励方法在预训练阶段需要评估外部稀疏奖励（在线或离线重标定），这在多任务、元学习和持续强化学习中难以实现，因为这些场景下的智能体交互通常是免奖励的。

Method: ROVER通过最大化状态占用量（occupancy measure）的熵来实现状态空间覆盖；利用基于算子形式化RL的学习可解析世界模型来估计占用量，避免密度和熵估计的常见困难；并引入虚拟"汇"状态来平衡已知状态的覆盖与未知区域的探索，防止循环性扩展-坍塌行为。

Result: 在表格型和像素级稀疏导航任务中，ROVER相比标准免奖励基线方法产生了更均匀的聚合覆盖，并为下游任务提供了更强的初始化策略。

Conclusion: ROVER成功实现了在无奖励信号情况下预训练可迁移的探索策略，有效解决了稀疏奖励场景下多任务学习中的关键瓶颈。

Abstract: Sparse rewards pose a central challenge in reinforcement learning, since agents receive no informative signal until they reach their goal. Intrinsic-reward methods address this issue by optimizing non-stationary objectives such as novelty, prediction error, or skill diversity, thereby injecting a supervision signal into the problem. While effective, these methods often require that the extrinsic (sparse) reward can be evaluated -- either online or during offline relabeling of the stored transitions. This limitation is particularly vexing for multi-task, meta-, and continual reinforcement learning, where agents' interactions with the environment are usually reward-free. In this work, we present a method to pre-train transferable exploration policies that rapidly adapt to sparse rewards at downstream task time. Our objective maximizes state-space covering for the occupancy measure, and can be framed in terms of entropy maximization. Its algorithmic implementation, ROVER, leverages recent advances on the operatorial formulation of RL to estimate occupancy with a learned resolvent world model, bypassing common hurdles associated with density and entropy estimation. ROVER further introduces a virtual "sink" state for unexplored regions, balancing coverage of known states with expansion into unseen ones and preventing cyclic expansion-collapse behavior during learning. In tabular and pixel-based sparse navigation tasks, ROVER produces more uniform aggregate coverage and stronger initializations for downstream tasks than standard reward-free baselines.

</details>


### [261] [Open Problem: Is AdamW Effective Under Heavy-Tailed Noise?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23676)
*Dingzhi Yu,Hongyi Tao,Yuanyu Wan,Luo Luo,Lijun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个开放问题：在重尾噪声条件下AdamW能否收敛？通过构建加权度量基准和走廊下界机制，证明分母记忆可能隐藏大梯度，从而阻碍收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AdamW理论主要局限于有限方差情形，但LLM预训练中的随机梯度噪声实际呈现重尾分布，缺乏严格收敛理论。

Method: 提出开放问题形式化描述，证明正加权度量基准，并设计走廊下界机制来展示分母记忆如何隐藏大梯度。

Result: 证明了在加权度量下存在正基准，并揭示分母记忆机制可能成为收敛障碍。

Conclusion: AdamW在重尾噪声下的收敛性仍是一个开放问题，分母记忆机制是其潜在障碍。

Abstract: AdamW is the de facto optimizer for training large language models (LLMs), yet the theory behind it still lives mostly in finite-variance regimes. This is increasingly unsatisfying, as empirical evidence indicates that stochastic gradient noise in LLM pretraining is typically heavy-tailed. Recent work shows that sign-based optimizers such as Lion and Muon achieve sharp heavy-tailed rates, and that AdaGrad can also converge under heavy-tailed noise. However, no rigorous convergence theory for AdamW has yet been established in this regime. Can AdamW converge under the same heavy-tailed assumptions, or does its second-moment accumulator create a genuine obstruction? We formulate this as an open problem, prove a positive weighted-metric benchmark, and give a corridor lower-bound mechanism showing how denominator memory can hide large gradients.

</details>


### [262] [Reconstructing Randomly Masked Spectra Helps DNNs Identify Discriminant Wavenumbers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21289)
*Yingying Wu,Jinchao Liu,Yan Wang,Stuart Gibson,Margarita Osadchy,Yongchun Fang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于任务增强的数据增强网络（TeaNet），通过掩码重建模块生成增强样本，解决振动光谱数据稀缺下的少样本分类问题，在合成和真实数据集上均优于CNN方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 振动光谱检测在工业、制药、国防等领域至关重要，但不同于图像、文本等拥有大量标注数据，振动光谱数据非常有限，现有的迁移学习和元学习难以有效解决这一问题。

Method: 提出TeaNet，核心是重建模块：对随机掩码的光谱进行重建，生成与原始样本相似但包含领域额外变化的增强样本，用于训练分类模型。重建和预测部分通过反向传播端到端联合训练。

Result: 在合成数据集最难场景下，TeaNet相比CNN准确率提升17%。神经元响应可视化分析表明，TeaNet在识别判别波数方面优于CNN。

Conclusion: TeaNet方法具有通用性，可轻松迁移至其他领域，为更准确且可解释的少样本学习提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Nondestructive detection methods, based on vibrational spectroscopy, are vitally important in a wide range of applications including industrial chemistry, pharmacy and national defense. Recently, deep learning has been introduced into vibrational spectroscopy showing great potential. Different from images, text, etc. that offer large labeled data sets, vibrational spectroscopic data is very limited, which requires novel concepts beyond transfer and meta learning. To tackle this, we propose a task-enhanced augmentation network (TeaNet). The key component of TeaNet is a reconstruction module that inputs randomly masked spectra and outputs reconstructed samples that are similar to the original ones, but include additional variations learned from the domain. These augmented samples are used to train the classification model. The reconstruction and prediction parts are trained simultaneously, end-to-end with back-propagation. Results on both synthetic and real-world datasets verified the superiority of the proposed method. In the most difficult synthetic scenarios TeaNet outperformed CNN by 17%. We visualized and analysed the neuron responses of TeaNet and CNN, and found that TeaNet's ability to identify discriminant wavenumbers was excellent compared to CNN. Our approach is general and can be easily adapted to other domains, offering a solution to more accurate and interpretable few-shot learning.

</details>


### [263] [Muown Implicitly Performs Angular Step-size Decay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23637)
*Florian Hübler,Kai Lion,Antonio Orvieto,Niao He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AngularMuown优化器，将Muown中的方向更新显式化为黎曼流形上的步长，实现角步长与径向幅度更新的解耦，在多个规模模型上取得优于Muown的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muown优化器在预训练Transformer中表现优异，但其方向更新的几何意义不明确，步长稳定性原因未得到解释。本文旨在揭示Muown方向更新的黎曼几何本质，并据此设计更直接、可调参的优化方法。

Method: 将Muown中未归一化的方向变量更新等价为归一化方向上的黎曼步长，发现参数化的幅度仅调节角步长大小。基于此，提出AngularMuown，直接优化归一化方向，将角步长作为独立可调超参数，与径向幅度更新解耦。

Result: AngularMuown在modded nanoGPT速度竞赛中领先每个优化器类别；在Qwen2-0.5B和1.1B MoE模型上的实验验证了算法可扩展到更大规模。

Conclusion: 显式化角步长并解耦径向更新能提升优化器性能与稳定性，AngularMuown是一种可扩展、可调参的改进优化器。
