An inverse-share softmax strategy dynamically balances the relative importance of individual loss components during training, eliminating manual penalty tuning and improving gradient stability. This formulation ensures boundary admissibility throughout optimization and enhances convergence efficiency and numerical robustness. Applications to representative elliptic (Poisson), parabolic (Burgers), and hyperbolic (convection with periodic boundaries) problems demonstrate that HSPINN consistently achieves faster convergence, higher accuracy, and greater stability than conventional PINNs, establishing a general and scalable foundation for physics-constrained deep learning across science and technology.

</details>


### [450] [Rethinking Molecular Graph Backdoors under Chemistry-aware Admission](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23361)
*Thinh T. H. Nguyen,Sze Jue Yang,Khoa D. Doan,Chee Seng Chan,Kok-Seng Wong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ChemGuard协议，检验分子记录是否能通过真实化学学习管道的入学检查（解析、清洗、规范化、图-字符串一致性验证），发现许多基于图的GNN后门攻击因化学无效或表示不一致而失效。进而提出ChemBack攻击，通过构建化学可行的基序-锚点附着并基于Tanimoto相似度排序，实现无需模型访问的高成功率后门攻击，揭示化学感知的入学检查虽可抑制图后门，但化学有效且目标对齐的后门仍是实际威胁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分子图神经网络后门攻击基于抽象图编辑评估，忽略了真实分子学习管线中必须先通过解析、清洗、规范化和一致性检查等入学阶段的事实，导致攻击评估脱离实际。

Method: 1) 提出ChemGuard协议，要求分子字符串可清洗且由该字符串重构的图与提交分子图匹配；2) 提出ChemBack攻击，构建化学可行的基序-锚点附着，利用分子指纹Tanimoto相似度排序候选毒物，无需模型访问。

Result: ChemBack在多个分子基准、验证器、架构和防御下实现了高攻击成功率，且毒物完全通过入学检查，同时保持干净准确率。

Conclusion: 化学感知的入学检查能抑制大量基于图的后门攻击，但化学有效且目标对齐的分子后门仍是实际威胁，揭示了两面对照的教训。

Abstract: Backdoor attacks on molecular graph neural networks (GNNs) are typically evaluated as abstract graph edits, but real molecular learning pipelines do not train on arbitrary graphs. Molecular records must first survive parsing, sanitization, canonicalization, and graph-string consistency checks. We formalize this overlooked admission stage as ChemGuard, an operational protocol for testing whether a submitted molecular record can enter a realistic learning pipeline, while complementing existing defenses. ChemGuard admits a record only when its molecular string is sanitizable and the graph reconstructed from that string matches the submitted molecular graph. Under this operational view, many existing graph-based backdoors lose much of their apparent efficacy because their poisons are chemically invalid or representation-inconsistent. We then show that admission checks alone are insufficient to rule out molecular backdoors. We propose ChemBack, an admission-aware molecular backdoor attack that constructs chemically feasible motif-anchor attachments and ranks admitted candidates by fingerprint-based Tanimoto similarity to clean target-class molecules. ChemBack is model-free during trigger selection, using molecular structures, target labels, fingerprints, and public validity checks, but no victim model, surrogate GNN, learned embedding, gradient, logit, or training-code access. Across molecular benchmarks, validators, architectures, and defenses, \textbf{ChemBack} achieves high attack success with fully admitted poisons while preserving clean accuracy. Our results reveal a two-sided lesson, chemistry-aware admission suppresses many graph-only backdoors, yet chemically valid and target-aligned molecular backdoors remain a practical threat.

</details>


### [451] [Distribution-Aware Diffusion-LLM for Robust Ultra-Long-Term Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23391)
*Falguni Ghosh,Vahid Hashemi,Bernhard Kainz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Diffusion-LLM框架，将条件扩散模型集成到LLM时间序列预测流程中，解决模态对齐和概率建模问题，在六个长时预测基准上超越现有LLM基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在处理多模态时间序列数据时存在两个问题：(1) 缺乏对非文本数据的校准概率建模；(2) 难以对齐异构表示。现有LLM虽擅长长上下文学习，但直接应用于时间序列预测时表现不佳。

Method: 提出Diffusion-LLM框架，将条件扩散模型集成到基于LLM的预测流程中，通过在共享潜空间中学习未来数据的条件分布并改进语义对齐，实现联合设计。

Result: 在ETT、Weather、ECL等六个长时预测基准上，Diffusion-LLM一致优于现有LLM基线，尤其在超长期和少样本预测场景下取得显著提升。

Conclusion: 分布感知的正则化方法能够有效增强时间序列LLM的鲁棒性和泛化能力，证明了将扩散模型与LLM结合用于时间序列预测的有效性。

Abstract: Time series forecasting is a fundamental machine learning task. Recent work has explored Large Language Models (LLMs) for this purpose due to their strong generalization, pattern recognition, and zero-shot or few-shot capabilities. Despite their suitability for long-context learning, LLMs face challenges in multimodal settings: they lack calibrated probabilistic modeling for non-text data and struggle to align heterogeneous representations. To address these issues, we propose a new framework Diffusion-LLM that integrates a conditional diffusion model into an LLM-based forecasting pipeline. This joint design enables learning the conditional distribution of future data while improving semantic alignment in a shared latent space. We evaluate Diffusion-LLM on six long-term forecasting benchmarks, including ETT, Weather, and ECL. Our method consistently outperforms existing LLM-based baseline, achieving notable gains in ultra-long-term and few-shot forecasting and demonstrating the value of distribution-aware regularization for enhancing robustness and generalization in time series LLMs.

</details>


### [452] [Physics-Informed Modeling for Wood Thermal Analysis and Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23402)
*Jingren Xie,Alex John Buckthal,Ryan Anthony O'Connor,Isak Worre Foged,Dim P. Papadopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出两种物理信息深度学习框架（PICNN和PInteCNN），通过嵌入热传导偏微分方程来预测木材RGB图像对应的热响应，在三个真实木材数据集上验证了该方法在预测精度、物理可解释性和种内多样性方面优于纯数据驱动方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 木材材料具有复杂、空间变化的熱性质，传统建筑假设材料均匀性不成立；数据驱动方法虽可直接映射RGB图像到热响应，但作为黑箱模型优先考虑统计相关性，可能吸收实验噪声而非热力学合理性。

Method: 提出两种物理信息深度学习框架：1）PICNN（物理信息卷积神经网络）：将物理规律作为软惩罚项嵌入损失函数；2）PInteCNN（物理集成卷积神经网络）：将分析近似-预测-校正求解器硬编码到CNN中。两者均基于二维稳态热传导偏微分方程约束。

Result: 在Poplar、Grandis-CC和Grandis-RC三个真实木材多模态数据集上验证，嵌入物理归纳偏置的方法在预测精度、物理可解释性和种内多样性处理上均优于纯数据驱动方法，能提取可解释的物理参数。

Conclusion: 物理信息深度学习能有效平衡预测精度与物理可解释性，在处理复杂木材材料异质性方面具有优势，可提取有意义的物理参数。

Abstract: Wood materials exhibit complex, spatially varying thermal properties that challenge traditional architectural assumptions of material homogeneity. Although data-driven approaches can directly map wood RGB images to their corresponding thermal responses, they operate as uninterpretable black boxes that prioritize statistical correlation and may absorb experimental noise rather than thermodynamic plausibility. To address these limitations, we present physics-informed deep learning frameworks that integrate partial differential equations (PDEs) to predict pixel-level thermal responses of spatially heterogeneous wood materials using wood RGB images and testbed temperature maps. Specifically, we investigate two distinct approaches to enforcing a normalized 2D steady-state heat transfer equation derived from the general heat transfer equation: Physics-Informed Convolutional Neural Networks (PICNNs), which embed physics as a soft penalty term in the loss function, and Physics-Integrated Convolutional Neural Networks (PInteCNNs), which hard-code an analytical approximator-predictor-corrector solver directly into convolutional neural networks. To validate our proposed approaches, we collect three real-world multimodal datasets of Poplar, Grandis Cross-Cut (Grandis-CC), and Grandis Radial-Cut (Grandis-RC) wood samples. We further demonstrate that embedding physical inductive biases successfully balances predictive accuracy, physical interpretability, and intra-species diversity, outperforming data-driven approaches in handling complex wood material heterogeneity and enabling the extraction of interpretable physical parameters. Project: https://zekifayes.github.io/pim

</details>


### [453] [HyperQuant: A Rate-Distortion-Optimal Quantization Pipeline for Large Language and Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23406)
*Yuval Domb,Hadar Sackstein,Tomer Solberg*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HyperQuant是一个统一的训练后量化流程，结合了随机Hadamard变换、最优格点量化、无损位剥离与Rice编码、以及KV缓存偏置校正，在权重和KV缓存量化上优于现有方法，可达近无损压缩比约3.9x（权重）和3.79x（KV缓存）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型和扩散Transformer的权重与KV缓存占用巨大显存，现有量化方案（如HIGGS、TurboQuant、OCTOPUS）在极低比特率下仍存在精度损失或压缩率不足的问题，需要一种统一的、接近无损的高效量化方案。

Method: HyperQuant结合四项技术：(i) 分块随机Hadamard变换使数据分布近似高斯；(ii) 量化到低维最优格点（E8/D4/A2/Z）；(iii) 对格点索引进行无损位剥离和接近熵最优的变长Rice编码；(iv) KV缓存的偏置校正方法保证内积无偏。同时集成fp8/int8/nvfp4/mxfp4的Tensor-Core路径。

Result: 在权重量化上全面优于HIGGS（3-5 bps），KV量化上优于TurboQuant和OCTOPUS（低至1.7 bps）；19B参数LTX-2 DiT视频模型量化后无可见帧级伪影；H100上4 bps时压缩权重~3.9x、KV缓存~3.79x，质量接近无损。

Conclusion: HyperQuant通过巧妙组合四种已知技术，实现了当前最优的权重和KV缓存统一量化，兼具高压缩率与近无损质量，并发现int8在RHT后格点输出上优于fp8。

Abstract: We present HyperQuant (Hadamard, optimallY Packing, Entropy Rice-coding), a unified post-training quantization pipeline for the weights and the KV cache of large language and diffusion transformers. Across a suite of self-contained experiments (Table 1), HyperQuant outperforms the recent HIGGS scheme at every operating point from 3 to 5 bits per scalar (bps) on weights, and beats both TurboQuant and OCTOPUS on KV quantization down to 1.7 bps. Beyond the LLM setting, HyperQuant quantizes the 19B-parameter LTX-2 DiT video model with no observable per-frame artifacts. End-to-end on an H100 at 4 bps, HyperQuant compresses the linear weights ~3.9x and the KV cache ~3.79x at near-lossless quality.
  HyperQuant combines four known ideas into a single construction: (i) a per-tile Randomized Hadamard Transform that makes the per-coordinate distribution of weights and activations approximately Gaussian; (ii) quantization to a low-dimensional optimal lattice (E8, D4, A2, or Z); (iii) lossless bit-stripping and near-entropy-optimal variable-length Rice coding of the lattice indices; and (iv) bias-correction methods for the KV cache that keep the reconstruction unbiased under inner products, preserving attention semantics. We further integrate the pipeline with 8-bit and 4-bit Tensor-Core MMA paths (fp8-e4m3, int8, nvfp4, mxfp4), and find that int8 beats fp8 on the post-RHT lattice output. Project page: https://moonmath.ai/hyperquant/

</details>


### [454] [Differential Spectral Damping Gap Adaptive Regularization for Ill-Conditioned Kernel Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23407)
*Praveg Vashishtha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对核方法矩阵求逆时特征值指数衰减导致的病态问题，提出微分谱阻尼（DSD）方法，基于Davis-Kahan定理对特征向量按谱间隙自适应惩罚，在LSTSVM分类任务上相比Tikhonov正则化提升最高+10.4个百分点，并在高扰动噪声下表现持平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 核方法（尤其是LSTSVM）的核矩阵存在特征值指数衰减，导致系统矩阵严重病态。标准Tikhonov正则化对所有特征方向施加均匀惩罚，未考虑不同特征向量的可靠性差异。

Method: 提出微分谱阻尼（DSD），基于Davis-Kahan sin(Θ)定理设计可靠性感知的阻尼函数。保留大谱间隙（可靠）的特征向量，抑制小谱间隙（方向已不可恢复）的特征向量，并选择指数形式以确保平滑性、可微性和自然饱和特性。

Result: 在LSTSVM分类上：GINA数据集（d=970）提升+4.8个百分点（Cohen's d=4.49, p<0.0001）；d=200时提升+10.4个百分点；Madelon（d=500）提升+2.6个百分点。预图像重建任务中，在高扰动噪声（p=0.99）下与Tikhonov持平，低噪声略逊；两者均将朴素求逆误差降低66倍。

Conclusion: DSD在病态核矩阵场景（d≥100，条件数>10³）中显著优于均匀正则化；在低维或良性条件数下简单方法已足够。为实践者提供了清晰的适用条件。

Abstract: Kernel methods requiring matrix inversion -- particularly Least-Squares Twin Support Vector Machines (LSTSVM) -- suffer from exponential eigenvalue decay in their system matrices, producing severely ill-conditioned problems where standard Tikhonov regularization applies uniform damping regardless of eigenvector reliability. We propose Differential Spectral Damping (DSD), a regularization formula that adapts its penalty to localized eigengap structure: preserving eigenvectors with large spectral gaps (reliable per Davis-Kahan perturbation theory) while aggressively suppressing those with small gaps (directionally corrupted beyond recovery). We motivate DSD through a principled design procedure grounded in the Davis-Kahan $\sin(Θ)$ theorem, systematically deriving the requirements for a reliability-aware damping function and selecting the exponential form for its smoothness, differentiability, and natural saturation properties. Through rigorous paired testing with fairly optimized baselines (including gradient-optimized Tikhonov receiving equal optimization opportunity), we demonstrate that DSD improves LSTSVM classification accuracy by +4.8 percentage points on real-world GINA ($d=970$, Cohen's $d = 4.49$, $p < 0.0001$), +10.4 percentage points at $d=200$, and +2.6 percentage points on Madelon ($d=500$) -- all using only principled spectral initialization while Tikhonov receives grid search. For pre-image reconstruction on manifold data, DSD ties Tikhonov at high perturbation noise ($p=0.99$) but slightly underperforms at lower noise levels; both reduce naive inversion error by $66\times$. We characterize the precise operating regime ($d \geq 100$, condition number $> 10^3$) and document where simpler methods suffice, providing practitioners with clear deployment guidance.

</details>


### [455] [Leveraging Similarities in Multi-Armed Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23414)
*Khaled Eldowa,Thibaud Rahier,Augustin Cablant,Panayotis Mertikopoulos,Pierre Gaillard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究具有相似性结构动作集的在线学习问题，证明了单点反馈无法利用动作相似性，并提出了能适应多种丰富反馈模型（如半反馈、两点反馈）的统一算法，实现了以相似性感知的有效动作数替代原始动作数的遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线学习/赌博机问题中，动作间存在自然相似性（如共享潜在特征、标签或层级结构），但传统方法未能充分利用这种结构信息来降低遗憾界。

Method: 首先证明了即使面对非常强的相似性约束，单点赌博机反馈也无法利用树结构相似性的不可能性定理；然后设计了一组统一算法，适用于从半反馈到多点反馈（包括最小两点反馈）的丰富反馈模型，实现了"两全其美"的遗憾保证。

Result: 所提出算法能够将原始动作数K替换为相似性感知的有效动作数K_eff，从而在两点反馈下，对d≤2的Lipschitz赌博机实现了√T遗憾界。

Conclusion: 动作相似性的有效利用高度依赖于反馈模型的丰富程度：单点反馈无法利用相似性，但通过更强的反馈（如两点反馈）可以显著利用结构相似性提升学习效率。

Abstract: In many online learning and bandit problems, the actions we consider possess inherent similarities--for instance because they share latent traits, tags, or hierarchical structure. We study online learning with a similarity-structured action set, encoded by a rooted tree whose leaves are the actions and whose levels quantify how closely two actions are related. The loss sequence is assumed tree-compatible: losses of similar actions are constrained to be close. We establish an impossibility result showing that usual one-point bandit feedback cannot, in general, leverage range or tree-induced similarity, even under very strong similarity constraints. We then provide a unified set of algorithms which adapt to a wide range of richer feedback models, from semi-bandit feedback down to multi-point bandit protocols, including the minimal two-point feedback setting. We show these algorithms exhibit best-of-both-worlds guarantees and provably exploit action similarities by replacing the number of actions $K$ by a similarity-aware effective number of actions $K_{\mathrm{eff}}$ in the regret bounds. As an application, we show that under two-point feedback, it is possible to achieve $\sqrt{T}$ regret in Lipschitz bandits when $d \leq 2$.

</details>


### [456] [GRINQH: Graded Input-based Quantization Hierarchy for Efficient LLM Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23419)
*Jette Oberländer,Jan Finkbeiner,Catherine M. Schöfmann,Emre Neftci*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GRINQH是一种权重后训练量化框架，通过结合量化与稀疏化，利用激活幅度动态分配权重通道精度级别，从而加速LLM解码阶段，在Llama3和Qwen3上优于SOTA方法，甚至支持2bit生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量化方法将推理视为均匀过程，未区分计算密集的prefill阶段和内存密集的decoding阶段的非对称性，导致在边缘计算场景下的内存带宽瓶颈问题未被有效解决。

Method: 提出GRINQH框架：将激活幅度作为计算重要性的代理指标，动态分配权重通道到不同精度级别（支持灵活的平均比特宽度），并在自定义GPU内核中使用层次化嵌套内存布局实现多精度存储。

Result: 在Llama3和Qwen3上，3-bit和4-bit设置下优于固定精度和混合精度基线，甚至可实现有效的2bit生成，并通过实验验证了理论加速比。

Conclusion: GRINQH建立了LLM生成的新SOTA帕累托前沿，实现了生成质量与推理速度之间的动态权衡。

Abstract: Autoregressive decoding with LLMs is primarily bottlenecked by GPU memory bandwidth, especially in edge-computing settings. While quantization is essential for mitigating this bottleneck, most existing methods treat inference as a uniform process and fail to account for the asymmetry between the compute-bound prefill stage and the memory-bound decoding stage. We propose GRINQH (GRaded INput-based Quantization Hierarchy), a weight-only post-training quantization framework that accelerates decoding by unifying quantization and sparsification. GRINQH leverages activation magnitudes as a proxy for computational importance to dynamically assign weight channels to different precision levels, enabling flexible average bit widths during decoding. Evaluated on Llama3 and Qwen3 models, GRINQH outperforms state-of-the-art fixed- and mixed-precision baselines at comparable 3- and 4-bit settings, even enabling effective 2-bit generation. We experimentally verify theoretical speedups by leveraging a hierarchical nested memory layout for multi-precision storage in a custom GPU kernel. Ultimately, GRINQH establishes a new state-of-the-art Pareto frontier for LLM generation, enabling a dynamic trade-off between generation quality and inference speed.

</details>


### [457] [Interpretable Kolmogorov-Arnold Network with Feature-Isolated Temporal Attention Mechanism for Electricity Load Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23425)
*Jinhao Li,Hao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LoadKAN，一种结合特征隔离时间注意力机制与KAN模块的混合可解释电力负荷预测框架，在保持高预测性能的同时实现可解释性，并通过对六种人类移动模式与电力负荷之间非线性关系的定量分析，揭示了复杂且市场特定的依赖关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习黑箱模型在电力负荷预测中缺乏可解释性，而KAN虽具可解释潜力但直接应用于时序预测存在困难，简单集成也无法充分利用其优势。

Method: 设计特征隔离时间注意力机制（独立提取各输入特征的时间动态信息），并将其与KAN模块协同组合，形成混合可解释框架LoadKAN。

Result: 在美国三个代表性电力市场数据集上，LoadKAN与经过精细调优的最先进黑箱模型相比保持高度竞争力，并通过KAN学习到的激活函数实现了对移动模式与电力负荷之间非线性关系的定量敏感性分析。

Conclusion: LoadKAN在保持高预测性能的同时实现了可解释性，能够揭示被黑箱模型掩盖的市场特定依赖关系，为电力系统负荷预测提供了新的可解释分析工具。

Abstract: Accurate electricity load forecasting is a crucial prerequisite for stable power system operations. While prevalent deep learning models present competitive performance, they often operate as black boxes and lack interpretability. While the Kolmogorov-Arnold network (KAN) has emerged as a promising alternative because of its learnable activation function design, its direct application to time-series forecasting faces challenges in modeling complex temporal data patterns. Also, simple integration into existing architectures, such as serving as replacement of neural modules, cannot fully leverage KAN's interpretability strengths. To address these gaps, this study develops LoadKAN, a novel hybrid and interpretable framework for load forecasting that synergistically combines a specifically-designed feature-isolated temporal attention mechanism with a KAN module. The attention stage aims to extract temporal dynamics from each input feature independently, such as historical load and human mobility, providing distilled feature representations to the KAN module for interpretable predictions. When evaluated on datasets from three representative U.S. electricity markets, our LoadKAN remains highly competitive when compared to extensively-tuned, state-of-the-art, black-box deep learning benchmarks. More importantly, LoadKAN's interpretability enables a granular analysis of the learned non-linear relationships between six distinct mobility patterns and electricity load. Through KAN-learned activation functions, our quantitative sensitivity analyses on mobility features reveal complex and market-specific dependencies. These findings further demonstrate the ability of our LoadKAN to generate insights often obscured by opaque black-box neural forecasting models.

</details>


### [458] [What Does a Chemical Language Model Know About Molecules?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23443)
*Christian Kenneth,Etowah Adams,Liam Bai,Gerard JP van Westen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过稀疏自编码器（SAEs）分析MolFormer模型，揭示了化学语言模型（cLMs）不仅学习表面语法模式，还能在后续层中编码原子-子结构及药理学相关特征，并发现非规范SMILES比无效SMILES更破坏表征，最后开发了交互式可视化工具InterMol。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究化学语言模型是否仅学习表面语法模式，还是真正学习有意义的分子语义表征，并理解其内部工作机制。

Method: 将稀疏自编码器（SAEs）应用于编码器型化学语言模型MolFormer，逐层分析分子表征的构建过程；通过对比规范/非规范/无效SMILES的表征变化，研究不同输入的破坏模式；开发InterMol可视化工具。

Result: 早期层依赖位置跟踪潜在变量解析分子语法，后期层编码原子-子结构和药理学相关特征；非规范SMILES比无效SMILES产生更严重的表征偏移，且由位置潜在变量的干扰逐层传播导致。

Conclusion: cLMs并非仅学习表面模式，而是能构建层次化的结构-语义表征；非规范SMILES的破坏性更强，提示输入规范化的重要性；InterMol工具可支持后续可解释性研究。

Abstract: Chemical language models (cLMs) are widely assumed to learn surface-level syntactic patterns rather than learning meaningful molecular semantics. Here, we apply sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to MolFormer, an encoder-only cLM, to mechanistically examine how molecular representations are built across layers. We discover that early layers rely on position-tracking latents to parse molecular grammar, while later layers encode atom-in-substructure and pharmacologically relevant features. Additionally, we show that non-canonical SMILES produce more disruptive representation shifts than invalid SMILES, driven by position-latent disruption propagating across layers. To support further exploration, we develop InterMol, an interactive visualizer for SAE activations on molecular strings and structures.

</details>


### [459] [Selective Time Series Forecasting via Metalearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23448)
*Ricardo Inácio,Vitor Cerqueira,Marília Barandas,Carlos Soares*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种选择性预测框架，通过元学习基于滞后结构特征建模预测误差的经验百分位数，实现跨异构时间序列的拒绝机制迁移，在域内和迁移学习场景中均能通过拒绝高难度样本提升预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习时间序列预测方法精度因样本而异，但拒绝机制在预测领域研究不足；现有策略依赖预测区间宽度或置信度分数等代理指标，这些指标与训练域绑定，泛化能力有限。

Method: 提出选择性预测框架，建模预测误差的经验百分位数（尺度不变统计量），基于元学习从近期滞后值提取的结构特征来驱动拒绝决策，将拒绝决策与预测本身解耦，基于域无关特征实现跨异构时间序列的有效迁移。

Result: 在域内和迁移学习实验中，拒绝被认为具有挑战性的样本后，在各种覆盖率水平下均能持续提升预测精度。

Conclusion: 该框架通过解耦拒绝决策与预测、利用尺度不变统计量和域无关特征，有效解决了现有方法泛化能力不足的问题，实现了跨序列的拒绝机制迁移。

Abstract: Deep learning methods have achieved state-of-the-art in time series forecasting, yet their accuracy varies considerably across samples, as some instances remain inherently difficult to predict. Reject option mechanisms, which allow models to abstain from high-risk predictions, are well established in classification and regression but underexplored in forecasting. Existing abstention strategies typically rely on proxies, such as the width of the prediction interval or learned confidence scores derived from forecasts. However, these approaches are inherently tied to the training domain, limiting their ability to generalize. We propose a selective forecasting framework that addresses this limitation by modeling the empirical percentile of forecasting errors, that is, a scale-invariant statistic, based on structural characteristics extracted from recent lags via metalearning. By decoupling the rejection decision from the forecast itself and grounding it in domain-agnostic features, the framework enables effective abstention transfer across heterogeneous time series. Experiments in both in-domain and transfer learning settings show that rejecting samples predicted as challenging consistently improves forecasting accuracy across coverage levels.

</details>


### [460] [Do Location Encoders Capture Spatial Effects? A GeoShapley Benchmark Across Scales](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23453)
*Daniel Kiv,Shaowen Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文评估GeoShapley能否从位置编码器的嵌入中恢复空间变化系数，使用11种编码器在不同尺度下测试，发现主要系数恢复良好，但次要系数恢复依赖尺度，原始坐标基线始终具有竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 位置编码器将地理坐标转换为高维嵌入用于机器学习，但尚不清楚这些表示能否捕捉可解释的空间效应，因此需要系统性评估。

Method: 使用GeoShapley（博弈论解释器）对11种TorchSpatial框架中的位置编码器进行基准测试，在网格、县、全球三种尺度下，评估从未经训练和对比训练条件下的嵌入中恢复空间变化系数的能力。

Result: 主要系数恢复在所有编码器上一致较好；次要系数恢复依赖尺度，在全球尺度差异最大；原始坐标基线始终具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 位置编码器在恢复主要空间系数方面表现良好，但次要系数的恢复受尺度影响显著，且简单原始坐标基线仍难以被超越。

Abstract: Location encoders transform geographic coordinates into high dimensional embeddings for downstream machine learning, but it is unclear how well these representations capture interpretable spatial effects. We benchmark whether GeoShapley, a game-theoretic explainer that treats all location features as a single joint player, can recover spatially varying coefficients from models built on location-encoder embeddings. Eleven encoders from the TorchSpatial framework are evaluated against a synthetic process with known coefficients, across three scales (grid, county, global), with and without raw coordinates alongside the embedding, and under untrained and contrastively trained conditions. Measuring recovery as the correlation between estimated and true coefficients, we report how it varies with scale and encoder architecture and compare the embeddings against a raw-coordinate baseline. Recovery of the primary coefficient is consistently high across encoders, whereas recovery of a secondary coefficient is more scale-dependent, differing most at the global scale; the raw-coordinate baseline remains competitive throughout.

</details>


### [461] [TROPT: An Open Framework for Unifying and Advancing Discrete Text Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23496)
*Matan Ben-Tov,Mahmood Sharif*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TROPT是一个统一离散文本优化器执行与开发的开源框架，包含30+优化方案、15+优化器和15+损失函数，覆盖越狱攻击、模型探测等多个领域，显著降低了离散文本优化的使用门槛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散文本优化器分散在不同研究代码库中，变种繁多且难以直接对比，导致使用和扩展成本高，阻碍了该领域的采用和进展。

Method: 提出TROPT框架，统一离散优化器的执行接口，支持灵活替换模型、目标和优化器组件，集成30+优化方案、15+优化器和15+损失函数。

Result: 通过大规模对比实验揭示了LLM越狱中有效但被忽视的技术；成功将优化器从LLM越狱领域迁移到语料投毒等新领域。

Conclusion: TROPT显著降低了离散文本优化的采用门槛，为模型红队测试、审计和可解释性研究提供了统一平台。

Abstract: Discrete text-trigger optimization -- searching for text sequences that, when ingested by a model, steer it toward a specified objective -- underpins model red-teaming (e.g., LLM jailbreaks), as well as auditing and interpretability. However, the current state of discrete optimizers hinders their adoption and progress. First, existing optimizers, when open-sourced at all, are scattered across research codebases tied to specific models, objectives, and problem domains. Second, optimizer variants proliferate, each requiring engineering overhead to use or extend, and remaining hard to compare head-to-head. Together, these raise the bar for adopting optimizers in existing or new domains, and for advancing them via new strategies. We address these gaps with TROPT, the first open-source framework that unifies discrete optimizers' execution and standardizes their development under a single interface. TROPT makes it easy to customize end-to-end optimization recipes by swapping any component -- models, objectives, and optimizers -- extending its reach across domains and new applications. TROPT currently ships with 30+ optimization recipes -- covering applications such as jailbreaking and probing model internals -- built from 15+ optimizers (spanning white-box to black-box access) and 15+ losses, from foundational to state-of-the-art methods. Demonstrating its utility, we leverage TROPT in several studies: (i) controlled, large-scale experiments comparing and enhancing optimization strategies for LLM jailbreaks, revealing potent-yet-underadopted techniques; and (ii) porting optimizers from one domain (e.g., LLM jailbreak) to new domains (e.g., corpus-poisoning embedding model). In all, TROPT significantly lowers the barrier to adopting and advancing discrete text optimization.

</details>


### [462] [Simulation-Free Estimation of Traffic Flows from Sparse Count Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23536)
*Davide Guastella,Gianluca Bontempi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种从稀疏聚合车辆计数数据中估计时变交通流模式的方法，通过区域划分、可行路径构建和加权最小二乘优化来分配车辆，并利用加权贡献矩阵指导优化，最终在布鲁塞尔路网验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统交通流估计方法依赖密集传感器数据，成本高昂且覆盖有限。本文旨在利用稀疏聚合的车辆计数数据，以较低成本准确还原时变交通流模式。

Method: 1) 将研究区域划分为空间子区域；2) 构建区域间的可行路径集合；3) 通过加权最小二乘优化求解各路径的车辆分配量；4) 利用加权贡献矩阵编码传感器覆盖信息，引导优化器优先关注传感器可直接观测的流量配置；5) 基于候选路径与传感器时空聚合计数的匹配度，推导出边级轨迹。

Result: 在布鲁塞尔路网的真实与合成交通数据上，该方法能够再现输入数据中的日交通流量曲线，并以更低的计算成本超越基线方法。

Conclusion: 所提方法能够从稀疏聚合数据中有效估计时变交通流，兼具高精度与低计算开销，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: We propose a method for estimating time-varying traffic flow patterns from sparse aggregated vehicle counts. The method partitions the study area into spatial regions, constructs a set of feasible region-to-region routes, and solves a weighted least-squares optimization problem to determine the number of vehicles to allocate on each route. A weighted contribution matrix encodes sensor coverage, steering the optimizer toward flow configurations that are directly observable by sensors. Edge-level trajectories are then derived by scoring candidate routes against the temporal and volumetric profiles of aggregated regional sensor counts.
  The method is evaluated on the Brussels road network using real and synthetic traffic data. Results show that the proposed approach reproduces the daily traffic profile in the input data and outperforms the baseline methods at a fraction of the computational cost.

</details>


### [463] [Scheduling Thoughts: Learning the Order of Thought in Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23567)
*Jiawei Xu,Minghui Liu,Aakriti Agrawal,Yifan Chen,Furong Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Self-Aware Scheduling (SAS)，通过学习最优的掩码解码顺序，将序列解码不匹配的KL散度上界转化为策略优化问题，在Sudoku和数学推理任务上显著提升了生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型的解码顺序（即"思维顺序"）对生成质量影响重大，但现有方法通常基于启发式规则选择解码顺序，缺乏理论指导和优化依据。

Method: 推导了序列解码不匹配的KL散度可处理上界（与模型路径对数似然相关），将该上界转化为有序轨迹上的稠密自感知奖励，从而将顺序选择建模为策略优化问题。SAS使用GRPO学习轻量级顺序策略，可无缝应用于任意顺序和半自回归解码。

Result: 在Sudoku任务上，1B MDM模型的准确率从82.0%（最佳启发式调度）提升至91.8%，结合第二阶段微调达到97.5%。在数学推理任务上，LLaDA-8B在GSM8K上pass@1从64%提升至76%，在MBPP上从39.5%提升至41%。

Conclusion: SAS通过理论驱动的顺序优化，一致超越或匹配各种生成长度和块大小下的启发式调度方案，证明了将解码顺序学习形式化为策略优化问题的有效性和通用性。

Abstract: Masked diffusion language models decode by iteratively unmasking tokens, where the unmasking order defines an "order of thought" that strongly influences generation quality yet is typically chosen heuristically. We derive a tractable upper bound on the sequential decoding mismatch, measured by the Kullback-Leibler divergence and expressed in terms of the model's pathwise log-likelihood, with tightness under sufficient model expressivity. This bound induces a dense self-aware reward over ordered trajectories, casting order selection as a principled policy optimization problem with a frozen denoiser. We instantiate this idea as Self-Aware Scheduling (SAS), which learns a lightweight order policy using Group Relative Policy Optimization and applies seamlessly to both any-order and semi-autoregressive decoding. On Sudoku with 1B MDM, SAS improves puzzle accuracy from 82.0% (best heuristic schedule) to 91.8%, and reaches 97.5% with second-stage fine-tuning along learned trajectories. On mathematical reasoning with LLaDA-8B, SAS improves pass@1 on GSM8K from 64% to 76% and on MBPP from 39.5% to 41%, consistently matching or exceeding heuristic schedules across generation lengths and block sizes. Project page: https://jimmyxu123.github.io/SAS

</details>


### [464] [Patient-Aware Contrastive Learning Preserves Per-Patient Structure in RR-Interval Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23570)
*Yasantha Niroshana,Weijith Wimalasiri,Chathuranga Hettiarachchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种患者感知的对比学习目标，通过在同一患者、同一类别的片段间构建正样本对，保留个体基线模式，从而提升阵发性房颤检测的跨患者泛化能力，在IRIDIA-AF数据集上实现了0.989的AUROC。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生理信号中每个受试者具有独特的基线模式，当类别差异与个体差异重叠时，监督对比学习等类别级目标会将个体结构合并为单一类别簇，去除模型泛化到未见患者所需的个体变异信息。

Method: 提出患者感知对比目标（patient-aware contrastive objective），仅在**同一患者、同一类别**的片段间形成正样本对，既保留每个患者的窦性心律基线，又将两个类别推开。

Result: 该方法在每患者窦性心律结构一致性上达到0.850（SupCon为0.800，BCE为0.772）；在IRIDIA-AF数据集上取得患者独立AUROC为0.989±0.003，且种子方差比监督对比基线低2.6倍。

Conclusion: 跨患者泛化的关键在于**每患者几何一致性**（per-subject geometric consistency），而非全局类别可分离性。

Abstract: Contrastive representation learning struggles on physiological signals when each subject contributes a distinct baseline pattern. If class differences overlap with subject differences,class-level objectives such as supervised contrastive learning tend to merge per-subject structure into a single per-class cluster,removing the individual variation that a model needs to generalize to unseen patients. We study this problem in the setting of Paroxysmal Atrial Fibrillation(PAF) detection from RR-interval(RRI) sequences and propose a patient-aware contrastive objective that forms positive pairs only from same-patient, same-class segments, preserving each patient's own sinus rhythm(SR) baseline while still pushing the two classes apart. Examining the learned embeddings directly, our objective achieves the most consistent per-patient SR structure (cohesion $0.850$ vs. $0.800$ for supervised contrastive loss (SupCon) and $0.772$ for binary cross-entropy (BCE)). We also identify that BCE produces the cleanest global class separation yet the most disordered per-patient structure. This is precisely why a linear probe trained on its features breaks down on unseen patients. On the IRIDIA-AF dataset, the resulting representation reaches a patient-independent Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUROC) of $0.989 \pm 0.003$ with $2.6\times$ lower seed variance than supervised contrastive baselines.These results highlight that per-subject geometric consistency, rather than global class separability, is key to robust cross-patient generalization.

</details>


### [465] [A Spectral Theory of Normalized Corrected GNN Propagation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23572)
*Qihan Chen,Wei Li,Meng Qin,Jianfeng Hou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对归一化修正GNN传播建立了谱理论，证明在CSBM模型下经过O(log n)层传播后仍能精确恢复二分类标签，并给出多类部分恢复定理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究去除度平稳成分后的对称归一化邻接矩阵的谱性质，探讨该修正算子能否在多层传播后保留类别判别性信号，核心动机是解决过平滑问题。

Method: 定义归一化修正GNN传播算子（对称归一化邻接减去度平稳成分），在Contextual随机块模型（CSBM）下进行高概率理论分析，推导精确恢复与部分恢复定理。

Result: 在稠密多对数区域(p≥C log^B n/n, B>4)下，二分类CSBM经O(log n)层传播后实现高概率精确恢复；多类场景下证明大部分节点向类中心收缩的部分恢复定理。

Conclusion: 理论预测了深度、图信号与特征噪声对分类性能的影响，并通过合成与真实节点分类实验验证了理论结果。

Abstract: We develop a spectral theory for \emph{normalized corrected GNN propagation}. The object of study is the symmetric normalized adjacency with its degree-stationary component removed, matching the normalization used by standard GCN-style models while isolating the stationary direction most directly tied to oversmoothing. The central theoretical question is whether this corrected normalized operator preserves class-discriminative signal after many propagation layers. Our main result is a high-probability exact-recovery theorem for the binary Contextual Stochastic Block Model after \(k=O(\log n)\) propagation steps in the dense polylogarithmic regime \(p\ge C\log^B n/n\), for any fixed \(B>4\), under explicit graph-signal and feature-SNR conditions. We also establish a multi-class partial recovery theorem showing contraction toward class centers for most nodes. Synthetic and real node-classification experiments are included as empirical checks of the theory's predicted dependence on depth, graph signal, and feature noise.

</details>


### [466] [It's Much Easier for Neural Networks to learn Game of Life Dynamics with the Right Activation Function: Polynomial Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23587)
*Tashin Ahmed,Q. Tyrell Davis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现使用默认ReLU激活函数的小型神经网络难以学习康威生命游戏，而采用二次多项式等替代激活函数可以显著提升学习效果，挑战了"越大越好"的默认设计思路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究发现能可靠学习生命游戏的神经网络规模与最小可表示网络之间存在巨大差距，作者认为这是由于缺乏合适的归纳偏置，而非网络规模不够。

Method: 系统比较不同激活函数（ReLU、二次多项式等）在小型神经网络上学习康威生命游戏的效果，考察有无权重学习两种情况下的表现。

Result: 二次多项式激活函数在有无权重学习的情况下均能稳定学习生命游戏动态，显著优于默认的ReLU激活函数。

Conclusion: 合适的归纳偏置（如激活函数选择）可以大幅缩小所需网络规模，不应盲目追求大模型；元胞自动机可作为简单有效的测试平台，推动科学机器学习、物理深度学习及可解释机器学习的发展。

Abstract: Previous work has found a gap between the scale of neural networks that reliably learn Conway's Game of Life, and minimal networks capable of representing the classic cellular automaton with hard-coded parameter values. Viewing neural network learning as a search process suggests a dependence on networks large enough to contain sub-networks with lucky initializations (sometimes known as 'winning tickets') that actually learn the task. In this work, we reorient our perspective from discovering Life rules as a search problem back to a learning problem, and reason that with fitting inductive biases, the problem should be much more amenable to minimal networks. We find that network variants with several alternative activation functions meaningfully outperform the default choice of Rectified Linear Units, and in particular, that a 2nd degree polynomial activation function consistently learns Life dynamics with or without the benefit of learning neural weights. Our results provide an informative demonstration of the benefits of matching learning to the task at hand and challenge the easy default choice of scale for all problems. In particular, we advocate for the use of cellular automata as simple test domains for developing strategies that can benefit machine learning for science, physics-based deep learning, and interpretable machine learning.

</details>


### [467] [Quantifying the Agreement Between Data-Influence and Data-Similarity to Understand LLM Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23591)
*Christopher J. Anders,Henrique Da Silva Gameiro,Nico Daheim,Mohammad Emtiyaz Khan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了两种用于追溯LLM输出的方法——数据相似度（data-similarity）和数据影响（data-influence），发现二者排序高度一致但存在不对称性：相似度排名靠前的文档在影响力排序中更稳定。作者利用这一不对称性提出了一种成本-精度折衷策略，即先用低成本的相似度筛选，再用高成本的影响力精炼。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管数据相似度和数据影响两种方法被广泛用于追溯LLM输出到训练数据，但缺乏对二者在输出追溯任务上的系统性比较，无法量化其共性与差异。

Method: 对每种度量分别对训练文档进行排序，计算两个排序之间的重叠度（rank overlap），并在多个模型（OLMo2-1B, Qwen3-1.7B, LlaMa3.2-1B, Gemma3-1B, GPT2）上进行实验。

Result: 两种排序显著一致，但存在不对称性：数据相似度的top文档在数据影响排序中排名更一致，反之则不成立。

Conclusion: 可以利用该不对称性实现成本-精度折衷：先用低成本的数据相似度筛选候选文档，再用高成本的数据影响进行精炼。

Abstract: One way to understand LLM behavior is to trace its output back to the training data. Two types of measures are commonly used for output tracing: data-similarity and data-influence. The former is cheaper while the latter is believed to be more accurate. Even though many works have compared them for ground-truth tasks, no such comparisons exist for output tracing. Here, we fill this gap and precisely quantify the commonalities and differences between the two measures. We do this by first ranking the training documents according to each measure and then computing the overlap between the two rankings. Our main finding is that the two rankings agree significantly, but there is an asymmetry between them: The top documents of data-similarity are assigned more consistent ranks by data-influence than the other way around. This result is valid across a range of experiments involving OLMo2-1B, Qwen3-1.7B, LlaMa3.2-1B, Gemma3-1B, and GPT2. We exploit the asymmetry to obtain a favorable cost-accuracy trade-off by using the costly data-influence to refine the results of data-similarity.

</details>


### [468] [MORL-A2C: Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning Reranker for Optimizing Healthiness in MOPI-HFRS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23603)
*Aarya Vasantlal,Joshua Zolla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MORL-A2C，一种基于强化学习的顺序决策扩展方法，用于多目标食品推荐系统，在牺牲少量排序质量的前提下大幅提升健康对齐度（H-Score从46.05%提升至69.57%），并修正了原基线评估中的bug。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有食品推荐系统过度关注用户偏好而忽视营养健康，且MOPI-HFRS采用静态帕累托优化，未能捕捉饮食决策的顺序性本质。

Method: 将推荐建模为K步重排序问题，利用冻结GNN嵌入和Advantage Actor-Critic算法，结合标量化的相关性与健康奖励，并通过行为克隆进行策略热启动。

Result: 在宏营养素基准上，Recall@20从25.64%降至23.61%，NDCG@20从23.52%降至20.64%，但H-Score@20从46.05%提升至69.57%，全营养素基准上趋势一致。

Conclusion: 基于策略的顺序优化能够有效平衡多目标食品推荐中的健康-偏好权衡，验证了强化学习在该场景下的有效性。

Abstract: Unhealthy dietary behavior continues to be a persistent public health issue in the United States, exacerbated by recommendation systems that prioritize user preference without considering nutritional health. The Multi-Objective Personalized Interpretable Health-aware Food Recommendation System (MOPI-HFRS), from which this work extends, addresses this by jointly optimizing preference, health, and diversity through Pareto-based optimization. However, this approach relies on static, per-step tradeoff solutions that fail to capture the sequential nature of dietary decision-making. We introduce MORL-A2C, a sequential decision-making extension to MOPI-HFRS targeting the health-preference axis. Leveraging frozen GNN embeddings, MORL-A2C formulates recommendation as a K-step reranking problem using an Advantage Actor-Critic algorithm with a scalarized relevance/health reward. The policy is warm-started via behavior cloning against a dot-product ranker derived from frozen embeddings. We also identify and correct a non-trivial bug in the MOPI-HFRS evaluation pipeline that understated baseline performance; all results are reported against the corrected baseline. On the macro-nutrient benchmark, MORL-A2C achieves a modest reduction in ranking quality (Recall@20: 25.64% to 23.61%, NDCG@20: 23.52% to 20.64%) in exchange for a substantial improvement in health alignment (H-Score@20: 46.05% to 69.57%), with consistent trends on the full-nutrient benchmark. These findings validate that policy-driven sequential optimization can effectively navigate the health-preference trade-off in multi-objective food recommendation.

</details>


### [469] [Scaling Linear Mode Connectivity and Merging to Billion Parameter Pretrained Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23607)
*Tianyi Li,Zhiqiang Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种双学习框架（Dual-Learned Matching），通过对两个预训练大模型应用功能保持的权重变换，使它们双向共同学习对齐到同一线性插值路径，首次在十亿参数级Transformer上实现近乎零障碍的线性模式连接（LMC）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LMC方法通常只从一个模型端点优化插值路径，限制了其在大规模预训练Transformer上的可扩展性和有效性。

Method: 提出双学习过程：对两个模型分别应用参数化的、保持功能的权重变换（解决参数对称性），使两个模型双向共同学习向共享线性插值路径对齐，从而降低插值障碍。

Result: 中等规模语言模型在WikiText上达到近零损失障碍；ViT-L在整个插值路径上保持69%以上ImageNet top-1准确率；十亿参数级LLM仅表现出很小的损失障碍。

Conclusion: 通过适当解决参数对称性，大型预训练Transformer可以通过简单线性路径连接和合并，显著提升插值性能。

Abstract: Linear mode connectivity (LMC) provides a promising foundation for understanding and merging independently trained neural networks, but existing methods typically optimize the interpolation path from only one model endpoint, limiting their scalability and effectiveness for large pretrained transformers. We propose a novel and scalable framework for enabling LMC-based model merging to {\em billion-parameter pretrained transformers}. Our method applies properly parameterized functionality-preserving weight transformations to align functionally equivalent solutions, and introduces a dual learning procedure in which both models jointly learn their corresponding transformations toward a shared linear interpolation path. This bidirectional optimization substantially reduces interpolation barriers and enables more reliable merging across large-scale architectures. Empirically, we show that our approach achieves near-zero loss barriers on WikiText for language models with medium-sized parameters, representing, to our knowledge, the first demonstration of near-barrier-free linear connectivity at this scale. In the vision domain, ViT-L maintains above 69\% ImageNet top-1 accuracy throughout the interpolation path, while modern billion-parameter LLMs exhibit only small loss barriers. These results suggest that properly resolving parameter symmetries enables large pretrained Transformers to be connected and merged through simple linear paths with substantially improved interpolation performance. Code: https://github.com/VILA-Lab/Dual-Learned-Matching .

</details>


### [470] [Discovering Latent Groups for Robust Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23609)
*Ankur Garg,Ulrich Aïvodji,Samira Ebrahimi Kahou,Vincent Michalski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出神经分类树（NCT），通过树形架构编码子群结构，在不需子群标注的情况下，利用样本路由机制（"易"/"难"节点）解耦冲突子群，在提升鲁棒性的同时提供可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法虽能通过调整参数缓解虚假相关性（spurious correlations），但在推理时仅输出类别预测，无法揭示样本所属的潜在子群，缺乏可解释性。

Method: 提出神经分类树（NCT），构建树形架构编码子群结构。每个样本根据预测正确性被路由到"易"或"难"节点，并将这些路由路径作为下一轮的伪标签，迭代解耦冲突子群，无需子群监督。

Result: 在五个基准数据集上评估，NCT的树拓扑结构能够一致地隔离少数群体子群，提供模型架构与数据潜在群结构之间的透明映射，同时在鲁棒性上与最先进方法竞争。

Conclusion: NCT通过树形架构在提升鲁棒性的同时提供了强可解释性，为处理虚假相关性提供了一种透明且不需要子群标注的新范式。

Abstract: Machine learning models exploit spurious correlations, achieving high average accuracy but failing disproportionately on underrepresented subgroups. Existing methods address this by adjusting network parameters, guided either by subgroup annotations or inferred pseudo-group labels. Yet at inference, these methods produce only a class prediction, with no insight into a sample's latent subgroup. We propose neural classification trees (NCT), a framework that achieves robustness by encoding subgroup structure in its tree-shaped architecture. By routing each sample to an "easy" or "hard" node of this tree -- based on prediction correctness -- and reusing these routes as pseudo-labels for the next iteration, NCT disentangles conflicting subgroups, without requiring subgroup supervision. We evaluate NCT on five benchmarks spanning binary and multi-class spurious correlations. Our experiments show that the learned tree topology provides strong interpretability by consistently isolating minority subgroups, which provides a transparent mapping between the model architecture and the data's latent group structure, while yielding competitive robustness with state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [471] [DiT-Reward: Generative Representations for Text-to-Image Reward Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23626)
*Yuanming Yang,Guoqing Ma,Bo Wang,Yuan Zhang,Wei Tang,Chenyi Li,Haoyang Huang,Nan Duan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DiT-Reward，将预训练的文本到图像扩散Transformer（DiT）转化为奖励模型，用于评估生成图像质量。该方法在偏好预测基准上超越HPSv3，并能在优化扩散模型时显著提升真实感，同时实现1.65倍推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究图像生成模型学到的表征是否能够用于生成图像的评估（奖励预测），即验证生成式表征在下游奖励建模任务中的可迁移性。

Method: 将预训练文本到图像DiT转化为奖励模型（DiT-Reward），通过处理近干净图像潜变量并跨Transformer层聚合文本条件图像表征来进行偏好预测。实验设置包括冻结生成主干仅训练轻量级头部、跨层探测分析、以及在不同规模骨干网络上的扩展性研究。

Result: 在相同训练数据下，DiT-Reward在HPDv2和HPDv3上分别达到85.6%和77.6%，全面超越HPSv3。冻结骨干时轻量级头部仍能提取有意义的预测；中间到后期层表征最强，跨层组合能进一步提升性能；奖励性能随生成主干容量正向扩展。用于优化Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large时，DiT-Reward优于HPSv3，尤其在真实感上提升显著，且推理速度提升1.65倍。

Conclusion: 预训练生成式DiT的表征可有效迁移到奖励建模和策略优化任务中，说明生成模型与评估模型之间存在表征的天然兼容性，为利用生成模型进行质量评估和反馈优化提供了新思路。

Abstract: Can representations learned for image generation also support the evaluation of generated images? We study text-to-image reward prediction as a downstream task of generative representation learning. To this end, we introduce DiT-Reward, which converts a pretrained text-to-image Diffusion Transformer into a reward model by processing near-clean image latents and aggregating text-conditioned image representations across transformer layers. Under the same training data mixture as HPSv3, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 on all four evaluated preference benchmarks, reaching 85.6% on HPDv2 and 77.6% on HPDv3. When the generative backbone is frozen, a lightweight learned head can still extract meaningful preference predictions from its representations. Probing across depth further reveals that downstream reward performance is strongest in the middle-to-late layers and benefits from combining representations across different stages. We also observe consistent positive scaling with generative backbone capacity. Finally, when used to optimize Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large with Flow-GRPO, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 along the matched training trajectory, with particularly clear gains in realism. Direct latent scoring also achieves a 1.65x inference speedup over HPSv3 with comparable peak memory. These results show that pretrained generative DiTs provide transferable representations for reward modeling and policy optimization.

</details>


### [472] [Dynamic estimation of slowly varying sequences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23655)
*Prashant Gokhale,Mikhail Khodak,Sandeep Silwal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个通用框架，用于在缓慢变化的序列中顺序逼近各类线性与非线性函数，通过局部调整估计预算实现路径长度型变差界 O(∑αᵢ)，优于以往的最坏情况界 O(m·max αᵢ)，并支持在线估计变化量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有隐式迹估计方法在处理缓慢变化序列时，复用查询可降低成本，但预算分配依赖于最坏情况变化量 αᵢ，对于稳定但有罕见突变的序列效率低下。作者希望将这一思想推广到更广泛的函数类型，并实现更优的自适应预算分配。

Method: 1. 提出一个通用框架，将顺序逼近方法推广到线性与非线性函数（矩阵幂、谱密度、蒙特卡洛积分、PDE边值问题）。2. 设计局部缩放预算算法，使得估计预算随局部变化量 αᵢ 自适应调整。3. 证明路径长度型变差界 O(∑αᵢ)。4. 在某些场景下，无需预先知道 αᵢ 的上界，可在线估计变化量且几乎无额外开销。

Result: 获得了更优的路径长度型变差界 O(∑αᵢ)，显著优于以往的最坏情况界 O(m·max αᵢ)，并在矩阵幂、谱密度、蒙特卡洛积分和PDE边值问题等多个应用中验证了框架有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架使顺序逼近方法成为通用且自适应的工具，在动态迹估计问题上超越了现有最先进的理论保证。

Abstract: We consider the problem of sequentially approximating functions of each element in a slowly-varying sequence, i.e. one where the magnitude $α_i$ of the difference between the elements at positions $i$ and $i-1$ is small. Recent work on implicit trace estimation shows that when $α_t$ is small, reusing queries to past sequence elements can reduce the overall cost [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021; Woodruff et al., NeurIPS~2022]. We introduce a framework generalizing this to a variety of linear and nonlinear functions on diverse vector spaces, obtaining novel sequential estimation results for matrix powers, spectral densities, Monte Carlo integration, and a boundary value problem from partial differential equations~(PDEs). Furthermore, we develop a novel algorithm for use with this framework that locally scales the estimation budget with $α_t$, obtaining sharper path-length-style variation bounds of form $\mathcal O(\sum_{i=1}^mα_i)$ on the cost of estimating a sequence of length $m$. This improves upon the previous implicit trace estimation bound of $\mathcal O(m\cdot\max_iα_i)$ [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021], which is achieved by fixing the query budget using the worst-case $α_i$ and is thus inefficient for stable sequences with rare bursts. Lastly, while all past work assumes a known bound on $α_i$, we show in certain cases how the changes can be estimated on-the-fly with (nearly) no added cost. In summary, our framework makes the sequential approximation toolkit general-purpose and adaptive while improving upon state-of-the-art-guarantees for dynamic trace estimation.

</details>


### [473] [MAS-PromptBench: When Does Prompt Optimization Improve Multi-Agent LLM Systems?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23664)
*Juyang Bai,Laixi Shi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了多智能体系统中系统提示优化的潜力与挑战，发现其能带来显著性能提升，但优化效果高度依赖于任务、工作流、通信协议和团队规模等系统配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）由多个基于LLM的智能体组成，每个智能体的系统提示决定了其角色和行为。虽然提示优化在单LLM中效果显著，但在MAS中面临搜索空间指数级增长的挑战，且不清楚提示优化在何种条件下有效。

Method: 在多种MAS设置（不同任务、工作流、通信协议、团队规模）下，将两种单智能体提示优化方法扩展为MAS优化器，系统评估其性能。

Result: 提示优化能显著提升MAS性能，但增益幅度高度依赖于系统配置；同时暴露了搜索空间庞大等开放挑战。

Conclusion: 提示优化在多智能体系统中具有巨大潜力，但效果具有配置敏感性，反映了现有方法的局限性，需要进一步研究。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a scalable path forward for agentic AI, comprising multiple LLM-based agents, each assigned a system prompt and a position within a workflow that governs inter-agent coordination and output aggregation. System prompts thus form a critical and accessible optimization surface: they specify agents' roles and behaviors, enabling system-level improvements without model finetuning. Although prompt optimization has shown substantial potential for single LLMs, extending it to MAS poses distinct challenges, notably an exponentially growing search space. It remains unclear whether, when, and by how much prompt optimization improves MAS performance, and how sensitive such gains are to system configuration. In this work, we systematically study system-prompt optimization across a broad range of MAS setups varying in task, workflow, communication protocol, and team size, benchmarking two prompt optimizers that naturally extend state-of-the-art single-agent methods. The results reveal its potential to unlock significant gains while exposing open challenges, characterizing when and how much prompt optimization helps across diverse MAS settings.

</details>


### [474] [On the Limits of Prompt-Conditioned Language Models as General-Purpose Learners](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23668)
*David Mguni,Julian Ma,Jun Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过廉价交谈博弈框架和PAC-Bayes理论证明，提示调优的LLM存在两个不可约的误差下限（表达能力下限和目标对齐下限），因此无法仅通过提示通用地解决所有任务，即使拥有无限数据也无法避免。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质疑LLM被普遍视为通用问题解决者的观点，指出语言作为任务信息传递的接口存在容量限制，这种约束被现有研究忽视。

Method: 将用户-系统交互建模为双层廉价交谈博弈，引入任务推理与执行的分解，并运用PAC-Bayes理论推导有限样本估计误差与不可约结构限制。

Result: 建立了两个主要结果：1) 表达能力下限：语言通道容量限制使高复杂度任务族中的不同任务变得不可区分，导致正向误差下限；2) 目标对齐下限：对齐约束使可行输出集受限，导致不可约的分布失真。

Conclusion: 提示调优的LLM并非通用问题解决者；超出自然语言的接口（如多模态、外部记忆）可能是缓解这些根本限制的方向。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are frequently portrayed as general-purpose solvers capable of solving arbitrary tasks. We argue that this view overlooks a fundamental constraint: language is a compressed and capacity-limited interface for conveying task information. Modelling User--System interaction as a bilevel \emph{cheap-talk} game, we analyse how latent tasks are encoded into prompts and reinterpreted under alignment and safety constraints. We introduce a conceptual decomposition separating task inference from execution and derive PAC-Bayes bounds that distinguish finite-sample estimation error from irreducible structural limitations. Our first main result establishes an \emph{expressivity floor}: language acts as a capacity-limited communication channel, and whenever the informational complexity of a task family exceeds the capacity of that channel, distinct tasks become unavoidably indistinguishable to the Solver, inducing a strictly positive error floor that cannot be eliminated by additional data, optimisation, or model scaling alone. We then establish an \emph{objective-misalignment floor}: when alignment constraints restrict the admissible output set, the User-ideal distribution may lie outside the feasible class, inducing an irreducible distortion. Together, these results yield a formal negative conclusion: prompt-conditioned LLMs are not universal problem solvers through prompting alone, as there exist task families for which correct behaviour is provably unattainable even in the infinite-data regime. More broadly, our analysis shows the limits of prompt-based generalisation arise from information-constrained communication and alignment-constrained objectives. This suggests that interfaces beyond natural language, including multimodal observations and, external memory, may reduce the inherent LLM limitations by increasing the task-relevant information available to the System.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.RM'></div>

# q-fin.RM [[Back]](#toc)

### [475] [Attributing Forecast Gaps to Component Models in Complex Model Suites](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21539)
*Xuan Mei,Junze Lin*

Main category: q-fin.RM

TL;DR: 本文针对金融模型套件中预测值与实际值之间的差距归因问题，在预期损失（EL）框架下系统研究了EAD、SMM、PD、LGD等组件模型的乘性交互归因。通过形式化标准Walk分析揭示其排序依赖性问题，提出了两种序无关的归因方法——改进的对数平均迪氏指数法（LMDI）和Shapley值法，并推导了高效的向量化计算公式，最后扩展至含蒙特卡洛模拟的模型套件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂模型套件在金融预测和风险管理中广泛应用，当模型套件预测与实际结果出现显著偏差时，需要将这种差距归因到各个组件模型，以便进行模型开发、验证和监管审查。然而，现有Walk分析方法存在排序依赖性问题，无法提供一致、公平的归因结果。

Method: 本文首先形式化分析了Walk分析的排序依赖性缺陷；然后引入两种序无关归因框架：1）针对预期损失结构定制的LMDI方法（对数平均迪氏指数法），2）基于边际贡献平均化的Shapley值方法。推导了逐元素和向量化公式以实现高效计算，并扩展至含蒙特卡洛模拟层的场景。

Result: 理论分析表明Walk分析的归因结果依赖于组件模型的分析顺序。LMDI和Shapley归因框架提供了序无关的解决方案，且向量化公式使得额外计算时间在组合规模的实际案例中仅需数秒。

Conclusion: 本文为金融模型套件的差距归因问题提供了理论严谨且计算可行的解决方案，揭示了Walk分析、LMDI和Shapley归因之间的内在联系，为模型验证和监管审查提供了更公平的归因工具。

Abstract: Complex model suites composed of multiple interacting component models are widely used in financial forecasting and risk management. In model performance testing, including in-sample backtesting (BT) and out-of-sample ongoing performance monitoring (OPM), a material gap between a model-suite forecast and the realized outcome must often be attributed to individual component models for development, validation, and regulatory review. This paper studies this gap-attribution problem in the expected loss framework, where exposure at default (EAD), prepayment or single monthly mortality (SMM), probability of default (PD), and loss given default (LGD) interact multiplicatively and are aggregated across loans and projection periods. We first formalize standard walk analysis and show why its attribution is generally order dependent. We then adapt two order-independent attribution frameworks: an augmented Logarithmic Mean Divisia Index (LMDI) approach tailored to the expected-loss structure, and a more general Shapley value approach based on averaging marginal contributions over all component orderings. We derive both elementwise and vectorized formulas to support efficient implementation, with the additional computation time for gap attribution typically limited to a few seconds in practical portfolio-scale examples. Finally, we discuss the connections among walk analysis, LMDI, and Shapley attribution, and show how the attribution framework extends to model suites with an additional Monte Carlo simulation layer.

</details>


### [476] [On Prudence of Risk Measures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21871)
*Niushan Gao,Denny H. Leung,Foivos Xanthos*

Main category: q-fin.RM

TL;DR: 本文研究了风险泛函的审慎性（prudence）这一稳定性性质，建立了审慎性与其他稳定性性质的一般关系，证明了审慎性在现金加性包和inf-convolution下的保持性，并提供了构造审慎风险度量的一般方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 审慎性是风险泛函的一个重要稳定性性质，但对其与其他稳定性性质的关系以及保持性操作的理解尚不充分，需要系统性地研究这些理论基础。

Method: 首先建立审慎性与弱审慎性等稳定性性质的一般关系；然后证明审慎性在星形泛函的现金加性包下的保持性（在简单渐近条件下）；最后证明审慎性在凸、现金加性、律不变的审慎泛函的inf-convolution下的保持性。

Result: 证明了对于一大类凸的律不变泛函，弱审慎性与审慎性是一致的；审慎性在现金加性包和inf-convolution下具有保持性。

Conclusion: 研究结果提供了从现有审慎泛函构造新的审慎风险度量的通用方法，深化了对风险泛函审慎性性质的理论理解。

Abstract: Prudence is a stability property of risk functionals recently introduced by Wang and Zitikis and subsequently studied by Amarante and Liebrich. In this paper, we first establish general relationships between prudence and other stability properties, showing, in particular, that weak prudence and prudence coincide for a broad class of convex, law-invariant functionals. We then prove that prudence is preserved by cash-additive hulls of star-shaped functionals under a simple asymptotic condition, and by inf-convolutions of convex, cash-additive, law-invariant prudent functionals. Our results provide general methods for constructing prudent risk measures from existing prudent functionals.

</details>


### [477] [Temporal Coarse-Graining of Multi-Sector Default Count Data Generates Posterior-Implied Copulas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22162)
*Shintaro Mori*

Main category: q-fin.RM

TL;DR: 本文提出一个动态低秩状态空间模型，用于月度多行业违约计数数据，通过时间粗粒化解释违约依赖结构在不同观测频率下的差异，并利用S&P数据验证了双因子模型的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有静态相关矩阵、静态copula或少量共同因子等表示方法，无法解释月度信用数据与年度聚合后有效依赖结构的差异，需要能捕捉时间粗粒化效应的动态模型。

Method: 构建动态低秩状态空间模型：以月度行业违约率相关矩阵的主特征向量作为固定载荷方向，引入持久AR(1)潜在信用状态因子，通过二项观测层建模违约数据；利用生存聚合生成依赖结构。

Result: 双因子模型捕捉到市场整体和行业轮动两种模式，再现了年度聚合下主特征值的放大效应，生成了异质的行业对copula结构；在年度预测中改善了静态基准的欠分散问题，提升了区间覆盖率和CRPS。

Conclusion: 动态因子模型有效解释了时间粗粒化导致的依赖结构变化，在预测性能上优于静态模型，其中单因子模型在log-score上极具竞争力，双因子模型进一步改善了行业级别校准。

Abstract: Sectoral default dependence is usually described by a static correlation matrix, a static copula, or a small number of common factors. Such representations, when specified separately at each observation horizon, do not by themselves explain why the effective dependence observed in monthly credit data differs from that observed after annual aggregation. This paper proposes a dynamic low-rank state-space model for monthly multi-sector default-count data and studies the dependence structure induced by temporal coarse-graining. The leading eigenvectors of the monthly sectoral default-rate correlation matrix are used as fixed loading directions for persistent AR(1) latent credit-state factors, and defaults are modeled through a binomial observation layer. Survival aggregation of monthly posterior probability paths induces horizon-dependent distributions of sectoral default-probability vectors, from which effective correlation matrices, eigenvalue spectra, and posterior-implied rank copulas are obtained. Applied to S\&P monthly sector-level default-count data from 1981--01 to 2021--09, a two-factor specification captures the dominant market-wide and sector-rotation modes, reproduces the annual amplification of the leading eigenvalues, and generates heterogeneous copula structures across sector pairs. In an annual forecast evaluation, the dynamic factor specifications reduce the under-dispersion of static binomial and beta-binomial baselines, improving interval coverage and CRPS for aggregate portfolio counts. In log-score-based forecast comparisons, the one-factor specification is highly competitive, whereas the two-factor specification improves sector-level calibration as measured by per-sector CRPS.

</details>


### [478] [Universal Value-at-Risk superadditivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22884)
*Yuyu Chen,Liyuan Lin,Ruodu Wang*

Main category: q-fin.RM

TL;DR: 本文研究了Value-at-Risk (VaR)的普遍超可加性（UVS）及其加权版本（WUVS），发现对于足够重尾的损失分布，VaR在所有概率水平上均表现出超可加性，且这种现象本质上要求无限均值结构。研究将UVS/WUVS视为随机向量的性质而非边缘分布的性质，建立了其在多种变换和极限下的保持性，并推广到非独立同分布的风险模型中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VaR是标准的监管风险度量工具，但其缺乏次可加性（subadditivity）是众所周知的缺陷。然而，一个更少被认识到的现象是：当损失分布具有足够重的尾部时，VaR可以在所有概率水平上表现出超可加性（superadditivity），这是一个比极值理论中渐近超可加性更强的现象。作者希望深入理解这一现象，并将其推广到更一般的随机向量框架下。

Method: 本文将UVS和WUVS视为随机向量的性质而非边缘分布的性质，建立了它们在递增变换、凸变换、弱收敛以及某些分布混合下的保持性。利用这些工具，证明了在完全可子缩放（completely subscalable）、超柯西（super-Cauchy）和倒次可加（inverted subadditive）等大族风险中，UVS和WUVS对非独立同分布风险也成立。同时，还建立了严格版本的UVS和WUVS。

Result: 研究发现，UVS（除平凡情形外）本质上要求无限均值结构。对于满足WUVS的任何投资组合，所有扭曲风险度量（distortion risk measures）都是超可加性的，从而导致最优配置集中于单一资产，分散化永远不是有益的。研究还将结论从独立同分布模型推广到了非独立同分布的风险模型中。

Conclusion: 本文系统研究了VaR的普遍超可加性现象，将其从独立的无限均值模型推广到更广泛的随机向量框架，并建立了严格版本的UVS和WUVS，揭示了其对分散化投资的深刻决策理论含义——在满足WUVS的条件下，分散化永远不是有益的。

Abstract: Value-at-Risk (VaR) is a standard regulatory risk measure, and its failure of subadditivity is well known. Much less appreciated is that for sufficiently heavy-tailed losses, VaR can be superadditive uniformly across all probability levels, a phenomenon strictly stronger than the asymptotic superadditivity studied in extreme value theory. We call this property universal VaR superadditivity (UVS). We study UVS and its stronger weighted version (WUVS) as properties of random vectors rather than of marginal distributions. This perspective unifies and extends a recent line of work on iid infinite-mean models. UVS, except for trivial cases, imposes an infinite-mean structure. We establish preservation properties of UVS and WUVS under increasing and convex transformations, weak convergence, and certain distributional mixtures, and use these tools to prove UVS and WUVS for non-identically distributed risks in several large families including completely subscalable, super-Cauchy, and inverted subadditive risks, extending results previously available only in the iid case. In many results, we also establish strict versions of UVS and WUVS, which lead to stronger decision-theoretic implications. As a consequence, for any portfolio satisfying WUVS, every distortion risk measure is superadditive, so an optimal allocation concentrates on a single asset, and diversification is never beneficial.

</details>


### [479] [Pareto Optimal Centralized Risk Sharing with Multiple Agents: Inclusivity and Fairness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22956)
*Debora Daniela Escobar,Wing Fung Chong*

Main category: q-fin.RM

TL;DR: 本文研究内生定价下的集中风险分担问题，提出“包容公平帕累托最优”概念，通过平衡序贯优化确保每个代理人在决策中被公平代表，并证明该概念介于Geoffrion-真帕累托最优与经典帕累托最优之间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典帕累托最优无法确保所有代理人在决策过程中被公平代表（如标量化目标可能给某些代理人赋零权重，群体聚合可能掩盖个体风险头寸），因此需要更精细的效率标准。

Method: 基于双边帕累托特征的序贯优化思想，提出“包容公平帕累托最优”概念，要求每个代理人恰好出现一次（可单独或作为群体的一部分）在有限有序优化序列中，并证明其与平衡序贯优化的等价性。

Result: 证明了包容公平帕累托最优介于Geoffrion-真帕累托最优与经典帕累托最优之间，并通过Expected Shortfall示例展示了框架的应用。

Conclusion: 提出了一种新的、更公平的帕累托效率概念，为内生定价下的风险分担问题提供了更均衡的决策理论基础。

Abstract: This paper studies centralized risk sharing with endogenous prices. Multiple policyholders transfer risks to a central insurer through indemnity decisions, while prices are determined by pricing functionals applied to ceded risks. The resulting problem is multiobjective, with Pareto optimality as the natural efficiency criterion. We show that classical Pareto optimality may fail to reveal whether all agents are represented in a balanced decision process that scalarized objectives may assign zero weight to some agents, and group aggregates may obscure individual risk positions. Motivated by bilateral Pareto characterizations through sequential optimization, we introduce inclusive and fair Pareto optimality, a representation-based refinement requiring every agent to appear exactly once, either individually or as part of a group, in a finite ordered sequence of optimizations. Our main result proves equivalence between this concept and balanced sequential optimization, placing it between Geoffrion-proper Pareto optimality and classical Pareto optimality. An illustrative example demonstrates the framework using the Expected Shortfall.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [480] [Platooning Connected, Autonomous, and Human-Driven Vehicles: A Deep Reinforcement Learning-based Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20648)
*Zhen Qina,Dong-Fan Xie,Heng Ma,Xiaomei Zhao,Zhengbing He*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合编队模式，允许非网联车辆有条件加入车队，并基于深度强化学习设计了控制策略，以在混合交通中平衡通行能力与稳定性，数值仿真证明该方法能有效抑制速度扰动传播，提升稳定性、安全性并降低油耗和排放。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有编队方法仅针对网联车辆（包括网联自动驾驶和网联人工驾驶车辆），未考虑非网联车辆，无法反映真实混合交通流现状。

Method: 提出混合编队模式，有条件允许非网联车辆加入；基于深度强化学习（DRL）设计控制策略，通过多层级状态表征网络整合车辆动力学、编队拓扑和交通流状态，动态优化编队结构。

Result: 数值仿真表明，该策略能有效抑制速度扰动传播，显著提升混合交通的稳定性和安全性，同时降低燃油消耗和排放。

Conclusion: 所提出的混合编队控制策略能够动态平衡交通通行能力与稳定性，为解决混合交通环境下编队问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Conventionally, existing vehicle platooning approaches are designed for connected vehicles, typically including connected autonomous vehicles and connected human-driven vehicles. Non-connected vehicles, such as non-connected autonomous or human-driven vehicles, are not incorporated. As a result, these platooning approaches may not properly reflect real-world mixed traffic conditions at the current stage. To address this limitation, this study proposes a hybrid platooning pattern that conditionally permits non-connected vehicles to join platoons, thereby enhancing platooning diversity and flexibility. However, it was found that the unregulated integration of non-connected vehicles can trigger rapid platoon expansion, significantly amplifying the risk of disturbance propagation in traffic flow. This, in turn, exacerbates the inherent conflict between traffic throughput and stability. To mitigate these challenges, this paper further develops a hybrid platooning control strategy based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL). This strategy integrates vehicle dynamics, platoon topology, and traffic flow states through a multi-level state representation network, enabling a dynamic trade-off between traffic capacity and stability. Numerical simulations demonstrate that the proposed strategy effectively suppresses velocity disturbance propagation by dynamically optimizing platoon structures, thereby significantly enhancing the stability and safety of mixed traffic while reducing fuel consumption and emissions.

</details>


### [481] [Distributed Model Predictive Control with Adaptive Safety Zones for Multi-Fleet Drone Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20651)
*Linda Mümken,Diyar Altinses,Michael Schwung,Stefan Lier,Andreas Schwung*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出一种自适应速度的安全球体方法替代固定半径安全区，用于高密度无人机集群在受限空间中的安全导航，通过集中式和分布式MPC实现，理论证明其可行性、稳定性，仿真显示可容纳无人机数量翻倍、穿越时间减少25%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统固定安全区基于最坏情况速度设定半径，造成高密度场景下的空域浪费，亟需一种能根据实时速度动态调整的安全区方法以提升空域利用率。

Method: 提出速度自适应的安全球体（半径与刹车距离成正比），分别设计集中式MPC和分布式DMPC框架，其中DMPC允许每架无人机基于检测到的邻居进行局部优化，并兼容非协作代理的混合编队。

Result: 仿真表明：相比固定半径方法，自适应框架可使可容纳无人机数量翻倍，狭窄通道穿越时间减少约25%，并能通过固定安全区无法通行的开口；集中式更接近理论容量上限，分布式则提供更现实的混合编队部署方案。

Conclusion: 自适应安全球体方法在理论可证明的可行性与稳定性保障下，显著提升了受限空间中无人机集群的密度与通行效率，为高密度自主编队操作提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Autonomous drone swarms in space-constrained environments such as warehouses, inspection corridors, and urban delivery routes must share limited airspace safely at high vehicle density. Existing approaches rely on fixed safety zones sized for worst-case velocity, which wastes airspace in congested scenarios. We replace the fixed radius with an adaptive, speed-dependent safety sphere whose size scales with braking distance: tight at low speeds, expanded at high speeds. We develop both a centralized model predictive control (MPC) formulation and a distributed MPC (DMPC) in which each drone optimizes locally from detected neighbors, accommodating mixed fleets with non-cooperative agents. We prove feasibility up to the geometric packing limit evaluated at the minimum radius, establish Lyapunov stability under sufficient conditions on the adaptation parameter, drone density, and prediction horizon, and extend these guarantees to the distributed setting via a contraction condition that preserves the centralized stability margins. We further derive modified sphere-packing capacity bounds and a throughput-optimal crossing speed for narrow passages. Simulations confirm that the adaptive framework remains feasible where fixed-radius methods fail: it roughly doubles the admissible drone count, reduces traversal time through constrained passages by about 25 percent, and enables passage through openings impassable to static safety zones. The centralized variant realizes a larger fraction of the theoretical capacity, while the distributed variant offers a more realistic deployment model for mixed-fleet operations under the same safety guarantees.

</details>


### [482] [Eigenspace-Based Clustering for Personalized System Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20811)
*Abdulmoneam Ali,Dipankar Maity,Ahmed Arafa*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于协方差矩阵特征空间对齐的一次性、无需训练的聚类方法，用于异构系统中的系统辨识，通过比较局部观测数据的协方差特征结构来识别具有相似动态特性的系统，并提供了理论保证与实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统聚类式系统辨识方法依赖迭代训练进行簇分配，对学习不确定性和模型初始化敏感。本文希望提出一种鲁棒性更强、无需训练的一次性聚类方法。

Method: 每个系统估计局部状态协方差矩阵，通过衡量不同系统间主导协方差特征空间的对齐程度来推断聚类身份。提出了相似度得分的数学解释，并进行了有限样本分析。

Result: 推导了成对误合并的概率界和全局聚类成功保证。数值实验表明该方法能有效识别共享动态的系统，且个性化模型估计误差低于基于训练的聚类方法和非聚类基线。

Conclusion: 基于特征空间的聚类方法在异构系统辨识中效果显著，兼具理论保证与实证优势，为无需训练的系统聚类提供了新思路。

Abstract: We study the problem of system identification in heterogeneous settings, where different systems may follow distinct underlying dynamics. Existing clustered system identification approaches often rely on iterative training-based cluster assignment, which can be sensitive to learning uncertainty and model initialization. In contrast, we propose a one-shot, training-free clustering method that identifies similar systems using the structure of their locally observed data. Specifically, each system estimates a local state covariance matrix, and cluster identities are inferred by measuring the alignment between the leading covariance eigenspaces of different systems. We provide a mathematical interpretation of the proposed similarity score and develop a finite-sample analysis that characterizes how covariance estimation error induces eigenspace perturbations in terms of the underlying system dynamics. We then derive a probability bound for pairwise false merges and a global clustering success guarantee. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed eigenspace-based clustering method effectively identifies systems with shared dynamics, leading to lower personalized model-estimation error compared with training-based clustering and non-clustered baselines.

</details>


### [483] [A Metaheuristic Framework for Optimized HAPS-Aided Localization in Urban Areas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20851)
*Hongzhao Zheng,Mohamed Atia,Halim Yanikomeroglu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种元启发式框架，通过整合3D城市模型、射线追踪和多目标优化，联合优化高空平台站（HAPS）的数量与部署位置，以增强城市环境中的GNSS定位性能。实验表明，4个HAPS即可满足18米3D定位误差阈值，2-5个HAPS相比纯卫星定位可减少50%以上误差，超过6个HAPS则收益递减。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 密集城市环境中GNSS受遮挡和多径效应影响严重，传统几何布局指标不足以解决NLOS问题，需要引入HAPS作为机会信号源来增强定位，但如何在实际约束下优化HAPS的数量和位置是一个高度非凸的离散优化问题。

Method: 提出元启发式框架，集成高保真3D城市模型、射线追踪和多目标优化；基于三种不同搜索原理（如遗传算法、粒子群等）开发元启发式求解器，在离散非凸设计空间中高效搜索HAPS的最优数量和部署位置。

Result: 三种元启发式方法均快速收敛，优于贪心基线；4个HAPS满足18米3D定位误差阈值；2-5个HAPS相比纯卫星降低50%以上平均/RMS定位误差，标准差降低94%，变异系数降低87%；超过6个HAPS收益递减；框架在不同城市环境中展现出强鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: 优化的HAPS部署可显著提升城市环境中的GNSS定位性能，该框架是一种有效且可扩展的实际城市HAPS辅助定位解决方案。

Abstract: High-altitude platform stations (HAPS), originally designed for communication services, can also provide structured signals of opportunity (SoOP) to augment the global navigation satellite system (GNSS). However, dense urban environments introduce severe blockage and non-line-of-sight (NLOS) conditions that undermine GNSS accuracy and render geometric placement metrics insufficient. To address this, we propose a metaheuristic framework for jointly optimizing the number and placement of HAPS under practical constraints by integrating high-fidelity 3D city models, ray-tracing, and multi-objective optimization to handle the discrete and highly non-convex design space. Three metaheuristic solutions based on distinct search principles are developed to efficiently explore the solution space, all demonstrating rapid convergence and consistently outperforming a greedy baseline, particularly in the low-to-moderate HAPS regime. For representative dense urban scenarios, we show that four HAPS are sufficient to satisfy an 18-m average 3D positioning error bound (PEB) threshold, while configurations with two to five HAPS achieve over 50\% reduction in mean and root mean square (RMS) PEB and up to 94\% and 87\% reduction in standard deviation and coefficient of variation (CV), respectively, compared to the satellite-only case. Diminishing returns are observed beyond six HAPS due to geometric redundancy, emphasizing the importance of optimized placement. The framework further demonstrates strong robustness and generalizability across diverse urban environments with varying building morphology and propagation conditions, establishing it as an effective and scalable solution for HAPS-assisted localization in realistic urban settings.

</details>


### [484] [AI Data Centers and Power System Sustainability: Understanding the Sustainability Implications of AI-Driven Data Centers on Power Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21064)
*Yuhao Huang,Novarun Deb,Hamidreza Zareipour*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文综述了AI数据中心扩张对电力系统可持续性的双重影响：一方面带来碳排放增加和电网可靠性挑战，另一方面通过清洁能源整合和运营创新提供发展机遇。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI的快速发展导致数据中心电力需求激增，这种负载增长的速度和规模对电力系统可持续性产生重大影响，需要全面评估其风险与机遇。

Method: 文章通过三个维度展开分析：(i) 表征AI数据中心的负载行为，按功能和可持续性对供电配置分类；(ii) 分析短期运行和长期规划机制下的可持续性影响；(iii) 评估企业可持续性发展路径及碳核算实践的可行性与局限性。

Result: 研究发现数据中心负载增长在多个地区超过清洁能源部署速度，增加了碳排放并挑战电网灵活性；但同时提供了通过清洁能源整合和参与辅助服务来提升系统可持续性的机会。

Conclusion: 本文旨在综合现有知识和技术发展，为AI数据中心与电力系统更可持续的整合提供研究和发展方向指导。

Abstract: The rapid expansion of artificial intelligence (AI) has driven unprecedented growth in data center electricity demand. The scale and pace of this load growth carry significant implications for the sustainability of electric power systems. On the one hand, rapid, spatially concentrated data center load growth is outpacing clean energy deployment in several major regions, raising emissions and challenging both grid flexibility and reliability. On the other hand, this fast-developing and capital-intensive sector offers abundant opportunities to advance sustainability through clean energy integration and operational innovations. This article provides an overview of the mechanisms through which data center affect power system sustainability, underscoring both risks and the potential. Specifically, this article (i) characterizes AI data center load behavior and categorizes electricity supply configurations by function and sustainability profile, as well as situates these loads within global and regional electricity demand trends; (ii) analyzes sustainability impacts across short-run operational and long-run planning mechanisms, evaluates effects on grid carbon emissions and renewable energy utilization, and feasibility of offering system flexibility and participating in ancillary service; and (iii) evaluates real-world corporate sustainability pathways and highlighting both the system benefits and feasibility limits of current carbon accounting practices. The goal of this work is to synthesize existing knowledge and technological developments and to guide research and development toward a more sustainable integration of AI data centers and electric power systems.

</details>


### [485] [Discrete Geometric Modeling and Extended State Estimation of Continuum Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21205)
*Maximilian Herrmann,Leander Pfeiffer,Paul Kotyczka*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于李群变分积分的连续机器人全离散动力学建模与状态估计方法，通过应变最小化公式和扩展卡尔曼滤波扰动观测器，在真实系统上验证了高精度和高效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续机器人缺乏精确且计算高效的动力学模型以及可靠的状态估计方法，现有方法难以兼顾保结构特性与数值效率。

Method: 采用基于几何精确梁的应变最小化公式，在李群变分积分器框架下推导全离散动力学模型；在此基础上构建基于扩展卡尔曼滤波的扰动观测器，同时估计系统状态、模型不确定性和外部扰动。

Result: 真实系统实验验证了所提模型和观测器的高精度与数值效率。

Conclusion: 所提李群变分积分方法成功实现了连续机器人动力学建模的保结构性与计算效率的统一，且扰动观测器可有效估计不确定性与外部干扰。

Abstract: In this paper, we present a fully discrete approach for the accurate and numerically efficient dynamical modeling and state estimation of continuum robots. The model is based on geometrically exact beams in a minimal, strain-based formulation and derived in the framework of Lie group variational integrators, allowing to preserve important geometric properties that we exploit to achieve high accuracy and numerical efficiency. We then propose a disturbance observer based on an extended Kalman filter formulation that reliably estimates system states as well as model uncertainties and external disturbances. Experiments on a real system validate the accuracy and efficiency of the proposed model and observer.

</details>


### [486] [Local Conformity-Based Evolutionary Game Modeling of UAV Swarm Under Byzantine Attack](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21206)
*Ruixing Ren,Junhui Zhao,He Fang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文基于图演化博弈理论，构建了恶意攻击下无人机蜂群的演化博弈模型，揭示了局部从众规则如何控制欺骗策略的传播，并推导了宏观动态方程与演化稳定状态的解析解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究假设无人机独立决策，忽视了局部从众行为会放大虚假信息传播的问题，因此需要建模分析恶意攻击下无人机蜂群的策略传播机制。

Method: 基于图演化博弈理论构建模型，采用死亡-出生更新规则，推导欺骗策略比例的宏观动态方程及演化稳定状态的解析解。

Result: 观测误差会削弱恶意诱导；恶意节点比例越高、攻击强度越大，攻击影响越剧烈；模型在规则网络、无标度网络和随机网络上均表现出强拓扑鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 局部从众规则在恶意攻击下显著影响欺骗策略的传播，模型具有良好的鲁棒性和解释力。

Abstract: Leveraging their flexible and efficient deployment capabilities, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) swarms have been widely applied in various mission scenarios. However, the open communication environment also exposes them to the threat of Byzantine attacks. Most existing studies assume independent decision-making by each UAV, neglecting that local conformity amplifies false information propagation. This paper constructs an evolutionary game model for UAV swarm under malicious attacks based on graph evolutionary game theory, revealing how local conformity rules govern the spread of deceptive strategies. Using death-birth updating rules, we derive the macroscopic dynamic equation for the fraction of deceptive strategies and the analytical solutions to its evolutionary stable states. Sim ulations reveal observation errors weaken malicious induction, while higher proportions of malicious nodes and greater attack intensity drastically amplify attack impacts. Moreover, the model exhibits strong topological robustness across regular, scale-free and random networks.

</details>


### [487] [Reliability Assessment and Performance Enhancement of Reset Control Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21431)
*Ali Hosseini,Dragan Kostić,Hassan HosseinNia*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对复位控制系统，提出了一种频域可靠性评估框架，通过引入两个指标（复位时间偏差σ_t和额外过零趋势σ_d）来量化复位触发的可靠性问题，并设计了一种一阶整形滤波器以提高低频衰减性能，在工业运动平台上验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有复位控制系统的可靠性评估方法不足，复位触发行为中存在时间偏差和额外过零等隐性问题，这些问题无法通过一阶闭环响应直接察觉，因此需要一种面向设计的可靠性指标来指导复位控制器的设计。

Method: 扩展了闭环高阶正弦输入描述函数（HOSIDF）公式，明确包含通过整形滤波器生成的复位触发信号；基于该信号定义了σ_t（复位时间偏差）和σ_d（额外过零趋势）两个指标；针对广义一阶复位元件提出了一个一阶整形滤波器，提升非零高次谐波的低频衰减斜率。

Result: 在工业运动平台上评估了所提方法，结果表明所引入的指标能够捕捉一阶闭环响应无法体现的可靠性问题，有效支持复位控制器的可靠性设计。
