Conclusion: 所提出的频域可靠性评估框架和两个量化指标能够有效识别复位触发中的潜在可靠性问题，结合一阶整形滤波器设计，可为复位控制系统提供更可靠的触发行为保障。

Abstract: This paper develops a frequency-domain reliability assessment framework for reset control systems. The closed-loop higher-order sinusoidal-input describing function formulation is extended to explicitly include the reset-triggering signal generated through a shaping filter. Based on this signal, two metrics are introduced: \(σ_t\), which quantifies reset-time deviation, and \(σ_d\), which evaluates the tendency toward additional zero crossings. These metrics provide design-oriented indicators for identifying potentially unreliable reset behavior. To improve reset-triggering reliability, a first-order shaping filter is proposed for a generalized first-order reset element, increasing the low-frequency attenuation slope of the nonzero higher-order harmonics. The proposed analysis is evaluated on an industrial motion stage. The results show that the proposed metrics capture reliability issues that are not evident from the first-order closed-loop response alone and can therefore support the design of reset controllers with more reliable reset-triggering behavior.

</details>


### [488] [Revisiting the generalized first-order reset element with shaping filters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21478)
*Ali Hosseini,Dragan Kostić,Hassan HosseinNia*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通过高阶整形滤波器抑制复位控制中高阶谐波的非线性，使复位元件在特定频段更接近线性系统，并在工业运动平台上验证了跟踪性能提升和谐波抑制效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复位控制虽能突破线性控制器性能极限，但复位动作会引入高阶谐波，导致跟踪性能下降、信号失真，并降低描述函数分析预测的可靠性。因此需要抑制这些非线性效应。

Method: 基于广义一阶复位元件与整形滤波器，推导了整形滤波器系数的解析条件，用以增加高阶正弦输入描述函数（HOSIDFs）幅值的低频衰减斜率，从而在不需要复位的频段强力抑制谐波，同时保持期望穿越频率附近的一阶谐波相位优势。

Result: 通过HOSIDF分析和叠加定律测试验证了非线性行为的降低，高阶整形滤波器使复位元件在特定频段更接近线性系统。工业运动平台实验表明跟踪性能提升、高阶谐波含量降低，复位动作在目标频段选择性激活。

Conclusion: 所提框架能系统性地抑制复位引入的非线性，提高系统线性行为近似程度，同时保留复位控制的性能优势，具有实际工程应用价值。

Abstract: Reset control provides a nonlinear approach for improving closed-loop performance beyond the limitations of linear time-invariant controllers. However, the reset action inevitably introduces higher-order harmonics, which may degrade tracking performance, distort the reset signal, and reduce the reliability of frequency-domain predictions obtained via describing-function analysis. This paper revisits the generalized first-order reset element with shaping filters and develops a systematic framework for suppressing undesired reset-induced nonlinearities. Analytical conditions are derived for shaping filter coefficients to increase the low-frequency attenuation slope of the magnitude of the higher-order sinusoidal input describing functions (HOSIDFs). By modifying the asymptotic attenuation behavior of these higher-order harmonics, the proposed design provides stronger harmonic suppression in frequency regions where reset action is undesired, while preserving the beneficial first-order harmonic phase advantage near the desired cross-over frequency. The reduction in nonlinear behavior is verified through HOSIDF analysis and a superposition-law test, demonstrating that higher-order shaping filters make the reset element behave more closely to a linear system at a certain range of frequencies. Experimental validation on an industrial motion stage demonstrates improved tracking performance, reduced higher-order harmonic content, and selective activation of the reset action in the intended frequency region.

</details>


### [489] [Stability Enhancement of Centralized UPS Data Center Systems Under Weak-Grid Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21536)
*Jesus D. Vasquez Plaza,Yonghao Gui,Jin Dong,Jamie Lian*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究了弱电网条件下数据中心集中式UPS系统的稳定性问题，发现传统PLL-PI控制在SCR=2时失稳，并提出了一种基于功率控制的无PLL三相整流器控制策略，仿真证明该方法能改善系统阻尼并恢复稳定运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代电力系统演变以及大动态负荷的接入导致数据中心电力系统日益暴露于弱电网条件下，传统PLL-PI控制策略在低短路比（SCR）场景下性能下降甚至失稳，亟需探索更鲁棒的控制方案。

Method: 采用功率控制（power-based control）方法，直接调节三相整流器的有功和无功功率，避免依赖PLL同步，从而在弱电网条件下实现稳定控制。

Result: 电磁暂态仿真表明：传统PI控制在SCR=2时失稳；所提功率控制策略能够改善系统阻尼，在弱电网条件下恢复稳定运行。

Conclusion: 控制设计对于在低强度电网环境中维持数据中心电力系统可靠运行至关重要，基于功率的控制是应对弱电网问题的有效方案。

Abstract: Data center power systems are increasingly exposed to weak-grid conditions due to the evolution of modern power systems and the integration of large and dynamic loads. In centralized uninterruptible power supply (UPS) architectures, the front-end rectifier plays a critical role in maintaining stable operation and ensuring reliable power delivery to information technology (IT) equipment. However, conventional phase-locked loop (PLL)-based proportional-integral (PI) control strategies may exhibit degraded performance or instability under low short-circuit ratio (SCR) conditions. This paper investigates the behavior of centralized UPS systems under weak-grid conditions and demonstrates, through electromagnetic transient simulations, that PI-controlled rectifiers can become unstable at SCR=2. To address this issue, a power-based control approach is applied to the three-phase rectifier, enabling direct regulation of active and reactive power without relying on PLL synchronization. Simulation results show that the proposed control strategy improves system damping and restores stable operation under weak-grid conditions. The findings highlight the importance of control design for maintaining reliable operation of data center power systems in emerging low-strength grid environments.

</details>


### [490] [Nonholonomic directional pursuit and evasion: Global feedbacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21742)
*Bo Wang,Miroslav Krstic*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对非完整运动体（前后移动）的定向追逐-逃避问题，提出了全局反馈控制策略，从任意初始相对位姿实现追逐与逃避目标，代价是需要对手最大转弯速率的先验知识。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前的工作（半全局方法）只能在有利的初始视线条件下解决定向追逐-逃避问题，本文希望从任意初始相对位姿（即全局）实现该目标。

Method: 提出了全新的反馈控制律设计，采用更温和的前向速度和转向律，允许追逐-逃避距离在全局重定向过程中出现瞬态超调。分析方法基于内源性时间膨胀诱导的积分输入-状态稳定性机制，以及有限时间协同消逝和安全裕度持续引理。

Result: 追逐问题：反馈律保证有限时间内捕获并满足规定的定向对齐；逃避问题：反馈律保证避免捕获并具有规定的安全裕度，且若追逐者转向率衰减可实现自旋逃逸。通过仿真验证了全局捕获和自旋逃逸。

Conclusion: 本文实现了从半全局到全局的突破，代价是需要对手最大转弯速率的先验知识，但设计更温和，允许多种瞬态行为。

Abstract: In a recent paper by the second coauthor, directional pursuit-evasion for strictly forward-moving nonholonomic vehicles was solved "half-globally", namely under favorable initial line-of-sight conditions. In this paper, we develop feedback designs that achieve the directional pursuit and evasion objectives from arbitrary initial relative configurations. We achieve globality with completely different approaches to both the design and the analysis. Our designs are less aggressive in both the forward-speed and steering laws, allowing transient overshoot of the pursuer-evader range during global reorientation. The only price that we pay for globality is that our feedback laws require a priori knowledge of the opponent's maximal turning rate, whereas in the half-global work, no known bound of the opponent's turning rate was assumed. For the pursuit problem, the feedback law guarantees finite-time capture with prescribed directional alignment. For the evasion problem, the feedback law guarantees capture avoidance with a prescribed safety margin and achieves spinaway under a decay condition on the pursuer's turning rate. We illustrate the global capture and spinaway with simulations. The analysis is based on an integral input-to-state stability type mechanism induced by an endogenous time dilation, together with finite-time coextinction and safety-margin persistence lemmas for singularly coupled scalar inequalities.

</details>


### [491] [Inference as Flexibility: Ramp Management for Transmission-Connected AI Data Centres](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21833)
*Zhirui Liang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出利用大语言模型推理服务的软件定义灵活性（通过调整批处理大小）来部分抵消AI训练造成的电力波动，与电池储能系统协同可减少71%的放电能量和51%的峰值放电功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型AI数据中心给电力系统带来快速爬坡、负荷振荡、电压波动等运行挑战，现有缓解方案主要依赖电池储能等外部电力资源，成本较高，需要探索替代性的软件定义缓解方案。

Method: 以150 MW传输连接数据中心为场景，包含训练、推理和基荷组件，使用实测LLaMA-2-70B微调功率曲线和LLaMA-3.1-70B推理功率曲线，比较三种策略：仅电池储能、仅批处理大小控制、以及协调的批处理大小+电池储能。

Result: 混合策略在满足10 MW/min爬坡限制的前提下，将电池放电能量减少71%，峰值放电功率降低51%。

Conclusion: 通过LLM推理服务的批处理大小灵活调度，可以作为一种有效的内生灵活性资源，与电池储能协同可显著降低对储能系统的依赖。

Abstract: The rapid growth of large AI data centres introduces new operational challenges for power systems, including rapid ramping, oscillatory load behavior, voltage fluctuations, and supply-demand balancing impacts. For example, the Alberta Electric System Operator (AESO) has identified transmission-connected data centres (TCDCs) as large non-conforming loads that may need to limit their point-of-connection ramp rates. Existing mitigation approaches mainly rely on exogenous electrical resources, such as battery energy storage systems (BESS). This paper presents a proof-of-concept demonstration of a complementary software-defined mitigation layer: using flexible large language model (LLM) inference serving as endogenous TCDC flexibility to partially offset AI training power ramps. We consider a 150 MW TCDC with training, inference, and base-load components. A measured LLaMA-2-70B fine-tuning power profile is scaled to represent an aggregate training block, while measured LLaMA-3.1-70B inference power traces are used to model batch-size-dependent inference flexibility. Three strategies are compared: BESS-only mitigation, batch-size-only control, and coordinated batch-size plus BESS control. Simulation results show that the hybrid strategy reduces BESS discharge energy by 71% and peak discharge power by 51%, while maintaining near-complete compliance with a 10 MW/min ramp limit.

</details>


### [492] [DC Link Capacitor Ripple Constraints Limit the Benefits of Utility-Owned Four-Wire Power Converters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21934)
*Matthew Deakin,Xu Deng,Shafiq Odhano,Rahmat Heidari*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究了不平衡运行下直流母线电容的热极限对功率变换器释放线路容量的影响，发现考虑该限制后，九种电压源变换器拓扑在相位电流不平衡缓解应用中的容量释放上限相比无纹波情况可提升超过80%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电力公司希望通过功率变换器主动控制网络潮流以释放线路容量，但直流母线电容的热极限可能显著削弱其效益。

Method: 分析了九种电压源变换器拓扑，考虑了不平衡运行下中性点电流和二倍频功率纹波对直流电容热极限的约束。

Result: 在相位电流不平衡缓解应用中，有纹波能力的变换器相比无纹波情况，容量释放上限提升超过80%。

Conclusion: 直流电容的热极限是影响变换器实际效益的关键因素，合理利用纹波能力可显著提升线路容量释放。

Abstract: Utilities are increasingly interested in power converters to increase the headroom of their assets by actively controlling power flows on their network. In this work we demonstrate that thermal limits of dc link capacitors can result in substantially diminished benefits of these converters under unbalanced operation, due to constraints on neutral current and double-line frequency power ripple. Considering nine voltage source converter topologies with varying ripple capabilities, the upper bound (in terms of additional headroom released) increases by more than 80% compared to a no-ripple case for the application of phase current unbalance mitigation.

</details>


### [493] [Joint Visibility Analysis of RIS in Non-Terrestrial Networks through Stochastic Geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21946)
*Ashutosh Balakrishnan,Junse Lee,Francois Baccelli*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究了在城市环境中，RIS部署在建筑屋顶以提供UE与NTN-BS间多跳连接时的联合可见性概率问题。考虑建筑位置和高度的双重随机性，推导了无条件与条件（基于UE-NTN链路为LoS或NLoS）下联合可见RIS数量的闭式期望。特别地，在2D场景中，无条件最大期望联合可见RIS数为两倍的Basel数（π²/6）。仿真分析了建筑密度、高度及NTN-BS参数对结果的影响，并提供了概率热图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 6G NTN通信在城市高楼环境中面临LoS路径阻塞问题，需要研究RIS部署在楼顶进行多跳连接的可行性，并统计性地评估RIS的联合可见性，以指导实际部署。

Method: 将RIS部署建筑建模为PPP（点过程），建筑高度服从指数分布，在2D场景中推导无条件及条件（UE-NTN链路状态）下联合可见RIS数量的闭式期望表达式，并通过仿真验证。

Result: 无条件情况下，最大期望联合可见RIS数量为2×（π²/6），即两倍Basel数。仿真结果展示了建筑密度、平均高度、NTN-BS高度与位置对联合可见性的影响，并生成了概率热力图。

Conclusion: 该研究为城市环境下RIS的部署规划提供了理论依据，有助于提升信号覆盖并评估经济效益。

Abstract: Non-Terrestrial networks (NTNs) are a key theme in upcoming 6G communications, especially for ubiquitous coverage. Urban environments, comprising of high rise buildings often result in blocking the line of sight (LoS) path between the user equipment (UE) and the NTN base station (NTN-BS). In this paper we investigate the situation where reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RIS) are deployed on the building roof-tops to ensure multi-hop connectivity between the UE and the NTN-BS. In such a scenario, it becomes crucial to statistically study the LoS visibility of the RIS from the UE as well as from the NTN-BS, hence termed as joint visibility. In this work, accounting for the dual stochasticity arising from the locations of the RIS deployed buildings and the respective random building heights, we statistically study the probability of joint RIS visibility in a two-dimensional (2D) scenario considering a deterministic location of the NTN-BS. Further, we study the joint RIS visibility statistics conditional on the UE-NTN link being LoS or non-LoS. For the RISs deployed as a point point process (PPP) having exponentially distributed heights, the expected RISs jointly visible under the unconditional and conditional geometric settings are derived in closed form. Interestingly, in the 2D setting, the maximum expected RISs jointly visible, unconditionally, is twice the Basel number $(π^2/ 6)$. The simulated results are analyzed over building density, average building height, the altitude and position of the NTN-BS. We also illustrate probability heatmaps, demonstrating the strongest chance to have a RIS used conditioned on the system geometry. This study is expected to be useful in planning the deployment of RIS in urban areas, improving the signal and for assessing economic aspects.

</details>


### [494] [Uncertainty-Disentangled Probabilistic Stability Analysis in Wind Power Integrated Weak Grids](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21984)
*Samson S. Yu,Yinsong Chen*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出解缠多项式混沌展开（d-PCE），通过独立源变量分离可再生能源预测中的偶发不确定性（不可约的天气随机性）和认知不确定性（可约的预测模型误差），实现了概率小信号稳定性分析中两类不确定性的精确闭式分解，并建立了一种预测感知的(α,β,γ)稳定证书。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统概率小信号稳定性分析将偶发不确定性与认知不确定性混为一谈，无法区分哪些风险源于不可控的天气随机性、哪些源于可改进的预测模型误差，导致稳定性评估和决策缺乏针对性。

Method: 通过二阶可再生能源预测和独立源变量，利用解缠多项式混沌展开（d-PCE）将偶发与认知不确定性在模态稳定映射中精确闭式分离。

Result: 建立了(α,β,γ)稳定证书，其保守分支以O(N^{-1/2})速率收敛到不可约的偶发极限；失败的证书可诊断：认知主导的风险可通过改进数据恢复，偶发主导的风险需要改进物理控制系统。

Conclusion: 该工作为概率小信号稳定性分析提供了不确定性溯源诊断能力，使稳定性评估能区分"数据不够好"与"系统不够强"两种本质不同的风险来源，从而指导差异化的改进策略。

Abstract: Conventional probabilistic small-signal stability analysis (PSSSA) propagates a single forecast distribution, conflating irreducible weather randomness (aleatoric) with reducible forecast-model uncertainty (epistemic). This letter propagates a second-order renewable forecast through the modal-stability map via an independent \emph{germ} variable, separating the two contributions exactly in closed form by a disentangled polynomial chaos expansion (d-PCE). The split underpins a forecast-aware $(α,β,γ)$ stability certificate whose conservative branch converges to its irreducible aleatoric limit at $O(N^{-1/2})$ -- making a failed certificate diagnostic: epistemic-dominated risk recovers with better data; aleatoric-dominated risk needs improvements of the physical control system.

</details>


### [495] [TSO-DSO Coordination for Flexibility Management Across Voltage Levels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21998)
*Gustavo Valverde,Anibal Sanjab,Florin Capitanescu,Christian Rehtanz,Gianluigi Migliavacca,Zhengshuo Li,Innocent Kamwa*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文综述了跨电压层级灵活性协调的技术、市场与监管挑战，分析了现有实践、提出方法及未来研究方向，强调需在不确定性、约束条件和可扩展性下实现输配电网协调优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着ICT、聚合商和灵活性市场的发展，输配电网中的灵活性资源逐渐解锁，但现有方法未能充分协调输配系统运营商的利益，缺乏兼顾物理约束、信息交换限制、不确定性和可扩展性的统一框架。

Method: 采用综述方法，从技术、市场和监管三个维度系统梳理输配协调的复杂性，归纳当前实践与前沿方法，并识别共享挑战与未来研究方向。

Result: 指出不存在通用方案，但存在重要趋势和共性挑战；归纳了当前协调实践、已提出的算法与模型工具，以及监管框架现代化需求。

Conclusion: 跨电压层级的灵活性协调需要综合考虑技术、市场与监管多维度因素，未来研究应聚焦于不确定性处理、信息交换约束下的算法设计及可扩展性提升。

Abstract: Several sources of flexibility in transmission and, especially, distribution networks are being unlocked by advances in information and communication technologies, aggregators, and new flexibility markets. However, maximizing benefits for both transmission and distribution system operators in a coordinated way requires new algorithms, modeling tools, and modernization of regulatory frameworks. Such approaches must account for uncertainties, the physical and operational constraints of flexibility providers and the grid itself, constraints on information exchange, and scalability, including computational requirements and time constraints.
  Given the diverse contexts and jurisdictions around the world, there is no single recipe for achieving coordination, but important trends and shared challenges are emerging. This paper surveys the complexities of coordination from technical, market, and technological perspectives, and outlines current practices, proposed approaches, and future research directions to effectively manage, coordinate, model, and leverage flexibility across voltage levels.

</details>


### [496] [A Pre-Dispatch Resonance Safety Criterion for AI Training Clusters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22096)
*Chandan Chaudhary,Abanish Tiwari,Yansong Pei,Mohammed Ben-Idris,Joydeep Mitra*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文揭示了超大规模AI训练集群在BSP协议下产生的周期性功率波动（方波）会激励电网区域间机电振荡，推导了闭式预调度安全判据，给出了最大安全集群规模与迭代周期的关系，并通过IEEE 39节点系统验证：共振时最大安全GPU数为66,900，将迭代周期调离共振点1秒以内可降低7.4倍的功率偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超大规模AI训练集群在BSP同步协议下所有GPU锁步地在计算与空闲间切换，导致总功率呈现方波形式，迭代周期（1-10秒）正好落在大型互联电网的区域间机电振荡模态频带内，可能驱动谐振。现有可靠性指令缺乏对此类新型大负荷的解析筛选工具，因此需要建立安全判据。

Method: 基于稳态受迫两区域摇摆方程的反演推导，得到闭式预调度安全判据。判据定义了迭代周期的危险频带，扩展到方波谐波，并通过规划研究的特征分析参数化模态响应，通过GPU规格参数化强迫幅值。在IEEE 39节点系统上以生产代表性占空比进行验证。

Result: 在轻阻尼条件下，共振时最大安全集群规模为66,900个GPU。将同一任务的迭代周期调离共振点不到1秒，功率偏差降低7.4倍，无需任何硬件更改。

Conclusion: 训练迭代周期是一个可控的电网安全参数，本文提供的解析筛选工具可用于填补当前可靠性指令对大型AI负荷缺乏评估手段的空白。

Abstract: Hyperscale AI training clusters operate under the Bulk Synchronous Parallel protocol, which impose a periodic power swing on the transmission grid. Every GPU in the job transitions between compute and idle in lockstep, so the aggregate power traces a square wave at the training iteration period. Production iteration periods of one to ten seconds place the forcing frequency within the inter-area electromechanical mode band of large interconnections, where a training schedule can drive a mode at resonance. This paper derives a closed-form pre-dispatch safety criterion that bounds the maximum cluster size a grid can absorb at any proposed iteration period. The derivation inverts the steady-state forced two-area swing equations. The criterion defines a danger band of iteration periods, extends to the square-wave harmonics, and parameterizes the modal response from planning-study eigenanalysis and the forcing amplitude from GPU specifications. Applied to the IEEE 39-bus system at a production-representative duty cycle, the criterion shows that the maximum safe cluster at resonance is $66\,900$ GPUs under light damping. Rescheduling the same job less than one second away from resonance reduces the deviation $7.4\times$ with no hardware change. These results establish the training iteration period as a controllable grid-safety parameter and supply the analytic screening tool that reliability directives on current large loads lack.

</details>


### [497] [Reinforcement Learning-Based Traffic Signal Control for IoT-Enabled Intersections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22108)
*Yousef AlSaqabi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于近端策略优化（PPO）的强化学习控制器，用于科威特城市路口的自适应交通信号控制。在真实仿真环境中，该方法相比固定时间控制和车辆感应控制，分别降低了46%和34%的平均车辆延误，并减少约23%的CO2排放。该方法的性能在需求扰动、不同交通模式及奖励函数消融实验中均保持稳健，展示了学习型边缘交通控制作为智能城市交通系统构建模块的实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市交通拥堵在依赖汽车的城市中持续存在，带来巨大的经济和社会成本。现有交通信号系统虽已联网，但仍需更智能的自适应管理方法。本文旨在探索强化学习作为边缘智能方法，在不依赖未来需求信息或集中协调的情况下，实现自适应交通信号控制，以提升交通效率并降低排放。

Method: 提出基于PPO（Proximal Policy Optimization）的强化学习控制器，利用本地观测的交通状态动态分配绿灯时长。在真实科威特交通数据驱动的仿真环境中进行训练和评估，并与固定时间控制和车辆感应控制（当前实践标准）进行对比。

Result: 相比固定时间控制，平均车辆延误降低46%；相比车辆感应控制，降低34%。每辆车CO2排放减少约23%。在±15%需求扰动、工作日与周末交通模式泛化及奖励函数消融实验中，性能增益保持稳健。五次随机种子的低方差验证了统计可靠性。

Conclusion: 研究表明，基于学习的边缘交通信号控制可作为物联网智能城市交通系统中的实用构建模块，也是迈向完全互联的车联网（IoV）城市移动性部署的前驱基础。

Abstract: Urban traffic congestion remains a persistent challenge in car-dependent cities, imposing significant economic and societal costs. Traffic signal systems are increasingly deployed as networked cyber-physical components within smart-city infrastructures, where distributed sensing and edge intelligence enable adaptive traffic management. This paper investigates reinforcement learning (RL) as an edge-intelligent approach for adaptive traffic signal operation at a signalized urban intersection in Kuwait. A Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)-based controller is developed to dynamically allocate green-phase durations using locally observed traffic states, without relying on future demand information or centralized coordination. The controller is evaluated in a realistic simulation environment informed by real-world hourly traffic volume data from Kuwait, and is compared against both conventional fixed-time control and a vehicle-actuated controller representing the current state of practice, using average vehicle delay, queue length, and emissions as performance metrics. Under nominal conditions, the proposed controller reduces average vehicle delay by 46% relative to fixed-time control and 34% relative to actuated control, while also lowering per-vehicle CO2 emissions by approximately 23%. These performance gains persist under demand perturbations of +/-15%, generalize from weekday to weekend traffic patterns, and are corroborated by a reward function ablation; low variance across five random seeds confirms their statistical reliability. These findings demonstrate the practicality of learning-based edge traffic signal control as a building block for IoT-enabled smart-city transportation systems, and as a deployable precursor toward fully connected, Internet of Vehicles (IoV)-based urban mobility.

</details>


### [498] [On the connection between input-output resonances and internal modes of linear time-invariant systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22122)
*Bassam Bamieh*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文证明了LTI系统的内部模态位置与输入输出频率响应的形状之间通常没有直接联系，共振峰不一定对应欠阻尼内部模态，这种现象在高维系统中虽罕见但存在，SISO情况下归因于系统零点位置，MIMO情况下则与内部动力学矩阵的非正规性有关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战传统认知中频率响应共振峰与系统欠阻尼内部模态之间的直观对应关系，揭示高维LTI系统中可能存在的反例。

Method: 通过理论分析和数学推导，分别针对SISO和MIMO情形，从系统零点和矩阵非正规性两个角度解释该现象的产生机制。

Result: 发现共振峰与欠阻尼模态无必然联系；SISO中零点位置起关键作用；MIMO中即使无零点，矩阵非正规性也能导致该现象。

Conclusion: 频率响应的形状不能简单用来推断系统内部模态特性，需谨慎对待二者之间的关系。

Abstract: It is shown that in general, there is no connection between the location of the internal modes of a Linear Time-Invariant (LTI) system and the shape of its input-output frequency response. In particular, it is shown that resonance peaks of the frequency response do not necessarily correspond to under-damped internal modes. This phenomenon, though rare, can occur in high (or infinite) dimensional LTI systems. In the Single Input Single Output (SISO) case, this phenomenon can be attributed to the location of system zeros, while in certain Multi Input Multi Output (MIMO) cases without system zeros, it can be attributed to the non-normality of the matrix generating the internal dynamics.

</details>


### [499] [Monotonic, Minimum-Settling-Time PI Tuning for First-Order-Plus-Dead-Time Plants: A Tangency Characterization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22217)
*Senol Gulgonul*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对一阶加纯滞后(FOTD)对象，研究如何在仅约束输出单调（零超调）的前提下，实现最快的设定点阶跃响应。最优解既非零极点对消，也非多重实主导极点(MRDP)设计，而是一个非对消点，其特征是闭环包含一个慢实模态（小残差）和一个较快的欠阻尼复共轭对。核心是单一正切恒等式tan(omega tau* + alpha) = (a - b)/omega，由此导出三个保真度层次的设计：显式闭式规则、精确响应简化、无仿真超越方程组。相比临界阻尼Lambert-W对消规则，2%调节时间降低14-52%，负载IAE降低5-38%，但最大灵敏度从1.39升至1.44-1.62。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PI调优方法（如零极点对消、MRDP、Lambert-W临界阻尼）在实现严格单调响应时并非最优。作者旨在精确刻画在输出单调性约束下最快设定点响应的PI调优点，并给出可操作的解析设计规则。

Method: 1) 将单调性边界转化为一个解析恒等式（正切恒等式），描述次级复模态恰好不使输出斜率降至零的条件。2) 从该恒等式出发，将设计问题简化为嵌套标量条件。3) 提供三个保真度层次：显式闭式规则（最简）、基于响应的精确简化、以及仅需解四次多项式的无仿真超越方程组。

Result: 相比Lambert-W临界阻尼对消规则，2%调节时间降低14-52%，负载IAE降低5-38%。代价：延迟主导(T/L<=0.55)时控制为单脉冲（在Huba意义上可接受且更快），滞后比更大时变为双脉冲；最大灵敏度从1.39升至1.44-1.62。

Conclusion: 该设计并非在所有指标上优于现有规则，而是对特定、明确定义的工作点（输出单调最快响应）的精确刻画，并提供了诚实的多指标对比。贡献在于解析地确定了零超调约束下的最优PI调优边界。

Abstract: This paper studies PI tuning of a first-order-plus-dead-time (FOTD) plant for the fastest strictly monotone (zero-overshoot) setpoint step response, with monotonicity imposed on the plant output only. The minimizer is shown to be neither the pole-zero cancellation design nor the multiple real dominant pole (MRDP) design. It is a non-cancellation point at which the closed loop carries a slow real mode of small residue together with a faster underdamped complex pair, with the controller zero placed near the dominant real pole. The analytical centerpiece is a single tangency identity, tan(omega tau_star + alpha) = (a - b)/omega, which states that the monotonicity boundary is the locus where the secondary complex mode just fails to drive the output slope below zero. From this identity the design reduces to nested scalar conditions, realized at three levels of fidelity: an explicit closed-form rule, an exact response-based reduction, and a simulation-free transcendental system whose only non-elementary step is a fourth-order polynomial root. Relative to the critically damped Lambert-W cancellation rule the design reduces the 2% settling time by 14 to 52 percent and lowers the load integrated absolute error by 5 to 38 percent. We report the full cost: for delay-dominated plants (T/L <= 0.55) the control stays one-pulse, so the design is itself admissible in Huba's sense and merely faster, but for larger lag ratios the control becomes two-pulse, and across the range the maximum sensitivity rises from 1.39 to between 1.44 and 1.62. The contribution is positioned not as a uniformly better tuning but as the exact characterization of a specific, well-defined operating point, with an honest multi-metric comparison against established rules.

</details>


### [500] [Regret-Guaranteed Safe Switching: LQR Setting with Unknown Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22223)
*Jafar Abbaszadeh Chekan,S. Rasoul Etesami,Cedric Langbort*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究LQR设定下，在模式参数未知、切换信息在线暴露时的学习控制问题，提出了一种同时优化切换时机与控制增益的策略，并在未知模型下实现了$\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{M}|^{1/4} n_s^{3/4} + n_m)$的预期遗憾。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在LQR控制中，模式参数通常未知且切换信息在线暴露，现有方法难以同时满足状态范数有界约束与累积成本最小化，因此本文旨在提出一种能同时决定切换时机与控制增益的学习控制策略。

Method: 首先在已知模型设定下，引入$(\alpha,\beta)$-可控性概念，证明在每种模式被无限次访问的假设下，最优策略是在各模式应用DARE解得的反馈增益并选择满足可控性条件的驻留时间（基准策略）。然后在未知模型设定下，提出在线算法，通过精确估计驻留时间误差，最小化与离线基准策略的遗憾差异。

Result: 在未知模型设定下，该算法实现了$\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{M}|^{1/4} n_s^{3/4} + n_m)$的预期遗憾，其中$n_s$为切换次数，$|\mathcal{M}|$为模式数，$n_m$为恶意切换次数。

Conclusion: 本文提出的方法在LQR切换系统的未知参数设定下，既保证了状态范数的可控性约束，又在累积成本上接近离线最优基准，理论遗憾上界清晰。

Abstract: We consider learning-based control in LQR setting, where the parameters associated with each mode are a priori unknown. The next mode to be activated is revealed online only at the time of switching. The objective is to determine both the switching times and the control gains for each mode such that (1) the norm of the system state remains bounded according to a prescribed criterion, and (2) the accumulated cost is minimized. To formalize the state-norm requirement, we introduce the notion of $(α,β)$-controllability for given parameters $α$ and $β$. We first study the problem in a known model setting and show that, under the switching mechanism described above and under the assumption that each mode is visited infinitely often, the strategy that minimizes the average expected cost consists of applying, in each mode, the feedback gain obtained from the solution of the discrete algebraic Riccati equation, while selecting dwell times that sufficiently satisfy the controllability condition. We refer to this strategy as the benchmark policy. Next, we propose an algorithm for the unknown-model setting that minimizes the regret, defined as the difference between the cumulative cost incurred by the online algorithm and that of the offline benchmark. By accurately estimating dwell-time errors, our method achieves an expected regret of $\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{M}|^{1/4} n_s^{3/4} + n_m)$, where $n_s$ denotes the number of switches, $|\mathcal{M}|$ is the number of modes, and $n_m$ is the number of malignant switches.

</details>


### [501] [Active Sensing and Deferred-Decision Trajectory Optimization for Robust Target Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22277)
*Farbod Siahkali,Mengxue Hou,Vijay Gupta*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种主动感知的延迟决策轨迹优化方法（AS-DDTO），在移动传感系统中资源受限且需保持对候选目标可达性的前提下，通过增加信息采集项来优化轨迹，以更早识别目标。支持贝叶斯更新和共形候选集更新，数值实验证明其优于标准DDTO。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的延迟决策轨迹优化（DDTO）虽然可以保持对多个候选目标的可达性，但缺乏主动信息采集的能力，导致目标识别效率较低。本文希望在不牺牲可达性的前提下，通过感知信息引导轨迹设计，实现更早的目标识别。

Method: 提出了AS-DDTO框架，在DDTO的规划目标中加入轨迹相关的信息采集项，使重合轨迹段偏向信息量更大的区域。采用贝叶斯更新和共形候选集更新来处理距离相关的感知不确定性，并推导了混合整数锥规划的重构形式，同时提供了递归可行性、置信度集中性和固定时间覆盖的理论保证。

Result: 数值模拟表明，在距离相关感知不确定性和有限感知预算的条件下，AS-DDTO相比标准DDTO能够更早、更准确地识别目标。

Conclusion: AS-DDTO在保持多目标可达性的同时，通过主动信息采集显著提升了目标识别效率，并具有可证明的收敛性和可行性保证，适用于资源受限的移动传感系统。

Abstract: We study trajectory optimization in mobile sensing systems that must identify which member of a finite candidate set is the true target, while maintaining reachability to all potential candidate targets, under resource constraints. Deferred-Decision Trajectory Optimization (DDTO) addresses this setting by computing trajectories that reach individual targets but remain coincident for as long as possible before separating toward different targets. We propose Active-Sensing DDTO (AS-DDTO), which extends DDTO by adding a trajectory-dependent information-acquisition term to the planning objective. The resulting planner maintains reachability to candidate targets while biasing the coincident portion of the trajectories toward regions that enable earlier target identification. The framework supports Bayesian updates and conformal candidate-set updates for distance-dependent sensing. We derive a mixed-integer conic reformulation and provide guarantees on recursive feasibility, belief concentration, and fixed-time coverage for the raw conformal candidate set. Numerical simulations show improved target identification compared with standard DDTO under distance-dependent sensing uncertainty and limited sensing budget.

</details>


### [502] [Stateful Pricing and Allocation for Repeated Constrained DER Coordination in Distribution Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22463)
*Shaun Sweeney,Peter Kilby,Blake Penney,Komeil Moghaddasi,Sunera Mudiyanselage*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为自动做市商（AMM）的状态化网络物理协调机制，用于高渗透分布式能源配电网的双向容量分配。相比传统动态运行包络（DOE），AMM减少了76%的未满足灵活需求，出口削减降低24.5%，且热约束违规为零，年度馈线间Jain指数达0.9998。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高渗透分布式能源配电网面临双向容量稀缺问题（进口稀缺时灵活需求分配、出口拥塞时发电削减），现有动态运行包络（DOE）缺乏跨时间修正，动态网络电价（DNP）无法保证约束满足，亟需一种兼顾公平、效率和可行性的协调机制。

Method: 提出自动做市商（AMM）机制：(1) 为进口和出口设置双公平状态；(2) 基于电压感知赤字信号驱动有界双边电价；(3) 在两层MV/LV架构内进行可行性约束匹配。

Result: 在CSIRO MV+33LV馈线数据集上，AMM相比等量分配DOE：未满足灵活需求从96.0 MWh降至23.2 MWh（-76%），出口削减从85.4 MWh降至64.5 MWh，零热约束违规；年际馈线间Jain指数0.9998，从第6个月起优于所有DOE变体。与FET/FOT/FUH直接对比表明，后者通过显式max-min MV目标实现更高最差馈线公平性，但离线运行且缺乏实时双边信号。

Conclusion: AMM在实时可行性和公平性之间取得了有效平衡，可作为机器对机器DER接入的附加协调层；AMM与公平随时间变化的DOE（FET/FOT/FUH）解决不同目标，未来可结合使用。

Abstract: Distribution networks with high penetrations of distributed energy resources (DERs) must repeatedly allocate limited network capability in two directions: under import scarcity, which flexible demand is served, and under export congestion, which generation is curtailed. Dynamic operating envelopes (DOEs) enforce hard feasibility bounds but lack intertemporal correction, while dynamic network prices (DNPs) provide an allocative signal but cannot guarantee constraint satisfaction. This paper develops a stateful cyber-physical coordination mechanism, termed an Automatic Market Maker (AMM), as an additive coordination layer for machine-to-machine DER access. The mechanism combines dual fairness states for import and export, bounded bilateral prices driven by a voltage-aware deficit signal, and feasibility-constrained matching within a two-tier MV/LV architecture. Experiments on the CSIRO MV+33LV feeder dataset compare five mechanisms and benchmark the fair-over-time DOE formulations of Moring et al. (FET, FOT, FUH). Relative to equal-allocation DOE, the AMM reduces unserved flexible demand by 76% (96.0 MWh to 23.2 MWh) with zero thermal violations and reduces export curtailment from 85.4 MWh to 64.5 MWh. Near-identical DOE and DOE-GREEDY performance confirms that heuristic choice alone does not improve repeated constrained outcomes. The AMM reaches an annual inter-feeder Jain index of 0.9998, outperforming all DOE variants from month 6 onwards. Direct benchmarking against FET/FOT/FUH shows that these mechanisms achieve higher worst-feeder equity through an explicit max-min MV objective, but operate offline over predetermined horizons and do not provide bilateral scarcity signals, real-time operation, or participant-level intertemporal correction. The two approaches address different objectives and may be combined in future work.

</details>


### [503] [An Enhanced Submodule for Modular Multilevel Converter with DC Fault Ride-Through Capability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22469)
*Yu Liu,Shengbo Zhang,Yating Yuan*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出一种改进型子模块拓扑，在保持直流故障穿越能力的同时，将所需电容总量降低75%，并减少一个二极管，从而降低MMC成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DCSM虽具备直流故障穿越能力，但其两个相同电容串联导致等效电容减半，增加了电容需求。为克服此缺陷，提出增强型子模块。

Method: 提出一种新型子模块拓扑，详细描述其工作模式，并通过实验验证其功能。

Result: 在相同储能容量下，相比DCSM，总电容需求降低75%；减少一个二极管；能有效抑制直流故障电流并恢复正常运行。

Conclusion: 所提子模块在不依赖外部保护装置的前提下，兼具直流故障穿越能力和更低的成本与电容需求，是一种更优的MMC子模块方案。

Abstract: Modular multilevel converter (MMC) has been successfully applied in various power electronic systems owing to its high efficiency, scalability, and superior output performance. Although the half-bridge submodule (HBSM) is widely used in MMCs for its structural simplicity, it is incapable of handling direct-current (DC) short-circuit faults. The diode-clamp submodule (DCSM) addresses this limitation by providing DC fault ride-through capability. However, because its two identical capacitors are connected in series, the equivalent capacitance is halved. To overcome this drawback, an enhanced SM is proposed in this paper. For the same energy storage capacity, the proposed SM reduces the total required capacitance by 75% compared with the DCSM. In addition, the proposed SM requires one fewer diode than the DCSM, thereby lowering the overall MMC capital cost. The topology and the operating modes of the proposed SM are described in detail, and its functionality is experimentally validated. The results demonstrate that the proposed SM can suppress DC fault currents and restore normal operation without additional external protection devices.

</details>


### [504] [Physics-Informed Predictive Control for Integrated Electric-Vehicle Thermal Management: An Open, Real-Data-Anchored Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22529)
*Yifan Wang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了OpenEV-ThermoSciML，一个开源、可复现的电动汽车热管理基准测试平台，并在此基础上开发了物理信息科学机器学习代理模型和遮蔽MPC控制器，在多个真实场景下显著优于基于规则的控制器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电动汽车热管理是耦合的整车级问题（电池包、乘客舱、热泵、空气质量等子系统相互竞争共享资源），但现有研究大多在专有模型上优化单一子系统，缺乏公平、可复现的对比基准。

Method: 1) 构建开源基准：耦合电池电热老化模型、双节点座舱模型、热泵/HVAC模型、CO₂/通风模型，使用真实驾驶循环和天气数据，多目标评分体系；2) 开发物理信息科学机器学习代理模型：名义物理先验+学习残差+守恒惩罚项；3) 设计遮蔽Sci-ML模型预测控制器。

Result: 代理模型在分布外预测中滚动RMSE为0.014（黑箱1.168、Koopman 3.991）；遮蔽MPC在六个场景中全面优于规则控制器，如热天US06工况下能耗-15%、舒适度RMSE-47%、峰值CO₂-25%、电池热梯度-78%，且增益可迁移至OpenModelica 8节点联合仿真平台。

Conclusion: 开源基准平台促进了电动汽车热管理研究的公平比较与可复现性，物理信息机器学习方法在分布外泛化和控制性能上显著优于纯数据驱动方法，为电动汽车热管理的智能优化提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Thermal management in a battery-electric vehicle (BEV) is a coupled, vehicle-level problem: the battery pack, the passenger cabin, the heat pump, and cabin air quality compete for shared actuation and energy, yet most studies optimise a single subsystem on proprietary models, which prevents fair, reproducible comparison. We present OpenEV-ThermoSciML, an open and reproducible benchmark that couples a battery electro-thermal-aging model, a two-node cabin model, a heat-pump/HVAC model, and a CO$_2$/ventilation model under real driving cycles (EPA) and real weather (NREL TMY3, NASA POWER), scored by a multi-objective suite spanning battery health, PMV/PPD comfort, cabin air quality, and HVAC energy. The benchmark's battery thermal core is anchored and validated on real BEV battery-management-system (BMS) data; the reduced battery (two-state) and cabin (two-node) models are validated against converged higher-fidelity references and, for the cabin, independently cross-checked against EnergyPlus 25.2.0. On top of the benchmark we develop a physics-informed scientific-machine-learning (Sci-ML) surrogate -- a nominal-physics prior plus a learned residual with conservation penalties -- that is exact on conserved quantities and dominates black-box and Koopman surrogates out-of-distribution (overall rollout RMSE 0.014 vs 1.168 and 3.991). A shielded Sci-ML model-predictive controller (MPC) delivers statistically significant, all-positive improvements over a production-like rule-based controller across six scenarios -- including a real hot-day US06 trip (energy $-15\%$, comfort RMSE $-47\%$, peak CO$_2$ $-25\%$, battery thermal-gradient $-78\%$) -- and these gains transfer to an independently exported OpenModelica 8-node co-simulation plant.

</details>


### [505] [LAWNs Meet SWIPT: Beamforming and Power Splitting Optimization for Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22534)
*Jun Wu,Wenchao Liu,Weijie Yuan,Nanchi Su*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于SWIPT的低空无线网络（LAWN）系统，使多天线基站通过功率分割同时向无人机群传输控制信息和无线能量，并利用流函数理论构建安全轨迹，结合模型预测控制、半定松弛和逐次凸近似优化控制与波束赋形，实现了高跟踪精度与能量收集效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决电池受限的低空无线网络中无人机群的可持续连接问题，需要在避开动态禁飞区的同时实现无线信息与能量的同时传输。

Method: 采用流函数理论构建平滑安全参考轨迹；提出两阶段优化框架：第一阶段用模型预测控制（MPC）生成预测控制输入，第二阶段用半定松弛（SDR）和逐次凸近似（SCA）迭代优化波束赋形向量和功率分割比，并证明SDR的紧致性。

Result: 数值结果表明，所提方案在跟踪精度和收集能量方面显著优于基准方案，验证了其在可持续LAWN系统中的有效性。

Conclusion: SWIPT与轨迹规划、联合优化的结合能有效提升低空无线网络的可持续性与安全性，为电池受限的无人机集群控制提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Simultaneous wireless information and power transfer (SWIPT) has emerged as a promising paradigm for enabling sustainable connectivity in battery-limited low-altitude wireless networks (LAWNs). This paper investigates a SWIPT-enabled LAWN system in which a multi-antenna base station (BS) simultaneously delivers control information and wireless energy to a fleet of uncrewed aircraft systems (UASs) via power splitting. In particular, the BS remotely guides the UASs to accurately track predefined reference trajectories toward their destinations while avoiding multiple mobile no-fly zones (NFZs). To guarantee collision-free path planning, we first construct smooth and safe reference trajectories using stream function theory. Then, a real-time optimization problem is formulated, which jointly takes into account the wireless control cost and energy sustainability by optimizing control inputs, transmit beamforming vectors, and the power splitting ratios. To address the resultant non-convex problem, a two-stage optimization framework is proposed. First, we develop a model predictive control (MPC)-based method to generate predictive control inputs. Subsequently, we derive a computationally efficient iterative algorithm to optimize the beamforming vectors and power splitting ratios by applying semidefinite relaxation (SDR) and successive convex approximation (SCA) techniques. We further prove that the SDR is tight for our formulation. Extensive numerical results demonstrate that our proposed design significantly outperforms benchmark schemes in terms of tracking accuracy and harvested energy, thereby validating its effectiveness for sustainable implementation in LAWN systems.

</details>


### [506] [Towards an FMI Layered Standard for DAE: Applications for Simulation and Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22544)
*Elmir Nahodovic,Andreas Heuermann,Joel A. E. Andersson,Adwait Verulkar,Srikanth Sivaramakrishnan,Masoud Najafi,Linus Langenkamp,Christian Bertsch,Erik Henningsson,Hans Olsson,Bernhard Bachmann*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出fmi-ls-dae分层标准扩展，允许FMU暴露半显式指标1的微分代数方程（DAE）而非仅混合常微分方程（ODE），解决了传统FMI 3.0在处理内部代数方程时存在的精度、计算成本、鲁棒性问题。通过原型实现验证，在工业级多连杆悬架模型上，DAE-FMU能在ODE-FMU无法收敛的最优控制问题上成功收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FMI 3.0标准仅支持混合ODE，要求代数方程在FMU内部通过牛顿迭代求解，导致精度下降、计算开销增加、引入隐藏求解器状态，并在下游仿真与优化中产生鲁棒性问题。亟需一种能暴露代数方程与代数变量的标准扩展。

Method: 提出fmi-ls-dae分层标准，将代数方程及关联代数变量作为半显式指标1的DAE暴露。扩展FMI XML schema，通过Dymola和CasADi生成原型FMU，并由CasADi、FMIOPT、Simcenter Twin Activate、MOO导入进行仿真与动态优化验证。

Result: 在工业级多连杆悬架模型上，DAE-FMU使优化例程在ODE-FMU无法收敛的最优控制问题上成功收敛，证明了DAE暴露在鲁棒性和收敛性上的优势。

Conclusion: 提出的DAE-FMU分层标准能有效提升复杂模型（含代数方程）在仿真与优化中的鲁棒性与收敛性，未来工作将支持更高指标DAE、一致初始化和事件处理。

Abstract: The Functional Mock-up Interface (FMI) 3.0 standard for Model Exchange is restricted to hybrid ordinary differential equations, requiring any internal algebraic equations to be solved inside the Functional Mock-up Unit (FMU) before derivatives are returned to the importer. For models originating from, e.g. Modelica, this means that nonlinear algebraic equations must be solved through internal Newton iterations, which can reduce accuracy, increase computational cost, introduce hidden solver states, and cause robustness issues in downstream simulation and optimization workflows. In this article, we present a proposal for a layered standard, fmi-ls-dae, that exposes algebraic equations and their associated algebraic variables as part of a semi-explicit index-1 differential-algebraic equation. We describe the proposed extensions to the FMI XML schema and demonstrate the approach through prototype implementations: Dymola and CasADi generate FMUs that expose this semi-explicit index-1 formulation, while CasADi, FMIOPT, Simcenter Twin Activate, and MOO (the dynamic optimization tool of OpenModelica) import them for simulation and dynamic optimization. On an industrially relevant multilink suspension corner model, the proposed DAE-FMU formulation enables the optimization routine to converge on an optimal control problem on which the equivalent ODE-FMU fails to converge. We outline ongoing work towards supporting higher-index DAEs, consistent initialization, and event handling,

</details>


### [507] [Dynamic Resilience Assessment of Power Systems With Data Center Load Events Using Physics-Informed Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22590)
*Chen Chao,Zixiao Ma,Ziang Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于DAE-PINN的电网侧弹性评估框架，利用电网侧动态模型和可观测的扰动后轨迹，无需数据中心内部详细模型即可评估大型数据中心负荷脱网与分阶段重连对电力系统带来的弹性挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型数据中心脱网和分阶段重连会引发快速电压和频率动态变化，而传统的静态服务状态或能量指标无法捕捉这些动态特性，因此需要一种新的弹性评估框架来量化此类扰动的影响。

Method: 开发了一种基于隐式后向欧拉残差的无监督DAE-PINN（微分代数方程-物理信息神经网络），用于联合预测动态和代数状态，实现重复的扰动后轨迹评估；并采用归一化多阶段弹性指标量化扰动、退化状态和恢复阶段的影响，用于筛选数据中心重连时机和负荷斜坡策略。

Result: 在改进的IEEE 33节点馈线案例中，所提出的DAE-PINN能够准确追踪数值DAE解，并在重复恢复筛查中显著减少计算时间；所提出的指标能够区分扰动规模、数据中心位置和重连策略的影响，揭示了恢复速度与瞬时弹性损失之间的权衡关系。

Conclusion: 该框架为电网侧评估数据中心负荷的弹性影响提供了有效的工具，可在无需数据中心内部模型的前提下实现快速、准确的动态评估和策略筛选。

Abstract: Large data center loads introduce new resilience challenges to power systems because their disconnection and staged reconnection can induce fast voltage and frequency dynamics that are not captured by static service-status or energy-based metrics. This paper proposes a utility-side, physics-informed resilience assessment framework that evaluates these events using only grid-side dynamic models and observable post-disturbance trajectories, without requiring detailed internal data center models. An unsupervised differential algebraic equation-physics informed neural network (DAE-PINN) based on an implicit backward Euler residual is developed to jointly predict dynamic and algebraic states, enabling repeated post-disturbance trajectory evaluation while enforcing network algebraic consistency. Normalized multi-phase resilience metrics are then used to quantify disturbance, degraded-state, and restoration-period impacts and to screen data center reconnection timing and load-ramping strategies under security constraints. Case studies on a modified IEEE 33-bus feeder show that the proposed DAE-PINN accurately tracks numerical DAE solutions and substantially reduces computation time in repeated restoration screening. The proposed metrics distinguish the effects of disturbance size, data center location, and reconnection strategy, revealing the trade-off between restoration speed and transient resilience loss.

</details>


### [508] [Development, Validation, and Benchmarking of a Multidisciplinary Semi-Analytical Model for Wave Energy Converters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22739)
*Rebecca McCabe,Madison Dietrich,Maha Haji*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为MDOcean的开源波浪能转换器（WEC）仿真框架，集成水动力学、动力学、结构和经济性分析，通过解析/半解析方法实现毫秒级快速仿真，精度接近高保真数值方法，支持早期设计探索和多学科优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有WEC仿真工具要么计算成本过高无法进行大规模优化，要么学科范围过窄无法支持集成设计研究，缺乏兼顾计算效率与多学科综合能力的早期设计平台。

Method: 集成特征函数线性水动力学求解器、准线性化频域动力学引擎（建模阻尼和饱和非线性）、结构尺寸模块（涵盖屈服、极限、屈曲、风暴和疲劳设计准则）以及简单成本模型。核心创新是线性化伪谱最优控制公式，将描述函数与解析二次约束二次规划（QCQP）框架结合，高效处理非线性与约束。

Result: MDOcean的单次运行时间仅151毫秒，比主流WEC仿真工具快数个数量级，与高保真基准的误差在多数情况下保持在百分之几以内。同时揭示了限值行为、标度律、子系统交互及关键设计权衡。

Conclusion: MDOcean为WEC的早期设计探索、参数分析和多学科优化提供了高效且足够精确的仿真工具，填补了现有工具在计算效率与学科综合能力之间的空白。

Abstract: Wave energy converters (WECs) require system-level techno-economic analysis to balance power production, cost, and survivability. Existing simulation tools are either too computationally costly for large-scale optimization or too narrow in disciplinary scope to support integrated design studies. This work presents MDOcean, a novel open-source WEC simulation framework for rapid early-stage design exploration, parametric analysis, and multidisciplinary optimization. MDOcean integrates hydrodynamics, dynamics, structures, and economics in a computationally efficient architecture based on analytical and semi-analytical methods that substantially reduce runtime while maintaining near-numerical accuracy.
  The framework includes an eigenfunction-based linear hydrodynamic solver, a quasi-linearized frequency-domain dynamics engine capable of modeling drag and saturation nonlinearities, a structural sizing module incorporating realistic yield, ultimate, buckling, storm, and fatigue design criteria, and a simple cost model for techno-economic assessment. Particular emphasis is placed on the linearized pseudo-spectral optimal control formulation, which extends frequency-domain constraint-handling approaches with a unified describing-function and analytical quadratically-constrained quadratic program framework. This formulation efficiently treats nonlinearities and constraints while preserving compatibility with optimization and frequency-domain analysis techniques.
  Validation and benchmarking demonstrate that MDOcean's 151 ms runtime is orders of magnitude faster than leading WEC simulation tools while maintaining agreement with higher-fidelity baselines to within a few percent in most cases. The framework also provides insight into limiting behaviors, scaling laws, subsystem interactions, and key tradeoffs governing WEC design and techno-economic performance.

</details>


### [509] [Delayed Functional Observers for the Realization of Generalized Delayed Control Laws](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22761)
*Hieu Trinh*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种延迟功能观测器设计方法，用于在输入和输出存在显著时延的情况下，渐进估计广义延迟控制律，从而在同时存在不匹配的输入和输出时延的条件下，仍能保证基于观测器的控制系统稳定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献在时延系统观测器设计方面已取得进展，但如何在**同时存在显著且不匹配的输入和输出时延**的情况下设计观测器，仍是一个未充分解决的问题。

Method: 基于现有研究成果，提出**延迟功能观测器**的设计方法，直接对**广义延迟控制律**进行渐进估计。

Result: 该框架能**扩展输入时延的可允许界限**，并在**同时存在不匹配的输入和输出时延**的条件下，保证基于观测器的控制方案的稳定性。

Conclusion: 所提出的延迟功能观测器设计方法成功解决了具有显著时延系统中控制律估计的难题，为实际系统中常见的双端时延问题提供了一种有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Building on the collective advancements in the literature \cite{trinh1, trinh2, trinhnn26, trinhnam26, trinhnam1}, this paper proposes the design of delayed functional observers to asymptotically estimate a generalized delayed control law under significant input and output delays. This framework enables designers to extend the allowable bounds for input delays while ensuring that the observer-based control scheme stabilizes the system despite simultaneous mismatched input and output time-delays.

</details>


### [510] [Adaptive Joint Beamforming and Fluid Antenna System Design for 6G ISAC](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22897)
*Haoyu Quan,Junhui Zhao,Dongming Wang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出基于软演员-评论家（SAC）算法的端到端优化框架，联合优化流体天线系统（FAS）拓扑重构与有源波束赋形，用于移动集成感知与通信（ISAC）系统。仿真表明在线推理延迟仅4ms，通信性能提升42%，且相比SCA-SDR基准节省57%天线数量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固定位置天线（FPA）受静态物理拓扑限制，难以适应快速变化的无线环境；流体天线系统（FAS）通过动态重构天线位置引入额外空间自由度，但如何联合优化FAS拓扑与有源波束赋形以实现实时决策仍待解决。

Method: 提出基于软演员-评论家（SAC）算法的端到端优化框架，联合优化FAS拓扑重构和有源波束赋形，实现移动ISAC系统的实时决策。

Result: 在线推理延迟仅4ms；相比交替优化方法通信性能提升42%；相比SCA-SDR基准，以57%更少的天线实现可比性能。

Conclusion: 基于SAC的端到端框架能有效解决FAS-ISAC系统的实时联合优化问题，兼具低延迟、高性能和硬件效率优势。

Abstract: Fixed-Position Antennas (FPAs) are constrained by static physical topologies and struggle to adapt to rapidly varying wireless environments. By dynamically reconfiguring the antenna positions, Fluid Antenna Systems (FASs) introduce additional spatial Degrees of Freedom (DoF) for wireless optimization. This paper investigates the joint optimization of Fluid Antenna System (FAS) topology reconfiguration and active beamforming for mobile Integrated Sensing and Communication (ISAC) systems. To enable real-time decision making, an end-to-end optimization framework based on the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) algorithm is proposed. Simulation results show that the proposed scheme achieves an online inference latency of only 4 ms. Compared to the widely used alternating optimization, it improves communication performance by 42%. Moreover, it achieves performance comparable to the SCA-SDR benchmark while requiring 57% fewer antennas, demonstrating superior hardware efficiency.

</details>


### [511] [Scalable Online Flight Trajectory Optimization via Sequential Quadratic Programming for Urban Air Mobility in Ultra Low-Altitude Airspace](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23008)
*Josue N. Rivera,Bohang Liang,Chen Lv,James Wang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可扩展的序列二次规划（SQP）框架，用于城市空中交通（UAM）在高密度运行下的在线碰撞规避轨迹优化。该方法无需预计算障碍物自由通道，而是在每次求解器迭代中实时生成分离超平面约束，结合变尺度四叉树分解保持计算效率。在五个真实城市的实验中，该方法在仅使用CPU的情况下实现了100%的成功率和避障率，优于传统SQP、iLQR和DDP。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着城市空中交通向高密度运行扩展，在复杂3D城市环境中生成无碰撞轨迹是核心安全需求。现有方法通常需要预计算无障碍走廊，难以兼顾密集城市几何、飞行器动力学和环境实时变化。

Method: 提出基于SQP的在线轨迹优化框架：1) 将几何环境约束、运行限制和飞行器动力学统一纳入单次在线优化；2) 障碍规避通过每次求解器迭代实时生成的分离超平面约束实现，而非预计算；3) 采用变尺度四叉树分解控制计算复杂度，支持城市级环境实时运行。

Result: 在五个真实城市中心的飞行测试中，与常规SQP、iLQR和DDP对比，该方法在仅使用CPU硬件上实现了100%的轨迹生成成功率和避障成功率。

Conclusion: 该SQP框架能够在线联合解决密集城市几何约束与全自由度飞行器动力学，同时通过变尺度四叉树保持实时性能，为高密度UAM运行提供了一种可扩展的轨迹生成方案。

Abstract: As Urban Air Mobility (UAM) scales toward high-density operations, generating collision-free trajectories within complex 3D cityscapes is a critical safety requirement. This paper proposes a scalable Sequential Quadratic Programming (SQP) framework that integrates geometric environmental constraints, operational limits, and vehicle dynamics within a single online trajectory optimization process. Rather than precomputing obstacle-free corridors ahead of time, our method encodes obstacle avoidance as live separating-hyperplane constraints regenerated at every solver iteration, so that dense urban geometry and full-DOF vehicle dynamics are resolved jointly and online as the reference and environment evolve. A variable-scale quadtree decomposition keeps computation bounded, enabling the framework to scale to city-wide environments while preserving real-time performance for high-speed flight. We validate the framework against conventional SQP, Iterative Linear Quadratic Regulator, and Differential Dynamic Programming across flights in five real-world urban centers, attaining 100% success and clearance rates on CPU-only hardware.

</details>


### [512] [Robust Data-Driven Nash Equilibrium Seeking under Partial-Decision Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23011)
*Linqi Wang,Yifei Li,Wenjie Liu,Yuzhou Wei,Gang Wang,Lihua Xie*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的分布式纳什均衡求解框架，适用于在局部决策信息、等式约束和外部扰动下运行的未知线性多智能体系统，并扩展到一类非线性系统。通过将问题转化为协同输出调节问题，利用含噪输入-状态数据通过半定规划直接合成控制器，保证了闭环稳定性和渐近收敛到纳什均衡。无人机网络和旋翼飞行器编队仿真验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有纳什均衡求解方法通常假设系统动力学已知、全局信息可用或不受扰动影响，但实际多智能体系统面临未知动力学、局部决策信息约束和外部扰动等挑战。本文旨在填补这些现实约束下的理论空白。

Method: 1) 将纳什均衡求解问题重构成协同输出调节问题；2) 设计分布式通信协议和内部模型抑制外部扰动；3) 利用含噪输入-状态数据，通过半定规划直接合成数据驱动控制器；4) 对非线性系统，引入积分控制并利用二次约束描述非线性。

Result: 在未知线性系统及一类非线性系统下，实现了闭环稳定性和渐近收敛到纳什均衡。无人机网络和旋翼飞行器编队仿真验证了方法的鲁棒性和有效性。

Conclusion: 本文首次将数据驱动控制与分布式纳什均衡求解相结合，在部分决策信息、未知动力学和外部扰动等现实约束下提供了形式化保证，为复杂多智能体系统的分布式优化控制提供了新的理论工具。

Abstract: This paper presents a data-driven framework for decentralized Nash equilibrium (NE) seeking in multi-agent systems with unknown linear dynamics subject to exogenous disturbances, operating under partial-decision information (where agents lack direct access to the decisions of all others) and equality constraints. The proposed framework integrates an NE model, a distributed communication protocol, an internal model for disturbance rejection, and a data-driven stabilization strategy. By reformulating the problem as a cooperative output regulation problem, we synthesize controllers directly from noisy input-state data via semi-definite programs (SDPs), providing formal guarantees for closed-loop stability and asymptotic convergence to the NE. The approach is further extended to a class of nonlinear systems with constant disturbances by leveraging integral control and describing nonlinearities via quadratic constraints. Numerical simulations involving unmanned aerial vehicle networks and a rotary-wing aerial vehicle formation validate the efficacy and robustness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [513] [Non-intrusive nonlinear reduced-order modeling with variable projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23077)
*Dimitrios Xylogiannis,Charles Poussot-Vassal,Claire Sarrat*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为MIIvp的非线性降阶模型构建方法，利用输出方程参数线性的特点，通过Variable Projection算法仅优化状态方程参数，输出参数由最小二乘求解，适用于高维输出系统，在合成双线性系统和实验基准上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非线性降阶模型方法在处理高维输出系统时计算成本过高，需要一种能够将输出维度排除在非线性优化之外的更高效方法。

Method: 提出MIIvp方法，利用考虑的非线性状态空间模型在输出方程参数上线性这一特性，应用Variable Projection (VarPro)算法将优化限制在状态方程参数，输出方程参数通过线性最小二乘恢复，从而避免输出维度进入非线性优化参数向量。

Result: 在合成双线性系统上达到机器精度并恢复真实特征值；在两个非线性系统辨识实验基准上验证了方法的有效性，同时也展示了其局限性。

Conclusion: MIIvp方法能够有效处理高维输出系统的非线性降阶建模，在温和假设下可恢复真实模型参数（相似性意义下），同时指出了方法的局限性和未来改进方向。

Abstract: This work presents a method for constructing nonlinear reduced-order models from input-output time-domain data. The proposed approach, termed Mixed Interpolatory Inference with Variable Projection (MIIvp), exploits the fact that the considered class of nonlinear state-space models is linear in the output equation parameters. By applying the Variable Projection (VarPro) algorithm, the optimization is restricted to the state equation parameters alone, while the output equation parameters are recovered via linear least squares. As a consequence, the output dimension does not enter the nonlinear optimization parameter vector, making the method well suited for systems with very high-dimensional outputs, a setting where many other approaches become computationally prohibitive. Under mild assumptions, it is shown that MIIvp can recover the true model parameters up to similarity. The method is first validated on a synthetic bilinear system, where it achieves machine-precision accuracy and recovers the true eigenvalues. MIIvp is then compared with existing methods on two experimental benchmarks from the nonlinear system identification literature. These numerical experiments showcase both the validity and the limitations of the proposed approach. Finally, directions for improvements and future work are outlined.

</details>


### [514] [Industrial electrification in the era of data centers: A Bayesian Optimization approach for grid-aware large load allocation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23452)
*Jiyong Lee,Erhan Kutanoglu,Michael Baldea,and Ilias Mitrai*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出双层优化框架，通过贝叶斯优化方法解决大型负荷（工业电气化和数据中心）并网选址问题，并以德克萨斯电网为例验证了不同负荷间的竞争关系及最优分布策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业电气化和数据中心的巨大负荷正在重塑电网规划与运行，在考虑输电拥塞的情况下优化大型负荷选址决策，对于降低扩建成本和运营风险至关重要。

Method: 提出领导者-跟随者双层优化框架：领导者决定大型负荷分配，跟随者决定电网扩建成本和输电利用率。采用贝叶斯优化方法将跟随者视为黑箱来高效求解双层优化问题。

Result: 大型负荷间存在电力竞争；在高负荷场景下，数据中心需求分布在整个电网中，避开了工业电气化高需求地区。

Conclusion: 该框架能有效整合战略规划与短期运营决策，为大型负荷并网提供优化选址策略，对电网规划具有重要指导意义。

Abstract: Large loads from industrial electrification and data centers are reshaping the planning and operation of the power grid. Identifying optimal large load siting decisions while accounting for transmission congestion is key to reducing expansion cost and operational risks. In this paper, we propose a leader-follower bilevel optimization framework to identify optimal large load allocation strategies. The leader determines the allocation of large loads, while the followers determine grid expansion cost and transmission utilization. This modeling approach explicitly integrates strategic planning with detailed short-term operational decisions. Moreover, we develop a Bayesian Optimization approach to efficiently solve the bilevel optimization problem by treating the followers as a black box. We use the framework to study large-scale load allocation from electrified oil refineries and data centers on a synthetic power grid that resembles key characteristics of the Texas (ERCOT) system. The results show that these large loads compete for electricity, and under high-load scenarios, data center demand is distributed across the entire grid, avoiding regions with high demand from industrial electrification.

</details>


### [515] [Two-Stage Optimization for Dynamic Line Rating and Energy Storage Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23586)
*Abanish Tiwari,Phurba T. Sherpa,Chandan Chaudhary,Mohammed Ben-Idris,Joydeep Mitra*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出两阶段优化方法，协同部署动态线路评级（DLR）和储能系统（ESS），以缓解可再生能源高渗透下的输电阻塞，增强系统可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分布式能源渗透率提高和天气变化导致输电阻塞和可靠性压力增大，传统的静态线路评级（SLR）过于保守，无法充分利用输电容量，亟需更有效的输电扩容和灵活性方案。

Method: 两阶段优化方法：第一阶段通过混合整数线性规划选择DLR走廊和ESS接入节点，最小化运行成本、弃风和切负荷惩罚；第二阶段在环境驱动线路评级下确定ESS容量和运行调度策略，利用气象数据生成DLR曲线，并用序贯蒙特卡洛模拟评估系统充裕性。

Result: 在改进的IEEE RTS 24节点系统上测试，结果表明协同规划DLR和ESS能有效提升输电能力、缓解阻塞、增强系统在天气变化下的充裕性。

Conclusion: DLR与ESS的联合优化配置可以有效应对高比例新能源接入带来的输电阻塞与可靠性挑战，是一种提升现有基础设施利用率的可行方案。

Abstract: The increasing penetration of distributed energy resources (DER) and weather-driven variability has intensified congestion and reliability stress in transmission networks. Strategies that enhance the utilization of existing infrastructure, such as static line ratings (SLR) and energy storage systems (ESS), have therefore become necessary. SLRs rely on conservative ambient assumptions and often understate thermal limits, whereas dynamic line ratings (DLR) adjust capacity according to weather conditions and unlock additional transfer capability. Energy storage systems provide temporal flexibility, but their transmission-level effectiveness depends on proper siting and sizing. This paper proposes a two-stage optimization method for joint placement of DLR installations and utility-scale energy storage. In the first stage, a mixed-integer linear program selects DLR corridors and ESS buses by minimizing operating cost, DER curtailment, and load-shedding penalties subject to DC power flow and investment constraints. In the second stage, the model determines ESS energy capacity and operating schedules under ambient-driven line ratings. Ambient weather data is used to generate DLR profiles, and sequential Monte Carlo simulation is applied to assess system adequacy. The proposed method, when deployed on the modified IEEE RTS 24-bus system, shows that coordinated DLR and ESS planning improves transmission capability, mitigates congestion, and strengthens system adequacy under weather variability.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [516] [Towards Fewer Control Laws via Continuous-Time Multiparametric Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21031)
*Lida Lamakani,Efstratios N. Pistikopoulos*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于连续时间的多参数规划框架，直接应用庞特里亚金极大值原理（PMP）求解最优控制问题，无需离散化模型。相比离散时间方法，该方法产生更少的关键区域且数量固定，并能将切换时间表示为初始状态的显式函数，显著降低在线计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决离散时间多参数规划中因时间离散化导致的权衡问题：离散区间太少会丢失系统动态，太多则导致问题规模、决策变量和关键区域数量激增，使离线和在线计算都变得昂贵。

Method: 直接对连续时间问题应用庞特里亚金极大值原理（PMP），无需模型离散化，将最优控制恢复为初始状态的显式函数，同时将切换时间也表示为初始状态的显式函数。

Result: 与离散时间方法相比，连续时间方法产生的关键区域数量大幅减少，且该数量不受精度要求影响，仅由问题本身结构决定。PAROC框架案例研究验证了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 连续时间多参数规划是传统离散时间方法的严谨替代方案，能显著降低在线执行成本，特别适用于对实时性要求高的最优控制问题。

Abstract: Multiparametric programming offers a powerful solution to the computational burden of solving optimal control problems repeatedly online. By solving the problem once offline, it yields the optimal control laws as explicit closed-form functions of the initial system state, reducing online execution to a direct evaluation with no iterations required. Most existing works build this idea on a discrete-time foundation, slicing the time horizon into intervals and applying KKT conditions to the resulting algebraic system. This discretization forces a tradeoff: too few intervals and the model fails to capture the true system dynamics, while too many cause the problem size, the number of decision variables, and the number of critical regions to grow rapidly, making both offline preparation and online lookup increasingly expensive. This work develops a multiparametric framework that works directly with the continuous-time problem. Pontryagin's Maximum Principle (PMP) is applied without any model discretization, and the optimal control is recovered as an explicit function of the initial state. Compared to the discrete-time formulation, the continuous-time approach produces substantially fewer critical regions, and this number remains fixed regardless of accuracy requirements, since it reflects the structure of the problem itself rather than a discretization grid. The framework also yields the switching times as explicit functions of the initial state, directly exposing when and how the optimal control structure changes over the horizon. Knowing these switching times in advance allows the real-time controller to skip unnecessary computations between them, further reducing the online execution cost. Results from a PAROC framework case study demonstrate that the continuous-time multiparametric approach is a rigorous alternative to the conventional discrete-time formulations.

</details>


### [517] [DUET: Decentralized Bilevel Optimization without Lower-Level Strong Convexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21153)
*Zhen Qin,Zhuqing Liu,Songtao Lu,Yingbin Liang,Jia Liu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为DUET的去中心化双层优化算法，通过引入递减二次正则化，无需下层强凸性假设即可保证收敛，并采用梯度跟踪解决数据异构问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有去中心化双层优化方法大多依赖下层强凸性假设来保证解的唯一性和超梯度的良定义，严重限制了实际应用。本文旨在移除这一限制。

Method: 提出DUET算法：1) 在下层目标中引入递减二次正则化项，消除对下层强凸性的依赖；2) 采用单循环结构；3) 引入梯度跟踪机制以应对数据异构性挑战。

Result: DUET在松弛假设下达到近似KKT驻点的迭代复杂度为O(1/T^{1-5p-11τ/4})；数值实验验证了理论结果和实际有效性。

Conclusion: 这是首个在去中心化设置下处理无需下层强凸性的双层优化工作，同时解决了数据异构性问题，拓展了DBO的适用场景。

Abstract: Decentralized bilevel optimization (DBO) provides a powerful framework for multi-agent systems to solve local bilevel tasks in a decentralized fashion without the need for a central server. However, most existing DBO methods rely on lower-level strong convexity (LLSC) to guarantee unique solutions and a well-defined hypergradient for stationarity measure, hindering their applicability in many practical scenarios not satisfying LLSC. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a new single-loop DBO algorithm called diminishing quadratically-regularized bilevel decentralized optimization (DUET), which eliminates the need for LLSC by introducing a diminishing quadratic regularization to the lower-level (LL) objective. We show that DUET achieves an iteration complexity of $O(1/T^{1-5p-\frac{11}{4}τ})$ for approximate KKT-stationary point convergence under relaxed assumptions, where $p$ and $τ$ are control parameters for LL learning rate and averaging, respectively. In addition, our DUET algorithm incorporates gradient tracking to address data heterogeneity, a key challenge in DBO settings. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to tackle DBO without LLSC under decentralized settings with data heterogeneity. Numerical experiments validate the theoretical findings and demonstrate the practical effectiveness of our proposed algorithms.

</details>


### [518] [A Multi-Objective Approach to Curriculum-Based Course Timetabling with Continuity Across Semesters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21176)
*Florian Meier,Thomas Stidsen,Clemens Thielen,Andreas Wiese*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多目标混合整数规划方法，用于解决基于课程表的大学排课问题，平衡教师和学生两大利益相关者的偏好，同时通过限制课程时间安排的变动（扰动）来保持学期间的连续性。采用字典序ε-约束法探索目标间的权衡，并在慕尼黑工业大学施特劳宾校区的真实数据上验证，结果显示教师与学生目标之间存在明确且一致的权衡，且允许的扰动数量是关键参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的单目标或加权和方法会掩盖利益相关者偏好之间的冲突，因此需要一种能够显式分离教师与学生目标、并保持课程表连续性的多目标方法。

Method: 提出多目标混合整数规划模型，将教师目标与学生目标分离，并引入扰动限制以保持课程表连续性；采用字典序ε-约束法计算一组代表性解，覆盖目标空间的不同区域。

Result: 在真实数据上验证，教师与学生目标之间存在明确且一致的权衡；允许的扰动数量是影响课程表质量的关键参数，适度放松扰动约束可显著改善双方目标，但存在收益递减效应。

Conclusion: 该方法能够生成多样化的优化课程表，为实际排课提供透明决策支持，帮助分析利益相关者之间的权衡与连续性。

Abstract: We study a curriculum-based university course timetabling problem in which the preferences of two key stakeholder groups - lecturers and students - must be balanced while maintaining continuity across semesters in a weekly repeating timetable. While existing approaches typically rely on single-objective formulations or aggregate multiple objectives into a weighted sum, this can obscure the underlying trade-offs between conflicting stakeholder preferences. We therefore propose a multi-objective mixed-integer programming approach that explicitly separates lecturer and student objectives and incorporates timetable continuity by limiting the number of changes, called perturbations, in the time period assignments of selected courses relative to the corresponding semester of the previous academic year. To explore the resulting trade-offs, we develop a multi-objective solution approach based on the lexicographic $\varepsilon$-constraint method, enabling the computation of a representative set of solutions whose images, i.e., their vectors of objective values, cover different regions of the objective space.
  The approach is evaluated on real-world instances from the Straubing Campus of the Technical University of Munich. The computational results reveal a clear and consistent trade-off between lecturers' and students' objectives across all instances. Moreover, the number of allowed perturbations is identified as a key decision parameter: relaxing this constraint significantly improves timetable quality for both stakeholder groups, although diminishing returns are observed beyond certain thresholds.
  Overall, the proposed approach provides decision support by generating a diverse set of optimized timetables and enabling a transparent analysis of stakeholder trade-offs and continuity for the practical timetable planning process.

</details>


### [519] [Restart and Adaptive Acceleration in Stochastic Gradient Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21354)
*Ali Elhishi,Chistophe Roux,Alexandre d'Aspremont*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究非光滑弱凸随机优化中的重启策略，利用Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz不等式实现加速收敛，并证明其对参数误设具有鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通过重启机制利用KŁ不等式改善非光滑弱凸随机优化问题的收敛速度，并解决实际中KŁ指数未知的问题。

Method: 在满足KŁ不等式的非光滑弱凸随机优化中引入重启方案，分析最优重启调度与Polyak步长SGD的联系，并考察对KŁ指数误设的鲁棒性。

Result: 重启方案可显著加速收敛，加速程度依赖于KŁ指数；最优重启调度类似Polyak步长；算法对KŁ指数误设具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 重启策略能有效加速非光滑弱凸随机优化，且在实际应用中具有近自适应性。

Abstract: We study restart schemes in stochastic optimization problems for non-smooth and weakly convex that satisfy a Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz inequality. We show that using restarts allows us to leverage the KŁ inequalities to achieve improved rates of convergence, with acceleration depending explicitly on the KŁ exponent. Furthermore, optimal restart schedules lead to learning-rates akin to Polyak steps for SGD. While regularity constants such as the KŁ exponent are typically unknown in practice, we prove that restart schemes are robust to a significant misspecification of these constants, hence nearly adaptive. We detail numerical experiments on both toy problems, where the KŁ exponent is controlled, and training of Large Language Models (LLMs).

</details>


### [520] [Finite-Horizon Portfolio Choice, Labor Supply, and Early Retirement under Borrowing Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21382)
*Gugyum Ha,Junkee Jeon,Jihoon Ok*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了在借贷约束下，具有劳动供给弹性和不可逆提前退休选择权的有限期最优消费与投资组合问题。通过对偶鞅方法将原问题转化为零和停止者-奇异控制博弈，并利用变分不等式刻画最优策略，数值分析揭示了劳动供给弹性对消费、投资和退休时机的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在现实经济中，个体面临借贷约束、劳动供给弹性和不可逆退休决策的交互影响，现有文献较少同时考虑这些因素。作者旨在建立一个综合框架，分析劳动供给弹性如何影响个体的最优消费、投资和退休时机决策。

Method: 采用对偶鞅方法（dual martingale method）将原始问题转化为零和停止者-奇异控制博弈（zero-sum stopper-singular-controller game）。通过对偶价值函数由带有障碍约束和梯度约束的极小-极大抛物变分不等式（min-max parabolic variational inequality）刻画，并证明其最大强解的存在唯一性，梯度约束的自由边界（即绑定边界）随时间单调递增。最后通过验证定理和對偶性恢复原始最优策略。

Result: 成功将问题转化为变分不等式并证明了强解的存在唯一性，梯度约束自由边界的单调性得以确立。数值分析恢复了价值函数和最优策略，展示了劳动供给弹性如何影响消费、投资组合选择和退休时机。

Conclusion: 劳动供给弹性显著影响个体的最优消费、投资和退休决策，借贷约束下这一影响更为复杂。所提出的对偶方法有效解决了含有不可逆退休选择和劳动供给弹性的最优控制问题。

Abstract: We study a finite-horizon optimal consumption and portfolio problem with labor supply flexibility and an irreversible early retirement option under a borrowing constraint. The agent chooses consumption, risky investment, and leisure before retirement, while after retirement labor income disappears and leisure is fixed at its maximal level. Preferences are described by a Cobb--Douglas utility, and wealth must remain nonnegative.
  {Using a dual martingale method, we transform the primal problem into a zero-sum stopper--singular-controller game. The associated dual value is characterized by a min--max parabolic variational inequality with obstacle and gradient constraints. We show that the maximal strong solution of the resulting variational inequality is the unique admissible strong solution whose gradient-constrained free boundary, namely the binding boundary, is monotone increasing in calendar time. A verification argument then identifies this strong solution with the value of the stopper--singular-controller game, and duality recovers the optimal retirement, consumption, leisure, and portfolio policies.}
  The numerical analysis recovers the value function and optimal policies, and illustrates how labor supply flexibility affects consumption, portfolio choice, and retirement timing under borrowing constraints.

</details>


### [521] [Unified Ergodic Primal-Dual Gap Rates with Unhalved Primal Stepsizes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21482)
*Sirong Dai,Ming Yan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对一类含光滑项f、凸函数g/h及线性算子A的复合优化问题，提出了“残差到对偶间隙转移原理”，使得Condat–Vũ、PD3O、AFBA/PDDY、PAPC/PDFP²O等一阶原始-对偶方法能在未减半的原始步长τ<2/L下达到O(1/K)的遍历原始-对偶间隙界，并给出了一个二维反例说明在一般三函数设定下无法同时满足τ<2/L和τη‖A‖²<4/3。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准原始-对偶间隙分析常常施加τ ≤ 1/L的保守步长条件，而收敛理论本身允许τ < 2/L的更宽范围，因此希望填补这一步长范围的间隙分析空白。

Method: 提出了残差-对偶间隙转移原理（residual-to-gap transfer principle），通过控制Lyapunov函数的下降量来约束一步间隙不等式中的正残差项，从而在更宽松的步长条件下建立遍历对偶间隙上界。

Result: 在未减半的原始步长τ < 2/L下，为Condat–Vũ、PD3O、AFBA/PDDY、PAPC/PDFP²O等方法建立了O(1/K)的遍历原始-对偶间隙界；并给出二维反例说明τ < 2/L与τη‖A‖² < 4/3无法在一般三函数设定下同时成立。

Conclusion: 本文拓展了原始-对偶方法的间隙分析至更大的步长范围，理论结果更精细地匹配了实际收敛条件，同时反例揭示了在三函数设定下的根本性局限。

Abstract: We study ergodic primal-dual gap rates for first-order primal-dual methods applied to \[
  \min_x f(x)+g(x)+h(Ax), \] where $f$ is smooth and convex, $g$ and $h$ are proper, closed, convex functions, and $A$ is linear. Standard gap-rate proofs often impose the halved smooth-stepsize condition $τ\le 1/L$, even though the corresponding convergence theory allows the larger range $τ<2/L$. We introduce a residual-to-gap transfer principle: positive residual terms in the one-step gap inequality are controlled by the decrease of a Lyapunov function. This yields $O(1/K)$ ergodic primal-dual gap bounds with the unhalved primal stepsize $τ<2/L$ for Condat--Vũ, PD3O, AFBA/PDDY, and PAPC/PDFP$^2$O, under their algorithm-dependent product conditions. We also give a two-dimensional counterexample showing that the fully separated rectangle $τ<2/L$, $τη\|A\|^2<4/3$ cannot hold in the general three-function setting.

</details>


### [522] [A note on the convergence guarantees of RLT-based algorithms for polynomial optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21483)
*Alejandro Barros-González,Julio González-Díaz,Brais González-Rodríguez,Iria Rodríguez Acevedo*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文指出了多项式优化的RLT技术中一个基础性数学证明的疏漏，并通过添加一个微小且自然的假设来恢复其正确性，同时警示若忽视此细微问题可能导致基于RLT的算法失去收敛保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者发现RLT技术的一项基础结果中存在数学证明疏漏，该疏漏可能影响RLT算法的收敛性保证，需要予以修正和澄清。

Method: 作者识别了原证明中的数学疏漏，并通过添加一个微小且自然的假设（即对原问题增加一个合理的约束条件）来修复证明的正确性。

Result: 通过添加一个微小且自然的假设，原基础结果的正确性得以恢复。若未注意到这一细微之处，RLT算法可能丧失收敛保证。

Conclusion: 该研究提醒研究者在应用RLT技术时需注意这一细微假设，以确保算法的收敛性保证不被破坏。

Abstract: This paper identifies and addresses a mathematical oversight in one of the foundational results on the Reformulation-Linearization Technique (RLT) for polynomial optimization. We then argue that, although correctness of the original result can be easily recovered by adding a minor and natural assumption, not being aware of this nuance may lead to the loss of convergence guarantees in RLT-based algorithms.

</details>


### [523] [Reference-Free, Long-Horizon Trajectory Optimization for Aggressive Autonomous Driving in Milliseconds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21486)
*Prayag Sharma,Jonathan Y. M. Goh,Franck Djeumou*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了在无参考轨迹和热启动条件下，利用全车辆动力学模型实现实时长时域最优控制问题求解的建模与求解器设计选择。通过分析车辆刚度特性、积分方案、求解器策略及动态平衡初始猜测方法，实现了低至55ms的实时计算性能，包括高速避障中的漂移轨迹生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作在缺乏参考轨迹和热启动时，很少量化长时域轨迹生成的计算需求，且常使用低保真度模型，牺牲了精度和控制能力。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索在极限工况下实现实时最优控制的可行方案。

Method: 1. 分析车辆刚度特性以证明OCP积分方案的选择；2. 比较不同阶数A-稳定积分方法的性能；3. 研究障碍参数更新策略和Hessian不定性保护技术对非线性求解器的影响；4. 提出基于动态平衡的初始猜测生成方法，减少初始不可行性。

Result: 低阶A-稳定方法优于其他方案，求解时间差异可达两个数量级；提出的动态平衡初始猜测方法将初始不可行性降低了四个数量级；在高保真BeamNG仿真中实现了260m时域、55ms的实时计算性能，包括高速避障中漂移轨迹的生成。

Conclusion: 通过合理的建模和求解器设计选择，可以在无参考轨迹和热启动条件下，利用全车辆动力学模型实现实时长时域最优控制，为自动驾驶车辆在极限工况下的安全运行提供了可行的技术路径。

Abstract: Autonomous vehicles must generate long-horizon and dynamically feasible trajectories in real time-even when operating at the limits of vehicle handling-to ensure safe operation in adverse conditions. However, existing work rarely quantifies the computational demands of generating such trajectories without prior references, warm starts and often defaults to low-fidelity models, compromising accuracy and control authority. We investigate the modeling and solver design choices that enable real-time solution of long-horizon, reference-free optimal control problems (OCPs) using full vehicle dynamics. To this end, we analyze vehicle stiffness properties to justify the OCP's integration scheme and show that lower-order A-stable methods consistently outperform alternatives, with solve time differences reaching two orders of magnitude. We show that robust nonlinear solver performance hinges on understanding barrier parameter update strategies and safeguarding techniques for Hessian indefiniteness, inherent in some interior point methods. Lastly, we propose a computationally efficient method for generating initial guesses using dynamic equilibrium, unlocking real-time performance and reducing initial infeasibility by up to four orders of magnitude. Extensive benchmarking and high-fidelity BeamNG simulation demonstrate compute times as low as 55 ms over a 260 m horizon, including high-speed obstacle avoidance scenarios where drifting emerges as a necessary component of feasible trajectory generation.

</details>


### [524] [Accelerated and Stable Convergence with Anchored Optimistic Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21528)
*Motahareh Sohrabi,Jianxin You,Simon Lacoste-Julien,Eduard Gorbunov,Gauthier Gidel*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出广义乐观锚定方法（GOMA），一种用于求解单调变分不等式的单次梯度查询一阶方法。在确定性环境中，该方法在平方梯度范数上达到最优加速末次迭代率O(1/k²)；在随机环境中，其简化变体在无方差缩减或批次增长的情况下，达到O(1/√k)的末次迭代收敛率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典方法（如外梯度法）每次迭代需要两次梯度查询，限制了其在在线和随机场景下的应用。作者希望设计一种仅需单次梯度查询、同时保持最优收敛速度的方法。

Method: 提出广义乐观方法族（GOMA），将两时间尺度乐观更新与Halpern迭代中的锚定项相结合。确定性版本使用双时间尺度结构，随机版本则简化为单次梯度调用的变体。

Result: 确定性设定：在单调Lipschitz算子上达到平方梯度范数的加速末次迭代率O(1/k²)。随机设定（无界方差）：单次调用变体达到末次迭代率O(1/√k)，这是首个无方差缩减或增长批次下的此类保证。

Conclusion: GOMA统一并改进了乐观方法和Halpern迭代，在单次梯度查询约束下实现了最优或接近最优的收敛速度，填补了随机单调变分不等式末次迭代率理论的重要空白。

Abstract: We study first-order methods for solving monotone variational inequalities arising in min-max optimization. Classical approaches such as the extragradient method rely on two gradient queries per iteration, which limits their analysis and applicability in the online and stochastic settings. We propose a family of Generalized Optimistic Methods with Anchoring (GOMA), which combine two-time-scale optimistic updates with an anchoring term inspired by Halpern iteration. In the deterministic setting, GOMA achieves the optimal accelerated last-iterate rate $O(1/k^2)$ on the squared gradient norm for monotone Lipschitz operators. In the stochastic setting with unbounded variance, a simplified single-call variant of GOMA achieves a last-iterate convergence rate of $O(1/\sqrt{k})$ on the squared gradient norm. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first such guarantee for stochastic monotone Lipschitz variational inequalities in the unconstrained setting without variance reduction or growing batches.

</details>


### [525] [On Fixed-Time Stability of Continuous Dynamics for Non-Monotone Variational Inequalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21573)
*Sina Arefizadeh,Kunal Garg,Angelia Nedić*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对非单调变分不等式（NMVI）的解集，提出了实现指数稳定性和固定时间稳定性的新条件与动力学系统构造方法，分别处理无约束和有约束两种情况，并通过数值模拟验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NMVI研究大多关注算法的渐近收敛性，缺乏对解集指数稳定性和固定时间稳定性的理论分析，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 1) 针对无约束NMVI，构建两种新动力学系统：一种在温和假设下实现指数稳定性；另一种实现固定时间稳定性（收敛时间与初始条件无关）。2) 针对有约束NMVI，采用连续时间Korpelevich方法实现指数稳定性，并通过引入新缩放因子实现固定时间稳定性。

Result: 通过数值模拟验证了所提改进动力学系统的有效性，并讨论了离散化变体的行为。

Conclusion: 本文为NMVI问题提供了指数稳定性和固定时间稳定性的理论框架与构造方法，未来可进一步研究离散化变体及更多应用场景。

Abstract: Non-monotone variational inequalities (NMVI) are an important class of problems that generalize non-convex optimization and have various applications in optimization theory, machine learning, game theory, and economics, among others. Most existing work on NMVIs focuses on the asymptotic convergence of algorithms proposed to solve these problems. In this paper, we tackle the problems of exponential and fixed-time stability of the solution set of a class of NMVIs for both unconstrained and constrained problems. We first present novel conditions guaranteeing exponential stability of solutions to unconstrained NMVIs for a uniquely constructed dynamical system under mild assumptions on the gradient of the non-monotone map.
