Then, under similar assumptions, we construct another novel dynamical system whose equilibrium point is fixed-time stable, i.e., the trajectories reach the equilibrium within a fixed time, independent of the initial conditions. For the case of constrained NMVIs, we employ a continuous-time variant of the Korpelevich method for exponential stability of the solution set, and provide a novel scaling factor in the dynamics to achieve fixed-time stability. We illustrate the efficacy of the proposed modified dynamical systems through numerical simulations and conclude the paper with a brief note on the behavior of the discretized variant of the proposed dynamics and on further work that remains to be done.

</details>


### [526] [Nonsmooth Obstacles and Killed Resolvents in Reflected Stochastic Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21575)
*Louis Shuo Wang,Jiguang Yu,Ye Liang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究二维象限中正态反射扩散的最优停时问题，提出了基于测度值变分公式的新框架，通过将停止增益表示为符号Radon测度并显式计算其沿kink对角线的奇异分量，建立了正确的 killed-resolvent 表示，纠正了传统 unrestricted-resolvent 公式的无效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统无限制预解公式在处理非光滑最大型支付函数时失效，因此需要发展新的测度值变分框架来正确刻画最优停时问题的解及其自由边界。

Method: 采用测度值变分公式，将停止增益Γ表示为符号Radon测度，其奇异分量集中在kink对角线上并显式计算；利用 killed-resolvent 表示 V=G-R_r^C Γ 刻画值函数；在显式单调性假设下将停时集表征为epigraph形式，并通过 killed-势迹条件刻画自由边界。

Result: 建立了 killed-resolvent 表示，纠正了传统公式的无效性；在单调性条件下得到停时集的epigraph结构和自由边界的 killed-势迹条件；给出了验证定理确保局部Lipschitz候选边界的最优性。

Conclusion: 该测度值变分框架为具有非光滑支付函数的反射扩散最优停时问题提供了严格的理论基础，并为自由边界的刻画和验证提供了可操作的条件。

Abstract: We study an infinite-horizon optimal stopping problem for a normally reflected two-dimensional diffusion in the quadrant with nonsmooth max-type payoff \(G(x_1,x_2)=x_1\veeαx_2\). The main novelty is a measure-valued variational formulation: the stopping gain \(Γ=c+rG-\mathcal LG\) is shown to be a signed Radon measure whose singular component is supported on the kink diagonal \(\{x_1=αx_2\}\), and this component is computed explicitly. We prove that the value admits the killed-resolvent representation \[
  V=G-R_r^{\mathcal C}Γ, \] where the reflected diffusion is killed upon entry into the stopping set. This corrects the generally invalid unrestricted-resolvent formula. Under explicit monotonicity hypotheses, the stopping set has epigraph form, and the free boundary is characterized by a killed-potential trace condition. A verification theorem certifies locally Lipschitz candidate boundaries as optimal.

</details>


### [527] [Convergence Analysis of Muon-type Methods with Inexact LMO in the Degenerate Case](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21581)
*Xun Qian,Peter Richtárik*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了Muon类型方法在非精确LMO退化情况下的收敛性，提出了新假设并建立了层-wise (L^0, L^1)-光滑假设下的收敛率，涵盖了非凸和星凸（含权重衰减）两种情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Muon方法在实践中使用迭代算法近似求解LMO，但收敛分析多假设搜索方向为精确解。Shulgin等人[2025]分析了非精确Muon更新，但只保证了非退化情况（残差动量的最小非零奇异值有正下界）的收敛性，退化情况尚未被研究。

Method: 针对退化情况（残差动量最小非零奇异值可趋近于零），提出新假设以应对非精确LMO带来的挑战；在层-wise (L^0, L^1)-光滑假设下，分别分析一般非凸情形和带权重衰减的星凸情形，建立收敛率。

Result: 在退化情况下，对一般非凸和星凸（含权重衰减）两种情形均建立了收敛率。

Conclusion: 本文填补了Muon方法在非精确LMO退化情况下的理论空白，扩展了其收敛性分析范围。

Abstract: Muon-type methods have demonstrated potentially superior performance over Adam and its variants, and have shown hyperparameter transferability across model sizes when specific norms are chosen for the LMO in deep architectures. However, while the LMO is solved approximately via iterative algorithms in practice, most convergence analyses consider the ideal case where the search direction is the exact solution to the LMO. Recently, the inexact Muon update was analyzed by Shulgin et al. [2025], which reveals a fundamental coupling between the inexactness and the optimal step size and momentum. However, the convergence is guaranteed for the non-degenerate case only, i.e., the smallest positive singular value of the rescaled momentum is assumed to be bounded below by some positive constant when the spectral norm is used. In this work, we investigate Muon-type methods with inexact LMO in the degenerate case, where the smallest positive singular value of the rescaled momentum can approach zero, for the general non-convex case and the star-convex case with weight decay. Novel assumptions are proposed to address the challenges posed by inexact LMO in such degenerate scenarios, and convergence rates are established under the layer-wise $(L^0, L^1)$-smooth assumption for both cases.

</details>


### [528] [Nonlinear Guidance for Arrival Time and Arrival Angle Control Using Trajectory Shaping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21643)
*Kun Wang,Andrés Infante Adrián*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于固定翼无人机到达时间和角度控制的非线性轨迹成形制导策略，将视角参数化为四阶多项式，并通过两阶段求解方法解决强耦合的非线性积分方程问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在高度非线性场景下可能无法生成可行解，需要一种能够同时控制到达时间和角度且鲁棒性更强的制导策略。

Method: 将视角参数化为四阶多项式，将非线性制导问题转化为求解两个耦合的非线性积分方程。采用两阶段求解：第一阶段通过近似构建解析温启动，建立参数间线性关系并推导标量二次方程获得初始猜测；第二阶段通过一维非线性方程精化初始猜测，最终作为二维非线性系统的初值进行求解。

Result: 数值仿真表明，即使在高度非线性场景下，所提方法获得的解也非常接近开环最优解，而某些现有方法在此类场景下无法生成可行解。

Conclusion: 本文提出的两阶段求解策略有效克服了参数强耦合带来的求解困难，在复杂非线性场景中仍能获得接近最优的可行解，优于部分现有方法。

Abstract: This paper proposes a nonlinear trajectory shaping guidance strategy for arrival time and angle control of a constant-speed fixed-wing unmanned aerial vehicle. The look angle is parameterized by a fourth-order polynomial. The nonlinear guidance problem is transformed into solving two coupled nonlinear integral equations with respect to two unknown guidance parameters. Directly solving these equations is challenging due to the strong coupling between the parameters. To address this, a two-stage solution procedure is developed. In the first stage, an analytical warm start is constructed. Specifically, by applying approximations, a linear relationship between the two guidance parameters is obtained. With this relationship, a scalar quadratic equation in the first guidance parameter is derived, leading to a good initial guess for the first guidance parameter. In the second stage, this initial guess is refined by solving a one-dimensional nonlinear equation. The obtained solution is finally used as the initial guess for solving the original two-dimensional nonlinear system of equations. Numerical simulations demonstrate that for the test cases, the obtained solution is very close to the open-loop optimal solution, even in highly nonlinear scenarios where some existing methods fail to generate a feasible solution.

</details>


### [529] [Optimal Control Problem with Mixed Control and State Constraints for Cancer Chemotherapy and Treatment Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21765)
*David Lassounon,Aziz Belmiloudi,Mounir Haddou*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于非线性反应扩散方程的最优控制策略，通过约束化疗药物浓度来最小化侵袭性肿瘤细胞密度，并利用数值模拟验证了其在恶性肺肿瘤治疗中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 化疗效果取决于药物递送策略及在杀伤癌细胞的同时最小化对健康组织损伤的能力。本文旨在通过控制化疗药物来最小化侵袭性肿瘤细胞密度。

Method: 将化疗药物浓度作为控制变量，建立非线性反应扩散方程描述药物对肿瘤进展的影响；提出混合控制与状态约束下的最优控制问题；推导一阶最优性必要条件；进行恶性肺肿瘤根除的数值模拟。

Result: 通过数值模拟展示了所提出策略在恶性肺肿瘤根除中的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法能够有效地优化化疗药物递送，在杀伤肿瘤细胞的同时降低对健康组织的损伤。

Abstract: The success of chemotherapy depends on the effectiveness of the drug delivery strategy and its ability to destroy cancer cells while minimizing damage to healthy tissues. The main objective of this work is to minimize the density of invasive tumour cells by controlling the chemotherapeutic agents. For this, we address an optimal control problem with mixed control and state constraints. The concentration of chemotherapeutic drugs is represented as a control variable. We use a nonlinear reaction-diffusion equation to describe the effect of drugs on the progression of invasive tumours. We start with the mathematical analysis of this initial boundary value problem. Then, we formulate the optimal control problem, explain the role of different constraints, and derive first-order necessary conditions of optimality. Finally, in order to demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed strategy, numerical simulations in the case of the eradication of malignant lung tumours, are presented and analysed.

</details>


### [530] [Local-to-Global Exactness of SDP Relaxations for Sparse QCQPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21823)
*Masakazu Kojima,Sunyoung Kim,Naohiko Arima*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究稀疏二次约束二次规划（QCQP）的精确半定规划（SDP）松弛问题，提出了一种基于弦图扩展最大团的局部到全局框架，通过验证局部子SDP的精确性来保证全局SDP松弛的精确性，并给出了三类可纳入该框架的局部QCQP问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对于稀疏QCQP，SDP松弛通常不是精确的（即最优解秩大于1），现有方法难以有效判定和保证精确性。本文旨在建立一种系统性的局部到全局框架，通过检查局部子问题来认证全局SDP松弛的精确性。

Method: 利用数据矩阵的聚合稀疏性模式图的弦图扩展的最大团，将全局SDP松弛分解为团-wise矩阵变量形式。引入局部子SDP（含右侧向量和一致性矩阵两个参数），在全局最优解确定参数后，通过验证局部子SDP的精确性来推导全局SDP松弛的精确性。进一步在任意两团至多交于一个节点的假设下，给出三类可验证的局部QCQP：凸QCQP、符号模式条件QCQP、可分离有限约束QCQP。

Result: 建立了核心定理：若由全局最优解确定的局部子SDP均精确，则原始SDP松弛精确。并给出了三类满足该框架的局部QCQP类别的充分条件。通过示例展示了不同类别局部QCQP在稀疏问题中的组合应用。

Conclusion: 该工作为稀疏QCQP的精确SDP松弛认证提供了一种系统化的局部到全局方法，扩展了可处理问题的范围，并为未来研究提供了理论框架。

Abstract: We study exact semidefinite programming (SDP) relaxation for a given sparse quadratically constrained quadratic program (QCQP). The SDP relaxation is exact if, whenever it has an optimal solution, it admits a rank-at-most-one optimal solution that corresponds to an optimal solution of the QCQP. Using the maximal cliques of a chordal extension of the aggregate sparsity pattern graph of the data matrices, we formulate the SDP relaxation in terms of clique-wise matrix variables and develop a local-to-global framework for certifying exactness. For each clique-wise matrix variable, we introduce a local sub-SDP with two parameters: a local right-hand-side vector and a consistency matrix specifying the values of entries shared by overlapping clique-wise matrix variables. In the main theorem, these parameters are determined by an optimal solution of the global clique-wise SDP. The theorem shows that if the resulting local sub-SDPs are exact, then the original SDP relaxation is exact. Under the additional assumption that any two distinct cliques intersect in at most one node, we present three classes of local QCQPs that can be incorporated into this framework: convex local QCQPs, local QCQPs characterized by sign-pattern conditions, and separable local QCQPs with a limited number of constraints. Examples illustrate how these different local QCQP classes can be combined in sparse QCQPs.

</details>


### [531] [PhiBE-Q-Learning: Bridging Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning and Continuous-Time Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21925)
*Yuhua Zhu,Yutong Ren*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对连续时间强化学习（CTRL）中的离策略学习方法，提出了新的状态-动作价值函数定义及其控制方程，并基于PhiBE近似设计了迭代算法，在线性函数近似下证明了收敛性及显式收敛速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续时间强化学习中经典的Q函数不存在，导致离策略学习困难；现有方法依赖状态价值函数V(s)而非Q函数，限制了离策略学习的灵活性。

Method: 提出新的CTRL中Q函数定义及其控制方程；基于PhiBE近似设计模型已知和模型未知两种迭代算法；利用离散时间轨迹数据进行离策略学习；在线性函数近似下进行理论分析。

Result: 在线性函数近似假设下，证明了所提出算法的收敛性，并推导出了显式的收敛速率。

Conclusion: 本文为连续时间强化学习中的离策略学习提供了理论基础和可行算法，填补了CTRL中Q函数定义的空白，并给出了明确的理论保证。

Abstract: In this paper, we develop an off-policy method for continuous-time reinforcement learning (CTRL), where the system dynamics are governed by an unknown stochastic differential equation (SDE) and only discrete-time trajectory data are available. A central challenge is that the classical state-action value function $Q(s,a)$, which enables off-policy learning in discrete-time RL, does not exist in CTRL (Baird, 1994; Jia and Zhou, 2023; Tallec et al., 2019). On the other hand, continuous-time control provides local notions such as the instantaneous advantage function $q(s,a)$, but these typically rely on state value function $V(s)$. To address this, we introduce a new definition of the state-action value function in CTRL and derive its governing equation.
  Building on the PhiBE approximation (Zhu, 2024; Zhu et al., 2025), we propose iterative algorithms to approximate the optimal $Q$-function in both model-based and model-free settings using only discrete-time off-policy data. Under linear function approximation, we establish convergence guarantees and derive explicit convergence rates for the proposed method.

</details>


### [532] [Active learning-based Bayesian optimization in the realm of copper slag-blended cement systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21948)
*Debadri Som,Rayna Maheshwari,Mathijs Schuurmans,Panagiotis Patrinos,Yiannis Pontikes*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文展示贝叶斯优化（BO）可在极少实验数据（初始10组实验，2:1数据-变量比）下，快速优化低碳胶凝材料配方。通过高斯过程代理模型结合采集函数，2-6次迭代即可找到满足强度、低成本、低CO2排放的Pareto最优解，并采用保守更新策略避免等待28天强度测试。线性核预测精度最佳，而径向基核在主动学习中不确定性量化更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统实验方法开发低碳辅助胶凝材料（SCMs）配方需要大量试验，周期长、成本高。亟需一种数据高效的优化方法，在实验室资源严重受限的条件下快速找到兼顾强度、成本和碳排放的近似最优配方。

Method: 采用贝叶斯优化框架，以高斯过程为代理模型，结合Expected Improvement和Upper Confidence Bound两种采集函数；初始仅10组实验（变量数5，数据-变量比2:1）；针对铜渣、石灰石、波特兰水泥三元体系优化2天抗压强度、成本和CO2排放；采用保守更新策略，利用28天强度的不确定性边界来避免等待28天。

Result: 2-6次迭代即可识别出Pareto非支配解，满足2天强度>10 MPa、28天强度>32.5 MPa的要求，CO2排放低于500 kg CO2/吨；线性核预测精度优于非线性核，但径向基核在主动学习中不确定性量化更优。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯优化是一种实用的决策支持工具，能够在严重数据约束下加速低碳水泥配方的研发，对推动建筑行业脱碳具有重要应用价值。

Abstract: Accelerated mix design optimization is critical for deploying low-carbon supplementary cementitious materials (SCMs) because traditional experimental approaches require extensive testing campaigns. The authors demonstrate that Bayesian optimization (BO) can identify near-optimal blended cement formulations using an AI-driven approach with minimal experimental data. Starting with only 10 initial experiments and a 2:1 data-to-variable ratio reflecting realistic laboratory constraints, the authors optimized copper slag, limestone, Portland cement systems for 32.5N strength class with respect to 2-day compressive strength, cost, and CO2 emissions. Gaussian process surrogate models guided sequential experimentation through Expected Improvement and Upper Confidence Bound acquisition functions. Within 2-6 iterations, BO identified Pareto non-dominated solutions meeting strength requirements (greater than 10 MPa at 2 days, greater than 32.5 MPa at 28 days) while achieving CO2 emissions below 500 kg CO2/ton; consistent with industry decarbonization targets. A conservative update strategy incorporating uncertainty bounds for 28-day strength enabled rapid iteration without waiting 28 days per cycle. Comparative analysis revealed that linear kernels outperformed nonlinear alternatives in predictive accuracy, though radial basis function kernels were preferred for active learning due to superior uncertainty quantification. This work demonstrates BO as a practical decision-support tool for cement research under severe data constraints.

</details>


### [533] [Optimal Macroitem Sequences in the Precedence Constrained Knapsack Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22018)
*Valerio Dose,Fabio Furini,Marco Locatelli*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了带优先约束背包问题（PCKP）的线性规划松弛结构，提出了宏观物品（macroitem）和可行序列的概念，证明了最优LP解由宏观物品的最优序列完全刻画，并给出了森林情形下的高效算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PCKP的线性规划松弛结构尚不清晰，特别是在优先约束下最优解的组合特征缺乏系统刻画，理解该结构有助于设计更好的近似算法或分支定界策略。

Method: 提出宏观物品（macroitem）与可行序列概念；利用线性规划对偶理论与参数化拉格朗日函数分析最优解结构；针对森林情形设计动态规划算法。

Result: 最优LP解由宏观物品的可行序列完全刻画：物品按宏观物品的利润-重量比非增序装入，至多一个宏观物品被部分装入；拉格朗日函数的断点与最优序列中宏观物品的利润-重量比一致；对偶解可由宏观物品内部的可行流组合刻画；森林情形下提出O(n²)算法，入树或出树情形改进至O(n log n)。

Conclusion: 本文为PCKP的LP松弛提供了完整的组合刻画，揭示了优先约束下背包问题的结构特性，并为特殊图结构提供了多项式时间算法。

Abstract: The Precedence Constrained Knapsack Problem (PCKP) asks for a maximum-profit subset of items, subject to a knapsack capacity constraint and precedence constraints encoded by a directed acyclic graph. We study the structure of optimal solutions of the Linear Programming (LP) relaxation of the natural Integer Linear Programming formulation of the PCKP. We introduce the notion of macroitem and of feasible sequence of macroitems, which partitions the item set while respecting the precedence structure. We establish that an optimal LP solution is fully characterized by the optimal sequence of macroitems: items are packed in nonincreasing order of the profit-to-weight ratio of their macroitem, with at most one macroitem fractionally included. We further show that the breakpoints of the parametric Lagrangian function of the capacity constraint coincide with the profit-to-weight ratios of the macroitems in the optimal sequence, and provide a complete combinatorial characterization of optimal dual solutions in terms of a feasible flow within each macroitem. Finally, for the special case in which the precedence graph is a forest, we devise an O(n^2) algorithm to compute the optimal sequence, which improves to O(n log n) for in-trees or out-trees, where n denotes the number of items.

</details>


### [534] [Information Design under Uncertain Utilities: Probabilistic and CVaR Approaches](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22157)
*Furkan Sezer*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出Cal-BCE概念，解决设计者缺乏代理人支付系数精确知识时的信息设计问题，在LQG结构下给出凸优化重构，并通过ETF实验验证了概率设计与CVaR设计在福利均值与尾部保护间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准信息设计假设设计者完全了解代理人支付系数，但现实中设计者往往面临结构不确定性。本文旨在弥补这一理论与实践差距，提出当设计者缺乏代理人支付系数精确知识时的信息设计方法。

Method: 引入Cal-BCE（校准贝叶斯相关均衡），通过修正策略（corrector policy）在结构不确定性下维持激励相容性，并适配揭示原理。在LQG结构下，将非凸设计问题转化为凸二阶锥规划（SOCP）和半定规划（SDP），分别处理概率约束和CVaR约束，通过Hadamard可逆性条件保证可行性。提出联合去中心化定理（joint decentralization theorem）分析两种设计对跨代理人行动协方差的约束。

Result: 在15个行业ETF数据集上，概率设计获得更高的平均福利，CVaR设计提供更好的尾部保护，两种设计各有优劣，无绝对主导。CVaR设计在相同容忍度下对协方差约束更紧，但实际排序取决于校准导致的可行性阈值差异。

Conclusion: 信息设计在结构不确定性下可通过Cal-BCE框架实现，概率约束和CVaR约束两种设计存在内在权衡，设计者需根据对福利均值与尾部风险的不同偏好进行选择。

Abstract: This paper studies information design when the designer lacks precise knowledge of agents' payoff coefficients. The Calibrated Bayes Correlated Equilibrium (Cal-BCE) is introduced as a solution concept that augments the Bayes correlated equilibrium with a corrector policy preserving incentive compatibility under the designer's structural uncertainty, adapting its revelation principle to this setting. The design problem is nonconvex in general, but under a linear-quadratic-Gaussian structure it admits convex second-order cone and semidefinite reformulations under two-sided probabilistic and conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) constraints, with feasibility guaranteed by a Hadamard invertibility condition. A joint decentralization theorem shows that both designs cap cross-agent action covariances, the CVaR design more tightly at a common tolerance; but because the formulations operate at design-specific feasibility thresholds, the realized ordering is calibration-dependent. Experiments on fifteen sector ETFs confirm the trade-off: the probabilistic design attains higher mean welfare and the CVaR design better tail protection, with neither dominating outright.

</details>


### [535] [Ensemble Feedback Methods for Families of Linear Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22192)
*Michael Schönlein,Fabian Wirth*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究紧致参数集上的一族有限维线性系统的反馈镇定问题，提出了乘法反馈算子来解决经典系综反馈无法镇定无穷维系统的问题，并在常/非常Hermite指标下证明了Heymann引理、极点配置定理和镇定结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典系综反馈诱导紧致控制算子，无法修改系统的本质谱，导致在无穷维设定下无法实现镇定。为此需要引入新的反馈机制。

Method: 引入乘法反馈算子替代经典系综反馈；对于常Hermite指标的系统证明Heymann引理和极点配置定理；分析点态可控性与系综可控性的关系；对非常Hermite指标的情况在附加参数集结构假设下推导结果。

Result: 在常Hermite指标下成功证明了Heymann引理、极点配置定理及镇定结果；阐明了点态可控性与系综可控性的关系；在非常Hermite指标下，在参数集满足特定结构时得到对应结论。

Conclusion: 乘法反馈算子能够有效解决经典系综反馈在参数化线性系统族镇定中的本质谱限制问题。

Abstract: We consider feedback stabilization for one-parameter families of finite-dimensional linear systems over compact parameter sets in the complex field. Classical ensemble feedback induces compact control operators and therefore cannot modify the essential spectrum of the associated multiplication operators describing the free motion of the system. This precludes stabilization in many infinite-dimensional settings. To address this issue, multiplication feedback operators are introduced. For systems with constant Hermite indices, an analogue of Heymann's lemma is proved, as well as a pole placement theorem, and stabilization results. The relation of pointwise and ensemble controllability is investigated. For systems with nonconstant Hermite indices, corresponding results are obtained under additional assumptions on the structure of the parameter set.

</details>


### [536] [Adam Converges in Nonsmooth Nonconvex Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22326)
*Zijian Liu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文首次对经典Adam优化器（含偏差校正项，无额外修改）在非光滑非凸优化问题上进行了有限时间分析，证明了随机缩放学习率可达到$1/T^{2/13}$的收敛率，且结果适用于重尾噪声场景，理论参数设置$β_1=β_2$与近期实证研究一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Adam理论分析主要关注光滑非凸优化的收敛率，无法解释其在非光滑实际问题（如神经网络训练）中的成功。而近年来的Online-to-Nonconvex Conversion框架虽提供了新视角，但现有工作忽略了Adam原始的偏差校正项，且常需额外操作（如裁剪），未能真正证明原始Adam的收敛保证。

Method: 基于Online-to-Nonconvex Conversion框架，对含偏差校正项的经典Adam进行有限时间分析，采用随机缩放学习率策略，并在$β_1=β_2$参数设置下建立理论保证。

Result: 证明了经典Adam在非光滑非凸优化上达到$1/T^{2/13}$的收敛率，且该结果适用于更贴近实际的重尾噪声场景。

Conclusion: 填补了原始Adam在非光滑非凸优化中理论分析的空白，为Adam的广泛实践成功提供了更合理的理论解释，并验证了$β_1=β_2$这一与实证研究一致的理论参数选择。

Abstract: Adam is one of the most widely implemented and influential modern optimizers. Why is it effective across different optimization problems in practice? This question arguably lies at the center of the optimization community over the last decade and has motivated a substantial body of work aimed at understanding its convergence behavior. However, existing studies have mainly focused on the convergence rate of Adam in smooth nonconvex optimization, which unfortunately does not adequately capture practical settings, since many real-world problems are nonsmooth, such as those arising in training neural networks. Thus, these studies cannot fully explain the popularity and empirical success of Adam.
  Recently, an insightful and powerful framework called Online-to-Nonconvex Conversion has opened a new way to analyze Adam for nonsmooth nonconvex optimization. Unfortunately, prior works along this line share two common limitations. First, all of them ignore the important bias-correction term in the original Adam algorithm. Second and more importantly, many of them require extra operations that are not used in Adam, such as a clipping step. Therefore, the convergence guarantee for the original Adam method still remains unclear.
  In this work, we present the first finite-time analysis for the classical form of Adam, i.e., with the bias-correction step and without further algorithmic modifications, and prove that a randomly scaled learning rate ensures a convergence rate of $1/T^{\frac{2}{13}}$ for nonsmooth nonconvex optimization. Moreover, our result provably applies to the modern heavy-tailed noise regime, which is closer to practice. Interestingly, our theory is established under the parameter choice $β_1=β_2$, aligning with the recent empirical studies.

</details>


### [537] [Convergence Rates of Tseng's Splitting Method and Its Acceleration Schemes for Monotone Inclusion Problem with a Sum of Hölder Continuous Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22392)
*Yi Zhang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了在Hölder连续（弱于Lipschitz连续）假设下，Tseng分裂方法及其两种加速变体（复合额外锚定梯度法和辛复合额外梯度法）的收敛率，并通过数值实验验证了理论收敛率与数值表现的一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单调包含问题的求解方法通常要求算子满足Lipschitz连续性，而Hölder连续性作为更弱的条件更能刻画某些实际问题的特性。为弥合这一差距，本文研究了相关算法在Hölder连续假设下的收敛性能。

Method: 在Hölder连续性假设下，理论分析了Tseng分裂方法及其两种加速变体（复合额外锚定梯度法和辛复合额外梯度法）的收敛率，并通过数值实验验证理论结果。

Result: 证明了三种算法在Hölder连续条件下的收敛率，数值实验表明算法的实际表现与理论收敛率一致。

Conclusion: 将单调包含问题的求解方法从Lipschitz连续性假设推广至更弱的Hölder连续性假设，拓展了这些经典算法的适用范围。

Abstract: The monotone inclusion problem is fundamental in applied mathematics and is closely related to a wide range of practical applications. However, existing solution methods typically require the underlying operator to be Lipschitz continuous. Recently, Hölder continuity, a weaker condition than Lipschitz continuity, has proven useful in characterizing certain real-world problems. To bridge this gap, we investigate the convergence rates of the Tseng's splitting method (a fundamental algorithm for monotone inclusion problem) and its two accelerated variants, the composite extra anchored gradient method and the symplectic composite extra gradient method, under the Hölder continuity assumption. Our numerical experiments demonstrate that the numerical performance of these algorithms aligns with their respective theoretical convergence rates.

</details>


### [538] [A Dual ADMM Framework for Inverse Parameter Identification in Elliptic Variational Inequalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22467)
*Youness Mezzan,Youssef Ouakrim,Abderrahim Zafrar*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文针对一类由第二类椭圆变分不等式（含不可微边界泛函）控制的反参数识别问题，提出了一种结合增广拉格朗日框架和ADMM算法的约束优化方法，成功重构Robin型系数，并通过数值实验验证了理论分析的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理含不可微边界泛函的变分不等式反问题时，要么引入平滑近似破坏原模型结构，要么计算代价过高。本文旨在发展一种无需平滑化、保留原问题非光滑结构的高效鲁棒参数识别方法。

Method: 将反问题表述为带Tikhonov正则化的约束优化问题；利用Fenchel对偶处理不可微边界项；采用增广拉格朗日框架结合ADMM交替求解；建立了未知系数的可识别性及近似方案的存在性与收敛性理论。

Result: 在经典基准问题上进行的数值实验证实了理论分析，表明所提方法能以较低计算代价实现精确的参数重构。

Conclusion: 该方法为热传导、摩擦接触、腐蚀检测等领域中的反问题提供了稳健的求解框架。

Abstract: This paper is concerned with an inverse parameter identification problem governed by a second-kind elliptic variational inequality involving a non-differentiable boundary functional. The objective is to reconstruct an unknown Robin-type coefficient from boundary measurements while preserving the intrinsic nonsmooth structure of the underlying model. The inverse problem is formulated as a constrained optimization problem, where the cost functional measures the discrepancy between the computed and observed data and is stabilized by Tikhonov regularization. To overcome the difficulties associated with the nonsmooth variational inequality, we reformulate the state problem as a constrained minimization problem and employ an augmented Lagrangian framework combined with the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). Fenchel duality is used to treat the non-differentiable boundary term without introducing smoothing approximations. We establish identifiability of the unknown coefficient and prove existence and convergence results for the proposed approximation scheme. Numerical experiments performed on a classical benchmark problem confirm the theoretical analysis and demonstrate that accurate parameter reconstruction can be achieved with reduced computational effort. The proposed methodology provides a robust framework for inverse problems arising in applications such as heat transfer, frictional contact, and corrosion detection.

</details>


### [539] [Quantum Restricted Boltzmann Machine for Fast Unit Commitment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22542)
*Yuji Cao,Yue Chen*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出量子受限玻尔兹曼机（qRBM）方法，通过量子硬件兼容的能量评分预测机组组合（UC）模式，再通过仿射映射恢复最优解。相比现有方法，所需量子比特减少223倍，计算时间降低99.96%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: UC问题需要反复求解以保证电力系统可靠性，但面临系统规模扩大和快速响应需求带来的计算挑战。

Method: 提出qRBM方法：先通过量子硬件兼容的能量评分预测UC模式，再通过仿射映射恢复最优解。

Result: 相比现有方法，所需量子比特减少223倍，计算时间降低99.96%。

Conclusion: qRBM方法能显著降低量子资源消耗和计算时间，为大规模UC问题的高效求解提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Unit commitment (UC) problems must be solved repeatedly to ensure power system reliability, yet face computational challenges from growing system scale and fast response requirements. This letter proposes a quantum restricted Boltzmann machine (qRBM) method that first predicts UC patterns via quantum-hardware-compatible energy scoring, then recovers optimal solutions through affine mapping. Compared to existing work, this method reduces the qubits needed for the same UC problem by 223 times and computation time by 99.96%.

</details>


### [540] [A Geometric Solution of the Schrödinger Bridge Problem on $\mathsf{SO}(2)$ via Stochastic Optimal Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22690)
*Hamza Mahmood,Adeel Akhtar*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种几何坐标无关的方法，用于解决李群SO(2)上运动学方程的迷向薛定谔桥问题（SBP），通过证明希尔伯特投影度量下不动点递归的压缩性，实现了最优密度控制，并通过数值仿真验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有薛定谔桥问题的求解通常依赖欧几里得嵌入，缺乏对李群内在几何结构的利用。本文旨在为SO(2)上的密度控制问题提供一种纯几何坐标无关的解决方案。

Method: 将角速度视为控制输入，假设初始和终端概率密度连续且严格正；证明SO(2)上薛定谔方程组的解存在且唯一；通过希尔伯特投影度量证明不动点递归在完备度量空间中是压缩的；利用SO(2)的内在几何结构设计几何控制器。

Result: 成功证明了SO(2)上薛定谔系统解的存在唯一性，设计了几何控制器，数值仿真验证了理论构造的正确性。

Conclusion: 本文为SO(2)上的密度控制提供了一种不依赖欧几里得嵌入的几何坐标无关方法，为李群上的薛定谔桥问题提供了新的理论框架。

Abstract: We present a geometric coordinate-free solution to the isotropic Schrödinger bridge problem (SBP) for the kinematic equation on the Lie group $\mathsf{SO}(2)$. We consider the angular velocity of the system as the control input and assume that the given initial and terminal state probability density functions defined on $\mathsf{SO}(2)$ in our SBP are continuous and strictly positive. We solve the SBP by proving the existence and uniqueness of a solution to the so-called Schrödinger system of equations on $\mathsf{SO}(2)$, by showing that a fixed-point recursion is contractive in a complete metric space with respect to the Hilbert's projective metric. The geometric controller thus designed only uses the intrinsic geometric structure of $\mathsf{SO}(2)$ and does not embed it in the Euclidean plane to achieve the optimal density control. The numerical simulation verifies the validity of the theoretical construction of the Schrödinger bridge. The code and animations are publicly available at \texttt{\href{https://gitlab.com/a5akhtar/sbp}{https://gitlab.com/a5akhtar/sbp}}.

</details>


### [541] [A Variable-Metric Non-monotone Line Search Method for Mixed Variational Inequalities and Equilibrium Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22869)
*Mohammed Alshahrani*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种带变尺度投影和非单调Armijo线搜索的间隙函数法，用于变分不等式、混合变分不等式和均衡问题，具有全局收敛性和R-线性收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有间隙函数法收敛速度慢或需单调线搜索，本文旨在结合变尺度投影与非单调线搜索，提升收敛性能并统一处理三类问题。

Method: 将变尺度投影步视为Fukushima正则化间隙的最大化方向，结合修正非单调Armijo线搜索驱动间隙函数趋于零。

Result: 对强单调Lipschitz算子证明全局收敛与R-线性收敛；对均衡问题获得全局收敛与Mastroeni间隙误差界；数值实验验证了理论结果。

Conclusion: 变尺度缩放+非单调线搜索+间隙函数下降的组合对所述问题类是新颖且有效的。

Abstract: We propose a scaled gap-function method for variational inequalities, mixed variational inequalities, and equilibrium problems over a closed convex set. The method drives a gap function to zero by combining a variable-metric scaled projection step with a modified non-monotone Armijo line search. The construction rests on a structural identity: the scaled projection step is exactly the maximizer that defines the Fukushima regularized gap, so the search direction is simultaneously the algorithmic step and the gap-defining direction. For variational and mixed variational inequalities with a strongly monotone, Lipschitz operator we establish global convergence and an R-linear rate, under a fixed or a controlled-change variable metric. The rate follows from the strong-monotonicity contraction and the resulting explicit gap error bound. For equilibrium problems we obtain global convergence and a gap error bound (Mastroeni's gap). Numerical experiments on controlled problems confirm the convergence guarantees and the predicted rate, and compare the method with standard extragradient and gap-descent methods. The combination of variable-metric scaling, a modified non-monotone line search, and gap-function descent appears to be new for these problem classes.

</details>


### [542] [Sparsity-Cone SDP Relaxations and Applications to Variable Fixing for Sparse Quadratic Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22894)
*Di Hou,Thai P. D. Nguyen,Kim-Chuan Toh,Guanyi Wang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种稀疏锥半定规划（SC-SDP）松弛方法，用于求解带有稀疏约束的二次规划问题。该方法仅使用(n+1)维矩阵和单个稀疏锥约束，在保持与SDP-RLT松弛等强度的同时显著降低计算成本，并设计了高效的求解算法和预求解机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 带稀疏约束的二次规划（QP）通常是NP难的，其高效全局求解依赖于可处理的紧凸松弛。现有标准SDP松弛（如SDP-RLT）涉及(2n+1)维半定矩阵，计算代价高昂，需要更高效的松弛方法。

Method: 提出SC-SDP松弛：仅使用(n+1)维矩阵加上一个稀疏锥约束$\mathcal{K}$来松弛$\ell_0$范数约束。证明了SC-SDP与SDP-RLT松弛等强度。研究了稀疏锥$\mathcal{K}$的结构特征，并证明其投影可通过一维子问题高效计算。基于对偶问题导出预求解机制（对偶固定规则、筛选剪枝规则、对偶细化步骤）。开发了两阶段黎曼几何增广拉格朗日方法进行高效求解。

Result: SC-SDP在保持与SDP-RLT相同边界质量的同时，大幅降低了计算复杂度；所提出的预求解机制有效；数值实验验证了SC-SDP的计算优势和实用性。

Conclusion: SC-SDP是一种兼顾紧性与计算效率的稀疏QP松弛方法，为稀疏优化问题的可扩展求解提供了新途径。

Abstract: Quadratic programs (QPs) with sparsity constraint are generally NP-hard, and their efficient global solution depends crucially on tractable tight convex relaxations. In this paper, we propose a sparsity-cone semidefinite programming (SC-SDP) relaxation for sparse (indefinite) QPs. Unlike standard SDP liftings, such as the SDP--RLT relaxation, which involve a $(2n+1)$-dimensional semidefinite matrix, the proposed SC-SDP formulation uses only a $(n+1)$-dimensional matrix together with a single sparsity-cone constraint $\mathcal{K}$ to handle the relaxation of the $\ell_0$-norm constraint. We prove that SC-SDP is equivalent in strength to the SDP--RLT relaxation. We further study the sparsity cone $\mathcal{K}$, deriving structural characterizations and showing that projection onto $\mathcal{K}$ can be computed efficiently via a one-dimensional subproblem. Building on the dual of SC-SDP, we derive explicit presolving mechanisms, including a dual-fixing rule for individual variables, a screening-cut rule for excluding larger support patterns, and a dual-refinement step for improving presolving certificates. To solve the resulting relaxation SC-SDP efficiently, we develop a two-phase Riemannian-based augmented Lagrangian method and exploits the structured projection subproblems. Numerical experiments on several classes of sparse QPs show that SC-SDP preserves the bound quality of SDP--RLT while offering substantial computational advantages and practically effective presolving capabilities.

</details>


### [543] [Diffusions with resetting boundaries: ergodic control and renewal optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22990)
*Sergey Nikitin*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了一类具有重置边界的一维扩散过程的遍历优化问题，推导了带非局部边界条件的HJB方程并建立了验证定理，同时还研究了更新扩散的遍历代价显式公式及最优漂移参数刻画。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究具有重置边界的一维扩散过程的遍历优化问题，这类过程在到达指定边界时会被瞬时重置，需要建立相应的最优控制理论框架。

Method: 通过HJB方程与非局部边界条件结合建立验证定理；利用更新扩散的再生结构推导遍历代价的显式公式；通过无限惩罚机制刻画最优遍历代价。

Result: 推导了带非局部边界条件的HJB方程并建立了最优平稳马尔可夫控制的验证定理；给出了更新扩散遍历代价的显式公式；在弱可积假设下证明了存在性结果；刻画了无限惩罚机制下的最优遍历代价。

Conclusion: 本文为具有复位边界条件的扩散过程遍历优化提供了完整的理论框架，包括HJB方程、验证定理、显式公式和存在性结果。

Abstract: We study ergodic optimization problems for one-dimensional diffusions with resetting boundaries, namely diffusions that are instantaneously reset according to prescribed distributions upon reaching designated boundary points. For controlled diffusions with resetting boundaries, we consider optimization of the ergodic cost over a broad class of admissible real-time controls. We derive a Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman equation with non-local boundary conditions and establish a verification theorem for optimal stationary Markov controls. In the case of one resetting and one reflecting boundary, we also prove an existence result under weak integrability assumptions.
  We then study renewal diffusions. Using their regenerative structure, we derive explicit formulas for the ergodic cost. These formulas are applied to optimization problems over families of drift coefficients, yielding explicit characterizations of optimal drift parameters in several examples. Finally, we study an infinite-penalty regime in which boundary hitting is prohibited and characterize the corresponding optimal ergodic cost.

</details>


### [544] [Towards time-variant scenario reduction for energy system optimization modeling under uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23072)
*Yannick Werner,Juan Miguel Morales,Salvador Pineda,Sonja Wogrin*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出一种时间变异的情景缩减框架，通过允许情景概率随时间变化，提高了能源系统随机规划中模型缩减的灵活性和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有情景缩减方法忽视了情景的长期时间特性，导致模型缩减效率有限，需要一种能更好捕捉时间维度信息的方法。

Method: 提出时间变异的情景缩减框架，允许情景聚合随时间变化，使情景概率具有时间变异性，从而更精确地捕捉驱动投资决策的关键时间步上的情景实现及其概率。

Result: 在含不确定可再生能源发电的两阶段随机发电扩展规划问题上，证明了该方法相比传统时间不变方法具有显著更高的灵活性。

Conclusion: 时间变异的情景缩减框架能够有效克服传统方法的局限性，为长期能源系统规划提供更高效的决策支持。

Abstract: Stochastic programming has become a popular tool for supporting decision-making under uncertainty in the long-term planning of energy systems. Existing scenario reduction methods, however, are naive about the long-term temporal nature of scenarios, which limits their efficiency in reducing model size. In this paper, we overcome this inefficiency by proposing a novel time-variant scenario reduction framework that explicitly allows for varying scenario aggregations over time. As a result, scenario probabilities become time-variant, enabling not only the accurate capture of scenario realizations but also their probabilities at the time steps that drive investment decisions. This substantially increases flexibility compared to traditional time-invariant methods, which we demonstrate on a two-stage stochastic generation expansion planning problem with uncertain renewable power production.

</details>


### [545] [On the gain of entrainment in stable linear control systems with a nonlinear output](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23149)
*Ram Massas,Michael Margaliot*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究连续时间稳定线性控制系统在静态非线性输出映射下的正增益夹带(GOE)现象。研究表明，非线性输出可通过周期轨道平均输出与平均平衡点输出的失配产生非平凡GOE，凸(凹)输出映射保证非负(非正)GOE，并给出了二次输出的频域公式和最优激励条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索线性控制系统中非线性输出映射如何产生正增益夹带(GOE)现象，即周期性输入产生的平均输出大于相同均值的常数输入输出，揭示非线性特性对系统增益的影响机制。

Method: 采用二阶近似分析平滑输出映射的GOE；利用凸性/凹性分析GOE符号；通过Bregman散度给出几何解释；针对二次输出来推导频域公式，并求解能量约束下的最优周期激励。

Result: 非线性输出映射的曲率决定GOE的主导贡献；凸(凹)输出映射保证GOE非负(非正)；二次输出情形下导出了GOE的频域显式公式及符号判据，并获得了最优周期激励解。

Conclusion: 非线性输出是产生非平凡GOE的关键；输出映射的凸性/凹性决定了GOE的方向；频域公式为工程应用（如RLC电路和药效模型）提供了定量分析工具。

Abstract: A control system admits a positive gain of entrainment (GOE) if entrainment to a periodic input yields a larger output, on average, than the output generated by the corresponding constant input with the same mean value. We analyze GOE in continuous-time stable linear control systems with a static nonlinear output map. Although linear systems with linear outputs have zero GOE, we show that a nonlinear output may generate a nontrivial GOE through the mismatch between the average output along the entrained periodic orbit and the output evaluated at the corresponding averaged equilibrium. We derive a second-order characterization of GOE for smooth output maps revealing that the leading-order contribution is determined by the curvature of the output map. We then show that if the output is convex (concave) on the controllable subspace, then GOE is nonnegative (nonpositive) for every periodic input. Furthermore, GOE admits a natural geometric interpretation as the average Bregman divergence between the entrained periodic orbit and the equilibrium associated with the averaged input. For the special case of quadratic output functions, we derive explicit frequency-domain formulas for GOE. These yield necessary and sufficient conditions guaranteeing the sign of GOE, characterize the contribution of individual input harmonics, and lead to an optimal periodic excitation that maximizes GOE under an energy constraint. The theoretical results are illustrated using an electrical RLC circuit and a compartmental pharmacodynamic model with a nonlinear drug-effect map.

</details>


### [546] [Incremental Learning in Mirror Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23198)
*Raphaël Berthier,Loucas Pillaud-Vivien*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究了凸二次损失与一般凸下半连续镜像势生成的镜像流，发现当初始值靠近镜像势定义域边界时，缩放轨迹收敛到以定义域指示函数为势的极限镜像流，此时原始变量在随时间变化的假设集上最小化损失，揭示了镜像流增量学习的一般机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解镜像流在边界初始条件下的渐近行为，揭示其增量学习机制。

Method: 理论分析：研究凸二次损失与凸下半连续镜像势生成的镜像流，分析其缩放轨迹在边界初始化条件下的收敛性，利用支撑函数的次微分刻画极限过程。

Result: 初始值靠近镜面势域边界时，缩放轨迹收敛到以定义域指示函数为势的极限镜像流；原始变量在支撑函数次微分的时变假设集上最小化损失。

Conclusion: 该结果提供了镜像流增量学习的一般机制。

Abstract: We study mirror flows generated by a convex quadratic loss and a general convex lower semicontinuous mirror potential. We show that, when initialized near the boundary of the domain of the mirror potential, their rescaled trajectories converge to a limiting mirror flow whose potential is the indicator function of the domain. In this limit, the primal variable minimizes the loss over a time-dependent hypothesis set: the subdifferential of the support function of the domain, evaluated at the dual variable. This characterization provides a general mechanism for incremental learning in mirror flows.

</details>


### [547] [Path-following Control of a Quadrotor using Quasi-Static Transverse Feedback Linearization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23218)
*Mohamed Al Lawati,Adeel Akhtar*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种准静态横向反馈线性化(QSTFL)控制器，用于四旋翼无人机沿几何路径（而非时间参数化轨迹）飞行，无需引入额外控制器状态，且推力输入由当前状态代数计算得到。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态反馈方法需要引入额外的控制器状态、推力导数测量和数值积分，计算复杂度高。本文旨在设计一种更简单的静态反馈控制器，实现路径跟踪的同时降低计算负担。

Method: 采用准静态横向反馈线性化方法，通过微分同胚坐标变换，将路径跟踪问题转化为使路径跟踪流形不变的控制设计；推力由当前状态代数求解，只需对3×3解耦矩阵求逆（而非4×4），并推导了推力和力矩的闭式表达式。

Result: 证明了路径跟踪流形的局部指数稳定性；数值仿真验证了所提方法的有效性；代码和动画已开源。

Conclusion: QSTFL控制器在无需动态扩展的前提下实现了四旋翼的几何路径跟踪，具有较低的实现复杂度和计算开销，是一种简洁有效的替代方案。

Abstract: We propose a quasi-static transverse feedback linearization (QSTFL) controller for a quadrotor to follow a prescribed geometric path, rather than a time-parameterized trajectory. In contrast to existing dynamic-feedback approaches, the controller does not introduce additional controller states. The thrust input is computed algebraically from the current state, eliminating the need for thrust-derivative measurements and numerical integration. The proposed design renders the path-following manifold invariant, ensuring that trajectories initialized on the path remain on it for all future time, while simultaneously regulating tangential velocity and yaw. We establish a diffeomorphic coordinate transformation and prove local exponential stability of the path-following manifold. In addition, closed-form expressions are derived for the thrust and torque inputs. Compared with dynamic-feedback constructions, the controller requires inversion of only a $3\times 3$ decoupling matrix rather than a $4\times 4$ one, leading to a simpler control law and reduced computational complexity. Numerical simulations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Code and animations are publicly available at \footnotesize{\texttt{\href{https://gitlab.com/a5akhtar/quasistatic-tfl-uav/}{https://gitlab.com/a5akhtar/quasistatic-tfl-uav/}}}.

</details>


### [548] [Value iteration with stopping criterion: finite iterations, stability, and near-optimality guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23229)
*Mathieu Granzotto,Romain Postoyan,Dragan Nešić,Lucian Buşoniu,Jamal Daafouz*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文为值迭代（VI）算法设计了广义停止准则，在温和假设下证明了算法有限步终止，并确保终止时的策略具有稳定性和近最优性保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 值迭代算法在实践中必须在有限步停止，但何时停止才能保证所得策略和价值函数具有期望的性质（如近最优性和稳定性）是一个关键问题。现有停止准则缺乏统一框架，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 针对确定性离散时间系统（无限时域，可能带折扣），提出一个广义停止准则框架，该框架涵盖现有准则并允许设计新准则。在温和假设下分析算法有限步终止性，并通过设计停止准则来保证策略的稳定性，同时推导出由停止准则决定的显式近最优性界。

Result: 证明了在广义停止准则下VI算法有限步终止；所得到的最终策略具有稳定性；给出了显式的近最优性界，该界限由停止准则的设计决定。

Conclusion: 本文提供了一个停止准则的设计框架，能够在计算开销与稳定性、性能保证之间取得平衡，为实际应用中的VI算法停止问题提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Value iteration (VI) is a cornerstone of dynamic programming that allows computing near-optimal feedback laws for general plant dynamics and cost functions. In practice, however, it must be stopped after finitely many iterations. This raises the question of when to stop the algorithm so that the resulting policies and value functions achieve desirable properties, like given near-optimality bounds and stability. In this context, we study deterministic, discrete-time systems with infinite-horizon (possibly discounted) costs whose inputs are generated by VI. We equip VI with a generalized stopping criterion that encompasses existing choices while allowing new ones. Our aim is to analyze the properties of the policies and value functions at the final iteration. Under mild assumptions, we first show that VI indeed terminates in a finite number of iterations. We then establish that the final policies are stabilizing by properly designing the stopping criterion, and derive explicit near-optimality bounds characterized by this choice. These results offer a design framework for the stopping criteria that balances computational effort with stability and performance guarantees.

</details>


### [549] [A First-Order Mean Field Control Analysis of Transformer Layers under Cross-Entropy Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23235)
*Cheng Huan,Hongwei Yuan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文从连续深度平均场控制视角研究Transformer残差层在交叉熵训练下的行为，将深度视为时间、层参数视为控制，证明了有限深度轨迹与连续流的逼近误差，并推导了Pontryagin条件等理论结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从理论上理解Transformer残差网络在交叉熵训练下的动态行为，建立连续深度平均场控制框架来统一分析离散残差层与连续极限之间的关系。

Method: 将残差Transformer递归视为受控隐状态流的显式欧拉格式，证明路径逼近误差；结合高概率采样界分析经验交叉熵风险；将极限问题建模为一阶输运控制问题并推导Pontryagin条件。

Result: 证明了$O(\varepsilon)$路径逼近误差、高概率采样界、Pontryagin条件（末端伴随含softmax残差）、有限类和度量熵一致性估计等理论结果。

Conclusion: 连续深度平均场控制视角为Transformer训练提供了统一的理论分析框架，验证了连续到离散的恢复性，并讨论了极小值的存在性、稳定性及初始化等实际问题。

Abstract: We study Transformer-type residual layers under cross-entropy training through a continuous-depth mean field control viewpoint. Depth is treated as time, layer parameters as controls, and the residual Transformer recursion as an explicit Euler scheme for a controlled hidden-state flow. For fixed controls, we prove an $O(\varepsilon)$ pathwise approximation of finite-depth trajectories by the continuous flow and combine this with high-probability sampling bounds for the empirical cross-entropy risk. We formulate the limiting population problem as a first-order transport control problem for the law of hidden states and derive a Pontryagin condition whose terminal adjoint contains the softmax residual. We also give finite-class and metric-entropy uniform estimates, compare optimal values, and discuss existence, stability, continuous-to-discrete recovery, initialization, and range estimates for continuous minimizers.

</details>


### [550] [Sparse Feedback Implementation for Sender-Receiver Transportation Linear-Quadratic Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23250)
*Anders Hansson*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文研究稀疏线性二次型交通动力学问题，提出最优反馈增益可分解为稀疏矩阵与另一稀疏矩阵逆的乘积，从而降低计算开销并支持分布式实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统线性二次型控制器的最优反馈增益通常是稠密矩阵，计算开销大且难以分布式实现，不利于大规模交通动力学系统的实时控制。

Method: 将最优反馈增益分解为稀疏矩阵与另一稀疏矩阵的逆的右乘形式，利用图自适应坐标系揭示内在稀疏结构。

Result: 提出的分解方法显著降低了控制信号的计算复杂度，并支持分布式实现。

Conclusion: 线性二次型控制问题在图自适应坐标系下并非必然是稠密的，所提公式可揭示其内在稀疏性。

Abstract: We study a sparse linear-quadratic problem for transportation dynamics. The goal is to compute the optimal control signal without applying the usually dense optimal feedback gain directly. We show that the optimal feedback gain can be factorized as the product of a sparse matrix and the inverse of another sparse matrix from the right. This factorization enables the control signal to be computed with much less computational effort than direct multiplication by the dense gain. The factorization also enables a distributed implementation. The main message is that linear quadratic control need not appear dense when expressed in graph-adapted coordinates, and that intrinsic sparsity can be revealed under the proposed formulation.

</details>


### [551] [Toward Decarbonization of Chemical Manufacturing: Joint Optimization of Unit Commitment and Microgrid Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23400)
*Saba Ghasemi Naraghi,Richard Reed,Tylee Kareck,Paritosh Ramanan,Zheyu Jiang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种集中式优化模型，联合优化电气化蒸汽裂解微电网与电力系统的运行，通过两阶段求解方法（Benders分解+热启动）将求解时间降低93.5%，发现30%电气化水平可实现最大温室气体减排，过高电气化反而增加排放和成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 化工过程加热的电气化对工业脱碳和可持续制造至关重要，但电气化化工厂与电力系统的联合优化尚未得到充分研究，需要协同优化以实现两个部门的脱碳运行。

Method: 建立混合整数线性规划（MILP）模型，优化26个乙烯厂与德州电力系统的小时级运行计划；提出两阶段求解法：第一阶段用Benders分解（LP松弛子问题）解耦微电网与主电网，第二阶段用第一阶段最优解作为热启动点求解原MILP。

Result: 两阶段方法将求解时间降低93.5%；30%电气化水平实现最大整体温室气体减排；超过30%后电气化水平越高，整体排放越高且运营成本稳步上升；提高可再生能源占比有助于破除电气化瓶颈；电气化蒸汽裂解微电网的最优运行计划呈现显著时空模式。

Conclusion: 30%是最优电气化水平点，过高电气化反而造成排放和成本上升；电力系统可再生能源增加可助力整体脱碳；电气化微电网的时空调度特性值得关注。

Abstract: The electrification of chemical process heating is essential to industrial decarbonization and sustainable manufacturing of chemical products. Joint optimization of electrified chemical process heating units and electric power systems is needed to achieve decarbonized operation of both sectors. In this work, we introduce a centralized optimization model that identifies the optimal unit commitment of power systems and optimal operation of electrified steam cracking microgrids for sustainable olefins production. A mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) model is developed to optimize the hourly operational plan of 26 ethylene plants and the main power system in Texas. We propose a two-stage solution method to solve the resulting large-scale centralized MILP problem efficiently. In the first stage, we apply Benders decomposition with LP-relaxed subproblems to decouple microgrid operations from the main power system. In the second stage, we use the first-stage optimal solution as a warm starting point for the centralized MILP. This two-stage approach reduces the average solution time by 93.5% compared to direct solution of the MILP. Results show that the largest overall greenhouse gas (GHG) emission reduction for both power systems and microgrids is achieved when the electrification level of steam cracking units is at 30%. Above 30% electrification level, a higher electrification level leads to higher overall GHG emissions and steady increase in operating costs, particularly on the microgrid side. Increasing renewables contributions in the electric power system helps debottleneck the electrification efforts and facilitate holistic decarbonization. We also remark that the optimal operational plan of electrified steam cracking microgrids also exhibit strong spatiotemporal patterns.

</details>


### [552] [Finite difference methods for a continuous-time heterogeneous agent model with recursive utility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23408)
*Yves Achdou,Qing Tang*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出并证明了求解具有Epstein-Zin效用的连续时间异质代理模型的计算方法，针对不同时间偏好情况设计了Howard-Newton和Howard-Tarski-Kantorovich算法，并证明了收敛性与解的存在性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决具有Epstein-Zin递归效用的连续时间异质代理模型的计算求解问题，该模型能够分离风险厌恶与跨期替代。

Method: 对HJB方程进行离散化，针对晚期偏好情况提出Howard-Newton算法，针对早期偏好情况提出Howard-Tarski-Kantorovich算法，并证明算法收敛性及离散解的存在性。

Result: 证明了两种迭代算法的收敛性，获得了离散HJB方程解的存在性，并在晚期偏好的情况下给出了连续与离散HJB方程唯一解之间的先验估计。

Conclusion: 所提出的算法能够有效求解Epstein-Zin效用下的异质代理模型，具有理论收敛保证。

Abstract: We propose, analyze and test computational methods for solving a continuous-time heterogenous agent model with Epstein-Zin utility. Such recursive utilities allow the model to disentangle between risk aversion and intertemporal substitution. Having discretized the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation arising in the model, we propose a Howard-Newton algorithm for the late resolution preference case, and a Howard-Tarski-Kantorovich algorithm for the early resolution preference case. We prove the convergence of the iterative algorithms. We obtain as a consequence the existence of solutions to the discretized HJB equations. In the late resolution case, we supply a priori estimates between the unique solutions of the continuous and discretized HJB equations.

</details>


### [553] [Exponential stability of abstract boundary-coupled positive systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23549)
*Yassine El Gantouh,Mahyar Mahinzaeim*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文在一般半群框架下研究了一类抽象边界耦合正系统的适定性和指数稳定性，通过反馈论方法和预解正算子扰动技术，给出了边界耦合算子的简单可验证条件及谱准则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为抽象边界耦合正系统建立统一的适定性和指数稳定性分析框架，填补现有理论在处理边界耦合问题上的系统性不足。

Method: 采用两种互补方法：1) 反馈论方法；2) Banach格上预解正算子的扰动技术。通过边界耦合算子的可验证条件保证适定性，并利用谱准则判断指数稳定性。

Result: 推导出一组简单且易于检验的边界耦合算子条件，用于验证耦合系统的适定性；同时提供了保证解指数稳定性的谱准则。

Conclusion: 该统一框架能够系统处理抽象动力系统中广泛类型的边界耦合问题，并通过多个算例验证了理论结果的有效性。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the well-posedness and exponential stability of a class of abstract boundary-coupled positive systems. Within a general semigroup framework, we establish well-posedness in terms of existence, uniqueness, and regularity of solutions. More concretely, we derive some simple and readily verifiable tests on the boundary coupling operators for the verification of the well-posedness of the coupled system and, at the same time, provide spectral criteria that guarantee exponential stability of the solutions. The analysis is based on two complementary approaches: the feedback-theoretic method and perturbation techniques for resolvent positive operators on Banach lattices (i.e., Banach spaces equipped with a compatible order structure). This unified framework allows for a systematic treatment of a broad class of boundary couplings in abstract dynamical systems. Several examples are presented to illustrate the applicability of the theoretical results.

</details>


### [554] [A modified Riemannian Levenberg-Marquardt Algorithm for robust or constraint optimization on manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23560)
*Mateusz Baran,Ronny Bergmann*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文在黎曼流形上扩展了Levenberg-Marquardt方法，提出了一种能够处理含异常值问题的鲁棒变体，包括块状鲁棒黎曼LM算法、收敛性分析、子问题求解方案，并在Manopt.jl中实现了开源代码，在地理回归、Procrustes分析、子空间Procrustes分析及束调整等任务上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的黎曼流形上的Levenberg-Marquardt方法无法有效处理实际应用中常见的异常值(outliers)，因此需要一种鲁棒的变体来扩展其适用性。

Method: 提出了块状鲁棒黎曼Levenberg-Marquardt算法(Robust Riemannian Levenberg-Marquardt)，讨论了收敛性理论如何适用于该框架，并探讨了子问题的多种求解方案。在Manopt.jl中实现了开源代码。

Result: 在地理回归、Procrustes分析、子空间Procrustes分析及束调整等任务上，该鲁棒LM求解器相比其他非光滑黎曼优化求解器表现更优。

Conclusion: 本文成功将LM方法推广到鲁棒黎曼流形优化场景，为含异常值的实际问题提供了有效的求解工具，并开源了实现。

Abstract: We extend the Levenberg-Marquardt method on Riemannian manifolds to a robust variant that allows to tackle problems from applications where outliers are to be expected. We formally state the framework for a block-wise variant of the Robust Riemannian Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm and discuss how known convergence results can be applied here as well. We further discuss several alternatives for phrasing the sub problem that has to be solved. Finally we illustrate how the accompanying open source implementation in Manopt$.$jl can be used to efficiently solve problems such as geodesic regression, Procrustes analysis, subspace Procrustes analysis and bundle adjustment robustly and compare the Levenberg-Marquardt solver to other solvers for nonsmooth Riemannian optimization.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.ST'></div>

# q-fin.ST [[Back]](#toc)

### [555] [Continuous Hidden Markov Models for Equity Returns: Heavy-Tail Emission Families and Regime-Conditional Value-at-Risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23492)
*Abdulrahman Alswaidan,Cade Jin,Jeffrey D. Varner*

Main category: q-fin.ST

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）在生成日度股票收益率方面的能力。传统观点认为，具有少量高斯状态的HMM无法再现收益率序列中绝对值自相关缓慢衰减的典型事实，因此需要更复杂的隐半马尔可夫模型。作者通过连续隐马尔可夫模型将时序（状态转移）与分布（条件密度）分离，发现失败原因在于分布假设（高斯）而非时序结构。使用厚尾分布（t、Laplace、广义误差）后，少量状态即可有效拟合波动率聚集和峰度，并通过多组回测验证了模型在路径模拟、VaR和投资组合等下游任务中的实用性与可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决传统隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）无法再现金融收益率序列中绝对值自相关缓慢衰减这一典型事实的长期困扰，避免转向更复杂的隐半马尔可夫模型，从而保留HMM的简洁性和可解释性。

Method: 提出连续隐马尔可夫模型，将状态转移（控制时序自相关）与条件分布（控制边际特征）分离；采用统一的EM框架支持高斯、t、Laplace和广义误差分布；提出基于分位数的初始化方法和谱恒等式（定界衰减模式数量）。

Result: 在SPY滚动窗口、30只股票板块平衡面板、CRSP跨十年转移测试以及六资产组合上，少量状态即可拟合；厚尾分布而非更多衰减模式是改善的关键；模型恢复了波动率聚类，缩小了峰度差距；无需调节超参数；生成的VaR通过了联合条件覆盖检验，Copula再现了跨资产相关性。

Conclusion: 传统HMM在日度美股收益率上的失败本质上是分布假设问题（高斯尾部不足），而非时序能力不足。使用厚尾分布的简单HMM即可达到甚至超越更复杂的隐半马尔可夫模型，是一个兼顾可解释性、路径生成和下游风险管理任务的统一工具。

Abstract: Synthetic generators of daily equity returns let practitioners stress test, backtest, and design scenarios that a single realized market history cannot supply, but only if the generator reproduces the stylized facts of real returns: heavy tails, negligible linear autocorrelation, and slow decay of the absolute-return autocorrelation. Hidden Markov models with few Gaussian states were long thought unable to reproduce that slow decay, and the standard fix was to abandon them for more complex hidden semi-Markov models. We revisit this issue with a continuous hidden Markov model whose regime chain governs the autocorrelation while per-regime densities govern the marginal, separating the temporal and distributional sides of the original failure. A unified expectation-maximization framework fits Gaussian, Student-t, Laplace, and generalized-error emissions under shared forward-backward recursions and quantile-based initialization, and a spectral identity bounds the number of decay modes by the rank of the centred transition matrix. Across SPY walk-forward folds, a sector-balanced 30-ticker panel, a CRSP cross-decade transfer, and a six-asset basket, that bound was not binding once a few states were used: heavy-tailed marginals, not additional decay modes, closed most of the fit gap, recovering volatility clustering above the i.i.d. baseline and narrowing the kurtosis gap without a tuning hyperparameter. The original failure is therefore distributional, not temporal. On daily US equities, a simple, interpretable Markov model suffices, and unlike a bootstrap or semi-Markov fit that wins only on a single-window fit, the fitted model also yields a regime-conditional Value-at-Risk that passes a joint conditional-coverage test and a copula that reproduces cross-asset correlations: one interpretable generator serving both path simulation and downstream risk and portfolio tasks.

</details>


### [556] [Leakage-Aware Benchmarking of LLM Forecasting: Real-Time Nowcasts as the Decision-Time Input for Macro Factor Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22719)
*Mao Guan,Qian Chen*

Main category: q-fin.ST

TL;DR: 本文研究了一个受控于决策时间信息的检索增强型LLM预测系统，用于美国股票风格因子排名。系统在避免信息泄露的前提下，结合宏观模拟检索、批评LLM压缩规则和演员LLM打分，取得了中位月Spearman IC为+0.154，但统计上不显著；基线模型kNN也能达到类似中位IC，表明实时通胀信息和宏观相似检索贡献了大部分信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索增强型LLM的预测基准常混淆模型能力与信息泄露问题，即标签的时间戳对应的特征在系统决策时并不可观测。作者希望构建一个严格避免信息泄露的预测系统，真实评估LLM在因子排名中的能力。

Method: 使用7B开源LLM作为预测器，在2023年4月至2026年3月间的每月末，仅使用决策时可获取的信息（滞后FRED宏观变量、近期宏观事件摘要、克利夫兰联储发布的当月CPI实时预测）。通过宏观模拟检索模块选取历史状态，批评LLM将其压缩为战术规则，演员LLM结合当前状态和近期规则对7个美国股票风格因子进行评分。

Result: 完整管道的中位月度Spearman秩IC为+0.154，在三个非重叠的连续12个月子窗口中均值均为正；但均值IC在统计上不显著，bootstrap 95%置信区间包含零。kNN宏观模拟基线模型能达到相似的中位IC，表明信号主要来自实时通胀信息和宏观相似检索。LLM管道保留了更高的均值IC和更强的多空配置合理性检查。

Conclusion: 在严格避免信息泄露的条件下，LLM预测管的边际收益有限且集中在极端排名上，对多空组合构建有贡献；但整体统计效力不足，说明当前LLM在因子预测中的增量优势并不稳健。

Abstract: Forecasting benchmarks for retrieval-augmented LLMs routinely confound model capability with information leakage: features labeled with a target's timestamp are often not observable at the system's decision time. We study leakage-controlled equity factor ranking with a retrieval-augmented 7B open-source LLM forecaster. At each month-end from 2023-04 to 2026-03, the forecaster observes only decision-time information: lag-shifted FRED macro variables, recent macro-event summaries, and the Cleveland Fed's archived daily CPI nowcast for unreleased current-month inflation. A macro-analog retrieval module selects historical states, a critic LLM compresses them into one tactical rule, and an actor LLM maps the current state and recent rules into scores for seven U.S. equity style factors. The full pipeline obtains a median monthly Spearman rank IC of +0.154, with positive means across three non-overlapping contiguous 12-month subwindows; the mean IC remains statistically underpowered, with a bootstrap 95% confidence interval that includes zero. Non-LLM baselines under the same decision-time constraint demonstrate that a kNN macro-analog model recovers a comparable median IC, indicating that real-time inflation information and macro-similar retrieval explain much of the median signal. The LLM pipeline retains higher mean IC and a stronger long-short allocation sanity check, suggesting that any marginal benefit is concentrated in the extreme rankings that drive long-short portfolio formation. A descriptive audit of the 36 critic rules and per-month case studies appears in the appendix.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.MF'></div>

# q-fin.MF [[Back]](#toc)

### [557] [The Mathematics of Modeling the Future](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20977)
*Miquel Noguer i Alonso*

Main category: q-fin.MF

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个统一的数学框架，将条件期望、马尔可夫核、无穷小生成元等经典工具串联成一条"脊线"，使信息流到预测、局部动态到全局规律、理想模型到经验预测的映射变得紧凑且系统化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建模未来需要指定相对于演化信息流的条件法则，并描述其随时间演变。现有工具（如滤波、鞅、随机微分方程等）分散在不同领域，缺乏一个统一的数学视角将它们整合为可操作的预测演算。

Method: 沿一条统一脊线（滤过→条件期望→马尔可夫核→半群→无穷小生成元→Kolmogorov方程/SDE）串联经典推导，显式连接塔性质与半群律、伊藤公式与倒向方程、分部积分与前向算子、生成元扰动与模型风险扭曲。并在离散时间、Hilbert/Fisher-Rao/Wasserstein几何中展示预测结构。

Result: 通过OU过程和非高斯CIR过程展示了该框架如何产生显式转移律、谱分解、期限结构公式和渐近行为。将密度演化重新解释为Wasserstein梯度流，并建立了信息→预测的紧凑数学映射。

Conclusion: 预测不是单纯的数据外推，而是构建动态一致的、受信息、几何和可接受模型约束的条件分布。本文提供了一个从信息到预测、从局部动态到全局规律、从理想模型到经验预测的完整数学图谱。

Abstract: Modeling the future requires specifying conditional laws relative to an evolving information flow and describing their movement across time. This paper provides a unified mathematical synthesis of this problem along a single spine. Filtrations encode known data; conditional expectation and regular conditional probabilities yield point and distributional forecasts; Markov kernels and semigroups propagate observables and laws; and infinitesimal generators encode local dynamics, producing Kolmogorov equations and stochastic differential equations. Along this spine, martingales isolate surprise, filtering handles partial observation, finance prices futures, stochastic control optimizes choices, and ergodic theory describes the far future.
  The contribution is architectural. We explicitly connect derivations that turn classical objects into a unified forecasting calculus: the tower property becomes the semigroup law; Ito's formula yields the backward equation after conditioning; integration by parts provides the forward operator; and generator perturbations become model-risk distortions. Forecasting is shown not as mere data extrapolation, but the construction of dynamically coherent conditional distributions constrained by information, geometry, and admissible models.
  These concepts are illustrated via Gaussian Ornstein--Uhlenbeck and non-Gaussian Cox--Ingersoll--Ross processes, demonstrating how abstract machinery produces explicit transition laws, spectral decompositions, term-structure formulae, and asymptotics in diverse geometries. We recast density evolution as a Wasserstein gradient flow, place forecasting within Hilbert, Fisher--Rao, and Wasserstein geometries, provide a discrete-time empirical dictionary, and address model-risk. The result is a compact mathematical map from information to prediction, local dynamics to global laws, and idealized models to empirical forecasting.

</details>


### [558] [Optimal Dynamic Fees for Automated Market Makers: A Stochastic Control Approach to Loss-Versus-Rebalancing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21769)
*Farbod Ghasemlu*

Main category: q-fin.MF

TL;DR: 本文研究恒定乘积自动做市商(AMM)中流动性提供者(LP)的最优费用策略。基于LVR框架，将LP相对财富建模为受控过程，证明增长最优费用独立于LP财富和风险厌恶系数，随瞬时方差严格递增（顺周期性），在随机波动率下通过HJB方程和泊松方程求解，实证表明动态费用弱优于静态及波动率启发式费用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在支持可编程钩子的AMM中，LP可连续调整费用，但如何设定最优费用以平衡收入与损失尚不明确。本文旨在从理论层面刻画最优动态费用策略。

Method: 基于LVR框架将LP相对财富建模为受控过程（费用仅影响漂移项），将期望效用问题转化为遍历控制问题，通过点态波动率反馈求解；随机波动率下通过标量遍历HJB方程和线性泊松方程（有限差分法求解）刻画最优费用。

Result: 增长最优费用独立于LP财富和CRRA系数；恒定波动率下退化为静态常数；严格随瞬时方差递增（顺周期）；价格跳跃下对数偏好具有不变性；存在最优费用与竞争性交易场所的关联；脉冲控制死区可忽略gas成本。

Conclusion: 动态最优费用在流动性大盘股校准下弱优于所有静态和波动率启发式费用，每次模拟路径上LP增长率均有微弱但一致的正向提升，死区策略使gas成本可忽略不计。

Abstract: We study the fee policy of a liquidity provider (LP) in a constant-product automated market maker (AMM) whose fee can be adjusted continuously, as enabled by programmable hooks. Building on the loss-versus-rebalancing (LVR) framework of Milionis et al. (2022) and its extension to nonzero fees by Milionis et al. (2024), we model the LP's wealth relative to the continuously rebalanced benchmark as a controlled process in which the fee governs two opposing forces: it raises revenue per uninformed trade while discouraging uninformed volume, and it widens the no-arbitrage band, which lowers the rate at which arbitrageurs extract value. Because the fee enters only the drift of relative wealth and never its diffusion, the LP's expected-utility problem reduces to an ergodic control problem whose solution is a pointwise volatility feedback. We prove that the growth-optimal fee is independent of the LP's wealth and of its constant relative risk aversion, that it collapses to a static constant when volatility is constant, and that it is strictly increasing in instantaneous variance, so that the optimal schedule is pro-cyclical. When volatility is stochastic, we characterise the optimal fee through a scalar ergodic Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation and a linear Poisson equation, solved by a finite-difference scheme. We further show that the optimal fee is invariant to price jumps under logarithmic preferences, relate the optimal fee to a stylised model of competition among venues, and treat gas costs through an impulse-control dead-band. In a calibration to liquid large-capitalisation conditions, the optimal dynamic fee weakly dominates every static and volatility-linked heuristic fee on each simulated path, improving the LP's growth rate over the best static fee by a modest but uniformly positive margin, with a dead-band rendering gas costs negligible.

</details>


### [559] [Innovative Extensions to Option Pricing: Asymmetric Brownian Motion and Random Walk Approaches](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22293)
*Jagdish Gnawali,Abootaleb Shirvani,Dilmi C. W. Hettiachchi-Halpe-Kankanamalage,W. Brent Lindquist,Svetlozar T. Rachev,Frank J. Fabozzi*

Main category: q-fin.MF

TL;DR: 本文提出几何非对称布朗运动（GABM）框架，将非对称布朗运动与随机游走方法统一到Bachelier-Black-Scholes-Merton框架中，通过Cherny-Shiryaev-Yor不变性原理推导闭式期权定价公式，并构建离散二项树算法，数值实验表明该模型能更好地捕捉市场非对称性和复杂风险行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典期权定价模型（Bachelier和BSM）假设对称布朗扩散，无法反映收益率偏度、厚尾和波动率不对称性等实证现象，因此需要发展更灵活的定价框架。

Method: 利用Cherny-Shiryaev-Yor不变性原理定义非对称随机游走积分，通过局部时间产生偏度和状态依赖风险；推导闭式期权定价公式；构建离散二项树算法并证明其收敛于GABM极限；基于正态逆高斯分布引入平滑函数形式以实现灵活的状态依赖波动率校准。

Result: 数值实验展示了期权价格和隐含波动率曲面，验证了该框架能够增强捕捉市场持续非对称性和复杂风险行为的能力。

Conclusion: GABM框架有效扩展了经典期权定价理论，能更好地拟合实证数据中的非对称性和波动率特征，为更现实的期权定价提供了理论依据和数值工具。

Abstract: Classical option pricing models, such as Bachelier and Black--Scholes--Merton, postulate symmetric Brownian diffusion, which limits their capacity to reflect empirical phenomena including return skewness, heavy tails, and volatility asymmetry. This paper develops an innovative extension: the Geometric Asymmetric Brownian Motion (GABM), unifying asymmetric Brownian motion and random walk methodologies within the Bachelier--Black--Scholes--Merton framework. The approach harnesses the Cherny--Shiryaev--Yor invariance principle (CSYIP) to define asymmetric random walk integrals, where local time at the origin generates skewness and state-dependent risk. Closed-form option pricing formulas are derived, and a discrete-time binomial tree algorithm is constructed and shown to converge rigorously to the GABM limit. By incorporating a smoothed functional form based on the normal inverse Gaussian distribution, the model allows for flexible, state-dependent volatility calibration. Numerical experiments demonstrate the resulting option price and implied volatility surfaces, highlighting the framework's enhanced ability to capture persistent market asymmetry and complex risk behaviors observed in empirical data.

</details>


### [560] [Enhancing the Black-Scholes Model for Option Valuation via Lévy Processes and Malliavin Calculus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22796)
*Shantanu Awasthi,Minglian Lin,Blair Faber,Michael Roberts,Hassan Butt*

Main category: q-fin.MF

TL;DR: 本文通过引入带跳跃的Lévy过程随机波动率，并结合多维Itô微积分和Malliavin微积分，改进了Black-Scholes模型，推导出欧式看涨期权定价公式和接近平值隐含波动率的精确表达式，更好地捕捉了波动率微笑等市场特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Black-Scholes模型依赖几何布朗运动和固定波动率假设，存在局限性，无法解释实际市场中的波动率微笑等现象。

Method: 采用Lévy过程建模跳跃，引入随机波动率；利用多维Itô微积分推导定价公式；使用Malliavin微积分推导平值隐含波动率的精确表达式。

Result: 新模型能更好地捕捉波动率微笑等经验特征，通过VIX数据分析验证了其与市场波动率的匹配能力。

Conclusion: 结合Lévy过程与Malliavin微积分有效弥补了经典Black-Scholes模型的缺陷，但仍需进一步在不同市场条件和期权类型下进行实证验证。

Abstract: The Black-Scholes model has been extensively used for option pricing, but exhibits limitations in its reliance on geometric Brownian motion and fixed volatility assumptions. This paper proposes an enhanced model incorporating stochastic volatility with jumps modeled by a Lévy process. Leveraging multidimensional Itô calculus, we derive a pricing formula for European call options under the new framework. Additionally, Malliavin calculus enables the derivation of an exact expression for at-the-money implied volatility. The proposed model is shown to better capture empirical features like volatility smiles. Analysis of VIX data demonstrates the model's ability to match observed market volatility. The integration of Lévy processes and Malliavin calculus represents a valuable advancement in addressing deficiencies in the classic Black-Scholes model. Further empirical testing is warranted to validate the approach across varying market conditions and option types.

</details>


<div id='econ.EM'></div>

# econ.EM [[Back]](#toc)

### [561] [Uniform Confidence Bands for Infinite-Dimensional Partially Identified Parameters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21224)
*Shunsuke Imai,Yuta Okamoto*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 本文针对实证经济学中常见的无限维部分识别参数，构建了基于乘子自助法的Imbens-Manski-Stoye型均匀置信带，并利用非中心经验过程上确界的逼近定理证明了该方法的均匀有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实证经济学中经常遇到无限维参数，但其部分识别情形下的统计推断（尤其是均匀置信带的构造）仍缺乏有效方法。

Method: 提出了基于乘子自助法的均匀置信带构建方法，利用非Donsker类非中心经验过程上确界的逼近定理来保证有效性。

Result: 从理论上确认了所提置信带构造方法的均匀有效性（uniform validity）。

Conclusion: 将Imbens-Manski-Stoye型置信带推广到了无限维部分识别参数设定，为实证经济学中复杂参数的不确定性量化提供了可行的统计工具。

Abstract: Infinite-dimensional parameters are ubiquitous in empirical economics. This paper develops an Imbens--Manski--Stoye type confidence band for infinite-dimensional partially identified parameters. In particular, we propose multiplier bootstrap-based construction of a uniform confidence band. By employing approximation theorems for suprema of non-centered empirical processes indexed by possibly non-Donsker classes \citep{chernozhukov2016empirical}, we confirm the uniform validity of the proposed procedure.

</details>


### [562] [What's the Magic Formula Instrument?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21569)
*Peizan Sheng,Alexander Torgovitsky*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 本文针对Borusyak和Hull提出的"公式工具变量"方法，开发了一套系统评估其对冲击分布参数假设敏感性的方法，并通过实证发现轻微改变分布假设可得到符号和大小迥异的估计结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Borusyak和Hull (2023, 2026) 提出的"公式工具变量"方法依赖于对未观测冲击分布的参数假设，但现有文献缺乏系统评估该假设敏感性的方法，可能导致估计结果不可靠。

Method: 作者开发了一套系统性的敏感性分析方法，并提供了配套的R包（formulaiv），用于评估公式工具变量估计对冲击分布参数假设的敏感程度。

Result: 在重分析Borusyak和Hull (2023)及(2026)的实证应用时发现，仅需轻微改变冲击分布假设，即可得到符号和大小迥异的估计值。

Conclusion: 公式工具变量方法对冲击分布参数假设高度敏感，研究者在使用该方法时应谨慎评估假设的合理性，并系统性地进行敏感性分析。

Abstract: Two recent papers by Borusyak and Hull (2023, 2026) propose using known formulas to adjust linear instrumental variable estimators for confounding covariates. Implementing this "formula instrument" approach requires making a parametric assumption on the distribution of the unobserved shocks that generated the instrument. We develop a method for systematically evaluating the sensitivity of formula instrument estimates to this parametric assumption. The method is straightforward to implement using our companion R package formulaiv. We use our method to reanalyze the applications in both Borusyak and Hull (2023) and Borusyak and Hull (2026). In both applications, we find that a variety of estimates of different signs and magnitudes can be recovered by slightly changing the shock distribution.

</details>


### [563] [Inference methods for unit-specific coefficients in panel data models with latent group structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22035)
*Mikihito Nishi,Ryo Okui*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 本文提出两种统计推断方法，在面板数据模型中利用潜变量分组结构估计单位特定系数，同时明确考虑分组不确定性的影响。通过将t检验、Wald检验与分组置信集结合，分别采用最小化统计量和偏差校正两种策略，在提高效率的同时保证推断的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 面板数据模型中的单位特定系数往往存在相似性（如不同州的政策效应），将其分组估计可以提高效率。然而，分组本身存在统计不确定性（即分组可能出错），现有方法忽略这种不确定性会导致推断失真（如检验的尺寸扭曲或覆盖率不足）。因此，需要在利用分组信息增益的同时，正确量化分组不确定性对推断的影响。

Method: 两种方法：(1) 取分组置信集内所有可能分组下检验统计量的最小值，可产生更短但可能不连续的置信集；(2) 对因分组误配产生的偏差进行校正，保证置信集连续可解释但长度略长。同时提出经分组误配调整的标准误，在短时间面板下仍然有效。

Result: 蒙特卡洛模拟表明，对于误差方差较大的个体，所提方法比逐个时间序列方法得到更窄的置信集；忽略分组不确定性则会导致尺寸扭曲和覆盖率下降。以美国各州最低工资效应为例进行实证说明。

Conclusion: 在面板数据分组推断中，必须显式处理分组不确定性问题；所提两种方法在不同场景下各有优势，为实证研究者提供了灵活的工具选择。

Abstract: This paper introduces statistical inference procedures for unit-specific coefficients in panel data models, where the coefficients exhibit a latent group structure. The proposed methods achieve efficiency gains by clustering units into a small number of groups, while explicitly accounting for the statistical uncertainty of group assignments. The core idea is to integrate standard inference procedures, such as the $t$-test and Wald tests, with confidence sets for group membership. Two methods are proposed: the first takes the minimum of the test statistics over the confidence set for group membership, and the second corrects for bias caused by possible group misassignment. The former can produce shorter but possibly disconnected sets, while the latter guarantees connected, interpretable intervals at some cost in length. We also develop standard errors that are adjusted for possible group misassignment and valid even with short time periods, which may be of independent interest. Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that our approach yields narrower confidence sets for units with relatively large error variances than unit-by-unit time-series methods. In contrast, ignoring statistical uncertainty in the group membership estimation leads to distortions in size and coverage. We illustrate the method with an empirical example that estimates the effect of the minimum wage in each U.S. state.

</details>


### [564] [Distributional Granger Causality: Identification, Sequential Inference, and Adaptive Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22230)
*Ayush Jha*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 本文提出基于有限通道集进行分布格兰杰因果检验的框架，通过自适应序贯检验程序（结合α-投资机制）在控制族系错误率的同时实现渐近最优检验功效，并建立了策略不变的有限样本有效性理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统格兰杰因果检验仅关注条件均值，但在非高斯时序中，预测依赖可能体现在尺度、尾部、偏度等分布特征上，单一检验无法完整刻画预测依赖关系。本文旨在建立一套完整的分布格兰杰因果检验框架。

Method: (1) 基于有限通道集刻画分布格兰杰非因果关系，证明通道完备性；(2) 开发自适应序贯检验程序，通过α-投资机制分配检验资源；(3) 建立策略不变的有限样本有效性定理和渐近效率定理；(4) 采用循环块置换方案处理时序依赖。

Result: 证明了在确定性条件下，有限的通道集可以完备地表征分布格兰杰非因果关系；策略不变有效性定理保证在任意可接受的选择规则下有限样本大小控制；渐近效率定理表明置信界分配规则能达到与不可行oracle基准相当的检验功效。

Conclusion: 该框架为时序数据中分布层面的因果推断提供了理论基础和可行方法，通过α-投资机制实现了对多种分布特征的联合检验，兼顾了理论严谨性和计算可行性。

Abstract: Predictive dependence in time series need not be confined to the conditional mean. Outside the Gaussian setting, causal content may arise through conditional scale, tail behavior, asymmetry, or other distributional features, implying that no single Granger-type test provides a complete characterization of predictive dependence. This paper develops a framework for distributional Granger causality based on a finite collection of channel-specific restrictions. Under suitable determinacy conditions, the channel menu is shown to be complete, yielding an identification result that links distributional Granger non-causality to a finite set of testable hypotheses. Building on this representation, we develop an adaptive sequential testing procedure that allocates inferential resources across channels while maintaining familywise error control through an alpha-investing mechanism. A policy-invariant validity theorem establishes finite-sample size control under arbitrary admissible selection rules, while an asymptotic efficiency theorem shows that a confidence-bound allocation rule achieves power equivalent to that of an infeasible oracle benchmark. The theoretical guarantees are derived from primitive mixing and moment conditions together with a circular-block permutation scheme.

</details>


### [565] [Sensitivity Analysis for the Average Treatment Effect under Discrete Unobserved Confounders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22255)
*Sung Jae Jun,Federico Zincenko*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 本文通过有限个潜在类型对未观测混淆进行建模，推导出处理组和控制组结果分布的有限混合表示，进而得到潜在类型数量的尖锐识别集和平均处理效应(ATE)的尖锐识别集，并提供了相应的估计与推断方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果推断方法难以处理未观测混淆（unobserved confounding），传统敏感性分析缺乏对潜在类型数量的结构性刻画。作者希望通过有限混合模型来捕捉未观测异质性，从而提供更精确的ATE识别。

Method: 假设未观测混淆由有限个潜在类型驱动，由此导出处理组和控制组结果分布的有限混合表示。基于识别的混合成分，推导潜在类型数量的尖锐识别集和ATE的尖锐识别集。通过比较得到ATE识别集与Manski边界重合的临界值。

Result: 发现当潜在类型数量低于某个临界值时，ATE的识别集严格小于Manski边界；高于此临界值时则与Manski边界重合。该临界值仅随混合成分数量线性增长，而最大允许潜在类型数量呈二次增长。提供了具有渐近保证的估计和推断方法。

Conclusion: 该方法为未观测混淆下的因果效应识别提供了一个结构化的敏感性分析框架，在有限潜在类型的假设下可得到比传统非参数边界更紧的ATE识别集，并在LaLonde数据上验证了其实用性。

Abstract: We model unobserved confounding through an unknown finite number of latent types. This assumption induces finite-mixture representations of the treated and control outcome distributions. Using the identified mixture components, we characterize the sharp identified set for the number of latent types and derive the sharp identified set for the average treatment effect (ATE) corresponding to each admissible value, thereby providing a natural framework for sensitivity analysis. We further obtain a cutoff beyond which the identified set for the ATE coincides with a version of the Manski bounds, whereas below the cutoff it is strictly smaller. This cutoff grows only linearly with the numbers of mixture components in the treated and control groups, although the maximum admissible number of latent types grows quadratically. We also provide estimation and inference procedures with asymptotic guarantees and illustrate our methodology using LaLonde's data.

</details>


### [566] [Neural networks for nonlinear regression with serially correlated disturbances: Evidence from cloud cover](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22483)
*Sebastian Jensen,Siem Jan Koopman*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 本文提出将自回归移动平均（ARMA）结构融入前馈神经网络，用于处理非线性回归中序列相关误差的问题。模拟实验表明该方法能准确恢复回归函数和误差动态，且对模型误设具有鲁棒性。在地中海区域云量预测的实证研究中，该方法优于现有方法（包括LSTM），尤其在山区改进更为显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统非线性回归处理时间序列相关误差时依赖滞后变量，但该方法存在局限性。本文旨在通过将ARMA结构融入前馈神经网络，提供一种替代方案，以更有效地建模时间依赖性和序列相关误差。

Method: 将自回归移动平均（ARMA）结构嵌入前馈神经网络，构建一个新的混合模型，用于处理非线性回归中序列相关的扰动项。

Result: 模拟实验中，该方法能准确恢复不同复杂度的回归函数及潜在误差动态，且对模型误设（遗漏滞后变量或错误指定误差动态）具有鲁棒性。在地中海区域云量预测中，该模型优于现有方法（包括LSTM），尤其在山区改进更显著。

Conclusion: 所提出的ARMA-前馈神经网络模型为处理时间序列非线性回归中的序列相关误差提供了有效且鲁棒的方案，在云量预测等实际问题中展现出优越的预测性能。

Abstract: We propose a new treatment of nonlinear regression with serially correlated disturbances that incorporates autoregressive moving average structures into feedforward neural networks. The resulting model provides an alternative to modeling temporal dependence using lagged variables. In simulations, the proposed method accurately recovers regression functions of varying complexity and the underlying error dynamics across a range of time-series lengths and signal-to-noise ratios. Finite-sample properties and out-of-sample predictive performances are shown to be robust to model misspecification induced by omitted lagged variables and incorrect specification of the error dynamics. Cloud cover is an important factor in climate projections. In an empirical study of cloud cover prediction for a grid of locations within and around the Mediterranean Sea, our proposed model yields more accurate predictions than existing methods, including long short-term memory networks. Improvements are observed broadly and are particularly pronounced in mountain areas relative to linear models with serially correlated errors, consistent with the presence of stronger nonlinear effects in cloud composure in such regions.

</details>


### [567] [Learning Dependence Structures for Econometric Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22555)
*Ulrich Hounyo*

Main category: econ.EM
