SciVerseGym supports local and global actions, including elemental substitution, lattice perturbation, atomic displacement, vacancy creation, and atom insertion, along with configurable chemical spaces, structure pools, atomistic and graph-based observations, custom rewards, optional relaxation, and stability or phonon-related diagnostics. Each step applies an edit, evaluates the candidate using a machine-learned interatomic potential or any ASE-compatible calculator, and returns the standard (obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info) tuple. By decoupling agent logic from materials infrastructure, SciVerseGym provides an open, reproducible, and extensible testbed for reinforcement learning, Bayesian optimization, evolutionary search, and language-agent workflows in closed-loop crystal discovery. Code is available at: https://github.com/Bin-Cao/SciVerseGym.

</details>


### [676] [Efficient Multimodal Clinical Question Answering for Pulmonary Embolism Risk Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22442)
*Xiangyuan Xue,Yang Yu,Yan Gao,Junyan Wang,Bin Chen,Lingyan Ruan,Ting Dang,Hong Jia*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文利用高效多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在包含23,248个CTPA研究的PE数据集上构建基准，评估了八项诊断与预后任务，发现Gemma4系列在结合CTPA和EHR数据时表现最佳，且诊断任务优于预后任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 肺栓塞（PE）的管理需要及时诊断和可靠的临床风险评估，而现有的诊疗流程中CTPA、放射学报告和EHR数据是分离的。作者希望通过紧凑型多模态语言模型统一整合这些信息，探索其在PE诊疗中的潜力。

Method: 基于INSPECT数据集（19,402名患者的23,248个CTPA研究），设计了八项诊断与预后任务，转化为结构化临床问答问题。在CTPA-Only、EHR-Only和CTPA+EHR三种输入设置下，对高效MLLMs进行零样本和少样本评估。

Result: Gemma4 E4B和E2B在包含EHR证据时表现最强，尤其在CTPA+EHR输入下。PE诊断任务整体优于预后任务（尤其是再入院预测）。

Conclusion: 紧凑型多模态模型在PE早期风险检测和解释方面具有很大潜力，为多模态临床AI提供了有价值的基准。

Abstract: Pulmonary embolism (PE) is a high risk cardiopulmonary condition whose management requires both timely diagnosis and reliable assessment of future clinical risk. Because PE care routinely combines computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), radiology interpretation, and longitudinal electronic health record (EHR) evidence, it provides a clinically meaningful setting for evaluating compact multimodal language models. In this work, we build a benchmark using efficient multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on INSPECT, a multimodal PE dataset containing 23,248 CTPA studies from 19,402 patients. We formulate eight diagnostic and prognostic tasks as structured clinical question answering problems and evaluate on typical efficient MLLMs under CTPA-Only, EHR-Only, and CTPA+EHR settings with zero-shot and few-shot prompting. Results show that Gemma4 E4B and Gemma4 E2B perform more strongly when EHR evidence is available, especially under CTPA+EHR input. Task level analysis further shows that PE diagnosis achieves higher performance than prognostic tasks, particularly readmission prediction. These observations suggest that compact multimodal models have the great potential in early stage PE risk detection and explanation.

</details>


### [677] [A Differentiable Atari VCS:A Complex, Fully Known Ground Truth for Explainable AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22447)
*Andreas Maier,Siming Bayer,Patrick Krauss*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过构建完全可微的Atari 2600模拟器（jutari和jaxtari），解决了XAI中缺乏真实可解释性ground truth的困境，为复杂系统的可解释性研究提供了完美实验平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有XAI研究面临两难：简单系统（决策树等）机制已知但解释无意义；复杂系统（深度网络）需要XAI却缺乏ground truth来验证解释的正确性。本文核心动机是打破这一困境，构建一个既复杂又完全可知可验证的研究对象。

Method: 将Atari 2600 VCS（真实计算机架构）重新实现为两个端到端可微模拟器（Julia版jutari和JAX版jaxtari）。通过将ROM视为权重张量、RAM视为软记忆带、控制流视为门控，证明不同温度下可微执行与原始硬执行逐位一致，同时暴露原本没有的代理梯度。JAX版本支持GPU批处理加速。

Result: 两个模拟器在全部64个ALE游戏上通过验证：64/64字节级RAM一致，64/64像素级画面一致。构建耗时约29个日历天（137活跃小时），大量代码由AI自主编写。JAX版本在单GPU上可达数百万环境步/秒的批处理可微 rollout。

Conclusion: 本文成功构建并验证了基础平台，理论上和定性梯度研究都表明，基于梯度的XAI在此平台上可行。代码已开源。

Abstract: Explanation requires ground truth: to verify an account of a system we must know its inner functioning-just what is missing where explainable AI (XAI) is most needed. Systems we can study fall into two camps. Simple, procedural one-decision trees, rule lists, sparse linear models-have a known but trivial mechanism, so explaining them tests nothing; genuinely complex ones-deep networks, real-world tasks-need XAI but have no ground-truth inner functioning, so an explanation can be plausible, confident, and wrong with no way to tell. We remove this dichotomy with a study object both genuinely complex and fully specified-inspectable by construction-and, so gradient methods apply, fully differentiable. We reimplement the Atari 2600 Video Computer System (VCS)-a real computer architecture, and the cradle of deep reinforcement learning-as two independent end-to-end differentiable emulators in Julia (jutari) and JAX (jaxtari), each validated bit-for-bit against xitari. Both reproduce xitari on all 64 supported Arcade Learning Environment (ALE) games: 64/64 byte-identical RAM and 64/64 pixel-identical screens. Treating the cartridge ROM as a weight tensor, RAM as a soft tape, and control flow as gates, we prove the differentiable (soft) execution equals the original (hard) one bit-for-bit in the forward pass at any finite temperature, while exposing surrogate gradients where the bit logic has none. The JAX port also opens a GPU path: batched differentiable rollouts reach millions of environment-steps/s on one commodity GPU. The system was built in roughly 137 active hours over 29 calendar days, much of it written autonomously by coding agents. This paper builds and validates the foundation, showing-theoretically and in a qualitative gradient study-that gradient-based XAI on it is feasible. Both ports' full code is available under the MIT license at https://github.com/akmaier/UnderstandingVCS.

</details>


### [678] [Self-Evolving Cognitive Framework via Causal World Modeling for Embodied Scientific Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22449)
*Yi Yu,Tetsunari Inamura*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向具身科学智能的自我演化认知框架，通过因果世界建模、干预驱动因果推理和持续认知精化三个互补组件，推动具身智能从预测性世界模型向自我演化的认知系统转变，将具身交互重新理解为因果假设生成和知识获取的认知过程，并提出了干预驱动的因果-认知基准评测范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的具身世界模型主要优化预测目标，导致其在分布偏移下泛化能力有限，无法系统性地推理未见情境和假设性干预。作者认为具身智能应超越预测性世界建模，向能与环境交互中持续构建和精化内部因果表征的自我演化认知系统发展。

Method: 提出三组件框架：1) 因果世界建模（构建因果表征）；2) 干预驱动因果推理（通过干预和反事实推理进行假设检验）；3) 持续认知精化（通过因果发现、干预反馈和反事实推理不断修正和扩展内部因果世界模型）。将具身交互重新解释为假设生成、干预实验和知识获取的认知过程。

Result: 提供了从预测性智能向认知性智能转变的概念和理论基础，提出了评估自我演化具身科学智能的干预驱动因果-认知基准评测范式。

Conclusion: 智能应当通过与环境交互中持续构建、修正和精化因果世界模型而涌现，推动具身智能从预测性智能迈向认知性智能（Epistemic Intelligence）。

Abstract: Current embodied world models are primarily optimized for predictive objectives, limiting their ability to generalize under distribution shifts and reason systematically about unseen situations and hypothetical interventions. We argue that embodied intelligence should move beyond predictive world modeling toward self-evolving cognitive systems that continually construct and refine internal causal representations through interaction with the environment. To this end, we propose a self-evolving cognitive framework via causal world modeling for embodied scientific intelligence, which integrates three complementary components: causal world modeling, intervention-driven causal reasoning, and continual cognitive refinement. The proposed framework continuously revises and expands its internal causal world model through causal discovery, intervention-driven feedback, and counterfactual reasoning, supporting continual cognitive refinement and enabling cognition itself to evolve over time. Furthermore, we reinterpret embodied interaction not merely as a means of trajectory optimization, but as an epistemic process for causal hypothesis generation, intervention-driven experimentation, and continual knowledge acquisition. This work provides a conceptual and theoretical foundation for a transition from predictive intelligence toward epistemic intelligence, in which intelligence emerges through the continual construction, revision, and refinement of causal world models via interaction with the environment. Accordingly, an intervention-driven causal-epistemic benchmarking paradigm is suggested for evaluating self-evolving embodied scientific intelligence.

</details>


### [679] [PRIME: Evaluating Prompt Resolution Under Incompatible Instructions in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22470)
*Tehreem Javed,Shumaim Fatimah,Masooma Bakhtiari,Gibrail Islam,Mehwish Fatima*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PRIME框架，系统评估大语言模型在接收到冲突指令时的行为表现，发现冲突类型比模型规模对行为影响更大，并识别出多种失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有指令遵循基准测试仅评估孤立的元指令，无法揭示模型处理冲突指令的行为模式，缺乏对模型在矛盾指令下表现的深入理解。

Method: 提出PRIME框架，在响应长度、输出格式和推理三个维度上生成可控冲突，使用确定性行为分类法对模型响应进行分类，并在平衡和自然分布两种设置下评估五个开源指令微调LLM。

Result: 冲突类型比模型规模对模型行为的影响更显著，不同冲突类别下存在多种失败模式。

Conclusion: 开发冲突意识具有重要价值，LLM的指令遵循能力不能仅通过孤立的约束条件来评估。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often encounter conflicting prompts, although current instruction following benchmarks assess those meta-instructions in isolation, limiting the insights about how models process conflicting instructions. We introduce a framework \textit{PRIME}(\textit{Prompt Resolution under Incompatible Meta-Instructions Evaluation}) to analyze behavior of LLMs when provided with conflicting instructions. \textit{PRIME} purposefully produces calibrated conflicts across response length, output format, and reasoning; classifying model responses with a deterministic behavioral taxonomy. We are evaluating five instruction tuned open weight LLMs in two distinct settings, balanced and naturally distributed. The conclusion we reach upon analysis is that conflict type is more significant in affecting behavior than model scale, and various failure modes across different categories of conflict. Our findings emphasize the value of developing conflict awareness and suggest ability of LLM to follow instructions cannot be assessed through isolated constraints alone.

</details>


### [680] [VADAOrchestra: Neurosymbolic Orchestration of Adaptive Reasoning Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22485)
*Teodoro Baldazzi,Luigi Bellomarini,Andrea Coletta,Michela Iezzi,Carsten Maple,Alessandro Pesare,Emanuel Sallinger*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了VADAOrchestra，一个融合传统BPM的严谨性与LLM灵活性的神经符号框架，通过Datalog+/-逻辑程序编码动态工作流，实现可审计、可扩展且可解释的复杂决策推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统BPM系统缺乏运行时适应性，而纯LLM智能体系统不透明、不可靠且处理大数据时存在扩展性问题。两者互补但各有缺陷，因此需要结合二者优势的框架。

Method: 采用神经符号混合方法：LLM驱动的编排器根据用户查询和数据源增量式规划并调整工作流，将工作流编码为Datalog+/-逻辑程序（谓词对应工具调用，规则表示领域依赖和按需合成的逻辑构造），然后由Datalog+/-符号引擎执行所有推理任务。

Result: 在真实金融用例上验证了VADAOrchestra在忠实性、可扩展性和可解释性方面均优于标准智能体架构。

Conclusion: 通过将高层编排与符号推理解耦，该框架提供了可验证的推理轨迹，支持审计和可复现性，同时解决了大规模数据集上的推理扩展问题。

Abstract: Decision-making in real-world settings rarely follows a fixed script. Instead, it unfolds as a dynamic reasoning process in which the appropriate course of action evolves as new context and data become available. Traditional Business Process Management systems provide rigor, determinism, and auditability, yet they generally struggle to adapt their execution at runtime. Conversely, agentic systems based on Large Language Models (LLMs) bring flexibility to decision-making, but they are inherently opaque, often unreliable, and suffer from significant scalability constraints when operating over large datasets. To combine these complementary paradigms, we introduce VADAOrchestra, a neurosymbolic framework that models complex workflows as evolving reasoning processes. The framework adopts a hybrid approach: given a user query and a collection of data sources, an LLM-based orchestrator incrementally plans and adapts the workflow. This is encoded as a logic program in a fragment of Datalog+/- where predicates correspond to tool invocations and rules represent both predefined domain dependencies and logic constructs synthesized on demand to manipulate intermediate results. All logical inference tasks are then executed by a state-of-the-art Datalog+/- symbolic engine. This approach provides a verifiable reasoning trace, supporting the auditability and reproducibility of the entire process. Furthermore, by decoupling high-level orchestration from symbolic inference, it addresses scalability concerns, enabling complex reasoning over large datasets through targeted data querying. We evaluate VADAOrchestra on real-world financial use cases, demonstrating faithfulness, scalability, and explainability compared to standard agentic architectures.

</details>


### [681] [SCOPE: Evolving Symbolic World for Planning in Open-Ended Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22488)
*Yundaichuan Zhan,Minghe Gao,Zhongqi Yue,Wendong Bu,Wenqiao Zhang,Guoming Wang,Jisheng Dang,Juncheng Li,Siliang Tang,Yueting Zhuang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SCOPE是一个自适应的符号规划框架，通过符号执行模拟器和自适应符号记忆模块，在开放环境中不断优化动作计划并演化符号世界表征，显著提升了符号世界的完整性和规划成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM与经典规划器结合的方法中，从感知获得的符号表征在开放环境中往往不完整，导致规划性能不佳。

Method: 提出SCOPE框架，包含两个协同模块：1) 符号执行模拟器(SESim)进行符号验证和实际执行，利用反馈改进计划和演化符号世界；2) 自适应符号记忆(SASMem)将反馈蒸馏为演化的符号知识，增强长程规划能力。

Result: 在开放环境实验中，SCOPE显著提升了符号世界的完整性、环境扰动下计划的成功率，以及跨任务的基础能力和跨具身场景的适应性。

Conclusion: SCOPE通过自适应的符号世界演化机制，有效解决了开放环境中符号表征不完整的问题，为复杂具身任务的长程规划提供了更鲁棒的方案。

Abstract: Recent works have explored integrating Vision-Language Models (VLMs) with classical planners that rely on symbolic representations of planning problems to generate long-horizon plans for complex embodied tasks. However, in open-ended environments, these symbolic representations obtained from perception are often incomplete, leading to suboptimal performance. To address this, we introduce SCOPE, a self-adaptive symbolic planning framework that supports refining action plans and evolving the symbolic world, i.e., the symbolic representations of open-ended environments. SCOPE comprises two synergistic modules: a Symbolic Execution Simulator (SESim) that conducts symbolic validation and real execution of action plans, leveraging the feedback to refine the plans and evolve the symbolic world; and a Self-Adaptive Symbolic Memory (SASMem) that further distills feedback into evolving symbolic knowledge to enhance long-horizon planning and modeling of the symbolic world. Experiments in open-ended environments show that SCOPE significantly improves the completeness of the symbolic world, the success rate of plans under environment perturbations, and cross-task grounding and adaptability across diverse embodied scenarios.

</details>


### [682] [Deep Learning-Based Sign Language Recognition from Videos and Cross-Lingual Translation to Indian Vernaculars](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22494)
*Chandranath Adak,Ramesh Nandipalli*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个两阶段深度学习流水线，先用VideoMAE视频Transformer对印度手语视频片段进行分类（13类），再用NLLB-200多语言翻译模型将预测的英文标签翻译成印地语、泰卢固语和孟加拉语。在197个片段的小规模学术设定下，训练准确率达99%，验证准确率78%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手语是聋哑人群的主要沟通方式，但自动化手语识别工具仍然有限，尤其是针对低资源的印度语言。现有工作多聚焦于高资源语言，缺乏面向印度手语的多语言翻译系统。

Method: 两阶段流水线：(1) 使用微调后的VideoMAE视频Transformer，从16帧（224×224）视频片段中分类出英文单词标签；(2) 使用Meta AI的NLLB-200多语言翻译模型，将英文标签翻译为印地语、泰卢固语和孟加拉语。在AI4Bharat Indian Sign Language数据集（13类，197个片段）上训练。

Result: 训练准确率99%，验证准确率78%（15个epoch）。通过混淆矩阵和分类报告分析了主要失败模式，主要是易混淆的形容词对（如ugly/deaf/blind/hat/dress）。开发了Streamlit推理演示工具。

Conclusion: 当前局限包括标签集小、孤立词而非连续手语、对单一手势风格敏感、机器翻译存在歧义。未来工作将扩展到句子级生成和更大词汇量。

Abstract: Sign language is a primary mode of communication for the global deaf and hard-of-hearing community, yet automated tools that recognize sign gestures from video and translate them into natural language text remain limited, particularly for low-resource Indian languages. We present a two-stage deep learning pipeline that (i) classifies short sign language video clips into English word labels using a fine-tuned VideoMAE video transformer, and (ii) translates the predicted English label into Hindi, Telugu, and Bengali using Meta AI's No Language Left Behind (NLLB-200) multilingual translation model. The classification model is fine-tuned on a 13-class subset of the AI4Bharat Indian Sign Language video corpus from IIT Madras, processing 16-frame clips sampled uniformly from each video at 224 x 224 resolution. Under a small-scale academic setting (13 classes, 197 clips, 80-20 split), the fine-tuned model reaches 99% training accuracy and 78% validation accuracy after 15 epochs. We provide a per-class breakdown via a confusion matrix and classification report, identify the dominant failure modes (confusable adjective pairs such as ugly, deaf, blind, hat, and dress), and describe a Streamlit-based inference demo that takes a user-uploaded video and returns the predicted English label alongside its Hindi, Telugu, and Bengali translations. We discuss the scope, limitations (small label set, isolated-word rather than continuous signing, single-signer style sensitivity, ambiguity of single-word machine translation), and directions for future work, including expanding to sentence-level generation and a larger vocabulary. Code is released to support reproducibility.

</details>


### [683] [Grounded Scaling: Why Agentic AI Needs Deterministic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22495)
*Liang Ding,Xintong Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文论证环境确定性是制约长链智能体任务成功的关键因素，提出确定性成熟度模型和可操作指标框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AGI-to-ASI讨论聚焦于计算增长与各种摩擦（数据墙、抽象屏障、具身瓶颈、多智能体信任）的赛跑，但忽略了环境确定性作为横跨所有四项摩擦的互补性约束轴。

Method: 给出三个形式化结论：确定性-效率边界、验证者-Goodharting底线、环境侧技能进化收敛条件；提出供应确定性指数（SCI）、五级确定性成熟度模型（DMM）、以及五个开放式问题（OQ1-OQ5）。

Result: 长链智能体执行在人类容忍度设计的环境中会指数级失败；确定性每步不足导致k步成功率按δ^k衰减。

Conclusion: 环境确定性是独立于现有四类摩擦的关键约束轴；该框架平台无关，并可检验三种对立立场（sim-to-real充分性、对齐充分性、AI作为正常技术）。

Abstract: Long-chain agent execution fails exponentially in environments designed for human tolerance: with per-step determinism $δ< 1$, $k$-step chain success degrades as $δ^k$. The AGI-to-ASI scaling debate (Genewein et al., 2026) has so far framed progress as a race between compute growth and a list of frictions (data wall, abstraction barrier, embodied bottleneck, multi-agent trust); we argue that environment determinism is a complementary binding axis cutting across all four, for the broad class of agentic AI tasks whose outcomes are verifiable economically, physically, or through multi-party settlement. Three formal results pin down the regime: a Determinism-Efficiency Bound on chain-task success, a Verifier-Goodharting Floor on flywheel ceilings under imperfect rewards, and a convergence condition for environment-side skill evolution. We operationalise the framework as a Supply Certainty Index (SCI) over five measurable properties, a five-level Determinism Maturity Model (DMM) as adoption ladder, and a falsifiable open-question programme (OQ1-OQ5) with explicit null results that would force retraction. The position is platform-agnostic. We engage three competing positions: sim-to-real sufficiency, alignment sufficiency, and AI-as-normal-technology.

</details>


### [684] [Imagine to Ensure Safety in Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22509)
*Gregory Gorbov,Artem Latyshev,Aleksandr I. Panov*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合可学习世界模型与双层策略（高层生成安全子目标，低层在模型想象中减少危险行为）的强化学习方法，有效解决了长时域任务中的安全探索问题，在复杂导航和操作任务中显著优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全强化学习方法在长时域任务中面临估计误差累积和探索受限的根本性挑战，难以同时最大化累积性能和满足安全约束。

Method: 提出可学习世界模型+高层策略（生成安全子目标引导探索）+低层策略（在模型想象rollout中减少不安全行为）的双层安全机制。

Result: 在长时域导航和操作任务中，成功率显著优于现有Safe RL基线，且在多个随机种子下始终满足预设安全预算，而对比方法无法有效解决这些复杂场景。

Conclusion: 双层层次化方法与世界模型结合能有效缓解长时域任务中的安全探索问题，实现高性能与强安全约束的兼顾。

Abstract: This work investigates the safe exploration problem in reinforcement learning, where an agent must maximize cumulative performance while simultaneously satisfying safety constraints. This challenge becomes even more pronounced in long-horizon tasks, where existing safe methods face fundamental limitations due to compounding estimation errors and restricted exploration capabilities. To address this problem, we propose a method that combines a learnable world model with two complementary policies a high-level policy and a low-level policy to promote safety at both hierarchical levels. The high-level policy generates intermediate subgoals that bias exploration toward safe regions, while the low-level policy uses imagined rollouts in the learned world model to reduce unsafe behaviors when reaching these subgoals. The proposed method was evaluated on challenging long-horizon navigation and manipulation tasks with high-dimensional action spaces, where it significantly outperforms existing Safe RL baselines in both success rate and strong empirical constraint satisfaction, consistently meeting the prescribed safety budget across seeds, while prior approaches fail to effectively solve these complex long-horizon scenarios.

</details>


### [685] [Governance Decay: How Context Compaction Silently Erases Safety Constraints in Long-Horizon LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22528)
*Shiyang Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现LLM代理的上下文压缩机制会静默移除安全约束（称为"治理衰减"），导致代理违规操作。作者构建了ConstraintRot基准，在1323个episode中违规率从0%升至30%（某些模型达59%），并提出了无需训练的缓解方法Constraint Pinning将违规率恢复至0%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究关注LLM代理的安全性大多集中在模型本身或提示工程层面，但忽略了上下文管理层（压缩、摘要、驱逐）这一重要安全失效表面。随着代理会话越来越长，token预算有限时上下文压缩成为必需，但其对治理约束的潜在破坏尚未被系统研究。

Method: 1) 提出ConstraintRot基准：包含长程代理场景和确定性工具调用评分；2) 设计Compaction-Eviction Attack：通过对抗性上下文内容引导摘要器移除合法策略；3) 提出Constraint Pinning：一种无需训练的缓解方法，将治理约束与有损压缩隔离。

Result: 在7个模型家族、1323个episode中，违规率从完整上下文时的0%上升到压缩后的30%，部分模型达59%；约束存活时违规率为0%，被丢弃时达38%；对抗攻击可击败所有评估模型；Constraint Pinning将违规率恢复至0%。

Conclusion: 上下文管理是已部署LLM代理的一等治理安全表面，现有压缩机制存在严重安全漏洞，需要将治理约束作为独立的安全边界来设计和保护。

Abstract: Modern LLM agents increasingly rely on context compaction, summarization, or eviction to keep long-running sessions within a token budget. We show that this context-management layer is a safety-critical failure surface: in-context governance constraints that agents reliably obey while visible can be silently removed by compaction, causing the same agent to perform prohibited tool actions later in the session. We call this failure mode Governance Decay. We introduce ConstraintRot, a benchmark of long-horizon agent scenarios with deterministic tool-call grading, and measure compaction-induced violations across seven model families. Across 1,323 episodes, violation rises from 0% with the policy in full context to 30% after compaction, reaching 59% for some models; when the constraint survives the summary, violation remains 0%, but when it is dropped, violation reaches 38%. We further study a Compaction-Eviction Attack, in which adversarial in-context content biases the summarizer to omit a legitimate policy, and show that optimized injections defeat every evaluated model. Finally, we propose Constraint Pinning, a simple training-free mitigation that quarantines governance constraints from lossy compaction and restores violation to 0% in our benchmark. These results identify context management as a first-class governance surface for deployed LLM agents.

</details>


### [686] [MacAgentBench: Benchmarking AI Agents on Real-World macOS Desktop](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22557)
*Yikun Fu,Bowen Fu,Zhenyu Wu,Shuang Cheng,Xiaowei Sun,Bowen Yang,Zehao Li,Yibo Zhao,Zichen Ding,Zhoumianze Liu,Shijie Wang,Biqing Qi,Bowen Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MacAgentBench 是一个包含 676 个任务、覆盖 25 个 macOS 应用的智能体基准测试，其中近 60% 的任务涉及 GUI 与 CLI 混合交互。该基准采用确定性规则评估与细粒度多检查点评分，实验发现最佳配置（Claude Opus 4.6 on OpenClaw）达到 73.7% Pass@1，优势主要来自技能库而非框架设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 macOS 基准测试在评估时不考虑框架增强且依赖二元评价，无法反映现代 CUA 所利用的框架能力，也无法捕捉长时、多应用任务中的部分进展。因此需要一个新的基准来弥补这些不足。

Method: 构建了 676 个任务（25 个应用），近 60% 的任务同时涉及 GUI 和 CLI 交互；采用确定性规则评估，并引入细粒度多检查点评分与能力标注，用于多应用任务的部分完成度评估。

Result: 在 3 个框架和 16 个模型上的实验显示，最佳配置 Claude Opus 4.6 on OpenClaw 取得 73.7% Pass@1，但优势主要来自技能库而非框架设计。细粒度指标进一步揭示，Pass@1 相近的模型在子目标完成度上存在显著差异。

Conclusion: MacAgentBench 能更全面地评估 macOS 上的 CUA 能力，揭示了技能库的重要性以及传统 Pass@1 指标的局限性，为后续研究提供了公开数据和代码。

Abstract: Computer use agents (CUAs) have advanced rapidly in desktop automation, and a growing number of users deploy CUAs such as OpenClaw on Mac Mini for always-on automation. However, existing benchmarks, including those for macOS, evaluate agents without framework augmentation and rely on binary evaluation. As a result, they fail to capture both the framework capabilities leveraged by modern CUAs and the partial progress on long-horizon, multi-application tasks. We present MacAgentBench, a comprehensive macOS agent benchmark comprising 676 tasks across 25 applications, with nearly 60% involving both GUI and CLI interaction. The benchmark adopts deterministic rule-based evaluation and introduces fine-grained multi-checkpoint scoring with capability annotations for multi-application tasks. Experiments across three frameworks and 16 models show that the best configuration, Claude Opus 4.6 on OpenClaw, attains 73.7% Pass@1, while this advantage is primarily driven by the skill library rather than by framework design. Fine-grained metrics further reveal that models with similar Pass@1 can differ substantially in sub-goal completion. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/JetAstra/MacAgentBench.

</details>


### [687] [Text2DSL: LLM-Based Code Generation for Domain-Specific Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22586)
*Alexander V. Kozachok,Alexander M. Nazimov,Shamil G. Magomedov*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了Text2DSL这一新问题类别（从自然语言生成领域特定语言代码），构建了PolkitBench数据集（4,204对NL-Polkit规则），并通过实验证明在提示中加入结构化上下文（BNF语法、API规范、标识符词汇）可显著提升LLM生成DSL代码的质量，无需微调即可达到98.6-99.4%的语法有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DSL安全策略规则编写依赖专家知识且易出错，而Text-to-SQL和通用代码生成方法不适用于DSL代码生成。作者希望将Text2DSL定义为一个独立的问题类别，并探索如何让LLM在不微调的情况下高质量生成DSL代码。

Method: 构建PolkitBench数据集（4,204条经过三层AST验证的NL-Polkit规则对）；在两种不同规模和来源的MoE模型（GigaChat-10B-A1.8B和Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B）上进行受控提示实验，对比有无结构化上下文（BNF语法、API规范、标识符词汇）对生成质量的影响。

Result: 提供结构化上下文后，语法有效性达98.6-99.4%，结构有效性提升+9.7至+35.5个百分点，CodeBLEU分数提升+60%至+95%。该效果在不同规模和来源的模型上表现一致。

Conclusion: 对于Text2DSL这类问题，在提示中注入形式化的目标语言规范是一种鲁棒的促成因素，无需模型微调即可实现高质量代码生成。

Abstract: Domain-specific languages (DSLs) are widely used for managing operating system security policies, yet manually authoring rules in such languages demands high expertise and is error-prone. This paper formalises the task of automatic DSL code generation from natural language descriptions - Text2DSL - as a distinct problem class, separate from Text-to-SQL and general-purpose code generation. We introduce the PolkitBench dataset comprising 4,204 verified natural-language-to-Polkit-rule pairs, each validated through a three-level AST-based pipeline. Controlled prompt experiments on two MoE models of different scale and provenance - GigaChat-10B-A1.8B (1.8B active parameters) and Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B (3B active) - demonstrate the critical role of structured context (BNF grammar, API specification, permitted identifier vocabulary) for LLM-based DSL code generation. Across both models, supplying context raises syntactic validity to 98.6-99.4%, structural validity by +9.7 to +35.5 pp, and the CodeBLEU score by +60% to +95%. The consistency of the effect across models of different scale and provenance indicates that, for the Text2DSL class of problems, injecting a formal target-language specification into the prompt context is a robust enabling factor for high-quality generation without model fine-tuning.

</details>


### [688] [PaperClaw: Harnessing Agents for Autonomous Research and Human-in-the-Loop Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22610)
*Weiwei Ye,Hangchen Liu,Dongyuan Li,Renhe Jiang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PAPERCLAW是一个多智能体系统，能从研究领域出发自主完成从文献调研、构思、迭代实验到撰写论文的完整科研流程，支持人类介入优化，生成可验证的高质量论文。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型已具备推理、工具使用（写代码、搜索文献）的能力，使得自动化科研流程成为现实目标。作者希望构建一个端到端系统，让AI自主完成从选题到成文的全过程。

Method: PAPERCLAW采用多智能体架构：1）从领域实时文献、数据集和代码中策划领域知识；2）头脑风暴生成研究想法并预注册主要结果合同；3）通过"提出-测试-反思"迭代循环驱动可停止的假设地图，仅凭实测结论生长，证据支持时停止；4）生成符合会议格式的论文。系统配备全生命周期记忆支持暂停恢复，核心研究助理可独立运行也可让人在任意环节介入。

Result: 通过LLM裁判评估，PAPERCLAW在全自主模式和人类介入优化模式下均能产出高质量的论文。

Conclusion: PAPERCLAW验证了LLM驱动的自动化科研的可行性，其模块化设计支持全自主与人类协作两种模式，为未来科研自动化提供了可行的框架。

Abstract: Large language models have become capable reasoners and tool users that write and run code and search the literature, which makes automating the research process itself a realistic goal. We present PAPERCLAW, a harnessed multi-agent system that carries a project autonomously, from a field of study to a finished paper. PAPERCLAW curates a domain from a field's live literature, datasets, and code; brainstorms it into an idea with a pre-registered main-result contract; and drives a stoppable hypothesis map through an iterative propose, test, reflect loop that grows only from measured verdicts and halts once the evidence supports the idea, at which point it writes a venue-compliant paper. A full-lifecycle memory keeps each stage in a single living record, so a long run can be paused, inspected, and resumed without losing context. At the centre is an in-cycle research assistant with research tools and skills: it can drive the whole pipeline on its own, while the same interface lets a person step in at any stage, turning a first autonomous draft into a stronger paper through human-in-the-loop refinement. Throughout, PAPERCLAW keeps its output grounded and checkable, citing only references validated against open scholarly indexes and reporting results that genuinely ran. An evaluation with an LLM judge finds that PAPERCLAW produces strong papers both fully autonomously and with human-in-the-loop refinement.

</details>


### [689] [SkillAudit: From Fixed-Suite Benchmarking to Skill-Centered Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22613)
*Dexu Yu,Youhua Li,Zhaoyang Guan,Xianhao Lin,Jining Luan,Zihao Rao,Xuanqi Lan,Yang Ran,Bo Lan,Nai-Xin Zhai,Hanwen Du,Junchen Fu,Wenhao Deng,Yongxin Ni,Chunxiao Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 针对大语言模型智能体技能生态缺乏可靠评估的问题，提出SkillAudit框架，能自动对任意智能体技能生成涵盖效用、效率/成本、安全性的多维评估报告，通过基线比较和两阶段安全检测实现技能中心化评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估方法依赖固定任务集，无法区分技能的边际贡献与骨干模型能力，且难以评估技能在预期范围之外的价值，随着技能市场扩张，这种范式已不适用。

Method: SkillAudit框架：1）从技能包直接构建与能力对齐的评估任务；2）在隔离沙箱环境中执行并收集证据；3）LLM自动评判；4）基线比较原则衡量效用和效率/成本；5）两阶段安全检测（静态语义分析+动态运行时验证）。

Result: 扫描23个职业类别中的顶级真实技能包，发现超过7%的技能处于风险状态。

Conclusion: SkillAudit提供了一种可靠的技能中心化评估范式，能够有效识别高风险技能，有望推动智能体技能生态的健康发展。

Abstract: Agent skills have become a practical way to extend large language model agents, but the growing skill ecosystem still lacks a reliable way to judge whether a skill is worth deploying. Existing evaluation methods remain largely anchored to fixed task suites, assessing skills through performance on predefined tasks and environments. As skill marketplaces expand, this paradigm becomes inadequate: fixed suites can conflate a skill's marginal contribution with backbone strength and miss its value when tasks fall outside the skill's intended scope. We introduce SkillAudit, an end-to-end framework for skill-centered assessment that takes an arbitrary agent skill as input and automatically generates a comprehensive, multi-dimensional evaluation report spanning utility, efficiency/cost, and safety. SkillAudit focuses on the skill artifact itself and constructs capability-aligned evaluation tasks directly from the skill package. The generated tasks are conducted in isolated sandbox environments to collect execution evidence, followed by automated checks with LLM-based judging to produce auditable results. To dissect the agent skills, we propose the baseline comparison principle to measure utility and efficiency/cost, and introduce a two-stage detection paradigm combining static semantic analysis with dynamic runtime verification to assess safety risks. After scanning top-ranked real-world skill packages spanning 23 occupational categories, we found that over 7% of skills are at risky status.

</details>


### [690] [Confident but Conflicted: Internal Uncertainty and Cognitive Dissonance Resolution in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22633)
*Weihong Qi,Kristina Lerman*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究LLM如何处理与先前输出矛盾的输入（认知失调），提出了信任弹性（Trust Elasticity）这一经济学启发的新指标来衡量模型被说服的程度，并发现模型间的行为差异与内部不确定性指标相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM经常遇到与自身先前输出不一致的信息（用户反驳、检索文档等），但冲突解决过程与模型内部不确定性的关联尚不清晰，现有研究多停留在行为层面。

Method: 沿两个维度（来源权威性、证据质量）变化说服尝试，在12个健康科学声明上进行实验；引入信任弹性（TE）指标；在四种LLM上测量；对两个开源模型分析内部不确定性指标（Qwen的置信度校准误差、Llama的内部不确定性变化）。

Result: 不同LLM的信任弹性差异显著；明显错误的声明在所有模型上信任弹性接近零；模型间行为差异与内部不确定性指标相关（Qwen的置信度校准误差、Llama的内部不确定性变化）。

Conclusion: 模型间行为差异可关联到可测量的内部属性，未来工作可针对内部不确定性设计干预措施。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) frequently encounter inputs that disagree with their prior outputs, through user pushback, retrieved documents, or web search results. While the way they resolve such conflicts -- a process we frame as cognitive dissonance resolution -- has been characterized behaviorally, its connection to internal model uncertainty is not well understood. To study this systematically, we vary persuasion attempts along two dimensions, source authority and evidence quality, across 12 health-science claims of stratified epistemic status. Dissonance can be resolved through persuasion, backfire, or immunity. We introduce Trust Elasticity (TE), an econometrics-inspired measure of how readily a model is persuaded toward conflicting evidence. Across four LLMs, TE varies substantially, while clearly false claims elicit near-zero TE across all models. On two open-weight models, we further find that this variation is associated with two complementary internal uncertainty indicators, Confidence Miscalibration in Qwen and Internal Uncertainty Change in Llama. These results link cross-model behavioral variation to a measurable internal property and point to interventions targeting internal uncertainty as future work.

</details>


### [691] [AgentLens: Interpretable Safety Steering via Mechanistic Subspaces for Multi-Turn Coding Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22673)
*Weidi Luo,Qiming Zhang,Yihao Quan,Mingyu Jin,Jie Cai,Chaowei Xiao,Jingcheng Niu,Zhen Xiang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentLens，一个基于机制可解释性的白盒防御框架，用于多轮编码智能体的运行时安全检测与表示级干预。通过分析模型内部隐藏状态，在单层10维子空间中进行干预以降低有害行为。同时引入MAS基准数据集，实验证明该方法在安全检测和风险缓解上效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全机制主要依赖外部护栏，对多轮交互中逐渐演变的行为风险缺乏细粒度控制能力；而机制可解释性方法多限于单轮或越狱型问答场景，无法捕捉多轮智能体执行中的动态风险变化。

Method: 1) 提出AgentLens框架，从步骤级隐藏表示中检测有害执行状态；2) 在单层10维子空间中进行表示级干预以缓解不安全行为；3) 构建MAS基准，包含194个任务的多轮执行轨迹，基于LLaMA-3.1-8B、Qwen-2.5-7B、Gemma-2-9B模型。

Result: AgentLens实现了强大的安全检测性能，能提前预测风险（lookahead risk anticipation），并显著降低编码智能体的有害行为。

Conclusion: 该工作为将机制可解释性应用于动态LLM智能体安全奠定了坚实基础，提供了一种从模型内部进行安全干预的新范式。

Abstract: Coding agents based on large language models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable autonomous capabilities, but they also introduce significant safety and misuse risks during multi-turn interactions with external environments. Existing safety mechanisms mainly rely on external guardrails, which have a limited ability to perform fine-grained behavioral control during execution. Meanwhile, recent mechanistic interpretability methods for LLM safety are mostly confined to single-turn or jailbreak-style QA settings, limiting their ability to capture the evolving risk dynamics of multi-turn agent execution. In this paper, we investigate the safety of multi-turn coding agents from an internal perspective. We propose AgentLens (Mechanistic Subspace Intervention and Steering), a white-box defense framework that performs runtime safety detection and representation-level mitigation for coding agents. Unlike conventional agent guardrails, AgentLens detect harmful execution states from step-level hidden representations and mitigate unsafe behavior by intervening in a 10-dimensional subspace within a single layer. To support this research, we introduce the Mechanistic Agent Safety (MAS) benchmark, comprising comprehensively annotated multi-turn execution trajectories across 194 tasks using LLaMA-3.1-8B, Qwen-2.5-7B, and Gemma-2-9B. Extensive experiments show that AgentLens achieves strong safety detection performance, provides preliminary evidence for lookahead risk anticipation, and substantially reduces harmful actions of the coding agent, establishing a foundation for applying mechanistic interpretability to dynamic LLM agent safety. The code is available at: https://github.com/EddyLuo1232/AgentLens

</details>


### [692] [Skin-Deep: A Geometric Diagnostic for Alignment Fragility in Large Language Model Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22676)
*Dongyub Jude Lee,Jungseob Lee,Seungyoon Lee,Seongtae Hong,Suhyune Son,Sugyeong Eo,Jaehyung Seo,Heuiseok Lim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Skin-Deep几何诊断方法，通过对齐模型的隐藏状态激活计算几何脆弱性分数（GFS），在不进行攻击或微调干预的情况下，就能检测模型在后续小规模微调后可能丧失有害请求拒绝能力的脆弱性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有关联微调的安全性在后续微调中可能被破坏，但缺乏在事前检测这种脆弱性的方法，难以在部署前识别风险。

Method: 提出Skin-Deep几何诊断方法，从对齐模型的隐藏状态激活中提取逐层安全性几何结构，将其压缩为单一标量——几何脆弱性分数（GFS），并识别跨模型家族的共享低秩安全子空间。

Result: 在21个模型（6种对齐策略，3B-32B参数）上验证，GFS能在任何微调前识别出后续小规模LoRA微调后最能保持拒绝能力的初始安全模型。

Conclusion: GFS可作为实用的部署前诊断工具，在不运行攻击的情况下标记脆弱的拒绝行为。

Abstract: Alignment tuning is meant to make harmful-request refusal robust, yet this safety behavior can be erased by a small set of benign fine-tuning examples. This is a deployment risk for open-weight models because a checkpoint can pass refusal tests at release time and later lose refusal under low-cost downstream fine-tuning. Prior work has established these refusal failures, but existing studies do not show how to detect this fragility in the aligned model itself before an attack or fine-tuning intervention is run. We introduce Skin-Deep, a geometric diagnostic that detects alignment fragility directly from the aligned model's hidden-state activations before such an intervention is run and compresses the layer-wise safety geometry into a single scalar, the Geometric Fragility Score (GFS). Applied to twenty-one instruction-tuned models spanning six alignment recipes and 3B--32B parameters, Skin-Deep reveals a recurring low-rank safety subspace across model families. Direction ablations show that removing directions in this subspace weakens harmful-request refusal, providing causal evidence that the recovered geometry underlies refusal behavior. Crucially, GFS identifies, before any fine-tuning, the initially safe model that retains the most refusal after small-scale LoRA fine-tuning. These results establish GFS as a practical pre-deployment diagnostic for flagging fragile refusal behavior without running an attack.

</details>


### [693] [VISTA Architect: A graph database-oriented health AI system demonstrated in multidisciplinary tumor boards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22692)
*Tuomo Kiiskinen,Jason Fries,Philip Adamson,David Wu,Timothy John Ellis-Caleo,Aaron Fanous,Balasubramanian Narasimhan,Joel Neal,Sylvia Plevritis,Manuel A. Rivas*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: VISTA Architect是一种面向数据库的AI架构，通过将EHR数据预编译为持久化的知识图谱（MEDS Graph + TOA），解决了长上下文提示和RAG在时序关系和计算成本上的局限，在斯坦福胸外科肿瘤委员会测试中达到96.4%准确率，并实现约2.2分钟的快速患者准备。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（长上下文提示、RAG）处理纵向EHR数据时，难以捕捉时序关系，且反复处理原始文本导致高成本和延迟。

Method: 双层次架构：第一层为源忠实MEDS图谱，保留EHR粒度结构及完整溯源；第二层为临床抽象的Timeline Object Architecture (TOA)，通过图引导的LLM提取合成去重且时序连贯的临床事件摘要。

Result: 在斯坦福1180名胸外科肿瘤患者中，15个变量评估准确率96.4%（95% CI 96.1-96.7%），优于BM25 RAG基线；30名患者的代理接口准备时间仅约2.2分钟。

Conclusion: VISTA Architect通过预计算临床摘要有效解决了EHR时序推理与效率问题，模块化设计可扩展至其他专科，但跨专科验证仍为未来工作。

Abstract: We introduce VISTA Architect, a database-oriented AI architecture for integrating large language models (LLMs) with longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs). At ingestion, it transforms complex clinical documentation into a persistent, provenance-linked knowledge graph, eliminating repeated reprocessing of raw records at query time. The architecture has two layers: a source-faithful MEDS Graph preserving granular EHR structure with full provenance, and a clinically abstracted Timeline Object Architecture (TOA) that uses graph-guided LLM extraction to synthesize a concise timeline of deduplicated, temporally coherent clinical events. This addresses key limitations of direct long-context prompting and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which often miss temporal relationships and incur high cost and latency from repeated raw-text processing. By precomputing clinical synthesis once, downstream queries access an organized patient state and traverse to source documentation only when detailed verification is needed.
  We demonstrate the system in multidisciplinary thoracic oncology tumor boards at Stanford Medicine, where precise reconstruction of patient histories is critical. Across 1,180 patients, VISTA Architect achieved 96.4% accuracy (mean 9.75/10) on 15 tumor board-salient variables (17,700 evaluations; 95% CI 96.1-96.7%), surpassing a matched BM25 RAG baseline and recent benchmarks for LLM-based clinical extraction. An agentic interface reduced preparation for a 30-patient held-out cohort to about 2.2 minutes without sacrificing accuracy. While configured here for thoracic oncology, the modular design adapts to other specialties through customizable event definitions, episode structures, and agentic tools; validation beyond thoracic oncology remains future work.

</details>


### [694] [Safety-Aware Evaluation of LLM-Generated Driver Intervention Messages through Multi-Task Risk Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22706)
*Keito Inoshita*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出面向驾驶员安全干预的领域专用评估指标DSAIS及多任务融合框架，实验验证其在ICC、Cohen's d等指标上表现优异，并给出车载部署设计指南。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有驾驶员干预系统依赖听觉警报和固定模板，未利用多任务识别输出；通用指标（BLEU、BERTScore）无法捕获风险-紧迫性对齐、认知负荷、驾驶员可接受性等干预专用质量维度。

Method: 提出DSAIS指标（混合轻量规则计算+LLM Judge评估的五维评价）+ 端到端框架（四任务识别输出→风险融合→状态历史管理→动态提示构建→LLM生成干预）。

Result: 在AIDE数据集上，DSAIS在三种不同架构Judge上ICC达0.798-0.840，所有控制条件Cohen's d>1.5；多任务融合使上下文相关性提升9.1%；消融实验验证各组件贡献；驾驶员情绪识别是最关键上游因素；7B-9B本地LLM质量优于API模型。

Conclusion: 领域专用评估指标和端到端多任务融合框架能有效提升驾驶干预质量，紧凑本地模型更适于车载部署。

Abstract: Existing driver intervention systems rely on auditory alerts and fixed templates, failing to leverage multi-task recognition outputs. General-purpose metrics such as BLEU and BERTScore cannot capture intervention-specific quality dimensions including risk-urgency alignment, cognitive load, and driver acceptability. In this paper, we propose the Driver Safety-Aware Intervention Score (DSAIS), a domain-specific metric evaluating five dimensions through a hybrid architecture combining lightweight rule-based computation with LLM Judge evaluation, together with an end-to-end framework integrating four-task recognition outputs into an LLM through risk fusion, state history management, and dynamic prompt construction. Experiments on the AIDE dataset with five models and seven conditions demonstrate that DSAIS achieves ICC 0.798-0.840 across three architecturally distinct judges and Cohen's d > 1.5 across all control conditions. Multi-dimensional sub-score analysis quantifies the contextual adaptability gap between rule-based and LLM-based systems, revealing that multi-task integration improves contextual relevance by 9.1% over rule-based baselines. Ablation experiments demonstrate that each framework component contributes to contextual relevance, with sub-score decomposition revealing gains that aggregate scoring masks. Driver emotion recognition is identified as the most critical upstream factor, and compact local LLMs (7B--9B parameters) achieve quality superior to API-based models, providing practical design guidelines for in-vehicle deployment.

</details>


### [695] [Beyond Penalizing Mistakes: Stabilizing Efficiency Training in Large Reasoning Models via Adaptive Correct-Only Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22716)
*Jungseob Lee,Seungyoon Lee,Seongtae Hong,Minhyuk Kim,Chanjun Park,Heuiseok Lim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现GRPO中惩罚错误回答长度会导致奖励崩溃，提出ACOER方法——仅对正确回答给予简洁奖励，并通过动态预算归一化和控制环路惩罚调整来避免两种崩溃模式，在数学推理任务中准确率提升的同时减少60%以上token生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练大语言模型高效推理时，GRPO中引入长度惩罚虽旨在减少冗长，但常引发奖励崩溃，严重损害推理能力，亟需稳定且高效的优化方法。

Method: 提出ACOER（Adaptive Correct-Only Efficiency Reward）：1）仅对正确回答给予简洁奖励，消除结构性惩罚循环；2）通过动态预算归一化和控制环路惩罚调整，防止随机性崩溃。

Result: 在多种数学推理基准上，ACOER相比基模型提升整体准确率，同时减少超过60%的token生成量。

Conclusion: ACOER为效率感知优化提供了根本稳定的方法，有效解决了GRPO中长度惩罚导致的奖励崩溃问题。

Abstract: Training large language models to reason efficiently is a critical challenge. While integrating length-penalizing rewards into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) aims to reduce verbosity, it frequently triggers reward collapse, severely degrading reasoning capabilities. Through a systematic evaluation of various reward configurations, we identify the root mechanism: GRPO's group normalization creates divergent advantages when incorrect answers receive continuous length penalties. Consequently, methods penalizing the length of incorrect answers are structurally prone to collapse under sustained optimization. Furthermore, restricting penalties exclusively to correct answers avoids this primary failure, but leaves the model susceptible to a stochastic collapse driven by response over-compression. To robustly prevent both failure modes, we propose ACOER (Adaptive Correct-Only Efficiency Reward). ACOER eliminates the structural penalty loop by isolating brevity bonuses to correct completions and prevents stochastic compression via dynamic budget normalization and control-loop penalty adjustments. Evaluated across diverse mathematical reasoning benchmarks, ACOER improves overall accuracy compared to the base model while reducing token generation by over 60%, establishing a fundamentally stable approach for efficiency-aware optimization.

</details>


### [696] [Text Dictates, Music Decorates: Energy-based Attention for Editable Dance Motion Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22726)
*Seong Jong Yoo,Siyuan Peng,Felix Gu,Stratis Aloimonos,Cornelia Fermüller*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: STREAM提出了一种模态解耦的扩散变换器，通过严格分离文本语义和音乐节奏的控制路径，解决了文生舞动中文本被音乐淹没的问题，实现了对舞蹈动作的可控生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文生舞动模型面临模态坍塌问题——密集的声学节奏会淹没稀疏的文本语义提示，导致用户可控性丧失。亟需一种能解耦两种模态、同时保留各自控制能力的方法。

Method: 提出STREAM扩散变换器，采用模态解耦设计：(1) 全局文本语义通过AdaLN调控运动学结构；(2) 新型双模态能量注意力模块(BEAM)将文本特征路由到音乐节拍而不覆盖语义。此外构建了Motorica++数据集，并提出Exchange评估协议和可编辑舞蹈分数(EDS)用于零样本可编辑性量化。

Result: STREAM在运动与音乐对齐方面达到SOTA，同时完美保留了舞蹈编排语义，实现了对用户意图的可控响应。

Conclusion: STREAM将AI从被动的音乐反应合成器转变为可控的、可协作的艺术创作伙伴，解决了时空冲突这一核心难题。

Abstract: Choreographic motion generation poses unique challenges for AI, demanding precise semantic control over complex, temporally structured, and expressive full-body dynamics. While existing models can synthesize motion from music, they remain largely black boxes. Conversely, attempting to condition generation on both text and music frequently leads to modality collapse, where dense acoustic rhythms overwhelm sparse semantic text prompts, destroying user controllability. To resolve this spatial-temporal conflict, we propose STREAM (Structural-Temporal Rhythmic Energy-based Attention for Motion), a modality-decoupled diffusion transformer. STREAM strictly separates conditioning pathways: global text semantics dictate the kinematic structure via Adaptive Layer Normalization (AdaLN), while a novel Bimodal Energy-Based Attention Module (BEAM) routes these features to the musical beat without overwriting the semantics. We further introduce Motorica++, a newly curated dataset enriched with domain-specific dance vocabulary and frame-level semantic annotations from existing Motorica dataset. Additionally, to rigorously quantify zero-shot editability, we propose the Exchange Evaluation Protocol and Editable Dance Score (EDS). Through extensive experiments, STREAM achieves state-of-the-art alignment between motion and music while perfectly preserving choreographic semantics, positioning AI not merely as a reactive synthesizer, but as a controllable, collaborative partner for artistic direction. The source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/SeongJong-Yoo/STREAM.

</details>


### [697] [Closed-loop Auto Research for Molecular Property Prediction: Discovering and Certifying Generalizable Improvements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22731)
*Jingjie Ning,Xiaochuan Li,Ji Zeng,Chenyan Xiong,Guolin Ke*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了闭环自动研究（Closed-loop Auto Research）在分子性质预测任务中的泛化能力，发现通过特征、模型和外部证据三个轴线的优化，部分改进能泛化到未见测试集（如TDC上+0.013、Polaris上+0.011、MoleculeNet上+0.042），但模型搜索和外部数据存在明显的过拟合风险（验证集增益在测试集上大幅下降甚至转负），并强调了分离发现与最终认证的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动化机器学习从固定数据集拟合扩展到动态研究流程，但语言模型代理对表征、模型代码和外部证据的编辑是否真正带来了泛化能力，而不仅仅是拟合验证集信号？本文旨在量化这种泛化差距。

Method: 在三个基准套件（TDC、Polaris、MoleculeNet）的36个端点上，隔离特征、模型和外部证据三个轴线的文件级消融实验。每个配置在从未读取标签的留出测试集上评估，并使用路由流水线（每个端点选取最佳验证轴）和匹配试验的自动化机器学习对照。

Result: 路由流水线在TDC、Polaris、MoleculeNet上分别获得+0.013、+0.011、+0.042的留出增益；模型搜索的验证增益0.041跌至测试0.003，外部数据验证0.022转负-0.019；CYP2C9-底物和半衰期分别提升0.17和0.08，但存在污染问题（重叠64-89%）；自动机器学习对照仅达0.006（vs 0.042）。

Conclusion: 闭环自动研究的改进部分可泛化，但存在严重的过拟合风险，尤其是模型搜索和外部数据。分离发现（validation）与认证（held-out test）是任何闭环系统的通用经验，分子性质预测中最佳可迁移轴因基准而异。

Abstract: Closed-loop Auto Research extends automated machine learning from fixed-dataset fitting to changing the research workflow, with language-model agents editing representations and model code and acquiring external evidence. Molecular property prediction spans many small endpoints. We ask whether this action space yields improvements generalizing beyond the validation signal selecting them.
  We isolate three Auto Research axes, features, models, and external evidence, under a file-level ablation lock attributing each gain to one axis over a strong baseline. Across 36 endpoints in three benchmark suites we score each selected configuration once on a held-out test whose labels the search never read. A routed pipeline taking each endpoint's best validation axis reaches positive held-out gains of 0.013, 0.011, and 0.042, the transferable axis differing by suite, data on TDC, model on Polaris, feature and model on MoleculeNet. The largest model-search gain falls from 0.041 on validation to 0.003 on test, while curated data reaches 0.022 but negative 0.019 on test, two non-transfer signatures. Curated external data raises held-out CYP2C9-substrate performance by 0.17 and half-life by 0.08, admitted through a contamination filter rejecting same-source files overlapping 64 to 89 percent of test structures, necessary but not sufficient for transfer. A matched-trial automated machine learning control did not reproduce the agent's code-level model intervention, reaching 0.006 against 0.042, and the pipeline stays competitive with an 84M-parameter pretrained 3D model on the shared training split.
  The experiments stay within molecular property prediction, but separating discovery from held-out certification is a domain-agnostic lesson for any closed-loop system optimising a proxy for a held-out quantity.

</details>


### [698] [GroundEval: A Deterministic Replacement for LLM-as-Judge in Stateful Agent Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22737)
*Jeffrey Flynt*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GroundEval 是一个无需评判者的框架，通过追踪智能体的搜索、获取、引用和权限记录，检测其回答是否基于真实的证据路径，而非看似合理的虚构证据。案例表明，两个前沿 LLM 评判者给看似合理的回答打了 0.85+ 分，但 GroundEval 发现智能体从未检索过关键证据，得分仅为 0.000。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 LLM-as-judge 评估方法仅关注最终答案的合理性，无法检测智能体是否使用了正确的证据路径、是否在合适的时间范围内基于可用证据推理、以及是否使用了正确的因果机制。这种评估盲区导致看似正确实则基于无效证据的回答被误判为高质量。

Method: GroundEval 包含三个追踪：Silence（智能体在声称不存在前是否检查过）、Perspective（是否仅使用相关时间范围内可用的证据）、Counterfactual（是否使用了正确的因果机制而非合理但错误的机制）。它通过领域配置生成问题，记录智能体的完整轨迹（工具活动+轮次叙述），并基于证据路径进行确定性评分。

Result: 案例研究表明，前沿 LLM 评判者对看似合理的错误回答给出了 0.85+ 的高分，而 GroundEval 通过检查证据路径发现智能体从未检索过关键证据，给出 0.000 分。这种评估差距并非罕见边缘案例，而是最终答案和评判者评分系统固有的盲点。

Conclusion: GroundEval 证明了基于可追踪证据路径的评估对于可靠智能体系统至关重要。仅依赖最终答案合理性的评估方法存在系统性盲点，无法检测证据路径层面的错误。GroundEval 的每个分数都可通过结构化诊断进行审查，为智能体评估提供了更高层次的可靠性保障。

Abstract: Before letting an agent operate over real context, can you prove it used the right evidence? GroundEval turns that question into a deterministic test of what the agent searched, fetched, cited, and was permitted to access. In one case study, two frontier LLM judges scored a plausible agent response above 0.85. But the trace told a different story: the agent had never retrieved the artifact its answer depended on, yielding a GroundEval score of 0.000.
  We introduce GroundEval, a judge-free framework for evaluating agents against grounded, time-bounded, and access-controlled evidence. GroundEval uses a domain configuration to generate questions, lets the agent choose how to answer, and then scores both the final answer and the recorded trajectory that produced it. The benchmark targets three failures that LLM-as-judge evaluation struggles to detect: whether an agent checked before claiming absence, reasoned only from evidence available to the actor at the relevant time, and used the correct causal mechanism rather than a plausible one. These correspond to three tracks: Silence, Perspective, and Counterfactual. GroundEval exposes when plausible answers rest on invalid evidence paths, and produces structured per-question diagnostics that pair tool activity with the agent's turn-level narration, making each score inspectable rather than merely reported. What our case studies turned up is that this gap isn't some rare corner case. It's exactly the blind spot that final-answer and judge-based scoring were never built to catch.

</details>


### [699] [Learning Filters with Certainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22786)
*Yuval Banoun,Daniel Sadoc Menasche,Ori Rottenstreich*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究Counting Bloom Filters（CBFs）中计数器所蕴含的确定性信息，并展示如何将这些确定性信号用于结合Bloom Filters与机器学习模型的架构中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统哈希数据结构（如Bloom Filter）仅提供二元成员指示（是/否），在哈希冲突时为了规避假阴性会返回阳性结果，但忽略了结果本身的确定性信息。作者认为这些确定性信息本身是有价值的，值得挖掘利用。

Method: 聚焦Counting Bloom Filters（CBFs），利用其维护的计数器（而非比特位）提供额外信息，通过计数器值来估计阳性成员指示的确定性程度。

Result: 展示了CBFs中的确定性信号可以在结合Bloom Filters与机器学习模型的架构中被有效利用。

Conclusion: Bloom Filter中的确定性信息（由计数器提供）是有价值的，可以在ML-Bloom Filter混合架构中发挥积极作用。

Abstract: Hash-based data structures such as Bloom filters are widely used in network systems for tasks including caching, anomaly detection, and machine learning pipelines. They typically provide binary indications of whether an element belongs to a set of interest, e.g., the contents of a cache. When uncertainty arises due to hash collisions, a positive indication is returned to avoid false negatives. We argue that the certainty associated with such indications can itself be useful information. This work focuses on Counting Bloom Filters (CBFs), a Bloom-filter variant that maintains counters rather than bits. Besides supporting insertions and deletions, these counters provide additional information that can be used to estimate the certainty of positive membership indications. We show how this certainty signal can be exploited in architectures that combine Bloom Filters with machine learning (ML) models.

</details>


### [700] [The Origins of Stochasticity: Comprehensive Investigations on Uncertainty Quantification for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22792)
*Xiang-Jun Ou,Shuang Liang,Xin-Yu Hu,Rong-Hao Huang,Jing Wang,Shao-Qun Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种细粒度不确定性分类法，将LLM不确定性归因于输入、参数、token和解码过程四个层面，并对应分类现有UQ方法。通过在Qwen3、Llama 3.2、DeepSeek-V3三个模型家族上评估21种方法，发现共识类方法（Deg和EigV）表现最优，且模型规模越大不确定性越低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统不确定性分类法（如偶然与认知不确定性的二分法）难以捕捉LLM生成的多组件、多阶段特性，也无法有效评估各种UQ方法的效果，亟需更细粒度的分类体系和系统性的评估框架。

Method: 提出四层不确定性分类（输入级、参数级、token级、解码过程级），对应四类UQ方法（贝叶斯、集成、共识、单次前向）。在三个LLM家族上对21种UQ方法进行系统评估，涵盖多种生成设置和指标。

Result: (i) UQ方法有效性对任务类型和生成设置敏感；(ii) 共识类方法（Deg和EigV）一致优于其他方法；(iii) 模型规模越大，不确定性估计越低，呈现经验性标度律。

Conclusion: 本工作弥合了理论起源与实际部署之间的鸿沟，为系统量化LLM应用中的不确定性提供了多功能诊断工具。

Abstract: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled sophisticated reasoning and content generation, yet their inherent stochasticity poses significant challenges for ensuring predictive credibility. While traditional uncertainty taxonomy paradigms, such as the dichotomy of aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties, provide conceptual foundations, they often fail to capture the multi-component and multi-stage nature of LLM generation and struggle to evaluate the effectiveness of various Uncertainty Quantification (UQ) methods. In this paper, we propose a granular uncertainty taxonomy that systematically attributes LLM uncertainty into input-level, parameter-level, token-level, and decoding-process sources. Correspondingly, we categorize existing UQ methods into Bayesian, ensemble, consensus-based, and single-pass approaches. Furthermore, we introduce a comprehensive evaluation framework covering diverse generation settings and metrics. We empirically evaluate 21 typical UQ methods across three prominent LLM families, including Qwen3, Llama 3.2, and DeepSeek-V3, on benchmarks such as TriviaQA, GSM8K, and HumanEval. Our experimental results demonstrate that (i) the effectiveness of UQ methods is sensitive to task types and generation settings; (ii) consensus-based methods, typed Deg and EigV, consistently outperform other UQ approaches; and (iii) larger model scales correlate with lower uncertainty estimates, suggesting an empirical scaling law for LLM uncertainty. This work bridges the gap between theoretical origins and practical deployment, providing a versatile diagnostic tool for systematically quantifying uncertainty in LLM applications.

</details>


### [701] [A Formula-Driven Survey and Research Agenda for On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22793)
*Bowen Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文将以"反馈到更新"的视角系统梳理On-policy Distillation (OPD)方法，提出基于直接分布损失和策略梯度式对数比率更新的双重分类体系，并区分了时间信用分配与词汇级概率路由两个常被混淆的机制，最终提出GAE-OPD和CR-OPD等新假设与方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究往往将OPD视为单一损失函数家族，缺乏统一的理论框架来理解其核心机制与失败模式。作者旨在从更本质的"反馈到更新"视角重新审视OPD，揭示其有效性的关键影响因素，并澄清被混淆的机制。

Method: 提出基于两条路径的公式驱动分类法：1) 直接分布损失；2) 策略梯度风格的对数比率更新。在此基础上区分时间信用分配（跨时间步的加权）与词汇级概率路由（负反馈下概率质量如何重新分配）两个机制，并据此推导出GAE-OPD和CR-OPD等新方法。

Result: 揭示了OPD有效性依赖于状态兼容性、支持构造、时间信用、词汇级概率路由、门控权重和正则化等多维因素；明确了不同估计器（即时、return-to-go、折扣、基线校正）的偏差边界；提出GAE-OPD用于值基假设下的对数比率回报，CR-OPD用于将概率质量路由到教师支持且学生可达的替代方案。

Conclusion: 提供了可操作的诊断工具、失败机制、案例研究、开放问题以及报告清单，映射到相同的反馈到更新变量上，为未来OPD研究建立了系统化的分析框架。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains an LLM on states induced by the current or recent student policy: the student generates complete or partial rollouts, a teacher or self-teacher scores the resulting tokens under their generated contexts, and dense log-probability, logit, or distributional signals are converted into post-training updates. This survey studies OPD as a feedback-to-update problem rather than a single loss family. We develop a formula-driven taxonomy from two routes -- direct distributional losses and policy-gradient-style log-ratio updates -- and use it to organize core methods, verifier- or outcome-guided hybrids, industrial reports, framework implementations, failure modes, and stabilization recipes under explicit evidence boundaries. The taxonomy shows that OPD effectiveness depends not only on KL direction or teacher access, but also on state compatibility, support construction, temporal credit, vocabulary-level probability routing, gates and weights, and regularization. We further separate two mechanisms often conflated in sampled-token OPD stability discussions. Temporal credit asks how teacher-student log-ratio returns should weight sampled actions across a rollout; vocabulary routing asks where probability mass should move when negative feedback suppresses a sampled token. This distinction yields bias boundaries for immediate, return-to-go, discounted, and baseline-corrected estimators, motivates GAE-OPD as a value-based hypothesis for log-ratio returns, and motivates Counterfactual Routed OPD (CR-OPD) for routing probability mass toward teacher-supported, student-reachable alternatives. We close by mapping actionability diagnostics, failure mechanisms, case studies, open problems, and a reporting checklist onto the same feedback-to-update variables.

</details>


### [702] [AI-Assisted Help-Seeking Trajectories in Programming Education from an SRL-Informed Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22809)
*Boxuan Ma,Huiyong Li,Gen Li,Li Chen,Atsushi Shimada,Shin'ichi Konomi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究通过分析71名学生在编程任务中的1,290条AI求助提示和17,190次代码提交，发现学生主要使用AI进行反应性故障排除而非主动的自我调节解决问题；虽然求助轨迹模式与任务分数无显著关联，但与代码提交次数密切相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于AI工具的准确性、可用性或使用频率，忽略了学生与AI交互过程中的求助轨迹如何展开，尤其缺乏从自我调节学习（SRL）视角对AI辅助求助过程的分析。

Method: 采用SRL-informed分析框架，将提示级别的求助行为编码为概念、实现、调试和反思四种类型；分析了71名初学Python学生的1,290条任务特定提示及17,190次代码提交，考察求助交互在轮次和尝试中的结构模式及其与任务分数和提交次数的关系。

Result: 学生多使用AI进行反应性调试而非计划性自我调节解决问题；求助轨迹模式与任务分数无显著差异，但在代码提交次数上存在显著差异。

Conclusion: AI支持的 educational significance 不仅在于学生是否使用AI，更在于他们在编程解决问题过程中求助轨迹如何展开。

Abstract: Generative AI tools provide novice programmers with instant, personalized support, but also raise concerns about whether AI use supports or bypasses students' regulation of problem-solving. Existing work has largely focused on correctness, usability, or overall usage frequency, with less attention to how student--AI help-seeking unfolds. This study addresses this gap by analyzing AI-assisted help-seeking trajectories in university-level programming. Using an SRL-informed analytical framework that links prompt-level help-seeking codes to conceptual, implementation, debugging, and reflective forms of support, we analyzed 1,290 task-specific student prompts linked to 17,190 code submissions from 71 students in introductory Python programming courses. Specifically, we examined how help-seeking interactions were structured across turns and attempts, and how trajectory patterns related to task scores and the number of code submissions. Results indicate that many students primarily used AI for reactive troubleshooting rather than for planned, self-regulated problem-solving. Although trajectory patterns were not associated with significant differences in task scores, they differed substantially in the number of code submissions required. These findings suggest that the educational significance of AI support lies not only in whether students use AI, but in how their help-seeking trajectories develop during programming problem-solving.

</details>


### [703] [Active Inference as the Test-Time Scaling Law for Physical AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22813)
*Omar Hashash,Christo Kurisummoottil Thomas,Walid Saad,Merouane Debbah,Karl Friston,Adeel Razi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向物理AI智能体的测试时缩放定律，基于主动推理原理，通过贝叶斯推理动态更新策略以应对训练分布外的未知场景，在自动驾驶任务上实现了超过36%的推理效率提升和鲁棒泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有缩放定律受限于模型大小和训练数据量，无法让物理AI智能体在面对训练分布外（OOD）的非平稳环境时实现有效泛化。本文旨在提出一种在测试时利用世界模型进行推理的缩放机制，让智能体具备在真实世界中生存和适应未知场景的能力。

Method: 基于主动推理的第一性原理，将策略更新建模为软贝叶斯推理过程：用减少期望预测误差作为似然函数更新策略信念，得到后验策略；利用变分推理最小化自由能边界求解该解析难解问题；测试时动态更新策略与世界模型，实现超越训练数据的持续学习。

Result: 在自动驾驶任务上，该方法优于无模型Q学习和基于模型的贝叶斯强化学习，能稳健泛化到未知场景，同时推理效率提升超过36%。

Conclusion: 该测试时缩放定律突破了传统缩放定律对模型规模和训练数据的依赖，使物理AI能通过持续的真实世界经验进行扩展，具有生物可解释性（基底节和前额叶皮层机制），为具身智能的在线适应提供了新范式。

Abstract: In this paper, a novel test-time scaling law for physical artificial intelligence (AI) agents is introduced. This scaling law enables physical AI agents to reason with their world models to generalize in unforeseen scenarios at test time. The derived scaling law is grounded in the first principle of active inference, which equips agents with the general objective to survive in the real world, under which their specific task objectives are subsumed. Active inference achieves this by providing the reasoning to resolve prediction errors that arise when the agent encounters unforeseen situations outside its training distribution, enabling generalization in non-stationary environments. The proposed scaling law captures this by dynamically updating the agent's policy with this reasoning at test time. This policy update is modeled as a soft Bayesian inference process in which beliefs about the policy are updated using the reasoning that reduces expected prediction errors under allowable policies as a likelihood. The resulting posterior policy admits a biological interpretation, recovering the scaling mechanism that engages the brain's basal ganglia and prefrontal cortex at test time. To solve this analytically intractable problem, a variational inference solution minimizing free energy bounds is developed. This solution extends to enable learning beyond training by reinforcing new instances, resolved at test time, in both the policy and world model. Unlike existing scaling laws constrained by model size and training data, the derived solution scales with the continuous real-world experience of a physical AI agent. Simulation results on an autonomous driving task demonstrate that the proposed solution outperforms model-free Q-learning and model-based Bayesian reinforcement learning, achieving robust generalization to unforeseen scenarios while improving inference efficiency by over 36%.

</details>


### [704] [MINCE: Shrinking LLM Evaluation Datasets via Few-Model Monte Carlo Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22826)
*Devleena Das,Rajeev Patwari,Vikram Kumar Bukka,Nithin Kumar Guggilla,Elliott Delaye,Ashish Sirasao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MINCE是一种基于蒙特卡洛模拟的基准测试子集选择方法，无需预测层即可最小化子集大小，在保持精度漂移可控的前提下显著降低LLM评估成本，在多个基准上实现54-89%的缩减，并带来1.7-8.1倍的加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在边缘硬件（如NPU）上反复运行大型基准测试评估不同变体的LLM（量化、微调等）耗时巨大（每个模型需数十小时）。现有子集选择方法依赖大型校准池或学习预测层，成本高且不灵活。

Method: 利用少量校准模型的逐项日志进行蒙特卡洛模拟，找到能限制精度漂移的最小子集大小，然后固定一个随机采样的子集。不需要任何预测层或额外学习模块。

Result: IFEVAL缩减54%，MMLU缩减89%，GSM8K缩减70%，BF16模型最大漂移≤2.62pp，NPU模型平均漂移0.77-3.59pp。GPU加速2.7-8.1倍，NPU加速1.7-2.0倍。相比tinyBenchmarks，MMLU漂移低12倍，GSM8K低3.3倍，且使用的校准模型少57倍。

Conclusion: MINCE提供了一种轻量级、无需学习的高效子集选择方法，对校准池大小鲁棒，在多种硬件和模型变体上都能大幅降低评估成本且保持精度。

Abstract: Evaluating LLMs across many model variants -- quantized, fine-tuned, or deployment-specific -- requires running large benchmarks repeatedly, a process that can take tens of hours per model on edge hardware such as NPUs. Existing subset selection methods reduce this cost but depend on large calibration pools or learned prediction layers. We introduce MINCE (Monte Carlo Informed N-sizing for Compact Evaluation), which uses Monte Carlo simulation over per-item logs from a small set of calibration models to find the minimum subset size that bounds accuracy drift and then fixes a randomly sampled subset at that size, with no prediction layer needed. MINCE reduces IFEVAL by 54\%, MMLU by 89\%, and GSM8K by 70\% with maximum drift $\leq$2.62\,pp on BF16 models and mean drift of 0.77--3.59\,pp on held-out NPU models, while delivering median GPU evaluation speedups of 2.7--8.1$\times$ and NPU evaluation speedups of 1.7--2.0$\times$. The method is robust to calibration pool size and achieves lower drift than tinyBenchmarks (12$\times$ lower on MMLU, 3.3$\times$ on GSM8K) while using 57$\times$ fewer calibration models.

</details>


### [705] [Finding the Evidence: Discovering Decision-Supporting Tokens for On-Policy Reasoning Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22830)
*Jinwei Xiao,Zhuowen Han,Yueqing Sun,Zhengxi Lu,Yuxin Liu,Zhiyuan Yao,Wentao Chen,Qi Gu,Xunliang Cai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现推理链中的知识分为"决策"（分支点）和"证据"（决策依据），现有方法只能迁移决策而忽视证据。作者提出DEAR方法，通过学生熵识别决策、隐藏状态余弦相似度发现证据，并用师生差异优先填补最大知识缺口，在数学和代码任务上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有on-policy distillation方法仅能捕捉推理链中的"决策"（分支点），而"证据"（支撑决策的中间步骤）这类蕴含实质性知识的信息未被有效迁移，导致学生模型无法获得完整的推理能力。

Method: 提出DEAR方法：1) 通过学生熵值识别决策位置；2) 利用隐藏状态与决策锚点的余弦相似度发现支撑证据；3) 结合师生差异权重优先关注知识缺口最大的位置，从而同时迁移决策和证据两种知识。

Result: 在数学和代码生成的多个师生配置下，DEAR一致优于标准OPD方法，竞赛数学提升+2.5pp，代码生成提升+5.7pp。

Conclusion: 推理链中的知识具有异质性（决策与证据），需要不同的发现机制才能充分迁移；关注被忽视的"证据"知识是提升蒸馏效果的关键。

Abstract: On-policy distillation transfers reasoning ability through dense token-level supervision, yet the nature of the transferable signal remains unclear. We discover that reasoning chains contain two types of knowledge that require different discovery mechanisms: decisions (where to branch), which surface through student uncertainty, and evidence (intermediate steps that justify decisions), which hides in positions where the student is confident yet wrong. Current methods capture only decisions; the substantive knowledge in evidence tokens remains untransferred. We propose DEAR(Decision-Evidence Aware Reasoning Distillation), which first identifies decisions via student entropy, then discovers their supporting evidence through hidden-state cosine similarity to decision anchors, boosted by teacher-student divergence to prioritize the largest knowledge gaps. Across three student-teacher configurations on math and code benchmarks, DEAR consistently outperforms standard OPD, with up to +2.5pp on competition math and +5.7pp on code generation.

</details>


### [706] [RaMem: Contextual Reinstatement for Long-term Agentic Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22844)
*Wei Yang,Bryce Kan,Shixuan Li,Li Li,Yuehan Qin,Jiate Li,Paul Bogdan,Jesse Thomason*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出RaMem框架，通过上下文重建来解决LLM代理长期记忆中的"上下文坍塌"问题（即记忆片段因脱离原始场景而无法判断其证据有效性），在四个阶段（证据锚定、召回条件归纳、有效性感知检索、上下文保留合成）中保持记忆的情境可验证性，在多个基准上平均F1提升超10%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长期记忆系统注重记忆的持久性、压缩性和可检索性，但仅靠检索无法确保记忆为当前查询提供有效证据。当经历被压缩成可复用的片段后，来自不同情境的记忆可能因涉及相同实体或用户状态而显得同样相关，导致"上下文坍塌"——记忆失去了判断其是否为当前查询提供有效证据所需的周围情境。

Method: RaMem框架包含四个协调阶段：(i) 证据锚定——将每条记忆锚定到原始事件条件（事件时间、提及时间、会话跨度、参与者）；(ii) 召回条件归纳——从查询中推导隐含的证据条件；(iii) 有效性感知检索——优先选择上下文兼容的记忆，同时保留内容相关候选作为后备证据；(iv) 上下文保留合成——将选定记忆的结构化上下文保留给生成器。

Result: 在长期记忆基准上，RaMem在多个骨干模型上相比强基线方法一致提升性能，平均F1提升超过10%。

Conclusion: RaMem通过情境重建有效解决了长期记忆系统中的上下文坍塌问题，验证了在记忆检索中保持情境可验证性对LLM代理长期交互的重要性。

Abstract: Long-term memory has become increasingly important for LLM agents that operate across extended interactions and evolving task contexts. Recent memory systems have made past experiences more persistent, compact, and retrievable, but retrieval alone does not ensure that a memory provides valid evidence for the current query. When experiences are compressed into reusable fragments, memories from different situations may appear equally relevant if they involve recurring entities or user states. We refer to this failure as context collapse: memories lose the surrounding context needed to judge whether they provide valid evidence for the current query. To address this problem, we propose Contextual Reinstatement for Agentic Memory (RaMem), a framework that turns retrieved memory fragments into contextually verifiable evidence. RaMem operates through four coordinated stages: (i) evidence anchoring grounds each memory in its original episodic conditions, especially event time, mention time, session span, and participants; (ii) recall condition induction derives the evidence conditions implied by the query; (iii) validity-aware retrieval uses these conditions to prioritize context-compatible memories while retaining content-relevant candidates as fallback evidence; and (iv) context-preserved synthesis keeps the selected memories' structured context available to the generator. Experiments on long-term memory benchmarks show that RaMem consistently improves performance over strong memory baselines, with average F1 gains of more than 10% across several backbones.

</details>


### [707] [AI Scientists as Engines of Discovery: A Case for Development within Reformed Institutions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22859)
*Raul Jimenez,Boris Bolliet,Francisco Villaescusa-Navarro,Rabih Zbib,Benjamin Wandelt,David N. Spergel,Thomas Meier,Jessica Montgomery,Hana Aliee,Licia Verde*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文论证AI正从被动工具转变为主动的“AI科学家”，能够自主执行科学发现中的多项任务，并提出需重新设计科研生态系统以适应这一质变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI系统已开始辅助科学发现，但这种转变是质变而非量变，现有科研体系尚未准备好应对AI作为自主知识生产者的角色，亟需重新审视机制设计。

Method: 通过分析多智能体架构（以原型框架Denario为例）如何加速发现周期、遍历超越人类可达的模型空间，并讨论其对 authorship、同行评审及人类科学家角色的影响。

Result: 提出多智能体系统可能进化为“AI科学家”，具备假设生成与验证能力，但需要重新设计可验证性、可问责性、可解释性和双重用途安全等机制。

Conclusion: 建议将AI视为“认知行动者”（epistemic actor）而非单纯工具来治理，以适应其作为科学发现主体的新角色。

Abstract: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) systems are beginning to assist, accelerate, and partially automate scientific discovery, performing tasks that span literature synthesis, code generation, data analysis, hypothesis proposal, and model criticism. We argue that this transition is qualitative rather than incremental, and that suitably designed multi-agent systems may evolve from passive computational tools into ``AI scientists'' that can expand the hypothesis-generating and verification capacity of science. Such systems must be developed and deployed within a scientific ecosystem fit for purpose: institutions must be redesigned for verification, accountability, interpretability, and dual-use safety. We sketch how multi-agent architectures, illustrated by the prototype framework \textit{Denario}, accelerate the discovery cycle and traverse model spaces beyond human reach; examine what this implies for authorship, peer review, and the enduring role of human scientists; and close with recommendations for governing AI as an epistemic actor rather than a mere instrument.

</details>


### [708] [CLI-Universe: Towards Verifiable Task Synthesis Engine for Terminal Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22883)
*Zhanbo Hua,Yifan Yao,Weihao Xie,Yongchi Zhao,Minghao Liu,Ruizhi Qiu,Zhewei Huang,Zun Wang,Yiyan Ji,Yunhai Ye,Letian Zhu,Xinping Lei,Han Li,Zhiyuan Ma,Zili Wang,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Jiaheng Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出 CLI-Universe，一种原则性的终端代理任务合成引擎，通过多维能力分类学采样、证据引导的深度研究和多阶段可执行验证流水线生成高质量训练数据。基于此构建的 CLI-Universe-6K 数据集（6,000条轨迹）微调 Qwen3-32B 后在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 上达到 33.4%，刷新了 32B 以下开源模型的 SOTA，并超越多个规模大一个数量级的模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM终端代理训练数据稀缺，合成数据方法常通过表面改造生成低质量任务（指令模糊、执行路径浅、测试脆弱），导致学习信号弱。亟需一种能系统生成高质量、可验证、有挑战性训练数据的方法。

Method: 1) 多维能力分类学采样生成候选任务（领域、技能类型、能力、工程支柱）；2) 证据引导的深度研究（基于真实技术资料）；3) 多阶段可执行验证流水线（含rubric-gated测试构建、hint条件过滤、严格fail-to-pass检查）。全程约2/3候选被淘汰。

Result: 构建 CLI-Universe-6K 数据集（6,000条轨迹）。微调 Qwen3-32B 后在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 上达 33.4%，超越32B以下开源模型，并优于多个大10倍参数的模型。

Conclusion: 结构化、高保真度的合成数据可以带来显著的数效率（data efficiency），证明了"少而精"的合成策略优于"多而滥"的粗放扩展。

Abstract: While recent LLM-based terminal agents have demonstrated promising capabilities, the scarcity of high-quality, executable training data remains a critical bottleneck. Existing synthesis pipelines typically scale by retrofitting surface-level artifacts into tasks, frequently yielding ambiguous instructions, shallow execution paths, and brittle tests that provide weak learning signals. To overcome this, we introduce CLI-Universe, a principled synthesis engine that constructs terminal-agent tasks. CLI-Universe generates candidate tasks by sampling combinations across a multi-dimensional capability taxonomy (domain, skill type, capability, and engineering pillar), then grounds each candidate through evidence-guided deep research over real-world technical materials. To ensure rigorous supervision, validated blueprints are instantiated into Dockerized environments and subjected to a multi-stage executable verification pipeline featuring rubric-gated test construction, hint-conditional filtering, and strict fail-to-pass checking. Across the full pipeline, from candidate generation to verification, approximately two-thirds of candidates are discarded, retaining only those that are genuine, verifiable, and non-trivially challenging. To validate our framework, we instantiate a highly distilled dataset of 6,000 trajectories called CLI-Universe-6K. Remarkably, fine-tuning Qwen3-32B on CLI-Universe-6K achieves 33.4% on Terminal-Bench 2.0. This sets a new state-of-the-art for models trained on open-source data at or below 32B parameters, and outperforms several models an order of magnitude larger, demonstrating the profound data efficiency of structured, high-fidelity synthesis.

</details>


### [709] [Agent-as-a-Router: Agentic Model Routing for Coding Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22902)
*Pengfei Zhou,Zhiwei Tang,Yixing Ma,Jiasheng Tang,Yizeng Han,Zhenglin Wan,Fanqing Meng,Wei Wang,Bohan Zhuang,Wangbo Zhao,Yang You*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出 Agent-as-a-Router 框架，通过 C-A-F 循环（上下文→行动→反馈→上下文）在部署中积累经验，解决多 LLM 路由中的信息不足问题。ACRouter 实现该框架，在 CodeRouterBench 上取得最低累积遗憾，并泛化到分布外任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有路由方法将任务路由视为静态分类问题，存在信息不足的性能瓶颈。简单增强路由器的任务维度统计信息即可获得 15.3% 的相对提升，说明信息缺口是核心问题。

Method: 提出 Agent-as-a-Router 框架，将路由形式化为 C-A-F（上下文→行动→反馈→上下文）循环，包含 Orchestrator、Verifier、Memory 三个模块。同时构建 CodeRouterBench 评估环境，包含约 1 万个任务实例和 8 个前沿 LLM 的验证分数，支持基于遗憾的流式路由比较。

Result: ACRouter 在分布内任务上取得最低累积遗憾，并能泛化到分布外的代理编程任务，证明路由框架能主动缩小信息差距。

Conclusion: 通过部署中积累经验来动态优化路由决策是解决多 LLM 路由问题的有效方向，ACRouter 验证了主动缩小信息缺口的可行性。

Abstract: Real-world users typically have access to multiple Large Language Models (LLMs) from different providers, and these LLMs often excel at distinct domains, yet none dominate all. Consequently, routing each task to the most suitable model becomes critical for both performance and cost. Existing routers treat this as a static, one-off classification problem. However, we identify the performance bottleneck for these routers as information deficit: simply augmenting a vanilla LLM router with performance statistics at the task-dimension level yields a 15.3% relative gain, surpassing a heuristic router built on the same dimension-level priors. Motivated by this finding, we propose Agent-as-a-Router, a framework that formalizes routing as a C-A-F loop (Context->Action->Feedback->Context). It closes the information gap by accumulating execution-grounded experience during deployment. We instantiate this framework as ACRouter, composed of an Orchestrator, a Verifier, a Memory module, and introduce CodeRouterBench, an evaluation environment comprising ~10K task instances with verified scores from 8 frontier LLMs, enabling regret-based router comparison on streaming tasks. Experiments show that ACRouter achieves the lowest cumulative regret on in-distribution tasks and generalizes to out-of-distribution agentic-programming tasks, demonstrating that our routing framework actively closes the information gap. Codes and benchmarks are released at https://github.com/LanceZPF/agent-as-a-router.

</details>


### [710] [Intent-Governed Tool Authorization for AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22916)
*Genliang Zhu,Chu Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出意图驱动的访问控制（IGAC），在AI代理使用外部工具时，将用户表达意图作为可审计的策略属性，通过意图证书、会话级策略收紧等机制，确保工具调用不仅凭静态凭证合法，更符合用户当前请求的真实意图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有授权机制只检查凭证/令牌能否调用工具，但静态授权无法区分用户当前请求的真实意图，例如读导出权限的凭证不应在用户仅要求摘要时执行导出，模型生成的删除调用也不应仅因集成有删除范围就执行。

Method: 提出IGAC框架，引入意图证书、会话级策略收紧、意图感知清单过滤、意图-工具-负载一致性检查等机制，核心不变量是用户意图只能缩减静态集成策略授予的权限，不能扩展范围。

Result: 将IGAC映射到OpenPort现有治理基础设施上，充分利用其授权依赖发现、作用域和ABAC策略检查、草稿优先写入、预检影响绑定、状态见证检查、幂等性、稳定原因码和审计能力。

Conclusion: IGAC作为服务端授权层，通过将意图作为单调、可审计的策略属性，解决了AI代理工具调用中静态授权与用户真实意图不匹配的问题，提供了更细粒度的安全保障。

Abstract: AI agents increasingly act through external tools: they read private data, construct structured payloads, submit write requests, export records, and coordinate workflows across application boundaries. Existing authorization mechanisms usually ask whether an integration credential, app, or token can call a tool. That question is necessary but incomplete. A tool call can be authorized by static credentials and still be unjustified by the user's current request. For example, a credential that can read and export records should not expose export authority when the user only asked for a bounded summary, and a model-generated delete call should not execute merely because the integration has a delete scope. This paper proposes Intent-Governed Access Control (IGAC), a server-side authorization layer that treats the user's expressed intent as a monotone, auditable policy attribute for AI-agent tool use.
