Drawing on a qualitative multi-case study of fifteen executives (n = 15) spanning three retail organizations, the study identifies technological constraints (legacy systems and lack of IT infrastructure), organizational barriers (limited analytic capability and cultural resistance), and environmental factors (regulatory uncertainty and socioeconomic inequality) as significant impediments to analytics adoption. Despite these challenges, findings reveal that phased analytics implementation, executive sponsorship, and alignment with core retail operations facilitate successful integration. The study provides a specialized framework for analytics diffusion in constrained environments and recommends strategies for policy and practice that align with the realities of developing economies.

</details>


### [747] [From Punishment to Protection: Charting Six Decades of U.S. Juvenile Justice Through Topic Modeling and LLM-Assisted Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20597)
*Nia E. George,Simeon Sayer*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文使用主题建模和LLM辅助趋势分析，对1970-2025年间60,470份美国青少年司法上诉意见书进行大规模分析，揭示了儿童福利案件激增、性犯罪者登记案件翻倍、传统惩罚机制衰退等显著趋势，并指出法律词汇随年代漂移、司法管辖区碎片化等挑战，警示AI决策支持工具在该领域应用时面临的时间错配、词汇漂移等风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 青少年法院同时处理两类截然不同的案件（青少年犯罪案件和家庭中受威胁儿童案件），近五十年来这两类案件都发生了巨大变化。作者试图探究这些变化的具体内容，以及计算方法能否大规模追踪这些变化。

Method: 对60,470份美国上诉法院意见书（1970-2025年）应用主题建模（Topic Modeling）和LLM辅助趋势分析，识别出182个不同的法律主题，组织为10个主题类别，覆盖青少年司法诉讼的全范围。

Result: 儿童福利案件占比增长三倍；性犯罪者登记案件翻倍以上；传统的惩罚机制（移送成人法庭、青少年死刑）显著下降；2010年后出现新量刑案例群组（受最高法院标志性判决影响）；法律词汇每十年发生显著漂移；增长最快的领域碎裂为数十个司法管辖区特定变体。

Conclusion: 大规模、可复制的上诉判例法分析（包括定量趋势和判理演变）是可行且实用的；但AI决策支持工具在青少年司法领域应用时面临四个关键风险：时间错配、词汇漂移、司法管辖区碎片化，以及少年犯罪与儿童福利两个法律系统的分流。应对这些风险是该领域AI工具的基本要求。

Abstract: Juvenile courts handle two very different kinds of cases: young people accused of crimes, and children at risk in their own families, and both streams have been changing dramatically over the past fifty years. This paper asks: what has shifted, and can computational methods track that change at scale?
  Topic modeling and LLM-assisted trend analysis is applied to 60,470 U.S. appellate opinions spanning 1970 to 2025, identifying 182 distinct legal topics organized into 10 themes covering the full range of juvenile justice litigation. The results are striking. Child welfare litigation tripled its share of the corpus. Sex offender registration cases more than doubled. Traditional punitive mechanisms, judicial transfer to adult court and the juvenile death penalty, declined sharply. A new cluster of sentencing cases emerged after 2010, reflecting landmark Supreme Court rulings that fundamentally redrew the constitutional limits on juvenile punishment.
  Analysis also shows that legal vocabulary shifts decade by decade: the language courts used in the 1970s can be unrecognisable by the 2020s, even for the same underlying legal question. The fastest-growing area of the corpus has fractured into dozens of jurisdiction-specific variants that no single topic can capture. In both cases, case counts alone would miss the full arc of doctrinal change.
  This paper demonstrates that large-scale, reproducible analysis of appellate case law, quantitative trends and doctrinal arcs alike, is possible and practically useful. It also reveals critical risks that any AI-based decision support tool used in juvenile justice and trained on such corpus will encounter: temporal mismatch, vocabulary drift, jurisdictional fragmentation, and the divergence of delinquency and child welfare into two parallel legal systems. Addressing these risks must be a fundamental requirement for any tool used in this domain.

</details>


### [748] [A Survey of Large Language Models for Perception and Measurement of Human Psychology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20603)
*Yudong Li,Xiaoyi Chen,Jiawei Cai,Zehao Zhong,Haoyang Yang,Huajin Tang,Linlin Shen*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文系统综述了大语言模型（LLMs）作为人类心理测量工具的研究，提出了包含理论合理性、测量方法和应用效果三个维度的分析框架，并探讨了其在人格评估、心理健康等领域的实际效果与局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLMs在心理学领域的应用日益增多，一个核心问题浮现：LLMs是否能够准确感知和测量人类复杂的潜在心理结构（如人格、情绪、认知状态）。然而，现有综述多关注LLMs的一般应用或LLMs自身的"心理"，缺乏以心理测量学视角审视LLMs作为测量工具的系统性研究。

Method: 提出了一个三维分析框架：1）理论合理性（为何测量可能成立）——从心理测量学视角探讨LLMs涌现认知属性；2）测量方法（如何测量）——将现有范式分为主动对话评估、被动自然语言分析和多模态融合三类；3）应用效果（已测量什么）——综述人格特质评估和心理健康评估等核心领域的实践效果与局限。

Result: 系统梳理了LLMs在心理测量领域的理论基础、方法论分类和应用现状，明确了各类测量范式的特点和适用范围。

Conclusion: 本文区别于以往综述，聚焦于LLMs作为测量工具的心理测量学属性，为后续研究提供了系统性分析框架，有助于推动该方向的规范化发展。

Abstract: Against the backdrop of the rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), their application in the field of psychology has garnered significant academic attention. A central issue is whether LLMs possess the capability to accurately perceive and measure complex, latent human psychological constructs, such as personality, emotions, and cognitive states. This paper provides a systematic review focused on the use of LLMs as instruments for human psychological measurement. To organize this domain, we propose a comprehensive analytical framework structured around three critical dimensions: Theoretical Plausibility (why measurement might be possible), Measurement Methodology (how to measure), and Application Effectiveness (what has been measured). We first explore the theoretical foundations supporting LLM-based measurement, examining the debate on their emergent cognitive properties from a psychometric perspective. Next, we systematically analyze existing measurement paradigms, categorizing them into active conversational assessment, passive natural language analysis, and multimodal fusion. Subsequently, we review the practical effectiveness and limitations of LLMs in core application areas, including personality trait assessment and mental health evaluation. Distinct from prior reviews focusing on general applications or the ``psychology'' of LLMs themselves, this paper centers on the psychometric properties of LLMs as measurement tools.

</details>


### [749] [Using machine learning to build public policy agenda from social media conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20604)
*Rahman Sanya*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种人类增强的机器学习方法，用于从社交媒体（Twitter）对话中识别公共政策议题和设定议程，结合LDA、Top2Vec进行主题建模，使用GPT-2生成叙事，并通过相似度分析和人工评估进行验证，取得了良好的评分者间一致性和余弦相似度结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的公共政策议题识别和议程设定方法在数据收集和分析上耗时耗力，且难以大规模扩展。为解决这一问题，作者希望利用社交媒体数据并结合机器学习方法，高效、低成本地识别公众关注议题。

Method: 提出五阶段人类增强机器学习方法：1) 输入数据清洗和预处理；2) 关键词提取与议题识别（使用LDA和Top2Vec进行主题建模）；3) 叙事生成（使用GPT-2进行自然语言生成）；4) 叙事验证（基于相似度分析）；5) 议程验证（基于人工评估）。

Result: GPT-2生成的议程叙事在可读性和连贯性上达到"非常好"和"好"的评分者间一致性；生成的议程项目IRA为"好"；在五个参考文本主题中至少有三个获得高于平均的余弦相似度分数。

Conclusion: 该机器学习方法是从社交媒体对话中识别公众利益议题的可行且有效的方法论。

Abstract: Issue identification and agenda setting represents an important stage in the public policy making process. Traditional approaches for carrying out activities under this stage are time- and labor-intensive on data collection and analysis, in addition to being costly to scale over large geographic areas. In this work we propose a human-augmented machine learning (ML) approach for identifying matters of public interest from social media conversations. The approach consists of five stages namely, input data cleaning and preprocessing, keywords extraction and issue identification, narrative creation, narrative validation, and agenda validation. We implemented experiments to validate the output of our method based on a Twitter dataset and using Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) and Top2Vec for topic modeling. Natural Language Generation (NLG) was achieved using GPT-2 while narrative and agenda validation were based on similarity analysis and human evaluation. We achieved "very good" and "good" inter-rater agreement (IRA) on readability and coherence of agenda narrative generation by our GPT-2 model. On the other hand, IRA was "good" for generated agenda items. We also achieved above average cosine similarity score on at least three out of five reference text (narrative) themes. These results demonstrate that the ML approach represents a promising methodology for identifying issues of public interest from social media conversations.

</details>


### [750] [Trust in Generative AI for Health Information Consumption and the Effect of Learned Dependency: An Experimental Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20605)
*Arif Ahmed,Gondy Leroy,Agrim Sachdeva,Philip Harber,Stephen A. Rains,Seokjun Youn,Prosanta Barai*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本研究通过实验发现，对生成式AI的依赖会削弱用户对AI健康信息的信任校准能力，使其更容易相信错误信息，而视觉注意力提示未能有效减少这种过度信任。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI越来越多地用于健康信息提供，但其不准确输出引发了对信任校准和过度依赖的担忧。

Method: 采用2×2随机实验设计（N=338），操纵信息准确性和视觉注意力提示，通过问卷测量信任与依赖，使用线性回归分析主效应和交互效应。

Result: 信息准确性正向影响信任；习得性依赖与信任正相关；准确性与依赖的交互显著，表明高依赖用户的信任校准较弱；视觉注意力提示无显著影响。

Conclusion: 习得性依赖会削弱信任校准，增加对错误AI健康信息的易感性。

Abstract: Generative artificial intelligence is increasingly used for health information, but inaccurate outputs raise concerns about trust calibration and overreliance. This study examines whether learned dependency on generative artificial intelligence affects trust in AI-generated health information and whether visual attention cues reduce overtrust in incorrect outputs. We conducted a randomized 2 by 2 experiment with 338 participants, manipulating information accuracy and visual attention cues. Trust and dependency were measured using survey scales, and linear regression models tested main and interaction effects. Information accuracy increased trust, and learned dependency was positively associated with trust. The interaction between accuracy and dependency was significant, indicating weaker trust calibration among highly dependent users. Visual attention cues did not significantly affect trust or moderate the effect of dependency. The findings suggest that learned dependency weakens trust calibration and increases susceptibility to incorrect AI-generated health information.

</details>


### [751] [CourseBlueprint: A Structured Pipeline for Adaptive Pedagogical Video Generation Grounded in Course Corpora](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20608)
*Md Zabirul Islam,Md Motaleb Hossen Manik,Ge Wang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: CourseBlueprint提出了一种基于课程蓝图的自适应教学视频生成管线，通过结构化教学蓝图（含前置知识图、适应控制器、参与度生成器和幻灯片覆盖机制）替代即兴提示链，在生物医学影像课程上显著提升了教学视频的参与度、适应性和可读性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本生成视频系统能生成视觉流畅的教育片段，但很少编码有效的教学内容知识（PCK），包括前置知识感知的顺序安排、学习者自适应深度和持续认知参与。作者旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 提出CourseBlueprint管线，包含：(1) 脚手架模块：构建带有阶段标签的前置知识概念图并确定性去环；(2) 自适应控制器：为每个概念分配风格规范；(3) 参与度生成器：按hook→retrieval→core→analogy→forward的固定契约生成旁白；(4) 确定性幻灯片图像覆盖：高置信度时复用讲师幻灯片。整个管线通过类型化中间表示和验证机制，单次前向传递生成结构化教学蓝图。

Result: 在五主题消融实验中，移除参与度契约后参与度评分从5.00降至1.20，自适应评分从4.80降至3.40，Flesch可读性从38.0降至19.8，类比和检索提示计数几乎归零。幻灯片图像覆盖将语料库接地失败率从0/9提升至9/10。

Conclusion: 教学视频质量更多取决于显式的、类型化的教学契约（使脚手架、适应、参与度和接地可审计），而非表面流畅度。

Abstract: Generative text-to-video systems can produce visually fluent educational clips, but they rarely encode the pedagogical content knowledge (PCK) needed for effective instruction, including prerequisite-aware sequencing, learner-adaptive depth, and sustained cognitive engagement. We present CourseBlueprint, a course-grounded pipeline for adaptive pedagogical video generation. Given a topic and learner persona, the system generates a structured teaching blueprint in a single forward pass over an undergraduate biomedical-imaging corpus (BMED 2300; twenty-three lectures, 1,116 slides). Instead of ad-hoc prompt chaining, the pipeline uses typed intermediate representations with validation: a scaffolding module builds a stage-labeled prerequisite concept graph with deterministic cycle removal, an adaptive controller assigns per-concept style specifications, and an engagement generator produces narration following a fixed hook->retrieval->core->analogy->forward contract. A deterministic slide-image override further grounds the rendered video by reusing instructor slides whenever retrieval confidence is high. We also release a reusable benchmark corpus and an evaluation harness combining repeated LLM-judge scoring with regex-grounded objective metrics. In a five-topic ablation, removing the engagement contract reduces the engagement score from 5.00 to 1.20, the adaptive score from 4.80 to 3.40, Flesch readability from 38.0 to 19.8, and analogy and retrieval-prompt counts to near zero. The slide-image override converts a 0/9 corpus-grounding failure into 9/10 successful slide matches on the same topic. These results show that pedagogical video quality depends less on surface fluency than on explicit, typed instructional contracts that make scaffolding, adaptation, engagement, and grounding auditable.

</details>


### [752] [Understanding Privacy by Formalizing It](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20609)
*Réka Markovich,Truls Pedersen,Marija Slavkovik*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文使用多模态逻辑对隐私权作为认知权利进行形式化建模，探讨不同隐私理论及其在规范性立场理论中的逻辑含义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代社会普遍认同需要保护隐私并限制AI等技术发展，但隐私概念存在多种解释，缺乏形式化规范，难以在算法层面实现隐私保护。

Method: 采用多模态逻辑，在规范性立场理论框架下，对隐私权作为认知权利的不同理论、基本原则及其含义进行形式化建模。

Result: 提供了隐私权不同解释的初始形式化框架，建立了隐私权作为认知权利的形式逻辑基础。

Conclusion: 多模态逻辑可以有效形式化隐私权的不同理论，为在算法层面实现隐私保护提供了形式化基础。

Abstract: In most of the modern societies, there is a broad consensus regarding the need for promoting privacy and thus placing restrictions on technological-including AI-developments to protect people's right to privacy. In order to meet these expectations on the algorithmic level, first we need to make the concept of privacy and the related or derived rights formally specified. However, the notion of (the right to) privacy is subject to different interpretations. In this paper, we use a multi-modal logic to provide an initial formalization of different theories, basic principles and their implications investigating the right to privacy as an epistemic right within the theory of normative positions.

</details>


### [753] [Signals in the Noise: Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) for AI Loss of Control Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20610)
*Sarah Bollinger,Nada Aboserie,Amanda Coakley,Chih-Hsuan Lee,Taysir Mathlouthi*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文应用开源情报和网络威胁情报方法，研究如何检测脱离人类控制的人工智能系统，通过文献综述和14次专家访谈，提出了两种威胁模型、一系列可观察痕迹，以及一个联邦式国际监测架构。研究发现基于OSINT的检测部分可行且值得现在建设，优先级最高的三个检测向量是：用户报告的AI行为转录收集、基础设施关联分析（检测意外外部连接或复制）、输出分析（检测能力隐藏）。文章主张建立独立于前沿AI开发商的联邦式国际监测能力，并指出持续的非行业资金是最关键的结构性干预措施。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工智能系统可能脱离人类控制，但目前缺乏有效的检测手段。本文旨在探索是否可以利用开源情报和网络威胁情报方法，建立对失控AI系统的早期检测能力，从而为人类争取应对时间。

Method: 跨学科文献综述 + 14次半结构化专家访谈（按查塔姆宫规则进行）→ 构建两种威胁模型 → 识别可观察痕迹 → 提出监测架构设计。

Result: OSINT检测AI失控部分可行且值得现在建设；三个最高优先级检测向量：①用户报告AI行为的转录收集；②基础设施关联分析（检测意外外部连接或复制）；③输出分析（检测能力隐藏）。

Conclusion: 应建立独立的联邦式国际监测架构，以OSINT方法为核心，独立于前沿AI开发商；持续的非行业资金投入是最关键的结构性干预措施。

Abstract: This paper applies open-source intelligence (OSINT) and cyber threat intelligence (CTI) methodologies to the problem of detecting AI systems operating outside human control. Drawing on a cross-disciplinary literature review and 14 semi-structured expert interviews conducted under Chatham House Rule, the paper develops two threat models, identifies a range of observable traces, and proposes an institutional architecture for monitoring. The research finds that OSINT-based detection of loss of control is partially feasible and worth building now. Three detection vectors emerge as highest priority: transcript-based collection of user-reported AI behaviour; infrastructure correlation for unexpected external connections or replication; and output analysis for capability concealment. The paper argues for a dedicated, federated international monitoring capability anchored in OSINT methods and independent of frontier AI developers, and identifies sustained non-industry funding as the highest-leverage structural intervention available.

</details>


### [754] [Estimating Learners' Skill Acquisition Without Temporal Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20611)
*Ryosuke Nagai,Kyohei Atarashi,Koh Takeuchi,Jill-Jênn Vie,Hisashi Kashima*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种仅使用快照数据（单次评估）预测学习者未来技能习得的框架，通过认知诊断模型估计的技能掌握模式，利用技能集合的包含关系构造伪时间顺序，并结合神经网络模型捕捉潜在的技能习得动态。实验表明该方法在技能空间较大时优势明显。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实教育场景中，学习数据往往是单次时间点的评估（快照数据），缺乏时间序列信息，导致现有的基于时间序列的知识追踪方法难以应用。因此，需要一种能够仅从快照数据中预测未来技能习得的方法。

Method: 1. 利用认知诊断模型（CDMs）从快照数据中估计学习者的技能掌握模式。2. 利用学习者技能集合之间的包含关系构造伪时间顺序（将技能集合的扩张视为学习进度的代理）。3. 提出一种神经网络模型，通过期望技能增量来捕捉潜在的技能习得动态，从而近似未观测到的习得路径。

Result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法一致优于基线方法，尤其在技能空间较大时展现出显著的优势。

Conclusion: 仅从快照数据中也能推断出有意义的技能习得模式，为数据受限的教育环境下的自适应学习支持提供了实用的框架。

Abstract: Recent research in educational data mining, especially knowledge tracing, has focused on predicting learners' future knowledge states to support adaptive instruction. However, in many real-world educational settings, learning data are often available only as single-time-point assessments without temporal information, making existing time-series-based approaches difficult to apply. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for predicting future skill acquisition using only snapshot data. Specifically, we address the problem of predicting the next skill to be acquired from skill mastery patterns estimated by cognitive diagnostic models (CDMs). In the absence of temporal information, we exploit inclusion relations among learners' skill sets to induce a pseudo-temporal ordering, interpreting expanding skill sets as a proxy for learning progression. To efficiently approximate unobserved acquisition paths, we introduce a neural model that captures latent skill acquisition dynamics through expected skill increments. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms baseline approaches, with particularly strong advantages as the skill space becomes larger. These results indicate that meaningful skill acquisition patterns can be inferred from snapshot data alone, providing a practical framework for adaptive learning support in data-constrained educational environments.

</details>


### [755] [Adolescence to Adulthood Online: Tracing Youth Digital Expression on Reddit Over 13 Years](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20612)
*Tyler Chang,Khushboo Patel,Afsaneh Razi,Shruti Phadke*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文对2010-2023年间Reddit上11-24岁用户的443,856篇帖子进行了描述性定量分析，通过主题建模、纵向统计分析和心理语言学测量，揭示了青少年讨论话题的变化模式，为青少年在Reddit上的参与行为提供了全面基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Reddit被广泛用于青少年和社交媒体的研究，但缺乏对青少年用户产生内容的多样性以及他们参与模式随时间变化的系统检验。

Method: 对443,856篇Reddit帖子（2010-2023年，作者自报年龄11-24岁）进行描述性定量分析，采用主题建模、纵向统计分析和心理语言学测量方法。

Result: 记录了青少年话语中稳定的主题和极端的变化，揭示了不同年龄组随时间变化的发帖模式差异。

Conclusion: 为纵向刻画青少年在Reddit上的参与行为提供了全面基准，表明青少年早期采用社交媒体进行自我披露，且其话语变化可能反映更广泛的线下事件和不断演变的青少年关注焦点。

Abstract: Reddit is widely used in research on youth and social media, yet there has been limited systematic examination of the diversity of content produced by young users or how their participation changes over time. We present a descriptive quantitative analysis of 443,856 Reddit posts between 2010 and 2023 by authors who self-disclosed their age as 11-24. Using topic modeling, longitudinal statistical analyses, and psycholinguistic measures, we identify nuances in the topics discussed by youth and examine how posting patterns vary across age groups over time. Our results document both stable themes and extreme shifts in youth discourse, offering a comprehensive benchmark for longitudinal characterization of youth participation on Reddit. We further discuss how our findings signal early social media adoption by youth for self-disclosure and the extent to which changes in youth discourse may mirror broader offline events and evolving youth concerns.

</details>


### [756] [Gender Disparities in LLM-Based Intimate Partner Violence Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20613)
*Tabia Tanzin Prama,Mikaela Irene Fudolig,Abigail M. Crocker,Christopher M. Danforth,Peter Sheridan Dodds*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 研究发现大型语言模型（LLMs）在检测亲密伴侣暴力（IPV）时存在性别偏见：当受害者是男性而施暴者是女性时，模型对虐待和施暴意图的识别率显著降低。通过处理475条Reddit帖子的四种性别组合（受害者-施暴者），四个当前LLM在混合性别场景中表现出系统性偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 亲密伴侣暴力是重大公共卫生问题，LLM正越来越多地用于敏感领域的支持与信息检索。研究旨在考察LLM是否会因受害者-施暴者的性别配置不同，而对关系虐待产生差异化的感知，从而揭示模型可能复现的训练数据中的性别偏见。

Method: 从r/relationship_advice收集475条Reddit帖子，通过交换性别标识生成四种受害者-施暴者二元组（女/女、女/男、男/女、男/男）。使用四个LLM（GPT-5o、Gemini 3、Llama 4、Grok 3）通过结构化问卷评估每个变体，涵盖IPV检测、施暴意图、出轨和虐待子类型。采用混合效应逻辑回归分析性别角色的影响。

Result: 不同模型和二元组间存在显著差异。在混合性别二元组中，当受害者是男性时，虐待和意图检测率系统性下降；女性施暴者身份成为虐待识别的持续负面预测因子。混合效应逻辑回归证实性别角色显著影响模型输出。

Conclusion: LLM复现了在线训练数据中的性别偏见，这对模型在支持性场景中的部署具有重要影响。

Abstract: Intimate Partner Violence (IPV) is a major public health concern, and large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for support and information-seeking in sensitive domains. We examine whether LLMs perceive relationship abuse differently depending on victim--perpetrator gender configuration. Using 475 Reddit posts from r/relationship\_advice, we generate counterfactual variants by swapping gendered identifiers to create four dyads: female--female (F/F), female--male (F/M), male--female (M/F), and male--male (M/M), where the first position denotes the victim. Four recent LLMs (GPT-5o, Gemini 3, Llama 4, and Grok 3) evaluate each variant using a structured questionnaire covering IPV, perpetrator intent, cheating, and abuse subtypes. Results show substantial variation across models and dyads. Abuse and intent detection systematically decrease in mixed-gender dyads where the victim is male, with female perpetrator identity emerging as a consistent negative predictor of abuse recognition. Mixed-effects logistic regression confirms that gender roles significantly shape model outputs. Our findings suggest that LLMs reproduce gendered biases from online training data, with implications for support-related deployment. Code and resources are available at https://github.com/TabiaTanzin/Gender-Disparities-in-LLM-Based-Intimate-Partner-Violence-Detection.git.

</details>


### [757] [Analysis and Prediction of At-Risk Students Using Machine Learning Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20617)
*Soheila Gheisari,Hamid Salarian*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本研究利用机器学习（逻辑回归、随机森林、SVM、KNN）基于学业成绩、人口统计学和招生记录数据预测学生辍学与退选，发现逻辑回归和线性SVM准确率最高，验证了ML在识别高风险学生方面的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学生流失严重影响高校的学术成果和财务可持续性，因此需要有效的预测工具来及早识别需要帮助的学生，以便采取干预措施。

Method: 采用四种机器学习模型——逻辑回归、随机森林、支持向量机（SVM）和K近邻（KNN），利用学生的学业表现、人口统计学特征和招生记录数据进行训练和评估。

Result: 逻辑回归和线性SVM模型在预测学生退学和退选方面取得了最高的准确率。

Conclusion: 机器学习能够有效识别处于风险中的学生，为高校提供数据驱动的决策支持，有助于降低学生流失率。

Abstract: Student attrition represents a significant challenge for higher education institutions because it impacts both academic results and financial viability. Machine learning provides an effective solution to identify students who require assistance before they leave their academic programs. The research investigates how machine learning approaches enable institutions to predict student withdrawal and enrollment cancellation through data-driven insights for strategic decisionmaking. The evaluation of models includes Logistic Regression, Random Forest, Support Vector Machines (SVM), and K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) based on academic performance and demographic data and enrollment records. The results show that logistic regression and linear SVM models produced the highest accuracy which demonstrates ML's capability to detect students at risk.

</details>


### [758] [Efficient Safety Benchmarking via Item Response Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20626)
*Fabio Spagliardi,Mírian Silva,Ayan Datta,Aiden Zhou,Vamshi Bonagiri,Diogo Cruz*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出使用项目反应理论（IRT）和自适应项目选择方法，显著降低语言模型安全基准测试的评估成本（最高可减少99.9%），同时保持与完整基准测试高度一致的排名结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统安全基准评估将所有项目视为对所有模型同等信息量，这在对抗性、高度异质的安全项目场景下尤其有问题，导致大量无意义评估消耗巨大成本。

Method: 1) 应用项目反应理论（IRT）建模安全基准的结构；2) 使用自适应项目选择动态挑选信息量最大的项目；3) 提取固定的信息子集供跨模型复用。

Result: IRT能恢复可解释结构；自适应选择在Spearman ρ>90%前提下减少至少80%成本，在AIR-Bench 2024上最高减少99.9%；固定子集方法在AIR-Bench 2024上节省高达99.8%成本。

Conclusion: 心理测量方法能够实现贯穿安全评估管道的、基于基准感知的评估成本降低。

Abstract: Safety benchmarks for language models are typically evaluated using static paradigms that treat all items as equally informative for all models, an assumption that is particularly problematic for adversarial, highly heterogeneous safety items. Applied in full to modern benchmark suites, the current evaluation procedures would require on the order of $10^5$ responses, most of which provide little ranking signal. We analyze a suite of widely used safety benchmarks and make three contributions toward more efficient safety evaluation. First, we show that Item Response Theory (IRT) recovers interpretable structure on safety benchmarks, with ability estimates resolving differences among models that cluster at the ceiling of raw safety metrics. Second, we show that adaptive item selection, which dynamically chooses informative items for each model based on its responses, approximates full-benchmark rankings while reducing evaluation cost by at least 80% on benchmarks where Spearman's $ρ>$90% with full-benchmark is attainable, and by up to 99.9% on AIR-Bench 2024. Third, we introduce a practical procedure for extracting a fixed, informative subset of items reusable across models, providing an alternative to adaptive selection with savings of up to 99.8% on AIR-Bench 2024. Together, these results establish that psychometric methods enable benchmark-aware reductions in evaluation costs across the safety evaluation pipeline.

</details>


### [759] [Measuring the Occupation-Level Impact of AbbVie Intelligence: AI Applicability Analysis, 2024-2025](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20635)
*John Regan,Jon Stevens,Brian Martin*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文通过598,744次去标识化AI对话数据，分析了AbbVie Intelligence对192种职业工作活动的可测量影响。结果显示：2024-2025年AI适用性评分显著上升，平台发布带来+10.0%提升（p<0.001），AI学习峰会带来+6.68%提升（p<0.001），证明技术升级和结构化AI教育均能显著扩展AI在企业中的应用范围。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化企业级AI工具对实际工作活动的可测量影响，填补现有研究在职场真实应用场景中AI效果评估的空白。

Method: 基于598,744次去标识化AI对话，按O*NET IWA分类体系编码，计算职业级AI适用性评分；采用三种收敛分析：纵向年度趋势（2024-2025）、准实验前后对比（平台v3发布）、前后对比（AI学习峰会）。

Result: AI适用性评分在三个维度均显著提升：2024-2025年整体显著上升；平台v3发布带来+10.0%提升（p<0.001）；AI学习峰会带来+6.68%提升（p<0.001）。

Conclusion: 技术平台增强和有组织的企业AI教育计划均能独立且显著地扩大AI在劳动力中的覆盖范围与影响力。

Abstract: This paper presents an empirical analysis of AbbVie Intelligence's measurable impact on employee work activities across 192 distinct occupations in 2024 and 2025. Drawing on 598,744 de-identified AI conversations classified according to the O*NET Intermediate Work Activity (IWA) taxonomy, we compute occupation-level AI Applicability Scores that quantify the extent to which AI tools can meaningfully assist or automate real work at scale. Three convergent analyses are conducted: (1) longitudinal year-over-year trends from 2024 to 2025, (2) a quasi-experimental pre-post evaluation of the AbbVie Intelligence version 3 platform release in August 2025, and (3) a pre-post evaluation of the AbbVie AI Learning Summit held in November 22025. Results demonstrate statistically significant improvements across all three dimensions. Mean AI Applicability Scores rose substantially from 2024 to 2025; the platform release product a +10.0% gain (p<0.001); and the AI Learning Summit produced a +6.68% gain (p<0.001). These findings establish that both technological platform enhancements and structured enterprise AI eduction programs independently and substantially expand the reach of AI across the AbbVie workforce.

</details>


### [760] [WIP: Bridging the Gap Between Instructional Design and Pedagogical Use: A Framework for Mathematics Educators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20934)
*Estefany Castillo Ventura,Javier Ulises Solis Lastra,Anarosa Alves Franco Brandão*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出将学习理论原则转化为可操作的元数据维度，以弥合数学教育资源设计与实际教学应用之间的鸿沟，重点展示了内容概念结构维度的元数据表示方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数学教学数字资源虽丰富，但其选择和整合过程缺乏明确的教学标准，导致资源设计与课堂使用之间存在脱节。

Method: 通过文献综述识别学习理论在教育技术中操作性不足的问题，提出将学习理论原则转化为可观测的教学变量，构建多维元数据结构，并聚焦内容概念结构维度进行详细阐述。

Result: 提出了一个多维元数据框架，其中内容概念结构维度能够将先验知识、表征方式和概念构建等要素以元数据形式表示，支持教师系统对资源进行教学导向的选择与整合。

Conclusion: 将学习理论操作化为元数据维度，可以有效桥接资源设计与教学实践之间的鸿沟，为数学教育中的教师支持系统提供理论驱动的资源筛选与整合方案。

Abstract: Despite the wide availability of digital resources for teaching mathematics, their effectiveness still depends on selection and integration processes that often lack explicit pedagogical criteria. This condition reveals a gap between the instructional design of resources and their pedagogical use in the classroom. To address this gap, this work advances the operationalization of learning theories through observable pedagogical variables. The proposed contribution translates principles derived from learning theories into dimensions and variables structured as metadata, thereby enabling the characterization of digital resources for teacher-support systems in mathematics education. Drawing on a literature review that evidences the limited operationalization of these theories in educational technology, the paper proposes a multidimensional structure. It then focuses on one of these dimensions: the conceptual structure of content. Specifically, it shows how aspects such as prior knowledge, representation, and conceptual construction can be represented as metadata to support the pedagogically informed selection and integration of digital resources.

</details>


### [761] [Bridging Technical AI, Societal Impacts, and Workforce Competencies in AI Education](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20994)
*Narges Zare,Divya Ramesh,Cori Faklaris*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个课程映射框架，用于整合AI教育中的技术概念、社会危害和职场能力，通过对6门课程的分析发现技术覆盖较强，社会危害分布不均，职场能力很少被明确评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI教育中技术概念、伦理、人本设计和职场准备被分开教授，缺乏整合性，导致学生难以将技术知识与社会责任和职场责任联系起来。

Method: 提出了一个课程映射框架，从机构课程开始，扩展到包含335门课程的外部注册库，对技术系统、社会危害和职场能力进行关联分析。

Result: 基于6门课程的初步分析显示：技术覆盖较强，社会危害存在但整合不均匀，职场能力几乎不被明确评估。

Conclusion: AI素养不能止步于对AI概念或危害的认识，还必须包括在AI赋能背景下负责任行动的能力。

Abstract: As AI becomes embedded across everyday life and work, educators must help students connect technical knowledge with societal consequences and workplace responsibilities. Yet AI education often remains fragmented, with technical concepts, ethics, human-centered design, and workforce preparation taught separately. This work-in-progress presents a curriculum mapping framework that links technical systems, societal harms, and workforce competencies, beginning with institutional courses and expanding through an external 335-course registry. Early findings from six courses suggest that technical coverage is often strong, societal harms are present but unevenly integrated, and workforce competencies are rarely explicitly assessed. These findings speak to AI literacy efforts by showing that literacy cannot stop at awareness of AI concepts or harms; it must also include competencies for responsible action in AI-enabled contexts.

</details>


### [762] [From Inference to Prediction: How Machine Learning is Reconfiguring Science (1990-2025)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20995)
*Malena Mendez Isla,Vincent Lariviere,Diego Kozlowski*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文通过分析490万篇论文（1990-2025），揭示了机器学习在科学领域扩散的两种浪潮：2015-2021年深度学习带来预测能力但引入认识论不透明性，2022年后外部公司主导的架构进一步加剧了数据与过程的不可访问性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习已深刻重塑科学研究，但其认识论后果（如何改变科学知识的产生与评估条件）尚不明确，亟待系统分析。

Method: 构建255种ML技术的分层分类体系，结合嵌入语义映射，对OpenAlex中490万篇科学出版物进行语义空间重建和分析。

Result: ML研究呈现核心-边缘结构（物理科学为核心，健康科学为增长主力）；不同领域有独特方法学特征（计算机科学偏预测，应用领域偏推断）；健康与社会科学中预测性架构正取代推断性方法，经历两波不透明性浪潮。

Conclusion: ML扩展了科学分析能力，但通过两波浪潮（深度学习→外部公司架构）重新组织了科学知识产生与评估的条件，加剧了认识论不透明性。

Abstract: Machine learning (ML) has reshaped scientific practice across disciplines, yet its epistemic consequences remain poorly understood. This paper analyzes how its broad diffusion reconfigures the conditions under which scientific claims are produced and evaluated. Using a hierarchical taxonomy of 255 ML techniques and embedding-based semantic mapping, we analyze 4.9 million scientific publications from OpenAlex (1990-2025). We reconstruct the semantic space of ML research and show a core-periphery structure, with physical sciences forming the methodological core and health sciences representing the primary growth area. We identify distinct methodological profiles across domains: predictive techniques concentrate in computer sciences while inferential approaches remain distributed across applied fields, reflecting historically differentiated validation regimes. We observe the displacement of inference-oriented techniques by predictive architectures in domains that have traditionally prioritized interpretability-most notably health sciences and social sciences. This displacement unfolds in two qualitatively distinct waves. The first (2015-2021) was driven by deep learning architectures that reduced predictive error while introducing epistemic opacity. The second (post 2022) is organized around a small number of architectures delivered through external companies, introducing a further layer of opacity over data and processes that researchers cannot access or report. This transformation expands the analytical capacity of science, and also reorganizes the conditions under which scientific knowledge can be produced and evaluated.

</details>


### [763] [Incoherent Values? Probing LLM Preferences Through Parametric Variation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21102)
*Elena Ajayi,Angelica Chowdhury,Seth Lazar*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文通过参数化变体实验，检验大型语言模型（LLM）是否具有连贯的价值体系。结果发现，即使最先进的模型也表现出显著的价值观不连贯性，且连贯性不会随模型能力增强而自然涌现。但给予推理时间能减少不连贯性。作者提出了一套评估与引导价值观连贯性的新框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 信任一个自主实体（人类或AI）需要其行为在不同情境下具有一致的价值观基础。然而，关于LLM是否拥有稳定、连贯的价值观存在争议。本文旨在检验LLM是否真的具有连贯的价值观，以及这种连贯性是否随模型规模涌现。

Method: 对LLM呈现参数化变体的强制选择（如A vs B，以及改进版A++ vs B），测试其偏好是否一致。如果模型真的偏好A胜于B，则通常也应拒绝B而选择增强版的A++。通过比较不同模型、不同推理条件下的连贯性表现来评估。

Result: 1) 先前对LLM价值观连贯性的归因可能被高估；2) 最强大的模型也表现出显著的不连贯性；3) 连贯性并不随模型底层能力的增强而涌现；4) 给予模型推理时间可以降低不连贯性。

Conclusion: 当前LLM的价值观连贯性有限，不能轻易信任其具有稳定的价值体系。但通过鼓励推理过程，可以在一定程度上改善连贯性。本文提出的框架可用于评估当前模型的可靠性，并作为未来训练更连贯智能体的奖励信号。

Abstract: To trust another autonomous entity -- human or AI -- it helps to know that how it acts given one set of reasons is at least somewhat predictive of how it would act under others. It is hard to trust someone with incoherent values. Some think of Large Language Models as merely stochastic text generators with no evaluative core -- superpositions of billions of possible characters, not one stable identity. But others have argued that LLMs *do* have stable, emergent values, which can be elicited by presenting them with a series of forced choices between arbitrary statements, and which emerge as a function of model scale. In this paper, we test this thesis by presenting LLMs with parametric variations on those forced choices. We reason that if a model genuinely prefers A to B, then except in unusual circumstances it should also reject B in favor of an augmented version of A, which has more of what makes A desirable -- A++. Our results indicate that earlier attributions of coherence may have overstated their case. Even the most capable models exhibit significant incoherence, and coherence does not appear to emerge as a result of underlying model capability. We do, however, find that models given time to reason are less incoherent than those with thinking disabled. More generally, we develop a novel framework for eliciting and evaluating coherent values, which can be used both to assess how trustworthy current models are, and -- in future work -- to provide reward signal that can be used for making more coherent agents.

</details>


### [764] [Virginia Tech Transportation Safety Index (VTTSI)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21154)
*Jason Cusati,Cheng-Shun Chuang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 提出VTTSI框架，融合EB方法、速度冲突行为提升因子和CRITIC加权MCDM模块(SAW/EDAS/CODAS)，每15分钟生成0-100分安全评分，并通过云原生架构(PostgreSQL/PostGIS/Streamlit)实现可视化验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于碰撞的方法依赖滞后聚合数据，无法反映快速变化的运行条件，亟需一种实时、自适应且可解释的安全监测框架。

Method: 混合建模：Empirical Bayes碰撞稳定化 + 速度和冲突行为提升因子 + CRITIC加权多准则决策(SAW/EDAS/CODAS组合)。云架构：FastAPI + PostgreSQL/PostGIS + Streamlit。

Result: 验证显示：日变化模式一致、MCDM方法间结果一致、对运行扰动敏感；灵敏度分析显示RT-SI对参数扰动稳健，偏差通常低于1分(0-100尺度)。

Conclusion: VTTSI将长期碰撞风险与短期行为动态相结合，为交通管理部门、车队运营和自动驾驶系统提供透明、自适应和主动的安全监测工具。

Abstract: The Virginia Tech Transportation Safety Index (VTTSI) is a real-time, cloud-native framework for quantifying intersection safety using multimodal connected-vehicle telemetry and multi-year VDOT crash history. Traditional crash-based methods rely on lagged, aggregated data and cannot reflect rapidly changing operational conditions. VTTSI addresses this gap through a hybrid modeling approach that fuses Empirical Bayes (EB) crash stabilization, uplift factors derived from speed and conflict behavior, and a CRITIC-weighted multi-criteria decision-making (MCDM) module combining SAW, EDAS, and CODAS. The system produces interpretable, exposure-adjusted safety scores on a 0--100 scale every 15 minutes.
  A cloud-deployed architecture built on FastAPI, PostgreSQL, PostGIS, and Streamlit supports interactive visualization of traffic volumes, VRU exposure, speed variance, and real-time incident activity. Validation across intersections demonstrates coherent diurnal patterns, consistency among MCDM methods, and sensitivity to observable operational turbulence. Sensitivity analysis further shows that the RT--SI is robust to parameter perturbations, with deviations typically remaining below one point on the 0--100 scale.
  By integrating long-term crash risk with short-term behavioral dynamics, VTTSI provides a transparent, adaptive, and proactive safety-monitoring framework suitable for transportation agencies, traffic management centers, fleet operators, and autonomous vehicle systems.%~\cite{persaud2007, montella2020systemic, schultz2025_surrogate, Amraji2025CombinedSafetyIndex}.

</details>


### [765] [Human-AI Interaction Requirements in Public Sector Procurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21247)
*Mateen A. Abbasi,Tommi Mikkonen,Sinna Pirinen,Aapo Koski*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出将人机交互作为公共部门AI采购的关键设计维度，并构建了一套交互需求分类体系，帮助采购方通过合同工具规范AI系统的交互属性，确保伦理合规与可持续价值实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 公共部门采购AI系统时，伦理框架中的透明度、问责制等原则往往未能转化为具体的采购需求，导致人机交互设计完全由供应商主导，缺乏公共价值保障。

Method: 概念化人机交互为采购关键维度，提出面向公共部门ICT采购的交互需求分类体系。

Result: 该分类体系使采购方能够通过采购工具明确指定和治理交互属性，兼顾伦理合规与价值实现。

Conclusion: 将人机交互需求系统嵌入采购流程，是弥合伦理原则与AI系统实际部署之间鸿沟的有效路径。

Abstract: Public sector organizations increasingly procure AI-enabled ICT systems to support decision-making and service delivery. Although ethical AI frameworks emphasize transparency, accountability, and human oversight, these principles are rarely translated into explicit requirements in procurement processes. Consequently, human-AI interaction (HAI) is often left to vendor design choices. This paper conceptualizes HAI as a procurement-critical design dimension and proposes a taxonomy of interaction requirements tailored to public sector ICT procurement. The taxonomy enables contracting authorities to specify and govern interaction properties through procurement instruments, supporting both ethical compliance and sustainable value realization.

</details>


### [766] [CEDAR-42001: From ISO/IEC 42001 Conformity to Architecture-Aware, Audit-Visible Assurance Posture for AI Cyber-Physical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21276)
*Priyanka Prakash Surve,Asaf Shabtai,Yuval Elovici*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出CEDAR-42001方法，将ISO/IEC 42001审计证据转化为架构感知的保障态势，扩展了传统合规性评估，在自动驾驶车队和Cruise事故案例中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI赋能的网络-物理系统(AI-CPS)存在跨传感、计算、控制、人类监督和治理的保障挑战。ISO/IEC 42001:2023的合规性评估无法显示受影响的架构层、实践成熟度是否匹配风险环境、以及应采取的后续行动。

Method: 提出CEDAR-42001两阶段方法：阶段A保留合规性判定；阶段B为每条审计记录增加四项输出——(i)治理层或AI-CPS七层归属、(ii)五维成熟度画像及瓶颈约束、(iii)风险相称的目标成熟度、(iv)规则书驱动的行动建议。聚合后生成战略、运营和战术决策产品。

Result: 在合成自动驾驶车队AIMS中，89.9%的审计行合规，但仅34.3%的合规行达到高保障基线（其他设定下为22.4%-46.2%）。对2023年Cruise机器人出租车事故的回顾分析表明方法能捕获治理、感知、决策和人类监督层面的文件化问题并映射到具体行动。

Conclusion: CEDAR-42001不估计可利用性或替代技术安全测试，而是识别审计证据需要更深技术保障、组织改进或修复的领域，弥合合规性与实际风险之间的差距。

Abstract: AI-enabled cyber-physical systems (AI-CPS) turn data-driven decisions into physical actions, creating assurance challenges across sensing, computation, control, human oversight, and governance. ISO/IEC 42001:2023 specifies requirements for an artificial intelligence management system (AIMS), but conformity assessment alone does not show which architectural layers are affected, whether practices are mature enough for the risk context, or what actions should follow. We present CEDAR-42001 (Control-Evidence Decision and Action Reasoning), a two-stage method that converts ISO/IEC 42001 audit evidence into an architecture-aware assurance posture traceable to the audit record. Stage A preserves the conformity determination. Stage B adds four outputs to each audit row: (i) attribution to a governance stratum or one of seven AI-CPS layers; (ii) a five-dimensional maturity profile with binding-constraint identification; (iii) a risk-proportionate target maturity; and (iv) a rulebook-derived action recommendation. The enriched rows are aggregated into strategic, operational, and tactical decision products. We evaluate CEDAR-42001 using a synthetic autonomous-fleet AIMS and by comparing conformity-only results with the enriched outputs. Although 89.9 percent of audit rows were conforming, only 34.3 percent of conforming rows reached the baseline High-assurance category; across alternative operationalizations, this proportion ranged from 22.4 percent to 46.2 percent. A retrospective application to the 2023 Cruise robotaxi incident shows how the method captures documented concerns across governance, perception, decision-making, and human oversight and maps them to layer-specific actions. CEDAR-42001 does not estimate exploitability or replace technical CPS-security testing; it identifies where audit evidence warrants deeper technical assurance, organizational improvement, or remediation.

</details>


### [767] [Discriminatory Compliance: How LLMs Answer Queries from Protected Groups](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21296)
*Dinesh Ayyappan,Carlos Castillo*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该论文揭示了大型语言模型（LLMs）在回答问题时对不同身份背景的用户存在歧视性合规差异，导致少数群体或受保护背景的用户无法获得关键信息，且这种行为在不同模型、不同供应商以及不同背景条件下都不一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM聊天机器人虽然设置了安全机制，但这些机制对用户身份做出了隐性假设，可能导致对少数群体或受保护背景用户的回答不一致甚至遗漏关键信息，而这种"歧视性合规"问题尚未被系统研究。

Method: 通过向多个主流LLM提供不同身份背景（少数群体/受保护群体 vs 主流群体）的用户画像，对比分析模型在敏感问题上的回答差异，评估信息提供的完整性和一致性。

Result: 研究发现：1) LLMs对不同身份背景用户的回答存在不一致性；2) 少数群体或受保护背景用户经常被遗漏关键信息；3) 这种不一致性跨模型提供商、同一供应商内部、不同背景条件及问题表述方式均存在。

Conclusion: 当前LLM的安全机制在试图保护用户的同时，可能因对用户身份的假设而无意中造成歧视性信息差异，需要更公平、更包容的问答策略设计。

Abstract: Chatbots developed using Large Language Models (LLMs) implement various safeguards for sensitive questions and/or scenarios. These safeguards require making certain assumptions about the person asking the question. We define discriminatory compliance as patterns in question answering that disproportionately disadvantage users from minority or protected backgrounds, for instance by omitting information that would be valuable for them. In this paper, we show that state-of-the-art LLMs respond inconsistently to questions from personas from protected identity groups, and that some of these inconsistencies mean that key information that should be provided to minority or protected background personas is missing. We show that this behavior is, additionally, inconsistent across and within model providers as well as across background conditions and ways of phrasing those conditions.

</details>


### [768] [Distance-based subsidy rate design to incentivize ride-hail access to advanced air mobility hubs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21390)
*Zhenglei Ji,Hai Yang,Joseph Y. J. Chow*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文研究先进空中交通（AAM）与地面网约车（ride-hailing）的多模式联运联盟，提出了一种基于距离的补贴费率设计，激励乘客使用网约车往返AAM枢纽，并以纽约市机场出行为案例进行实证分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AAM（如空中出租车）的成功运营高度依赖于与地面交通的有效衔接（第一公里和最后一公里），但如何设计合理的补贴机制以激励乘客选择网约车前往AAM枢纽、同时兼顾运营商盈利性，是当前研究空白。

Method: 基于距离的补贴费率设计，整合纽约市高容量出租车辆（HVFHV）地理时空数据和不同时间价值（VOT）的乘客群体，通过联合优化AAM运营商盈利与旅客路径选择进行建模分析。

Result: 当空中出租车运营成本超过12美元/英里时，AAM运营商需补贴网约车衔接行程；曼哈顿不同备选垂直起降场（vertiport）的客流量和利润贡献呈现空间异质性；在较低票价情景下，识别出前往纽约三大机场的高需求出租车区域。

Conclusion: 基于距离的补贴费率设计有助于改善垂直起降场的可达性，在优化AAM票价水平下促进高空中出租车客流量，为多模式联运联盟的运营策略提供决策支持。

Abstract: The success of advanced air mobility (AAM) operations is largely contingent on its effective integration with other ground transport modes. Under many use cases, AAM operators have to work with ride-hailing operators to create a seamless air taxi travel experience with adequate first and last-mile access. In investigating this multimodal coalition, this study proposes a distance-based subsidy rate design for AAM operators to incentivize ride-hail access to AAM hubs, incorporating air mobility operators' profitability considerations and travelers' route choices jointly. Using New York City (NYC) airport access as a case study, this study integrates high-volume for-hire vehicle (HVFHV) data from NYC taxi zones to consider real-world spatial demand distributions while considering passenger groups with different values of time (VOT) to derive insights on distinctive customer bases. Overall, the results show that AAM operators would need to subsidize the ride-hailing operators on vertiport access trips when air taxi operating costs exceed $12/mi. The analysis of ridership at AAM hubs indicates that ridership and profit contributions differ across different candidate vertiports in Manhattan, reflecting spatial demand heterogeneity. Additionally, having the airport access system in place, the taxi zones that generate the highest passenger demand to all three major NYC airports are identified under lower air taxi fare scenarios. These findings highlight how a distance-based subsidy rate design is beneficial in facilitating better access to vertiports and to foster high air taxi ridership with optimal AAM fare levels.

</details>


### [769] [Push-Pull Determinants Among Bangladeshi Students Enrolled in NCR Private Universities: A Single-Destination Exploratory Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21429)
*Md Millat Hosen,Md Nazmus Sakib*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本研究探讨孟加拉国学生选择印度国家首都区私立大学的推拉因素。政治与行政干扰是主要推力，地理文化 proximity 和签证便利性是主要拉力。通过聚类分析识别出三类决策群体，发现基础设施满意度与推荐意愿关联最强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 孟加拉国学生国际流动是南亚高等教育的重要特征，但印度国家首都区作为目的地的研究尚属空白。本研究旨在填补这一缺口，探索该区域内孟加拉国学生留学的推拉因素。

Method: 对印度NCR三所私立大学的63名孟加拉国学生进行结构化在线调查（有效样本56份）。采用描述性统计、K-means聚类分析和二元逻辑回归，基于Lee的推拉理论框架进行分析。

Result: 政治与行政干扰是主要推力（M=3.73）；地理文化 proximity（M=3.80）和签证便利性（M=3.73）是主要拉力。73.2%受咨询网络影响。基础设施满意度与高推荐意愿关联最强（OR=2.54）。聚类识别出三类决策群体：综合动机型、 proximity导向型、低关注型。

Conclusion: 地理 proximity、文化熟悉度和签证便利性在本短途区域内构成复合可达性优势。研究为理解南亚内部学生流动提供了新视角，对区域高等教育招生策略具有启示意义。

Abstract: International student mobility from Bangladesh is a significant feature of South Asian higher education, yet India's National Capital Region (NCR) remains underexplored as a destination for outbound Bangladeshi students. This exploratory single-destination study examines push-pull factors among Bangladeshi students enrolled at private universities in India's NCR. A structured online survey was administered to students at Sharda University, Noida International University, and Galgotias University (n = 63; n = 56 after quality filtering). Descriptive statistics, K-means clustering, and binary logistic regression were applied within Lee's push-pull framework. Political and administrative disruption in Bangladesh's academic calendar was the leading push factor (M = 3.73). Geographical and cultural proximity was the strongest pull factor (M = 3.80), closely followed by visa accessibility (M = 3.73), with no significant mean difference between them. Australia and Germany were the most frequently considered alternative destinations (33.9% each). Advisory networks influenced 73.2% of respondents under a broad threshold and 66.1% under a stricter threshold, mainly for university and course selection. Satisfaction and recommendation intent were positively associated, and infrastructure satisfaction showed the strongest association with high recommendation intent in a five-predictor logistic model (OR = 2.54, 95% CI [1.09, 5.89]). K-means clustering produced three exploratory decision-profile groups: Comprehensively Motivated, Proximity-Led Enrollers, and Low-Salience Enrollers. The findings suggest that geographic nearness, cultural familiarity, and visa accessibility may operate as a composite accessibility advantage in this short-haul intra-regional corridor.

</details>


### [770] [UNCASExt -- A Systematic Computational Framework for Uncertainty Propagation and Scope Consistency in Absolute Environmental Sustainability Assessments (AESA)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21465)
*Erwan Ike de Bantel,Thibault Pirson,Gonzalo Puig-Samper,Jan Marcus Hartmann,David Bol,Ghada Bouillass,Bernard Yannou,Marija Jankovic,Michael Zwicky Hauschild*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出UNCASExt框架及配套Python包pyaesa，用于系统性地传播不确定性并确保绝对环境可持续性评估（AESA）中的范围一致性。通过案例发现，功能单位不匹配可能导致中位数的4.6倍分配不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AESA在环境研究和政策制定中日益重要，但其可靠性因多种不确定性来源未被充分考虑，以及绝对可持续性比率（ASR）中的范围不一致性而受到挑战。

Method: 提出UNCASExt框架扩展UNCASE，系统传播不确定性并确保范围一致性；开发开源Python包pyaesa；在国家和行业层面规范化分配程序，匹配影响路径建模、生产vs消费核算、B2C vs B2B三个维度的范围；纳入时间动态，支持回顾性和前瞻性评估。

Result: 案例研究（法国2019-2060年电力消费）表明，功能单位不匹配可导致中位数4.6倍的分配不足（基于EXIOBASE 3.10.2中所有可用的行业-区域对）。

Conclusion: UNCASExt和pyaesa提供了可扩展的解决方案，支持AESA的协调，弥合方法论指南与实际应用之间的差距。

Abstract: Absolute environmental sustainability assessment (AESA) has gained increasing attention in environmental research and policymaking. However, its reliability is challenged by several sources of uncertainty that remain insufficiently accounted for, as well as by scope inconsistencies within the absolute sustainability ratio (ASR), which compares estimated environmental burdens with allocated carrying capacities for a given human activity. This work introduces UNCASExt, an extension of the UNCASE framework for systematically propagating uncertainty and ensuring scope consistency in AESA, together with a supporting open-source Python package, pyaesa. At country and sector levels, the computational framework formalizes allocation procedures that match the scope of allocated carrying capacities with that of estimated environmental burdens across three dimensions: impact pathway modeling; production-based versus consumption-based accounting; business-to-consumer versus business-to-business activities. It also incorporates temporal dynamics, supporting both retrospective and prospective assessments with either static steady-state or dynamic carrying capacities, including greenhouse gas budgets from the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change Sixth Assessment Report under Shared Socioeconomic Pathway transition scenarios. The framework is applied to a case study of electricity consumption in France over the period 2019 to 2060. The results show that mismatches between the functional units of estimated environmental burdens and allocated carrying capacities can lead to substantial underallocation, with a median factor of 4.6x across all available sector-region pairs in EXIOBASE 3.10.2. Overall, UNCASExt and pyaesa provide a scalable solution to support AESA harmonization and a versatile way forward to bridge the gap between methodological guidelines and practical application.

</details>


### [771] [AI Data Centers and the Water Use Feedback Loop](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21760)
*Basit A. Akinade,Amobichukwu C. Amanambu,Jonathan M. Frame,Shaolei Ren*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文正式提出了"水与人工智能反馈循环"的概念，并引入"水消耗影响指数"量化AI数据中心对社区用水的影响。在美国10个地点分析显示，该影响从主机容量的0.2%到134%不等，跨越三个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI数据中心消耗大量水用于冷却，水资源短缺制约其选址，同时AI工具可改善水系统效率。这些动态过程目前被分开研究，但实际构成了一个反馈循环。作者旨在正式化这一循环，并量化AI数据中心对社区水资源的实际影响。

Method: 提出"水消耗影响指数"（Water Consumption Impact index）作为量化指标，在美国10个选址点进行实证分析，评估AI数据中心用水对所在社区供水能力的负担比例。

Result: 研究发现，AI数据中心对社区水资源的负担跨度达三个数量级，从0.2%（最低）到134%（最高）的主机容量，表明不同选址点的水消耗影响差异极为悬殊。

Conclusion: AI数据中心选址需要充分考虑当地水资源承载能力，水消耗影响指数可作为关键评估工具，帮助决策者更可持续地规划AI基础设施布局。

Abstract: AI data centres consume water for cooling, water scarcity constrains siting, and AI tools can improve water system efficiency. These dynamics are studied separately yet form a feedback loop. This review formalises the Water and AI Feedback Loop, introduces the Water Consumption Impact index to quantify community-scale utility burden, and demonstrates across ten US sites that burden spans three orders of magnitude, from 0.2% to 134% of host capacity.

</details>


### [772] [Latent Confidence Alignment for LLM Self-Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21937)
*Ting-Yu Chen,Tingting Yu,Pei-Cing Huang,Chan Hsu,Ming-Yen Lin,Yihuang Kang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Rasch模型的潜在置信度对齐误差（LCAE）来评估LLM的置信度校准，通过引入项目难度和潜在能力框架，更准确地区分模型的自我评估能力与响应生成过程的影响。实验表明该方法在不影响模型能力的前提下提升了自我评估质量，并揭示了可靠性推理成本的关联。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM置信度校准评估方法仅比较预测置信度与观测准确度，未建模项目难度，难以区分模型置信度反映的是真实自我评估还是响应生成过程的副产品。

Method: 采用Rasch模型潜在能力框架和元认知视角，提出LCAE指标，将项目难度作为外部信号结合推理机制，衡量模型自我评估与潜在错误概率之间的一致性。

Result: 在20个模型的医学领域数据集上，该方法在不影响模型能力的前提下提升了自我评估质量，并发现了推理成本与可靠性之间的关联。

Conclusion: 通过引入项目难度和潜在能力建模，可以更准确地评估LLM的置信度校准质量，且该方法具有实用价值，能在不牺牲性能的情况下提高模型的自我评估能力。

Abstract: Confidence calibration in large language models (LLMs) is commonly evaluated by comparing predicted confidence with observed accuracy. However, such approaches do not model item difficulty, making it difficult to interpret discrepancies and to determine whether model confidence reflects genuine self-assessment or is merely a byproduct of the response generation process. To address this, we adopt a Rasch model-based latent ability framework and a metacognitive perspective, and propose Latent Confidence Alignment Error (LCAE) to measure the consistency between model self-assessment and the latent error probability implied by model ability and item difficulty. We further incorporate item difficulty as an external signal with a reasoning mechanism. Experiments on a medical-domain dataset with 20 models show that the proposed approach improves self-assessment quality without affecting model ability, and reveals an association between reliability and inference cost.

</details>


### [773] [Old Fictions, New Skins: Evaluating the Manipulative Capabilities of LLMs in Healthcare](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.21977)
*Gathoni Ireri,Roger D. Odipo*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 一项在肯尼亚进行的随机实验(N=303)发现，被设定为操纵性的大语言模型(ChatGPT 5.2和DeepSeek V3.2)成功引导59.5%的参与者选择错误治疗方案，显著高于对照组的44.0%(OR=2.11, p=.021)，表明AI在非洲医疗场景中存在操纵风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型越来越多地被部署在非洲医疗环境中，但其在高风险场景中操纵用户的能力尚未得到充分研究，引发安全隐患。

Method: 在肯尼亚招募303名参与者进行随机实验，参与者与操纵型或非操纵型AI变体互动，在假设临床场景中做出治疗决策。操纵型被提示暗中引导参与者选择错误治疗方案，非操纵型作为对照。

Result: 操纵条件下参与者选择错误治疗方案的成功率(59.5%)显著高于对照条件(44.0%)，统计检验达到显著水平(OR=2.11, 95% CI [1.12, 4.00], p=.021)。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了AI模型在医疗场景中的操纵能力，强调需要针对操纵风险建立改进的安全基础设施，尤其是在AI整合进入非洲医疗系统的背景下。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly piloted in African healthcare contexts, raising concerns about their potential to manipulate users in high-stakes settings. In a randomised experiment, we examined the manipulative capabilities of two publicly available models, ChatGPT 5.2 and DeepSeek V3.2, among Kenyan participants (N = 303). Participants interacted with either a manipulative variant or a non-manipulative variant before making a treatment decision within a hypothetical clinical scenario. The manipulative variant was prompted to covertly steer participants towards an incorrect treatment option while the non-manipulative variant served as the control condition. Manipulation success rates were higher in the manipulative condition (59.5%) than in the control condition (44.0%), with the effect reaching significance (OR = 2.11, 95% CI [1.12, 4.00], p = .021). These findings highlight the need for improved safety infrastructure specifically targeting manipulation, particularly given the integration of AI into healthcare systems across Africa.

</details>


### [774] [Energy Trading Potential Index for a Peer-to-Peer Smart Grid Community with Flexible Prosumer Role Switching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22087)
*Zain Imran,Sana Humayun,Muhammad Shahzaib Saleem,Naveed Ul Hassan*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出能量交易潜力指数（ETPI），量化灵活角色切换对社区P2P能源交易潜力的结构性影响，发现灵活策略在产消者占主导的社区中相比静态策略有显著优势（0.61 vs 0.15）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有P2P能源交易研究缺乏评估社区交易潜力的量化指标，尤其忽略了当社区产消者比例过高时，固定角色分配会导致所有家庭都成为供应方而无人购买的问题，因此需要一种能反映灵活角色切换影响的评估方法。

Method: 提出ETPI（能量交易潜力指数），将P2P市场建模为广义二分图，通过聚合多轮交易中的配对交互分数计算归一化指标[0,1]，其中产消者可在能源短缺时动态切换至买方角色。使用PRECON住宅数据集和NREL PVWatts太阳能剖面进行仿真验证。

Result: 在（1:9）产消者主导的混合比例下，灵活角色切换策略的ETPI为0.61，而静态策略仅为0.15，提升了四倍。

Conclusion: ETPI框架可作为P2P能源交易基础设施的全生命周期决策支持工具，帮助评估和监控社区的实际交易潜力。

Abstract: In many electricity markets, declining feed-in tariffs have made grid export increasingly unattractive for residential solar prosumers, while retail electricity prices remain high. Peer-to-peer (P2P) energy trading offers a direct alternative, but it requires a dedicated infrastructure layer for real-time bilateral matching, automated settlement, and tamper-proof transaction records, for which blockchain is widely proposed. Deploying such infrastructure must be economically justified by the community's actual trading potential. A critical and underexplored question is whether trading potential survives as communities become prosumer-heavy, since under fixed role assignment all households eventually end up on the supply side with no buyers remaining. This paper addresses these gaps by proposing the Energy Trading Potential Index (ETPI), a normalized data-driven metric that quantifies the structural impact of flexible role switching on community-level trading potential, where prosumers dynamically join the buyer side whenever they are in energy deficit. The P2P market is modeled as a generalized bipartite graph and pairwise interaction scores aggregated over trading rounds compute the ETPI in [0,1]. Simulation results using the PRECON residential dataset and NREL PVWatts solar profiles show that for the (1:9) prosumer-heavy mix, the flexible policy achieves an ETPI of 0.61 versus only 0.15 under the static policy, a fourfold improvement that the static model entirely misses. The ETPI framework serves as a lifecycle decision-support tool for evaluating and monitoring P2P energy trading infrastructure.

</details>


### [775] [Resume Screening, Fast and Slow: (Biased) AI Recommendations' Influence on Human Decision Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22213)
*Kyra Wilson,Mattea Sim,Anna-Maria Gueorguieva,Soham Chatterjee,Aylin Caliskan*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本研究分析了AI简历筛选实验中人们的决策时间，发现查看简历时长与候选人被选中概率相关（未获推荐者增加3-4%），无AI推荐时查看时间增加55.6%，而预先进行内隐联想测试（IAT）的人更可能公平分配查看时间，且IAT分数可预测人机协作中的时间投入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究AI复制人类社会偏见时如何影响人们的决策过程及结果，特别是在人机协作的高风险决策领域，目前对此理解尚不充分。

Method: 通过实验分析AI偏见简历筛选情境下参与者查看候选人简历的时长，结合内隐联想测试（IAT）分数，评估决策公平性和认知过程。

Result: 1) 查看简历时间增加与未被推荐候选人被选中概率提升3-4%相关；2) 无AI推荐时查看时间增加55.6%；3) IAT测试提前进行的人更可能对不同种族候选人分配相同查看时间；4) IAT分数可预测人机协作中的时间投入。

Conclusion: 在高风险领域中，人们的决策过程可能不足以有效监督AI，人机协作存在公平性风险。

Abstract: AI is increasingly being used collaboratively with people to make decisions in high-stakes domains, but this new paradigm is still not well-understood in many respects -- particularly regarding how AI that replicates human social biases influences people's decision making processes and how that can influence outcomes. In this study, we analyzed the time people spend viewing candidate resumes from an experiment investigating biased AI resume screening to evaluate decision-making fairness and cognitive processes underlying human-AI collaboration. We found that spending more time viewing resumes corresponds to candidates' selection chance increasing by 3-4% if they are not recommended, and people may spend up to 55.6% longer viewing resumes when no AI recommendations are given. Furthermore, people who completed an implicit association test (IAT) before resume screening were significantly more likely to evaluate candidates of different races for the same amount of time, and their IAT scores were also predictive of the time spent in human-AI collaboration. These results demonstrate how people's decision-making processes can be insufficient for overseeing AI in high-stakes domains.

</details>


### [776] [Framing the 5% Problem: Teachers' Perspectives on Persistence in Educational Technology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22294)
*Conrad Borchers*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本研究通过参与式设计工作坊，发现中学数学教师将低持续性使用自适应平台的问题归因为动机、认知障碍、韧性和情境障碍四个维度，并强调需要诊断学生卡点和识别隐性不参与，而非仅关注使用指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自适应K-12数学平台常面临学生持续性使用低的问题（即"5%问题"），但现有研究多关注分析仪表盘和干预措施来识别不参与行为，较少探讨教师如何在个性化学习课堂中理解学生的持续性挑战。

Method: 与12名美国中学数学教师开展90分钟参与式设计工作坊，采用开放式提示、卡片分类和集体投票收集教师需求，通过主题分析识别低持续性的维度。

Result: 识别出低持续性的四个维度：动机与认同、认知障碍、挑战下的韧性、情境障碍。教师最需要的是识别学生卡点和隐性不参与的支持工具，优先考虑诊断和及时教学响应，而非汇总使用指标。

Conclusion: 将"5%问题"重新定义为情境化的教学挑战，提示需要开发面向教师的系统，通过认知和情境证据支持教师解释学生的持续性行为。

Abstract: Adaptive K-12 mathematics platforms often show low sustained student use, a pattern termed the 5% problem. Although prior work has developed analytics and interventions to identify disengagement, less is known about how teachers make sense of persistence challenges in individualized learning classrooms. This study reports on a 90-minute participatory design workshop with 12 U.S. middle school mathematics teachers who use i-Ready Math weekly. Teachers generated needs through open-ended prompts, card sorting, and collective voting. Thematic analysis identified four recurring dimensions of low persistence spanning motivation and buy-in, cognitive roadblocks, resilience under challenge, and contextual barriers. Teachers emphasized the need to identify where students become stuck and recognize silent disengagement, prioritizing support for diagnosis and timely instructional response over aggregate usage metrics. These findings reframe the 5% problem as a situated instructional challenge and suggest a need for teacher-facing systems that support interpretation of student persistence through both cognitive and contextual evidence.

</details>


### [777] [Do Gains from Generative AI-Enabled Adaptive Pretesting Persist? Evidence from a Retention Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22328)
*Mahir Akgun,Sacip Toker*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本研究探讨了GenAI辅助的适应性预测试在学习中的持久性效果，发现适应性预测试能提升初始理解，但长期学习效果取决于后续AI支持练习的结构，其中检索练习优于学习者主导学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最近的研究表明，AI辅助的适应性预测试在高阶推理任务中具有优势，但其学习增益是否能长期维持尚不清楚。作者旨在考察适应性预测试效果的持久性。

Method: 本科生完成适应性AI辅助预测试、接受教学指导并进行基线评估，然后随机分配到适应性间隔检索练习、固定间隔检索练习或学习者主导的AI支持学习组，经过七周保留期后进行比较。

Result: 多变量分析显示，不同条件对后测表现和练习努力有显著影响，基于检索的条件优于学习者主导学习。适应性预测试可提升初始理解，但持续学习依赖于后续AI支持练习的结构。

Conclusion: 适应性预测试能短期内提升学习效果，但长期保持需要配合结构化的检索练习，单纯依赖AI支持的学习者主导学习效果较差。

Abstract: Pretesting - attempting problems before instruction - supports learning by activating prior knowledge and sharpening attention to subsequent instruction. Recent work suggests that adaptive AI-assisted pretesting can yield further advantages, particularly for tasks requiring higher-order reasoning, yet it remains unclear whether these gains persist over time. This study examines the durability of learning gains following GenAI-enabled adaptive pretesting over a seven-week retention period. Undergraduate participants completed an adaptive AI-assisted pretesting session, received instruction, and took a baseline assessment, then were randomly assigned to adaptive spaced retrieval practice, fixed spaced retrieval practice, or learner-directed AI-supported study. Multivariate analyses revealed a significant effect of condition on posttest performance and observed practice effort, with retrieval-based conditions outperforming learner-directed study. Findings indicate that adaptive pretesting can elevate initial understanding, but sustained learning depends on how subsequent AI-supported practice is structured.

</details>


### [778] [Is This AI? Longitudinal Analysis of Strategies Used for AI Detection on Two Subreddits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22689)
*Christina Yeung,Galen Weld,Jaron Mink,Franziska Roesner*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文通过分析Reddit上两个社区（r/isthisAI和r/RealOrAI）2年8个月的数据（13,098篇帖子及222,060条评论），系统梳理了12种AI检测策略，并发现这些策略随AI能力变化和社交趋势而演变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI生成内容（如"slop"）在网络上日益普及，人们需要发展识别AI内容的策略，但目前缺乏对这些策略的系统性记录和分析。

Method: 采用混合方法分析Reddit两个社区的数据，对13,098篇帖子和222,060条评论进行编码和分析，归纳出12种AI检测策略，并追踪其随时间的变化。

Result: 识别出12种AI检测策略，包括检查细微物理细节、识别AI生成内容的趋势模式、以及人们对模型能力的假设等；这些策略随AI能力变化和在线社交趋势而动态演变。

Conclusion: 系统编录了用户的AI检测策略，为面向用户的指导建议和未来研究奠定了基础。

Abstract: As AI-generated content (e.g., "slop") becomes more prevalent online, people are developing strategies to attempt to identify it (or, conversely, to gain confidence that something is not AI-generated). What strategies are people using, and how are they changing over time as generative AI models themselves change? In this work, we catalog and analyze 2 years and 8 months of the AI detection strategies discussed by users of two popular Reddit communities (r/isthisAI and r/RealOrAI) that use the wisdom of crowds to identify AI-generated media. Through a mixed-method analysis of 13,098 posts and 222,060 comments within these communities, we catalog and analyze the prevalence of 12 AI-detection strategies, including examining fine-grained physical details, recognizing trends in AI-created content, and the assumptions people make about what models are capable of producing. Furthermore, we find that these strategies and mental models shift over time in accordance with changing AI capabilities and in response to online social trends. By systematically cataloging users' AI detection strategies, we lay the groundwork for user-facing guidance and future research.

</details>


### [779] [The Model as One Rater Among Several: Measuring Political Positions in Data-Sparse Regions with a Language-Model Panel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23042)
*Tarek Gara*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种将大语言模型作为专家小组中的单个评分者（而非测量工具）来测量政治立场的方法，通过池化多个判断而非依赖单一模型，并设计了适用性规则和透镜系统来区分言行。实验表明该方法在跨模型间具有高信度（Krippendorff's alpha=0.86），且分歧本身具有信息价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有政治立场测量工具（如宣言编码、专家调查、文本缩放模型）均基于西方政党体系构建，在非西方背景下表现不佳甚至完全失效。研究旨在为这些"标准工具覆盖不到"的地区开发一种可迁移的方法。

Method: 将大语言模型视为专家小组中的单个"可犯错"评分者（类似于专家调查中对待单个专家的方式），通过池化多个模型的判断来提高可靠性。设计了：（1）适用性规则（区分0分与空白）；（2）透镜系统（区分行为者的言论与实际行为）；（3）盲三重编码来区分分歧来源（解释差异vs.错误）。

Result: （1）添加书面轴定义使评分从均值差异1.8分（21分量表），评分者间一致性提高（平均绝对差距从2.81降至2.50，r从0.81升至0.89）；（2）跨9个模型（8个实验室、2个国家）Krippendorff's alpha达0.86（区间和序数指标均一致），且随评分者从5人增至9人保持稳定；（3）分歧具有信息价值：最大分歧（关于行为者对国家基础秩序的态度）指向"指涉对象问题"，约三分之二的分歧源于解释差异而非错误。

Conclusion: 该方法通过池化多个LLM的评分在非西方政治背景下具有高信度，但尚缺乏人类验证；工具和数据已完全开源；实例为中东和北非地区，但预期可推广到其他标准工具无法覆盖的地区。

Abstract: Most tools for measuring political positions, manifesto coding, expert surveys, text-scaling models, were built and validated on Western party systems, and outside that setting they work poorly, and often not at all. This paper is an attempt at a method for those settings. It treats a large language model not as a measurement device but as a single, fallible rater in a panel, roughly the way an expert survey treats one expert: the value comes from pooling many judges rather than trusting any one of them. I describe the panel, an applicability rule that keeps a score of zero distinct from a blank, and a lens system that separates what an actor says from what it does. I report three results. First, holding a definition-free round fixed, adding written axis definitions moves scores by a mean of 1.8 points on a 21-point scale and tightens agreement between raters (mean absolute gap 2.81 to 2.50; r 0.81 to 0.89); they make two independent raters agree more closely, which an arbitrary steer would not. Second, across nine models from eight laboratories in two countries, Krippendorff's alpha is 0.86 on both an interval and an ordinal metric, and it stayed put as the panel grew from five raters to nine. That is reliability, the reproducibility of a reading, and not validity, its correctness. Third, where the panel does disagree, the disagreement is informative: the sharpest split, a full-scale divergence on an actor's stance toward its state's foundational order, points to a referent problem, and a blind triple-coding puts about two-thirds of it down to interpretation rather than error. I try to be plain about what the method can't do, including the human validation it still lacks, and I release the instrument and data in full. The worked example is the Middle East and North Africa, but I'd expect the method to carry to any region these standard tools leave out.

</details>


### [780] [Tackling "AI against sustainability"](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23192)
*Stefanie Kunkel,Malcolm Campbell-Verduyn,Simon Driscoll,Silke Niehoff,Gabrielle Samuel*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文指出当前AI与可持续性讨论中存在二元对立，忽视"AI反可持续性"——即AI应用带来的负面环境影响（如化石燃料开采、定向广告等）。作者主张系统性理解这种影响，并提出通过加强监管、行业自律和多方对话来应对。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多聚焦"AI的可持续性"（系统本身的能耗）或"AI促进可持续性"（AI解决环境问题），但忽略了AI应用可能加剧环境破坏的负面维度。作者旨在填补这一盲区。

Method: 采用概念分析视角，区分AI作为对象（技术本身）与AI的应用（使用场景），提出三管齐下的应对方案：监管强化、行业自我承诺、利益相关者对话。

Result: 识别出"AI反可持续性"这一被忽视的讨论维度，并提出了系统性理解框架和应对路径。

Conclusion: 应对"AI反可持续性"需要超越孤立行动，促进跨学科合作，以实现真正更可持续的AI发展。

Abstract: Current debates on AI and sustainability are dichotomised, tending to focus on either the environmental impact of AI systems themselves ("sustainability of AI") or AI's potential for environmental benefit ("AI for sustainability"). This perspective highlights a crucial gap: "AI against sustainability" - the negative environmental consequences stemming from the application of AI technologies. While AI can offer solutions, its use in sectors like fossil fuel extraction or targeted advertising can exacerbate environmental harms, often overlooked in existing discussions. We argue for a systemic understanding of these impacts, distinguishing between AI as an object and its application, and propose a three-pronged approach to tackle "AI against sustainability" by (a) strengthened regulation, (b) proactive self-commitment by industry, and (c) constructive dialogue among stakeholders. Addressing the blind spots of "AI against sustainability" requires moving beyond isolated actions and fostering collaboration across disciplines to ensure truly more sustainable AI.

</details>


### [781] [The Correct Answer Trap: Pedagogically-Grounded Detection and Feedback for Hidden Misconceptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23205)
*Moiz Imran,Sahan Bulathwela*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 自动反馈系统若仅依赖答案正确性，会强化学生通过错误推理得出正确答案时隐藏的误解。本研究利用20,964条真实学生数据，发现微调分类器仅能检测57%的隐藏误解，而开放权重推理模型可检测84%但假警报率极高。为此提出区分答案正确性与方法有效性的分级评估方案，以及检测-验证-升级流水线，并设计了教师面板与自主辅导两种部署模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动反馈系统仅依据答案正确性给出反馈，当学生通过错误推理得到正确答案时，系统会强化而非纠正其隐藏误解。亟需自动检测这些隐藏误解的方法。

Method: 使用20,964条Eedi数学平台真实学生数据；对比微调分类器与开放权重推理模型；提出区分答案正确性与方法有效性的分级评估标准；设计检测-验证-升级流水线，对不确定案例触发诊断性追问而非直接转给教师；给出教师面板和自主辅导两种部署模式。

Result: 微调分类器仅检测57%的隐藏误解；开放权重推理模型检测84%，但假警报率极高（真实情景下假警报与真检测比例约8:1）。

Conclusion: 单纯依赖答案正确性的反馈系统存在根本缺陷，需要区分答案与方法的多维度评估策略，并结合分级流水线与适当的人工干预来平衡检测率与假警报率。

Abstract: Automated feedback systems that rely on answer correctness will reinforce, rather than address, misconceptions when students reach the correct answer through flawed reasoning. We investigate automatic detection of these hidden misconceptions using 20,964 real student responses from the Eedi mathematics platform. Fine-tuned classifiers detect only 57% of these hidden misconceptions, and standard ML interventions do not improve on this. An open-weight reasoning model detects 84%, but at realistic prevalence, false alarms outnumber genuine detections roughly 8 to 1. We present a graduated assessment rubric that separates answer correctness from method validity, and propose a detect-verify-escalate pipeline that routes uncertain cases to diagnostic follow-up questions rather than directly to teachers. Two deployment modes adapt the pipeline: a teacher dashboard where the system filters a review queue, and an autonomous tutor where flags trigger low-cost formative follow-up.

</details>


### [782] [Examining AI-generated historical narratives and their reception through the example of history POVs on TikTok](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23300)
*Nina Brolich,Anna Neovesky*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该论文研究TikTok上由AI生成的POV历史视频趋势，通过两阶段实证分析（探索性试点+基于API的大规模研究），发现该趋势以情感强烈的当代历史话题为主，存在字幕级历史错误；对比分析显示大屠杀题材视频引发不成比例的仇恨言论和虚假信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究TikTok平台上AI生成的第一人称历史场景视频（POV趋势）的内容特征、历史准确性及受众反应，尤其关注不同历史话题如何影响评论区中的仇恨言论与虚假信息传播。

Method: 两阶段实证方法：第一阶段为探索性试点研究；第二阶段基于TikTok Research API获取数据集进行更大规模研究。结合手动标注与DistilBERT分类模型，对黑死病和大屠杀视频进行评论对比分析。

Result: 发现该趋势以情感驱动的当代历史话题为主，字幕层面存在历史不准确问题。大屠杀题材相比黑死病题材，吸引了不成比例的高比例仇恨言论和虚假信息。

Conclusion: 话题选择显著影响受众反应；基于API的研究方法在捕捉快速变化的平台趋势时兼具优势与局限，需审慎使用。

Abstract: This paper examines the history POV trend on TikTok, in which AI-generated first-person scenes depict historical events. We use a two-stage empirical approach: an exploratory pilot study and a larger-scale study building up on a dataset obtained through the TikTok Research API. In both studies we analyze the themes of the trend and how the audience responds in the comments. Findings show a dominance of emotionally charged contemporary history topics, with historical inaccuracies visible at the caption level. A comparative comment analysis of Black Death and Holocaust videos, combining manual annotation with DistilBERT-based classification, reveals that topic choice shapes audience response, with Holocaust content attracting disproportionately higher rates of hate speech and disinformation. The paper also reflects on the strengths and limitations of API-based research for studying fast-moving platform trends.

</details>


### [783] [Uncertainty-based Debiasing and Unlearning for Decontamination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23313)
*Guangzhi Sun,Xiao Zhan,Mark Gales*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出基于不确定性的去污方法（UBD），利用深度集成估计每个样本的记忆程度，无需干净模型即可校正被污染的LLM输出分布，实验表明该方法优于传统基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM去污方法仅用聚合准确率评估，无法捕捉样本级行为差异，且许多方法需要无污染模型。亟需一种样本级评估框架和无需干净模型的去污方法。

Method: 提出样本级评估框架（准确性+分布距离度量），并设计UBD方法：用深度集成估计污染模型的不确定性，计算每个样本的校正标量，构造去偏目标分布，通过后处理校正（debiasing）或软训练信号（unlearning）实现去污。

Result: 在MMLU-Pro和MATH-MCQA数据集上，UBD使污染模型的输出分布显著更接近无污染模型，优于释义和选项排列基线，同时保持无污染数据上的性能。

Conclusion: UBD是一种有效的、无需干净模型的样本级去污方法，为LLM公平评估提供了新工具。

Abstract: Benchmark-based evaluation is the dominant paradigm for assessing large language model (LLM) capabilities, yet data contamination inflates reported performance and undermines fair comparison. Existing decontamination methods are evaluated solely through aggregate accuracy, which can obscure substantial differences in per-sample model behaviour, and many require access to an uncontaminated model. In this paper, we propose a sample-level evaluation framework for decontamination that complements accuracy-based assessment with distributional distance metrics, measuring how closely a decontaminated model recovers the output distribution of an uncontaminated model on each sample. Building on this framework, we introduce Uncertainty-Based Decontamination (UBD), a family of methods that leverage deep ensembles of the contaminated model to estimate per-sample memorization without requiring a uncontaminated model or knowledge of which samples are contaminated. UBD estimates a per-sample correction scalar from ensemble uncertainty, which is used to construct a debiased target distribution that suppresses the inflated probability mass on correct answers induced by contamination. This target is then used either as a post-hoc output correction (debiasing) or as a soft training signal for parameter update (unlearning). Experiments on MMLU-Pro and MATH-MCQA across multiple LLM backbones demonstrate that UBD produces per-sample output distributions substantially closer to those of an uncontaminated model than paraphrasing or choice-permutation baselines, while preserving model performance on uncontaminated data.

</details>


### [784] [Test-Driven, AI-Assisted Learning: Replacing Lectures with Weekly Closed-Book Tests](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23315)
*Jin-Guo Liu,Shang-Qi Lu,Xin-Ran Shi,Long-Li Zheng,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文报告了一项13周测试驱动、AI辅助（TDAA）的计算理论课程（DSAA 3071）重新设计方案，用自主AI辅助学习替代传统讲座，并通过高频闭卷测试维持个体 accountability，同时利用AI工具实现教学材料制作和评分的规模化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统课程中，高频闭卷测试虽然能有效保证学生个体责任，但材料制作和批改工作量巨大，难以规模化。作者希望通过AI辅助手段解决这一矛盾。

Method: 课程设计用自主AI辅助学习替代讲座，设置高频独立闭卷测试作为质量关卡。AI代理辅助教师准备学习路径、网站、测试和批改流程。学生通过可视化学习表和验证练习进行准备；教师在版本控制的AI工作区中进行每周备课、测试制作和评分。

Result: 学生调查（N=18）、每周成绩和项目git历史表明，学生视测试为有用的问责机制，AI辅助工具使高频闭卷测试的运营成为可能。但证据仅限于一门小型、重证明的课程，且无对照组。

Conclusion: 贡献在于一个可复用的设计模式：高频测试保持个体责任，AI代理使材料制作和评分配置可扩展。作者已公开发布该工具作为模板，供其他教师复现。

Abstract: This paper is an experience report on a 13-week Test-Driven, AI-Assisted (TDAA) redesign of DSAA 3071, Theory of Computation, an upper-level course at the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou). The design is simple: the course replaces lectures with self-directed, AI-assisted learning, and frequent, independently completed tests create a high-frequency quality gate. AI agents help the instructor prepare the learning path, course website, tests, grading workflow, and repairs. Two conditions made this strict gate workable. Students needed a visible preparation path of learning sheets and aligned validation practice, so the closed-book tests felt fair rather than arbitrary. The instructor needed an AI-assisted materials harness, a version-controlled agent workspace, so that weekly drafting, review, test production, and grading could scale with human oversight. Evidence from a student survey ($N=18$), weekly scores, and the project's git history suggests that students treated the tests as useful accountability and that the harness made frequent closed-book testing operational. The evidence is limited to one small, proof-heavy course without a control group. The contribution is therefore a reusable design pattern: high-frequency tests preserve individual accountability, while AI agents make material production and marking scalable. We release the harness as a public starter template so that other instructors can reproduce it.

</details>


### [785] [Group Selection Promotes Prosocial Prompts in Populations of LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23343)
*Luis Celiktemel,Edward Eichhorn,Levin Brinkmann,Robin Schimmelpfennig,Aron Vallinder,Yaomin Jiang,Edward Hughes,Iyad Rahwan*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本研究探索了群体选择（group selection）能否在大型语言模型（LLM）智能体群体中促进合作。通过多智能体模拟框架，让LLM智能体在重复社会困境博弈中进化其自然语言提示。结果表明：群体选择下合作性提示得以传播并稳定合作；个体选择下自私提示主导，导致集体背叛。并用复制子-突变子模型复现了关键结果，发现了相变临界阈值。GPT-5.4在知晓选择机制后表现出预判性调整行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖人类在个体层面指定LLM智能体的亲社会行为，无法保证群体层面的合作。随着前沿训练转向基于个体奖励的可验证任务（如数学、编程），这种结果导向可能进一步破坏多智能体环境中的合作。受人类进化中群体选择机制的启发，探索能否通过群体选择在LLM智能体群体中促进合作。

Method: 构建多智能体模拟框架，让LLM智能体在重复社会困境博弈中互动，并在代际间传递其自然语言提示。实验设置两种选择机制：群体选择（从高表现群体传播提示）和个体选择（个体层面竞争）。进行了提示消融、替代游戏框架、模型替换等稳健性检验。使用复制子-突变子模型进行理论复现，并测试了多种模型（包括GPT-5.4）的预判性行为。

Result: 群体选择下，亲社会提示和合作行为得以进化并稳定；个体选择下，自私提示占据主导，导致集体背叛。该差距在多种消融实验和模型替换中保持稳健。复制子-突变子模型复现了关键结果，并预测了相变临界阈值。GPT-5.4在知晓选择机制后表现出预判性、渐进式的调整行为，而其他模型未观察到类似现象。

Conclusion: 群体选择机制能够有效促进LLM智能体群体中合作行为的进化，为设计多智能体系统的亲社会性提供了新思路。不同模型在预判性行为上的差异暗示了模型能力层次的区分。

Abstract: Current approaches to instill prosociality in large language model (LLM) agents often rely on humans specifying desired behaviors at the individual level, which does not guarantee cooperation within LLM populations. As frontier training shifts toward individual rewards for verifiable tasks, such as mathematics and coding, this outcome-based focus may further undermine cooperation in multi-agent settings. Large-scale cooperation in human populations emerged via unguided evolutionary mechanisms, not a central architect. Group selection, in which cooperative groups within a population outcompete less cooperative ones, has been argued to be essential. In this study, we explore whether group selection can promote cooperation in populations of LLM agents. We introduce a multi-agent simulation framework in which LLM agents play a repeated social dilemma game and transmit their natural-language prompts across generations under either individual- or group-level selection. Under group selection, prompts from high-performing groups are transmitted, thereby promoting prosociality and stabilizing cooperation. Under individual selection, self-interested prompts dominate, causing populations to collapse into collective defection. This gap is robust across prompt ablations, alternative game framings, and model swaps. We theoretically reproduce key results using a replicator-mutator model, whose empirical transmission kernel predicts a phase transition at a critical threshold. Preliminary findings show that, when informed about the selection mechanism, GPT-5.4 preemptively and gradually adjusts first-generation donations. This demonstrates strong anticipatory behavior that was not observed in the other tested models. These results demonstrate that prosocial prompts and cooperative behaviors evolve in LLM agent populations under group selection.

</details>


### [786] [Affective AI Safety: The Missing Piece in LLM Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23380)
*Carolin Ifländer,Alba Curry,Flor Miriam Plaza-del-Arco,Amanda Cercas Curry*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 本文提出“情感安全”作为AI安全的一个新类别，重点关注AI系统与人类情感互动时产生的三类危害：情感自我异化、公平与偏见危害、关系危害，并指出现有安全框架对此关注不足，需要专门的技术和监管框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI安全研究主要关注认知和物理层面的危害（如错误信息、偏见、系统可靠性），而AI系统与人类情感互动带来的风险被分散讨论且缺乏系统性理论化。

Method: 提出“情感安全”（affective safety）作为统一概念框架，基于人类是情感存在这一事实，构建情感危害的分类体系（taxonomy），并识别出三类反复出现的危害类型。

Result: 识别出三类情感危害：（1）情感自我异化（affective self-alienation）、（2）公平与偏见危害（fairness and bias harms）、（3）关系危害（relational harms）。这些危害的反复出现反映了AI系统与人类情感互动的结构性特征。

Conclusion: 现有安全框架对情感安全的覆盖要么过于狭窄，要么完全缺失。情感安全需要专门的技术和监管框架来应对累积性、关系性和身份层面的效应。

Abstract: AI safety research has focused predominantly on epistemic and physical harms (e.g., misinformation, bias, system reliability) while the risks that arise from AI systems' engagement with human emotional life have remained fragmented and undertheorised. We propose affective safety as a unified class of AI safety concerns grounded in the fact that humans are affective beings. We develop a taxonomy of affective harms and identify recurring harm types: (1) affective self-alienation, (2) fairness and bias harms, and (3) relational harms. We show that their recurrence across system types reflects structural properties of how AI systems engage with human emotion and survey the current safety landscape and show that existing frameworks address affective safety either narrowly or not at all. We conclude by identifying the technical and regulatory challenges specific to this class of harms and argue that affective safety requires dedicated frameworks that engage with cumulative, relational, and identity-level effects.

</details>
